SinoMed · 方药推理系统SinoMed · Formula Reasoning System
以《伤寒杂病论》为纲。搜一味药、一首方、一个症状，看它在升降出入的格局里如何推理成方。Search a herb, a formula, or a symptom — trace the reasoning through the qi-dynamic framework of the Shang Han Za Bing Lun.

类方导航 — 点击进入类别枢纽（成员方＋鉴别决策链）Formula Classes — tap a class hub
桂枝汤类Gui Zhi Class15
营卫天平向哪一侧倾斜 × 病势深入哪一层（表→胸→中→血脉→精关）
Class hub with member formulas and decision chains
麻黄剂Ma Huang Class14
麻黄开“出”之路开向何处（皮毛之汗 / 肺气之壅 / 肌表之水）× 兼何种内患（内热 / 内饮 / 阳虚 / 湿邪）
Class hub with member formulas and decision chains
柴胡剂Chai Hu Class7
枢机不利向哪个方向偏移——偏表（兼太阳）/ 偏里（兼阳明实）/ 偏虚寒（兼太阴）/ 偏神志（邪扰神明）/ 纯气郁（阳郁致厥）
Class hub with member formulas and decision chains
泻心·陷胸类Xie Xin / Xian Xiong9
心下之病按诊定性——满而不痛为痞（无形气塞，开之）/ 按之则痛为小结（痰热，清化之）/ 石硬拒按为大结（水热，峻攻之）；痞再按寒热虚实分五档
Class hub with member formulas and decision chains
承气·白虎·栀子豉Cheng Qi / Bai Hu / Zhi Zi Chi12
阳明之热以什么形态存在——郁于胸膈（无形最高位，宣之）/ 弥漫气分（无形而盛，清之）/ 结为燥屎（有形在腑，下之）；每一形态内部再分轻重缓急
Class hub with member formulas and decision chains
苓桂·四逆辈Ling Gui / Si Ni13
水与阳的跷跷板——水停在哪一层（胃 / 心下 / 脐下 / 膀胱 / 周身）× 阳虚到哪一步（中阳不足 → 肾阳虚衰 → 阳衰阴盛 → 阴盛格阳 → 阴阳并竭）
Class hub with member formulas and decision chains
杂病诸方Miscellaneous20
杂病不成一“类”，按病机圆心分五组——温里降浊 / 滋润填补 / 血分水分 / 神志不寐 / 清利湿热，每组内部再以变量多少定方之繁简
Class hub with member formulas and decision chains
桂林古本拓展篇Guilin Extension55
古本独有方五个层次——传经诸方 / 温病三张地图 / 六气犯五脏系列（暑热燥风各按脏定位，脉位+经络双重坐标）/ 湿之上下内外分诊 / 着痹三方；通行本对读为一贯正路
Class hub with member formulas and decision chains
📖 全部方剂索引📖 All formulas index
时方 · 法系 — 后世名方按经方血缘归宗，法系树卡展示演化脉络Later Formulas by Method Lineage
补气法系Qi-Tonifying Lineage7
一条主干三个岔口——虚（四君）→虚＋痰（六君）→虚＋痰＋滞（香砂六君）为主干；便溏久泻岔向参苓白术（渗涩），清阳下陷岔向补中益气（升举），心脾血伤岔向归脾（养神），卫表不固岔向玉屏风（固表）
Lineage hub with evolution tree and decision chains
地黄法系Dihuang Lineage7
一次减法开宗（肾气丸去桂附→六味），此后按三问分岔——火亢否（知柏）、病位在哪一窍（杞菊入目）、亏损多深（二至轻—六味中—左归重）、阴阳何方（左归育阴 / 右归益火）
Lineage hub with evolution tree and decision chains
和肝·平肝法系Liver-Harmonizing Lineage8
肝病三问定方——郁在气在血在火（气实径疏：柴胡疏肝／郁兼血虚脾弱：逍遥／化火：丹栀／犯胃吞酸：左金／乘脾痛泻：痛泻要方），亢与风到哪一档（阳亢未风：天麻钩藤／化风欲仆：镇肝熄风／风痰阻络：牵正），体亏否（体亏之燥痛出此法系、归一贯煎）
Lineage hub with evolution tree and decision chains
化痰法系Phlegm Lineage6
痰之三问——性质（湿痰白滑：二陈／痰热黄腻：温胆·黄连温胆）、去向（扰神不寐惊悸：温胆线／上冒作眩：半夏白术天麻／壅肺气逆：三子）、体质（虚人合六君、老人标实用三子）
Lineage hub with evolution tree and decision chains
逐瘀法系Blood-Stasis Lineage7
先认瘀（久痛·刺痛·定处·夜甚·舌暗脉涩五指纹），再问三事——瘀在哪（胸中血府：血府逐瘀／肢体经络：身痛逐瘀／心胃：丹参饮／胞宫：桃红四物）、气之虚实（气滞并重：血府／气虚为本：补阳还五）、要多大火力（最小对：失笑散／底盘：桃红四物／重装：诸逐瘀）
Lineage hub with evolution tree and decision chains
温病法系Wenbing Lineage7
一条时间轴定方——邪在卫（但咳轻：桑菊／热显咽痛：银翘）→邪退阴伤（肺胃：沙参麦冬／专胃不饥：益胃／肠燥便结：增液）→虚火上灼（咽喉：养阴清肺）；贯穿两条纪律：治上焦如羽（轻剂勿久煎）、存得一分津液便有一分生机
Lineage hub with evolution tree and decision chains
清利·痹证·安神Clearing / Bi / Shen13
三个小法系合卡——清利按“火湿之地”选方（肝胆经：龙胆泻肝／肠：芍药汤／膀胱：八正散／肺：泻白散／胃：清胃散·玉女煎／虚寒白浊反例：萆薢分清）；痹证按“病程×寒热”定位（邪盛：蠲痹／瘀阻：身痛逐瘀／正虚：独活寄生／湿热：宣痹）；安神按“虚之何在”分格（阴虚火扰：补心丹／气虚胆怯：定志丸／水火不交：交泰丸）
Lineage hub with evolution tree and decision chains
固摄·消导·调冲Consolidating / Digestive8
固摄支按“脱之何物何度”选方（定时之泻温固：四神／滑脱之泻涩固：真人养脏／尿频遗溺温摄：缩泉／阴阳两虚之冲任：二仙／产后瘀阻：生化）；消导支按“滞之轻重与兼夹”（食积平剂：保和／湿滞：平胃／寒湿表里同病：藿香正气）；总纪律一条——涩法消法皆治标，邪未净禁涩、积既去勿消
Lineage hub with evolution tree and decision chains
同类药选用 — 何种条件用哪味（补气·补血·活血·安神·理气·化痰·利水·解表·补阳·清热）Same-Class Herb Selection
补气药选用Qi-Tonics: Which One
同为补气，走向与兼能各异——救脱固里选人参、走表固卫升举选黄芪、平补清润守而不燥选党参、燥湿健脾选白术、补涩兼固选山药、和中缓急选甘草；“气虚”二字之下，先问兼夹（脱？表虚？津伤？湿？滑脱？）再落子
补血药选用Blood-Tonics: Which One
补血四主将各有偏性——熟地厚重填精血之本、当归补中有行兼调经、白芍敛阴柔肝止痛、阿胶滋阴兼止血；“血虚”之下先问：偏静补（地芍胶）还是需兼行（归）、有无出血（胶）、有无肝急疼痛（芍）
活血药选用Blood-Movers: Which One
活血按“力度与兼能”排谱——丹参凉血活血兼安神（缓）、桃仁红花逐瘀通经（中·破有形血块用桃、行血滞用红）、川芎血中气药兼行气祛风（上行头目）、五灵脂蒲黄专止瘀痛、益母草兼利水调经；先问：瘀之新久缓急？兼热（丹）兼气滞（芎）兼水（益母）兼痛（灵脂蒲黄）？
安神药选用Shen-Calmers: Which One
安神三路——养（枣仁柏仁补血养心之“虚烦”）、通（远志交通心肾之“不接”）、镇（龙骨牡蛎龙齿潜镇浮阳之“惊越”）；先问不寐之本：血不养神？心肾不交？阳浮神动？
理气药选用Qi-Movers: Which One
理气按“部位与力度”分工——陈皮中焦脾胃兼化痰（平）、木香脾肠之滞除后重（平）、香附肝郁调经之总司（平·女科）、枳实破气消痞（峻·实证）、厚朴行气除满兼降逆（下气）、乌药下焦寒凝、砂仁芳香化湿醒脾；先问：气滞在何部（中/肝/肠/下焦）？虚证宜芳缓、实证宜破降
化痰药选用Phlegm-Resolvers: Which One
化痰按痰之“寒热燥湿”分路——半夏燥湿痰之君（温燥）、贝母润燥热痰兼散结（凉润·川润浙泄）、竹茹清痰热除烦（凉）、瓜蒌润肺涤痰宽胸（甘寒·痰热结胸）、白芥子豁皮里膜外之痰（温·经络关节）；先辨痰性：白滑湿痰（夏）、黄黏热痰（茹贝蒌）、干黏燥痰（贝）、深伏膜外（芥）
利水药选用Water-Drainers: Which One
利水按“兼能”分工——茯苓利水兼健脾宁心（平·补中有利）、猪苓泽泻纯利力专（泽兼泄肾火）、滑石利窍兼清暑（寒）、薏苡仁渗湿兼健脾除痹排脓（缓·可久）、车前子利水兼清肝明目、防己行肌表经隧之水兼祛风湿；先问：利水兼补（苓）、纯利（猪泽）、兼热（滑车）、兼湿痹（薏己）
解表药选用Exterior-Releasers: Which One
解表按“寒热与力度”分——辛温：麻黄发汗平喘（峻·无汗表实）、桂枝解肌调营卫（缓·有汗表虚）、荆芥防风祛风之平和（寒热皆可）、苏叶白芷散寒兼专能；辛凉：薄荷桑叶轻宣风热；先辨表证寒热、有汗无汗、兼喘兼湿兼头痛
补阳药选用Yang-Tonics: Which One
补阳按“峻缓与兼能”分——附子肉桂回阳温里之峻（急·亡阳沉寒）、鹿角胶血肉填精之厚（虚劳精亏）、淫羊藿仙茅巴戟温肾壮阳（缓·痿弱）、杜仲菟丝子平补兼固（腰膝胎元）、补骨脂益智温脾肾固下（泻遗）；先问：回阳救急（附桂）？填精（鹿胶）？壮阳（三仙）？固摄（杜菟骨智）
清热药选用Heat-Clearers: Which One
清热按“热之性位”分四路——清气分（石膏知母·大热渴）、清脏火（黄连心胃/黄芩肺胆/黄柏下焦/栀子三焦·湿热火郁）、清热凉血（生地丹皮玄参·血分热）、清热解毒（金银花连翘·疮痈温毒）；先辨热在气分血分、在何脏、有无湿有无毒
经方药对精辨Classic Herb-Pair Distinctions
麻黄 · 桂枝 · 细辛Ma Huang / Gui Zhi / Xi Xin
同属辛温开“出”，开的层次不同——皮毛 / 肌腠血脉 / 深层伏寒
生姜 · 干姜Sheng Jiang / Gan Jiang
走与守——同源之姜，鲜者走散、干者守温
芍药之酸收 · 桂枝之辛散Shao Yao / Gui Zhi (Yin-Yang Pair)
一对阴阳砝码——出与入、散与收、卫与营
附子 · 干姜（附：肉桂）Fu Zi / Gan Jiang
温阳之部位与动静——下焦之根 / 中焦之轴
柴胡 · 黄芩Chai Hu / Huang Qin
枢机之治的两翼——外透其郁 vs 内清其热
枳实 · 厚朴Zhi Shi / Hou Po
降气药之点与面——破结之凿 vs 除满之刨
黄连 · 黄芩Huang Lian / Huang Qin
苦寒两兄弟的分工——心胃中焦之实火 vs 胆肺分野之郁热
石膏 · 知母（附：栀子）Shi Gao / Zhi Mu / Zhi Zi
清气分热的三张面孔——辛寒清透 / 苦润清滋 / 轻清宣泄
大黄 · 芒硝Da Huang / Mang Xiao
攻下二将的分工——推荡之力 vs 软坚之功
茯苓 · 猪苓 · 泽泻Fu Ling / Zhu Ling / Ze Xie
利水三将的性格——守中兼渗 / 专职纯渗 / 深入而泄
吴茱萸 · 干姜 · 附子Wu Zhu Yu / Gan Jiang / Fu Zi
温里三将的地界——肝之脏寒 / 中焦脾胃 / 少阴命门
当归 · 川芎 · 芍药Dang Gui / Chuan Xiong / Shao Yao
血家三味的分工——补而行 / 行而散 / 敛而柔

麻黄剂Ma Huang Class
麻黄汤Ma Huang TangMa Huang Tang无汗·恶寒发热

葛根加半夏汤Ge Gen Jia Ban Xia TangGe Gen Jia Ban Xia Tang表证无汗·呕逆
大青龙汤Da Qing Long TangDa Qing Long Tang不汗出而烦躁·发热恶寒身疼痛
小青龙汤Xiao Qing Long TangXiao Qing Long Tang咳喘痰稀白多沫·干呕
麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤Ma Xing Shi Gan TangMa Xing Shi Gan Tang喘咳气粗·汗出
麻黄细辛附子汤Ma Huang Xi Xin Fu Zi TangMa Huang Xi Xin Fu Zi Tang发热·脉沉
麻黄附子甘草汤Ma Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao TangMa Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao Tang少阴感寒二三日·无吐利等里证
麻黄杏仁薏苡甘草汤Ma Xing Yi Gan TangMa Xing Yi Gan Tang一身尽疼·发热日晡所剧
麻黄连轺赤小豆汤Ma Huang Lian Yao Chi Xiao Dou TangMa Huang Lian Yao Chi Xiao Dou Tang身黄·发热

生姜泻心汤Sheng Jiang Xie Xin TangSheng Jiang Xie Xin Tang心下痞硬·干噫食臭
甘草泻心汤Gan Cao Xie Xin TangGan Cao Xie Xin Tang下利日数十行、谷不化·心下痞硬而满

承气·白虎·栀子豉Cheng Qi / Bai Hu / Zhi Zi Chi

八正散Ba Zheng SanBa Zheng San尿频尿急、溺时涩痛·淋沥不畅、尿色浑赤
泻白散Xie Bai SanXie Bai San肺热咳喘·皮肤蒸热、日晡尤甚
清胃散Qing Wei SanQing Wei San牙痛牵引头脑、面颊发热·齿龈红肿溃烂或出血
玉女煎Yu Nv JianYu Nv Jian牙痛齿松、烦热干渴·头痛、齿龈出血（衄）
萆薢分清饮Bi Xie Fen Qing YinBi Xie Fen Qing Yin小便频数浑浊、白如米泔·凝如膏糊（膏淋、白浊）
独活寄生汤Du Huo Ji Sheng TangDu Huo Ji Sheng Tang痹证日久、腰膝冷痛·肢节屈伸不利、麻木不仁
蠲痹汤Juan Bi TangJuan Bi Tang肩项臂痛、举动艰难·风寒湿痹之上半身证
宣痹汤Xuan Bi TangXuan Bi Tang湿热痹：关节红肿灼热疼痛·痛处焮热、得凉稍舒
天王补心丹Tian Wang Bu Xin DanTian Wang Bu Xin Dan虚烦失眠、心悸神疲·健忘、梦遗
安神定志丸An Shen Ding Zhi WanAn Shen Ding Zhi Wan心胆气虚之惊悸·夜寐易惊、梦中惊跳
交泰丸Jiao Tai WanJiao Tai Wan心肾不交之失眠·心悸不宁、怔忡
固摄·消导·调冲Consolidating / Digestive
二仙汤Er Xian TangEr Xian Tang更年期综合征：烘热汗出与畏寒并见·头晕耳鸣、腰酸乏力
四神丸Si Shen WanSi Shen Wan五更泄泻（黎明前脐腹作痛、肠鸣即泻、泻后则安）·久泻不愈
真人养脏汤Zhen Ren Yang Zang TangZhen Ren Yang Zang Tang久泻久痢、滑脱不禁·甚则脱肛坠下
缩泉丸Suo Quan WanSuo Quan Wan小便频数·小儿遗尿
生化汤Sheng Hua TangSheng Hua Tang产后恶露不行或行而不畅·小腹冷痛
保和丸Bao He WanBao He Wan脘腹痞满胀痛·嗳腐吞酸、恶食呕逆
藿香正气散Huo Xiang Zheng Qi SanHuo Xiang Zheng Qi San外感风寒、内伤湿滞·恶寒发热、头痛
平胃散Ping Wei SanPing Wei San脘腹胀满·不思饮食、口淡无味

药物总索引All Herbs

English edition in progress.
标签说明：核心药＝经方体系中的重点药，条目为完整推理链深写（气机定位推理、功用机理、经典药对、类药鉴别）；常用药＝方中出现的次级药，条目为精简版（气机定位＋方中之职）。此分级指条目深度，与某方中的君臣佐使无关——每味药在具体方中的角色见该方“组成”卡片。

桂枝汤Gui Zhi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳中风，阳浮而阴弱，阳浮者热自发，阴弱者汗自出，啬啬恶寒，淅淅恶风，翕翕发热，鼻鸣干呕者，桂枝汤主之。（12）
方证抓手
汗出恶风发热脉浮缓鼻鸣干呕
气机病机
卫强营弱——风邪袭表，卫阳浮盛与邪相争（阳浮而热自发），卫失固摄之职，营阴不得内守而外泄（阴弱而汗自出）。病机核心不是“出”之不通，而是“出”之失序：该固摄的固摄不住。
辨证推理
同为表证，麻黄汤证是毛窍闭而无汗（出之不通），此证是毛窍疏而汗漏（出之失序）。有汗则不可再开表，故不用麻黄；卫已浮盛于外，故用桂枝温而和之、芍药收而敛之——一出一入之间把营卫重新配平。这就是“解肌”与“发汗”的分水岭。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝三两（9g）君
解肌祛风，温助卫阳之“出”
芍药三两（9g）臣
敛营和血，收外泄之阴使之“入”
生姜三两（9g）佐
助桂枝散邪，兼和胃止干呕
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补营血之源，为汗提供后勤
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
合桂枝化阳、合芍药化阴，居中调衡
桂芍等量对峙是本方之眼：桂枝助卫（出），芍药敛营（入），谁也不压倒谁，故曰“调和”。姜枣一辛一甘在第二层重复同一结构（姜助卫、枣补营），甘草居中为轴。服后啜热稀粥、温覆取微汗——借谷气为汗源，是方外之方。
加减
项背强几几（有汗）：葛根四两 → 桂枝加葛根汤
津不上布经输，加葛根升津柔筋
发汗遂漏不止、恶风、小便难、四肢微急：炮附子一枚 → 桂枝加附子汤
过汗伤卫阳之根，加附子固少阴以摄卫
下之后脉促胸满：去芍药 → 桂枝去芍药汤
胸阳被遏，芍药阴柔碍阳，去之
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方麻黄汤桂枝加附子汤小建中汤柴胡桂枝汤桂枝去桂加黄芩牡丹汤白虎加桂枝人参芍药汤黄芪桂枝茯苓细辛汤桂枝加葛根汤桂枝去芍药汤桂枝加桂汤桂枝加厚朴杏子汤当归四逆汤桂枝人参汤玉屏风散银翘散
禁忌与注意
太阳伤寒无汗表实者禁（当用麻黄汤）；酒客湿热内蕴者不宜（得甘则呕）；服桂枝汤吐者，其后必吐脓血。
Key Signs
sweatingaversion to windfeverfloating, moderate pulsenasal congestion, dry retching
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Defense strong, nutritive weak — wind assails the exterior; defensive yang floats and contends with the pathogen (yang floats, so fever arises of itself), yet fails in its duty of consolidation, and nutritive yin cannot hold within and leaks out (yin weak, so sweat issues of itself). The core pathomechanism is not that "exiting" is blocked but that "exiting" has lost its order: what should be held in is not held.
Pattern Reasoning
Both are exterior patterns, but the Ma Huang Tang pattern is closed pores without sweat (exiting blocked), while this is loosened pores with leaking sweat (exiting disordered). With sweat present, the exterior must not be opened again, so Ma Huang is not used; since defense already floats abundantly outward, Gui Zhi warms and harmonizes it while Shao Yao gathers and restrains it — rebalancing nutritive and defensive between one exit and one entry. This is the watershed between "releasing the flesh" and "promoting sweat."
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi9gSovereign
Shao Yao9gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The equal contest of Gui Zhi and Shao Yao is the axis: Gui Zhi supports defensive qi (exit), Shao Yao gathers nutritive qi (enter), neither overpowering — hence "harmonizing." Ginger and jujube repeat this structure on a second tier; Gan Cao is the pivot. Sipping hot rice-gruel and warm covering to raise a light sweat draws on grain-qi as the source of sweat.
Modifications
Nape-and-back stiffness (with sweat): Ge Gen four liang → Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang
Fluid not spreading up to the channel transport; add Ge Gen to raise fluid and soften the sinews
Sweating leaking incessantly, aversion to wind, difficult urination, slight tension of the four limbs: Blast-fried Fu Zi one piece → Gui Zhi Jia Fu Zi Tang
Excess sweat harms the root of defensive yang; add Fu Zi to consolidate Shao Yin and contain the defensive
Hurried pulse and chest fullness after purging: Remove Shao Yao → Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Tang
Chest yang hemmed in; Shao Yao's yin-soft hinders yang, so remove it
Cautions
Contraindicated in the Tai Yang cold-damage exterior-repletion pattern of no sweat (use Ma Huang Tang); unsuitable for the wine-drinker with internal damp-heat (sweetness makes them retch); if one retches on taking Gui Zhi Tang, one will later vomit pus and blood.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝加葛根汤Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，项背强几几，反汗出恶风者，桂枝加葛根汤主之。（14）
方证抓手
项背强几几汗出恶风
气机病机
桂枝汤证之营卫失和，兼太阳经输不利：邪阻经脉，津液不得升布于项背，筋脉失濡而拘紧。
辨证推理
抓手在“反汗出”三字：项背强几几本是葛根汤（无汗表实）的地面，今反有汗，知底证仍是中风表虚，故以桂枝汤为体、加葛根为用。一个“反”字教人先定表虚表实，再看兼证。
组成与组方逻辑
葛根四两（12g）君
升布津液，直濡项背经输
桂枝三两（9g）臣
解肌祛风
芍药三两（9g）臣
敛营，兼助葛根柔筋
生姜三两（9g）佐
助散
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补营
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
调和
葛根四两冠于方首且先煮，专任升津舒筋之职；余即桂枝汤原局。津上布则筋自柔，非用伸筋活络之品强解其强。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方葛根汤桂枝汤
禁忌与注意
无汗者非本方证，当用葛根汤。
Key Signs
stiffness and rigidity of the nape and backsweatingaversion to wind
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The nutritive-defensive disharmony of the Gui Zhi Tang pattern, plus inhibited Tai Yang channel transport: the pathogen obstructs the channels, fluid cannot ascend and spread to the nape and back, and the sinews, unmoistened, grow taut.
Pattern Reasoning
The handle lies in the words "conversely sweating": nape-and-back stiffness is properly the ground of Ge Gen Tang (no-sweat exterior excess); here there is instead sweat, telling us the underlying pattern is still wind-strike exterior deficiency. So Gui Zhi Tang serves as the body and Ge Gen as the function. The single word "conversely" teaches one to first settle exterior deficiency versus excess, then attend to the concurrent sign.
Composition & Logic
Ge Gen12gSovereign
Gui Zhi9gMinister
Shao Yao9gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Four liang of Ge Gen crown the formula and are boiled first, tasked solely with upbearing fluid and relaxing the sinews; the rest is the Gui Zhi Tang configuration. When fluid spreads upward the sinews soften of themselves — not forcibly releasing the stiffness with sinew-stretching herbs.
Cautions
Those without sweat do not have this pattern — use Ge Gen Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝加附子汤Gui Zhi Jia Fu Zi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，发汗，遂漏不止，其人恶风，小便难，四肢微急，难以屈伸者，桂枝加附子汤主之。（20）
方证抓手
汗漏不止恶风小便难四肢微急难以屈伸
气机病机
过汗伤阳，“出”门大开而无阳固摄：卫阳之根（少阴）已伤，故漏汗不止；津液从表尽泄，膀胱无津可化则小便难，筋脉无液可濡则四肢微急——一个漏口，三处告竭。
辨证推理
小便难与四肢急，初学者易另寻水道、筋脉之治，其实皆是漏汗一症之下游：源头堵住，下游自复。故方中不加一味利尿舒筋药，只加附子塞其漏——治病求本之典范。卫出下焦，固卫必温少阴，此附子所以为君。
组成与组方逻辑
附子一枚，炮（9g）君
温固少阴之阳以摄卫止漏
桂枝三两（9g）臣
解未尽之表，复卫之职
芍药三两（9g）臣
敛阴止汗
生姜三两（9g）佐
和卫
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
滋汗后之营
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
调和
桂枝汤原方续和营卫、解余邪，炮附子一枚直入少阴撑起固摄之权。芍药在此不减，敛阴之用正合止汗之需。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝汤桂枝去芍药加附子汤附子泻心汤
禁忌与注意
漏汗属阳明热迫津泄者（汗出而渴、脉洪）禁用。
Key Signs
incessant leaking sweataversion to winddifficult urinationslight tension of the limbs, hard to bend and stretch
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Excessive sweating harms yang; the "exit" gate flung wide with no yang to consolidate: the root of defensive yang (Shao Yin) is already damaged, so leaking sweat does not stop; fluid drains entirely from the exterior, the bladder has none to transform (difficult urination), and the sinews none to moisten (slight tension of the limbs) — one leak, three places running dry.
Pattern Reasoning
For difficult urination and tense limbs the beginner readily seeks separate treatments of the water passages and sinews, when in fact both are downstream of the single sign of leaking sweat: block the source and the downstream recovers of itself. So not one diuretic or sinew-relaxing herb is added, only Fu Zi to plug the leak — a paradigm of seeking the root. Defense issues from the lower burner; to consolidate defense one must warm Shao Yin, and this is why Fu Zi is sovereign.
Composition & Logic
Fu Zi9gSovereign
Gui Zhi9gMinister
Shao Yao9gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The original Gui Zhi Tang continues to harmonize nutritive and defensive and resolve residual pathogen; one piece of prepared Fu Zi enters Shao Yin directly to prop up the power of consolidation. Shao Yao is not reduced here — its yin-gathering use suits the need to stop sweating.
Cautions
Contraindicated for leaking sweat of the Yang Ming heat-forcing-fluid type (sweating with thirst, surging pulse).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝去芍药汤Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，下之后，脉促胸满者，桂枝去芍药汤主之。（21）
方证抓手
误下后胸满脉促表证仍在
气机病机
误下伤胸中阳气，表邪乘虚内陷胸膈，阳气被遏而不得展布——脉促是阳气奋起抗邪之象，胸满是阳郁不布之征。
辨证推理
去一味药即成新方，此仲景示人“药有阴阳”之处：芍药酸敛阴柔，营弱汗漏时是功臣，胸阳被遏时即成掣肘——敛阴之性恰碍阳气之伸展。去之，则全方纯辛甘化阳，专务通阳。读经方，减法与加法同等重要。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝三两（9g）君
温振胸阳，解表通阳
生姜三两（9g）臣
辛散助阳
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补中
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
辛甘化阳之基
桂枝甘草辛甘化阳为核，姜枣辅之，四味皆阳药，胸阳得温得散则满自除。
加减
兼微恶寒（阳伤更甚）：炮附子一枚 → 桂枝去芍药加附子汤
微恶寒示阳虚已露，非表邪之寒，加附子温之
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝汤桂枝去芍药加附子汤
禁忌与注意
胸满属痰热壅滞者非本方所宜。
Key Signs
chest fullness after mistaken purginghurried pulseexterior pattern still present
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Mistaken purging harms the chest yang; the exterior pathogen exploits the vacancy to sink into the chest and diaphragm, and yang is hemmed in and cannot spread — the hurried pulse is the image of yang rousing to resist, the chest fullness the sign of constrained yang failing to spread.
Pattern Reasoning
Removing one herb yields a new formula — here Zhang Ji shows that "herbs have yin and yang": Shao Yao, sour-gathering and yin-soft, is a meritorious minister when nutritive is weak and sweat leaks, but becomes a hindrance when chest yang is hemmed in — its yin-gathering nature obstructs the stretching of yang. Remove it, and the whole formula becomes purely acrid-sweet transforming yang, devoted to freeing yang. In reading the classics, subtraction matters as much as addition.
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi9gSovereign
Sheng Jiang9gMinister
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Gui Zhi and Gan Cao, acrid-sweet transforming yang, as the core, with ginger-jujube assisting — all four herbs are yang herbs; once the chest yang is warmed and dispersed, the fullness resolves of itself.
Modifications
With slight aversion to cold (yang harm more severe): Blast-fried Fu Zi one piece → Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Jia Fu Zi Tang
Slight aversion to cold shows yang deficiency emerging, not exterior-pathogen cold; add Fu Zi to warm it
Cautions
Chest fullness from phlegm-heat congestion is not suited to this formula.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝去芍药加附子汤Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Jia Fu Zi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
若微寒者，桂枝去芍药加附子汤主之。（22）
方证抓手
误下后胸满脉微恶寒
气机病机
较桂枝去芍药汤更进一层：阳伤已从“郁而不布”滑向“虚而不足”，微寒即其外露之端倪。
辨证推理
脉促胸满是阳气尚能奋争，加见微寒则奋争之力已馁。同一病势的两个刻度，用药只差一枚附子——经方的剂量刻度感即在此类对子中养成。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝三两（9g）君
通振胸阳
附子一枚，炮（9g）臣
温经扶阳，救误下所伤
生姜三两（9g）佐
辛散
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补中
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
化阳
纯阳之局再添附子，温通与温补并行。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝去芍药汤桂枝加附子汤
禁忌与注意
同前方。
Key Signs
chest fullness after mistaken purgingfaint pulseaversion to cold
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
One step deeper than Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Tang: the yang damage has slid from "constrained and not spreading" toward "deficient and insufficient," and slight cold is the first exposed hint of it.
Pattern Reasoning
Hurried pulse and chest fullness show yang still able to struggle; the added slight cold shows the strength to struggle already flagging. Two gradations on one disease course, the medicine differing by a single Fu Zi — the classicist's sense of dose-gradation is cultivated in just such pairs.
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi9gSovereign
Fu Zi9gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The pure-yang configuration with Fu Zi added — warm freeing and warm supplementing proceeding together.
Cautions
Same as the preceding formula.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝加桂汤Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
烧针令其汗，针处被寒，核起而赤者，必发奔豚，气从少腹上冲心者……与桂枝加桂汤，更加桂二两也。（117）
方证抓手
气从少腹上冲心（奔豚）发作欲死复还止烧针后针处核起而赤
气机病机
烧针迫汗，心阳随汗而泄；上焦阳虚，下焦寒气失于镇摄，乘虚上僭——升降失序中的“阴乘阳位”：当降者（下焦阴寒）反升。
辨证推理
奔豚上冲，见“冲”而用沉降镇坠是常人思路；仲景只把桂枝加二两——因为冲逆之根在心阳虚，不在气之实逆。温上则镇下，阳复则阴自安位。此方是“以温为降”的教学范本。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝五两（15g）君
重用以温心阳、平冲降逆
芍药三两（9g）臣
敛阴和营，制冲气之横
生姜三两（9g）佐
散寒
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补中
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
合桂化阳
原方不动，独桂枝由三两加至五两：量变引起功变，从解肌转为温心阳平冲。同一味药在不同剂量下走不同的道，此经方剂量学之要义。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝甘草汤桂枝汤苓桂枣甘汤
禁忌与注意
奔豚属肝郁化热上冲者（金匮奔豚汤证）禁此温法。
Key Signs
qi surging from the lower abdomen up to the heart (running-piglet)attacks feeling like dying then subsidingred raised nodule at the needle site after fire-needling
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Fire-needling forces sweat, and heart yang drains away with it; the upper burner yang being deficient, the lower-burner cold qi loses its restraint and surges upward into the vacancy — within the disordering of ascending and descending, a "yin usurping the yang position": what should descend (lower cold) instead ascends.
Pattern Reasoning
For running-piglet surging upward, to see "surge" and use heavy sinking settlers is the common line of thought; Zhang Ji merely adds two liang of Gui Zhi — because the root of the counterflow surge is heart-yang deficiency, not a repletion of counterflowing qi. Warm above and the below is settled; restore yang and yin returns to its place of itself. This formula is a teaching model of "descending by warming."
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi15gSovereign
Shao Yao9gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The original formula unchanged, only Gui Zhi raised from three liang to five: a change in dose brings a change in function, shifting from releasing the flesh to warming heart yang and calming surging. One herb travels different roads at different doses — the essence of classical dosimetry.
Cautions
Running-piglet from Liver-constraint transforming to heat and surging up (the Jin Gui Ben Tun Tang pattern) forbids this warming method.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝加芍药汤Gui Zhi Jia Shao Yao Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
本太阳病，医反下之，因尔腹满时痛者，属太阴也，桂枝加芍药汤主之。（279）
方证抓手
腹满时腹自痛误下之后
气机病机
误下伤脾，表邪内陷太阴，脾络气血不和而拘急——“时痛”者，气血乍通乍滞之象，虚中夹滞，未成实结。
辨证推理
与桂枝加桂汤互为镜像：彼加桂治阳虚上冲，此倍芍治阴络挛急。同一张底方，桂芍孰重决定方向朝阳朝阴——桂枝汤是一架天平，砝码移动即成新方。腹满时痛而非大实痛，故只倍芍不加大黄。
组成与组方逻辑
芍药六两（18g）君
倍用以和营缓急，直解腹中之痛
桂枝三两（9g）臣
温通阳气，领邪外出
生姜三两（9g）佐
温中
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补脾
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
合芍缓急
芍药加倍后，酸甘（芍草）之力压过辛甘（桂草），全方重心从表转里、从卫转营，遂为太阴和络之方。
加减
大实痛者：大黄二两 → 桂枝加大黄汤
滞已成实，加大黄导其壅
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方小建中汤桂枝加大黄汤
禁忌与注意
腹痛拒按、燥屎内结之阳明实痛非本方证。
Key Signs
abdominal fullnessintermittent spontaneous abdominal painafter mistaken purging
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Mistaken purging harms the Spleen; the exterior pathogen sinks into Tai Yin, and the Spleen collaterals' qi and blood, disharmonious, grow cramped — "intermittent pain" is the image of qi and blood now freely flowing, now stagnant, deficiency with stagnation, not yet formed into a repletion bind.
Pattern Reasoning
A mirror image of Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang: that one adds Gui Zhi to treat yang-deficiency upsurge, this doubles Shao Yao to treat yin-collateral cramping. On the same base formula, whether Gui Zhi or Shao Yao predominates decides the direction, toward yang or toward yin — Gui Zhi Tang is a balance-scale, and moving the weight makes a new formula. Abdominal fullness with intermittent pain, not great repletion pain, so Shao Yao is merely doubled without adding Da Huang.
Composition & Logic
Shao Yao18gSovereign
Gui Zhi9gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
With Shao Yao doubled, the sour-sweet power (Shao Yao–Gan Cao) overrides the acrid-sweet (Gui Zhi–Gan Cao); the formula's center of gravity shifts from exterior to interior, from defensive to nutritive, becoming a Tai Yin channel-harmonizing formula.
Modifications
Great repletion pain: Da Huang two liang → Gui Zhi Jia Da Huang Tang
Stagnation formed into repletion; add Da Huang to conduct the congestion
Cautions
Abdominal pain refusing pressure with dry stool bound within — a Yang Ming repletion pain — is not this pattern.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝加大黄汤Gui Zhi Jia Da Huang Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
大实痛者，桂枝加大黄汤主之。（279）
方证抓手
腹大实痛痛处拒按误下之后
气机病机
太阴气血不和进一步壅滞成实：络中之滞由“时痛”转“大实痛”，非导之不去。
辨证推理
太阴病而用大黄，初学多疑。关键在剂量与配伍：大黄仅二两，且坐在桂姜枣草的温托之中，泻的是络中壅滞而非胃肠燥屎——温药护其虚，黄泻其实，攻补之界在此一线。仲景自注“太阴为病脉弱，其人续自便利，设当行大黄芍药者宜减之”，剂量的可调性本身就是辨证的一部分。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝三两（9g）君
温通领邪
芍药六两（18g）臣
倍用和络缓急
大黄二两（6g）佐
泻络中壅实，导滞外出
生姜三两（9g）佐
温中护脾
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补脾
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
缓急
桂枝加芍药汤原局加大黄二两：和络之中通一条泄路。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝加芍药汤
禁忌与注意
脉弱便利者减大黄芍药；纯虚无滞者禁。
Key Signs
great replete abdominal painpain refusing pressureafter mistaken purging
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Tai Yin qi-blood disharmony stagnating further into repletion: the collateral stagnation turns from "intermittent pain" to "great repletion pain," removable only by conducting it out.
Pattern Reasoning
Using Da Huang in a Tai Yin disease puzzles the beginner. The key is dose and combination: Da Huang is only two liang, seated within the warm support of Gui Zhi, ginger, jujube and Gan Cao — draining the collateral stagnation, not dry stool in the gut. Warm herbs protect the deficiency, Da Huang drains the repletion; the border of attacking and supplementing is this fine line. Zhang Ji's own note — "in Tai Yin disease with a weak pulse and the person about to have spontaneous diarrhea, if Da Huang and Shao Yao are indicated they should be reduced" — makes dose-adjustability itself a part of pattern differentiation.
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi9gSovereign
Shao Yao18gMinister
Da Huang6gAssistant
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The Gui Zhi Jia Shao Yao Tang configuration with two liang of Da Huang added: opening one draining route within channel-harmonization.
Cautions
For weak pulse and loose stool reduce Da Huang and Shao Yao; contraindicated for pure deficiency without stagnation.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝加厚朴杏子汤Gui Zhi Jia Hou Po Xing Zi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
喘家作，桂枝汤加厚朴杏子佳。（18）喘而汗出者……（43）
方证抓手
发热汗出恶风咳喘素有喘疾复感风寒
气机病机
营卫不和于表，肺气壅逆于上：新感引动宿喘，表气不和则肺之宣降俱乱。
辨证推理
喘而有汗，与麻杏石甘汤之“汗出而喘”最易混：彼是里热壅肺（汗出因热迫、身无大寒），此是表虚宿喘（恶风脉缓、喘随感发）。定表里寒热在先，宣降之药在后——朴杏只是治标之佐，桂枝汤和表才是治本。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝三两（9g）君
解肌祛风治其表
芍药三两（9g）臣
敛营
厚朴二两（6g）佐
下气宽中平喘
杏仁五十枚（9g）佐
肃降肺气
生姜三两（9g）佐
助散
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补营
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
调和
桂枝汤主表，厚朴降胃平喘、杏仁降肺定逆——表解气降，喘自平。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤桂枝汤
禁忌与注意
喘属肺热（汗出而喘、无大热）者当用麻杏石甘，误用桂枝则助热。
Key Signs
fever, sweating, aversion to windcough and wheezingpre-existing wheezing disorder re-contracting wind-cold
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Nutritive and defensive disharmonious at the exterior, Lung qi congested and counterflowing above: a new contraction stirs up a chronic wheeze; when exterior qi is disharmonious the Lung's diffusion and descent are both deranged.
Pattern Reasoning
Wheezing with sweat is most easily confused with Ma Xing Shi Gan Tang's "sweating and wheezing": that is interior heat congesting the Lung (sweat from heat pressure, body without great cold), this is exterior-deficiency chronic wheeze (aversion to wind, moderate pulse, wheeze arising with contraction). Settle exterior-interior and cold-heat first, diffusing-descending herbs after — Hou Po and Xing Ren are only branch-treating assistants; Gui Zhi Tang harmonizing the exterior is the root treatment.
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi9gSovereign
Shao Yao9gMinister
Hou Po6gAssistant
Xing Ren9gAssistant
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Gui Zhi Tang governs the exterior; Hou Po directs down the stomach and calms wheezing, Xing Ren directs down the Lung and settles counterflow — exterior resolved and qi descended, the wheeze calms of itself.
Cautions
Wheeze from Lung heat (sweating with wheeze, no great heat) should take Ma Xing Shi Gan; mistaken Gui Zhi abets the heat.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤Gui Zhi Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang

金匮要略Jin Gui Yao Lue
原文
夫失精家，少腹弦急，阴头寒，目眩发落，脉极虚芤迟……男子失精，女子梦交，桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤主之。（金匮·血痹虚劳）
方证抓手
遗精滑泄梦交少腹弦急阴头寒目眩发落脉极虚芤迟
气机病机
阴阳两虚而失于交固：阳不摄阴则精滑于下，阴不敛阳则神浮于上（梦交目眩）——上浮下滑，中枢失衡，是“入”与“藏”的全面失守。
辨证推理
虚劳失精而不用峻补肾精之品，是本方大眼目：病位虽在精关，病机却在阴阳不相交固。桂枝汤调其阴阳使复交，龙牡镇其浮、固其滑——先复“交”再谈“补”，交则精自藏。凡遇滑脱之症，先问阴阳交固与否，勿见滑即涩。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝三两（9g）君
温通阳气，交通上下
芍药三两（9g）臣
敛营养阴
龙骨三两（9g）佐
镇摄浮阳、固涩精关
牡蛎三两（9g）佐
潜阳敛阴
生姜三两（9g）佐
和中
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补虚
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
调和
桂枝汤为体（燮理阴阳），龙牡为用（潜镇固涩），一动一静。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤小建中汤酸枣仁汤镇肝熄风汤安神定志丸
禁忌与注意
相火亢盛、湿热下扰之遗精禁用温法。
Key Signs
seminal emission and effluxdream intercoursetension of the lower abdomen with cold glansdizziness and hair lossextremely deficient, hollow, slow pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Dual deficiency of yin and yang failing to interlock: yang not restraining yin, so essence slips below; yin not gathering yang, so spirit floats above (dream intercourse, dizziness) — floating above, slipping below, the central pivot losing balance, a comprehensive collapse of "entering" and "storing."
Pattern Reasoning
That taxation seminal loss is treated without herbs that fiercely supplement Kidney essence is the great insight of this formula: though the location is the essence-gate, the pathomechanism is yin and yang failing to interlock. Gui Zhi Tang attunes yin and yang to interlock again, Long Gu and Mu Li subdue the floating and consolidate the slipping — restore the "interlock" first, then speak of "supplementing"; once interlocked, essence stores of itself. Whenever meeting efflux-desertion signs, first ask whether yin and yang interlock; do not astringe at the mere sight of slipping.
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi9gSovereign
Shao Yao9gMinister
Long Gu9gAssistant
Mu Li9gAssistant
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Gui Zhi Tang as the body (attuning yin and yang), Long Gu and Mu Li as the function (subduing and consolidating) — one moving, one still.
Cautions
Contraindicated for seminal emission from hyperactive ministerial fire and damp-heat harassing below.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝甘草汤Gui Zhi Gan Cao Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
发汗过多，其人叉手自冒心，心下悸，欲得按者，桂枝甘草汤主之。（64）
方证抓手
发汗过多后心下悸叉手自冒心欲得按
气机病机
汗为心之液，过汗则心阳随液外亡；心阳虚馁，鼓动无力而空悸——“欲得按”三字定虚实：虚者喜按。
辨证推理
两味药，顿服，是经方中温心阳的最小完整表达。凡学补心阳诸方（加龙牡、加桂、救逆汤），皆自此二味生发——先识核，再看核外添了什么、为何而添。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝四两（12g）君
入心温阳
甘草二两，炙（6g）臣
合桂辛甘化阳，兼缓悸动
桂枝四两独重，直趋心位；甘草伴之化阳。药简则力专，顿服则势聚。
加减
兼烦躁（火逆下之烧针后）：龙骨牡蛎各二两 → 桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤
阳虚而神浮，加龙牡镇之
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝加桂汤桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤芍药甘草汤栝楼薤白白酒汤
禁忌与注意
心悸属阴虚火旺、痰热扰心者禁。
Key Signs
palpitation below the heart after excessive sweatinghands crossed pressing over the heartdesiring pressure
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Sweat is the fluid of the Heart; excessive sweating lets heart yang expire outward with the fluid; heart yang deficient and feeble, its throbbing powerless — an empty palpitation. The three words "desiring pressure" settle deficiency versus repletion: the deficient welcome pressure.
Pattern Reasoning
Two herbs, taken at one draught, are the minimal complete expression of warming heart yang in the classics. All the formulas for supplementing heart yang (with Long-Mu added, with Gui added, Jiu Ni Tang) sprout from these two herbs — first recognize the core, then see what is added outside the core and why.
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi12gSovereign
Gan Cao6gMinister
Gui Zhi four liang alone weighted, driving straight to the heart position; Gan Cao accompanies to transform yang. Simple herbs concentrate the force, one draught gathers the momentum.
Modifications
With vexation-agitation (after fire-counterflow purging or fire-needling): Long Gu, Mu Li, two liang each → Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Yang deficient and the spirit floating; add Long Gu-Mu Li to subdue it
Cautions
Contraindicated for palpitation from yin-deficiency effulgent fire or phlegm-heat harassing the Heart.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
火逆下之，因烧针烦躁者，桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤主之。（118）
方证抓手
烦躁火逆误治之后心悸不安
气机病机
迭经火逆、误下、烧针，心阳虚而神气浮越不敛——虚阳不能自安其位，扰动为烦躁。虚性的“升”，根在“藏”之无力。
辨证推理
烦躁有虚实：实热之烦躁清之（栀子豉辈），此为误治后阳虚神浮之烦躁，清之则毙。鉴别眼在病史（迭经误治）与兼症（悸、脉虚）。温其阳、镇其浮，烦躁自宁——治烦躁而不用一味清心药。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝一两（3g）君
温复心阳
甘草二两，炙（6g）臣
化阳缓中
龙骨二两（6g）佐
镇敛浮越之神气
牡蛎二两（6g）佐
潜纳浮阳
桂草化阳为体，龙牡潜镇为用；桂枝仅一两，因阳浮于上不宜再助升散，微温即可。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝甘草汤桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤
禁忌与注意
实热烦躁禁用。
Key Signs
vexation and agitationafter mistaken fire-counterflow treatmentrestless palpitation
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
After repeated fire-counterflow, mistaken purging, and fire-needling, heart yang is deficient and the spirit-qi floats unrestrained — deficient yang unable to settle in its place, stirring into vexation and agitation. This deficient "ascending" is rooted in the powerlessness of "storing."
Pattern Reasoning
Vexation and agitation have deficiency and repletion forms: repletion-heat vexation is cleared (Zhi Zi Chi and kin); this is post-mistreatment yang-deficiency spirit-float vexation, which clearing would kill. The differentiating eye is in the history (repeated mistreatment) and concurrent signs (palpitation, deficient pulse). Warm the yang, subdue the floating, and the vexation quiets of itself — treating vexation without a single heart-clearing herb.
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi3gSovereign
Gan Cao6gMinister
Long Gu6gAssistant
Mu Li6gAssistant
Gui Zhi–Gan Cao transforming yang as the body, Long Gu–Mu Li subduing as the function; Gui Zhi only one liang, since yang floating above should not be further aided in upbearing dispersal — mild warming suffices.
Cautions
Contraindicated in repletion-heat agitation.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

小建中汤Xiao Jian Zhong Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒二三日，心中悸而烦者，小建中汤主之。（102）虚劳里急，悸，衄，腹中痛……小建中汤主之。（金匮·血痹虚劳）
方证抓手
腹中急痛（喜温喜按）心悸虚烦虚劳诸不足手足烦热咽干口燥
气机病机
中焦化源不足，气血阴阳俱馁而失于和：中者升降之轴、化源之地，中虚则上不能奉心（悸烦）、内不能濡络（里急腹痛）、阴阳两端俱见假象（或寒或热错杂）。
辨证推理
寒热错杂之虚象（手足烦热与里急冷痛并见）最迷惑人——若逐症用药则寒热互碍。仲景不治两端而独建中州：化源一复，气血自生，阴阳自归其位。“建中”二字是治法学上的大概念：与其调其乱，不如复其生乱之源。
组成与组方逻辑
饴糖一升（30g）君
甘温建中，缓急补虚
芍药六两（18g）臣
倍用和营缓急
桂枝三两（9g）佐
温阳化气
生姜三两（9g）佐
温中
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补脾
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
合饴芍酸甘化阴
桂枝加芍药汤再加饴糖一升，重心彻底移向甘缓建中：饴糖为君，酸甘（芍草饴）化阴之力主导，辛甘（桂姜）化阳辅之——阴阳双化而以滋化源为归。
加减
虚劳里急诸不足更甚：黄芪一两半
即黄芪建中汤，益气建中更进一层（后批入库）
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝加芍药汤桂枝汤桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤芍药甘草汤当归芍药散温经汤
禁忌与注意
呕家不可用建中（甜助壅）；中满湿盛者禁甘。
Key Signs
urgent abdominal pain (better with warmth and pressure)palpitation and deficiency vexationinsufficiencies of taxation-deficiencyvexing heat of palms and soles, dry throat and mouth
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Insufficiency of the middle transformation-source, with qi, blood, yin and yang all feeble and disharmonious: the middle is the axle of ascending-descending and the ground of transformation; when the middle is deficient, above it cannot serve the Heart (palpitation, vexation), within it cannot moisten the collaterals (urgent abdominal pain), and both ends of yin and yang show false appearances (cold and heat mixed).
Pattern Reasoning
The deficiency-appearance of mixed cold and heat (vexing heat of the palms alongside cold urgent abdominal pain) most misleads — if one medicates each symptom, cold and heat herbs obstruct each other. Zhang Ji treats neither end but builds the central region alone: once the transformation-source recovers, qi and blood arise of themselves and yin and yang return to their places. The two words "build the middle" are a large concept in therapeutics: rather than regulate the chaos, restore the source that generates the chaos.
Composition & Logic
Yi Tang30gSovereign
Shao Yao18gMinister
Gui Zhi9gAssistant
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Gui Zhi Jia Shao Yao Tang with one sheng of malt sugar added, the center of gravity shifting wholly toward sweet-moderating fortification of the center: malt sugar as sovereign, the sour-sweet (Shao Yao–Gan Cao–sugar) yin-transforming power leading, the acrid-sweet (Gui Zhi–ginger) yang-transforming power assisting — dual transformation of yin and yang returning to enriching the transformation source.
Modifications
Taxation with interior urgency and the various insufficiencies more severe: Huang Qi one-and-a-half liang
I.e. Huang Qi Jian Zhong Tang, boosting qi and building the middle a step further
Cautions
Retchers may not use Jian Zhong (sweetness abets congestion); contraindicated in middle fullness with damp exuberance (sweetness forbidden).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

当归四逆汤Dang Gui Si Ni Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
手足厥寒，脉细欲绝者，当归四逆汤主之。（351）
方证抓手
手足厥寒脉细欲绝素体血虚复感寒邪
气机病机
血虚寒凝，脉道不充不通：厥有多种，此厥之辨在脉——细欲绝者血虚脉空，非沉微欲绝之阳衰（四逆汤证）。血不充脉、寒凝其行，阳气虽在而无路达于四末。
辨证推理
同名“四逆”，与姜附剂天壤之别：四逆汤救的是“火将灭”（阳衰），本方通的是“路不通”（血虚寒滞）。故不用姜附之燥热（血虚忌燥），而以归芍养其血、桂辛温其经、通草利其道。厥证鉴别，脉象是第一抓手。
组成与组方逻辑
当归三两（9g）君
补血行血，充脉之空
桂枝三两（9g）臣
温经通阳
芍药三两（9g）臣
养血和营
细辛三两（3g）佐
温散深伏经脉之寒
通草二两（6g）佐
通利血脉
大枣二十五枚（8枚）佐
重用补营血之源
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
调和
桂枝汤去生姜（辛散走表非所需，且防燥血）、倍大枣（补血之源）、加归辛通草——底盘从“调营卫”改装为“温血脉”。
加减
内有久寒（沉寒痼冷在中）：吴茱萸、生姜
即当归四逆加吴茱萸生姜汤，兼温肝胃沉寒
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝汤四逆散当归四逆加人参附子汤桂枝当归汤四逆汤温经汤
禁忌与注意
阳衰阴盛之厥逆（脉沉微、下利清谷）当用四逆辈，误用本方则杯水车薪。
Key Signs
reversal cold of the hands and feetthin pulse verging on expiryblood-deficient constitution re-contracting cold pathogen
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Blood deficiency with cold congelation, the vessels neither filled nor free: reversal cold has many kinds, and this one is distinguished by the pulse — thin verging on expiry is blood-deficient empty vessels, not the deep-faint verging on expiry of yang collapse (the Si Ni Tang pattern). Blood not filling the vessels, cold congealing their flow, and yang qi, though present, has no route to reach the four extremities.
Pattern Reasoning
Sharing the name "Si Ni," it is worlds apart from the ginger-Fu Zi formulas: Si Ni Tang rescues "the fire about to go out" (yang collapse), this frees "the road blocked" (blood-deficient cold stasis). So the dry-hot ginger and Fu Zi are not used (blood deficiency shuns drying); instead Dang Gui and Shao Yao nourish the blood, Gui Zhi and Xi Xin warm the channels, Mu Tong frees the passages. In differentiating reversal patterns, the pulse is the first handle.
Composition & Logic
Dang Gui9gSovereign
Gui Zhi9gMinister
Shao Yao9gMinister
Xi Xin3gAssistant
Tong Cao6gAssistant
Da Zao8 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Gui Zhi Tang with fresh ginger removed (acrid dispersal to the exterior is not needed and would dry the blood), jujube doubled (the source of blood supplementation), and Dang Gui, Xi Xin, Mu Tong added — the base refitted from "harmonizing nutritive and defensive" to "warming the blood vessels."
Modifications
Longstanding internal cold (deep entrenched cold in the middle): Wu Zhu Yu, fresh ginger
I.e. Dang Gui Si Ni Jia Wu Zhu Yu Sheng Jiang Tang, also warming deep Liver-stomach cold
Cautions
Reversal cold of yang collapse with yin exuberance (deep faint pulse, clear-food diarrhea) needs the Si Ni class; mistaken use of this formula is a cup of water on a cartload of fire.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桂枝人参汤Gui Zhi Ren Shen Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，外证未除，而数下之，遂协热而利，利下不止，心下痞硬，表里不解者，桂枝人参汤主之。（163）
方证抓手
下利不止心下痞硬表证未解（发热恶寒）误下之后
气机病机
屡下伤中，脾阳虚陷而利下不止、虚气痞于心下；表邪犹恋——里虚寒与表邪并存，升降之轴（中焦）已塌而外门未闭。
辨证推理
“协热利”之“热”是表热，非里热——利下清稀、痞硬喜温喜按，皆里虚寒之征。若误认里热而清之，利更甚。表里同病而里虚者，理中为主、桂枝为辅：先撑起轴心，再顺手关门。本方即理中汤加桂枝，学者可由此入理中之门。
组成与组方逻辑
桂枝四两（12g）君
解散表邪（别煮后下，取其气锐走表）
干姜三两（9g）臣
温中焦之寒
人参三两（9g）臣
补中气之虚
白术三两（9g）佐
健脾止利
甘草四两，炙（12g）使
重用固中
理中汤（参姜术草）温建中州以止利消痞，加桂枝四两后下专走表分——一方两线，里七表三。
类方鉴别
桂枝汤类方桂枝汤理中丸藿香正气散
禁忌与注意
利属湿热（利下臭秽、肛门灼热）者禁温补。
Key Signs
incessant diarrheahard focal fullness below the heartexterior pattern unresolved (fever, aversion to cold)after mistaken purging
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Repeated purging harms the middle; Spleen yang deficient and sunken with incessant diarrhea and deficiency-qi focal fullness below the heart; the exterior pathogen still lingering — interior deficiency-cold and exterior pathogen coexisting, the axle of ascending-descending (middle burner) already collapsed while the outer gate is not yet closed.
Pattern Reasoning
The "heat" in "heat-complex diarrhea" is exterior heat, not interior heat — the clear thin diarrhea and hard focal fullness that welcomes warmth and pressure are all signs of interior deficiency-cold. Mistake it for interior heat and clear it, and the diarrhea worsens. In exterior-interior dual disease with interior deficiency, Li Zhong leads and Gui Zhi assists: first prop up the axle, then close the gate in passing. This formula is Li Zhong Tang plus Gui Zhi, by which the student may enter the gate of Li Zhong.
Composition & Logic
Gui Zhi12gSovereign
Gan Jiang9gMinister
Ren Shen9gMinister
Bai Zhu9gAssistant
Gan Cao12gEnvoy
Li Zhong Tang (ginseng, ginger, Bai Zhu, Gan Cao) warms and builds the central region to stop diarrhea and disperse focal fullness, with four liang of Gui Zhi added last to go specifically to the exterior — one formula, two lines, seven parts interior to three parts exterior.
Cautions
Contraindicated in damp-heat diarrhea (foul stool, burning anus) — do not warm and supplement.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麻黄汤Ma Huang Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，头痛发热，身疼腰痛，骨节疼痛，恶风，无汗而喘者，麻黄汤主之。（35）
方证抓手
无汗恶寒发热头身骨节疼痛脉浮紧喘
气机病机
寒主收引，束闭皮毛：“出”之路彻底关闭。卫阳郁而发热，营阴滞而身痛，肺合皮毛，表闭则肺气无从宣泄而上逆为喘——一个“闭”字贯穿全部见症。
辨证推理
八症归一机：无汗定“闭”，脉紧定“寒”，身痛定“营滞”，喘定“肺壅”——全是同一扇门关死的连锁反应。故治法只一个动作：开门（发汗）。门开则热退痛止喘平，不需退热药、止痛药、平喘药各来一味。这是经方“抓病机不追症状”的第一课。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄三两（9g）君
开毛窍之闭，发汗散寒
桂枝二两（6g）臣
温经助汗，透营达卫
杏仁七十枚（9g）佐
降肺气以平喘，佐麻黄一宣一降
甘草一两，炙（3g）使
缓峻护中
麻桂相须，发汗之力倍增；杏仁在宣散大军中独任肃降，防肺气宣而不收；甘草缓峻。药仅四味而升降开阖之局全。
加减
项背强几几无汗恶风：葛根、芍药、姜枣（麻黄减量） → 葛根汤
经输不利，转用葛根汤
不汗出而烦躁（内已郁热）：石膏、姜枣（麻黄加倍） → 大青龙汤
外寒内热，转大青龙
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方桂枝汤大青龙汤葛根汤小青龙汤麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤麻黄细辛附子汤麻黄杏仁薏苡甘草汤麻黄连轺赤小豆汤银翘散
禁忌与注意
疮家、衄家、亡血家、汗家、淋家及尺中脉微迟者，皆不可发汗；有汗恶风之表虚证禁用。
Key Signs
absence of sweatingaversion to cold with feverheadache and generalized body/joint painfloating, tight pulsewheezing
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Cold governs contraction, binding the skin and hair shut: the road of "exiting" is completely closed. Defensive yang, constrained, gives fever; nutritive yin, stagnant, gives body pain; the Lung pairs with the skin and hair, so when the exterior is shut, Lung qi has no route to diffuse and counterflows upward into wheezing — the single word "shut" runs through every sign.
Pattern Reasoning
Eight signs reduce to one mechanism: no sweat settles "shut," tight pulse settles "cold," body pain settles "nutritive stasis," wheezing settles "Lung congestion" — all the chain reaction of one door slammed shut. So the method is a single action: open the door (promote sweat). With the door open, fever recedes, pain stops, wheezing calms, needing no separate fever-reducer, pain-reliever, or wheeze-calmer. This is the first lesson of the classics: grasp the mechanism, do not chase the symptoms.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang9gSovereign
Gui Zhi6gMinister
Xing Ren9gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
Ma Huang and Gui Zhi reinforce each other, doubling the sweating power; Xing Ren alone directs downward amid the diffusing troops, preventing Lung qi from dispersing without recovery; Gan Cao tempers the harshness. Four herbs, yet the whole ascending-descending, opening-closing structure is complete.
Modifications
Nape-and-back stiffness, no sweat, aversion to wind: Ge Gen, Shao Yao, ginger-jujube (Ma Huang reduced) → Ge Gen Tang
Channel transport inhibited — turn to Ge Gen Tang
No sweat with vexation and agitation (heat already constrained within): Shi Gao, ginger-jujube (Ma Huang doubled) → Da Qing Long Tang
Cold outside, heat inside — turn to Da Qing Long
Cautions
Those with chronic sores, chronic nosebleed, blood loss, chronic sweating, or strangury, and those with a faint slow chi pulse, may none be made to sweat; the exterior-deficiency pattern of sweating with aversion to wind is contraindicated.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

葛根汤Ge Gen Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，项背强几几，无汗恶风，葛根汤主之。（31）太阳与阳明合病者，必自下利，葛根汤主之。（32）
方证抓手
项背强几几无汗恶风或太阳阳明合病自下利
气机病机
表闭而经输不利：寒闭其表（无汗），太阳经气不利、津液不能上布项背（强几几）；若表邪内迫阳明，清气被逼下走则自利——同一个邪，向上则项强，向内则下利。
辨证推理
与桂枝加葛根汤只差有汗无汗一线：有汗用桂枝底盘，无汗用麻黄底盘（本方实为桂枝汤加麻葛）。而治下利尤见深意：利因清气被表邪内迫而下陷，故不用一味止泻药，只升清（葛根）解表（麻桂）——邪去清升，利不治自止。“逆流挽舟”之先声。
组成与组方逻辑
葛根四两（12g）君
升津舒经，兼升清止利
麻黄三两（9g）臣
开表发汗
桂枝二两（6g）臣
助汗解肌
芍药二两（6g）佐
敛营，制麻桂过散
生姜三两（9g）佐
助散
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补津之源
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
调和
葛根冠首先煮；麻桂开表而芍药敛之、枣草滋之——发中有收，因项背之强本缘津亏，不容过汗再夺其津。
加减
合病不下利但呕：半夏半升 → 葛根加半夏汤
邪迫于胃上逆，加半夏降之
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方桂枝加葛根汤麻黄汤葛根加半夏汤黄芩汤葛根黄芩黄连汤
禁忌与注意
有汗者禁（当用桂枝加葛根汤）。
Key Signs
stiffness and rigidity of the nape and backabsence of sweating, aversion to windor Tai Yang–Yang Ming combination disease with spontaneous diarrhea
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Exterior shut with inhibited channel transport: cold shuts the exterior (no sweat), Tai Yang channel qi is inhibited, and fluid cannot spread up to the nape and back (stiffness); if the exterior pathogen presses inward on Yang Ming, the clear qi is forced downward into diarrhea — one pathogen, upward giving nape stiffness, inward giving diarrhea.
Pattern Reasoning
It differs from Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang by the single line of sweat versus no sweat: with sweat use the Gui Zhi base, without sweat the Ma Huang base (this formula is in fact Gui Zhi Tang plus Ma Huang and Ge Gen). Its treatment of diarrhea shows special depth: the diarrhea comes from clear qi forced down by the exterior pathogen, so not one antidiarrheal is used — only raise the clear (Ge Gen) and resolve the exterior (Ma Huang, Gui Zhi); pathogen gone and clear qi risen, the diarrhea stops untreated. A forerunner of "hauling the boat against the current."
Composition & Logic
Ge Gen12gSovereign
Ma Huang9gMinister
Gui Zhi6gMinister
Shao Yao6gAssistant
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Ge Gen leads and is boiled first; Ma Huang and Gui Zhi open the exterior while Shao Yao restrains and jujube-Gan Cao enrich — dispersing with restraint, since the nape stiffness stems from fluid depletion and must not be further robbed by over-sweating.
Modifications
Joint disease without diarrhea but with retching: Ban Xia half a sheng → Ge Gen Jia Ban Xia Tang
Pathogen pressing the stomach counterflows up; add Ban Xia to descend it
Cautions
Contraindicated with sweating (use Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang instead).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

葛根加半夏汤Ge Gen Jia Ban Xia Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳与阳明合病，不下利但呕者，葛根加半夏汤主之。（33）
方证抓手
表证无汗呕逆太阳阳明合病
气机病机
同为表邪内迫阳明，气机被迫的方向不同：迫而下走则利（葛根汤证），迫而上逆则呕（本方证）——一邪两路，下利与呕是同一病机的镜像。
辨证推理
31、32、33三条连读是仲景的“一机多变”教学法：底证不变（表闭+迫阳明），变的只是被迫气机的走向，方随之只动一味药。读经方当成组读，不当成首背。
组成与组方逻辑
葛根四两（12g）君
升津解表
半夏半升，洗（9g）臣
降逆止呕
麻黄三两（9g）臣
开表
桂枝二两（6g）佐
助汗
芍药二两（6g）佐
敛营
生姜三两（9g）佐
散水止呕
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补中
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
调和
葛根汤原局加半夏，降上逆之胃气。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方葛根汤
禁忌与注意
同葛根汤。
Key Signs
exterior pattern with no sweatingretching and counterflowTai Yang–Yang Ming combination disease
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Likewise exterior pathogen pressing inward on Yang Ming, but the direction of the forced qi differs: forced downward gives diarrhea (the Ge Gen Tang pattern), forced upward gives retching (this pattern) — one pathogen, two roads; diarrhea and retching are mirror images of one mechanism.
Pattern Reasoning
Reading lines 31, 32, 33 together is Zhang Ji's "one mechanism, many variations" pedagogy: the base pattern is unchanged (exterior shut plus pressing Yang Ming), only the direction of the forced qi varies, and the formula accordingly moves but a single herb. The classics are to be read in sets, not memorized formula by formula.
Composition & Logic
Ge Gen12gSovereign
Ban Xia9gMinister
Ma Huang9gMinister
Gui Zhi6gAssistant
Shao Yao6gAssistant
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The Ge Gen Tang configuration with Ban Xia added to direct down the counterflowing stomach qi.
Cautions
Same as Ge Gen Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

大青龙汤Da Qing Long Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳中风，脉浮紧，发热恶寒，身疼痛，不汗出而烦躁者，大青龙汤主之。若脉微弱，汗出恶风者，不可服之，服之则厥逆，筋惕肉瞤，此为逆也。（38）
方证抓手
不汗出而烦躁发热恶寒身疼痛脉浮紧
气机病机
表闭至极而阳郁化热于内：门关得越死，屋里越燥——“不汗出而烦躁”六字，前四字言表闭，后二字言内热，外寒内热（寒包火）之格局全在其中。
辨证推理
烦躁是本方与麻黄汤的分水岭：麻黄汤证郁在表，此证郁已化热入内扰神。故麻黄倍至六两破其重闭，石膏一味清其内燔——一开一清，两线作战。条文后半“脉微弱汗出恶风者不可服”是仲景亲手写下的禁忌症与中毒反应（厥逆筋惕肉瞤），发汗峻剂之峻，当与其禁忌同学。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄六两（18g）君
倍量峻开表闭
桂枝二两（6g）臣
助汗
石膏如鸡子大（30g）臣
清透内郁之热
杏仁四十枚（6g）佐
降肺
生姜三两（9g）佐
助散
大枣十枚（3枚）佐
护中
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
缓峻
麻黄汤重其君，加石膏反佐其热，姜枣护其中——峻药必配护法，此配伍之德。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方麻黄汤小青龙汤麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤大青龙加附子汤越婢汤
禁忌与注意
脉微弱、汗出恶风者禁服；一服汗者停后服，汗多亡阳。
Key Signs
no sweating with vexation and agitationfever, aversion to cold, body painfloating tight pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Exterior shut to the extreme with constrained yang transforming into heat within: the tighter the door is shut, the drier the room — the six words "no sweat with vexation and agitation," the first four speaking exterior closure, the last two interior heat, contain the whole pattern of cold outside and heat inside (fire wrapped in cold).
Pattern Reasoning
Vexation and agitation are the watershed from Ma Huang Tang: the Ma Huang Tang pattern is constraint at the exterior, this pattern's constraint has already transformed into heat entering to disturb the spirit. So Ma Huang is doubled to six liang to break the heavy closure, and Shi Gao alone clears the interior blaze — one opening, one clearing, fighting on two lines. The latter half of the text, "for faint weak pulse with sweating and aversion to wind it may not be given," is the contraindication and toxic reaction (reversal cold, twitching sinews and flesh) written in Zhang Ji's own hand — the fierceness of a fierce sweating formula must be learned together with its prohibitions.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang18gSovereign
Gui Zhi6gMinister
Shi Gao30gMinister
Xing Ren6gAssistant
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao3 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Ma Huang Tang with its sovereign strengthened, Shi Gao added as counter-assistant against the heat, ginger-jujube to protect the center — harsh herbs must be paired with protection; therein lies the virtue of the combination.
Cautions
Contraindicated for faint weak pulse with sweating and aversion to wind; if one dose brings sweat, stop further doses — excessive sweating collapses yang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

小青龙汤Xiao Qing Long Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒表不解，心下有水气，干呕发热而咳，或渴，或利，或噎，或小便不利、少腹满，或喘者，小青龙汤主之。（40）
方证抓手
咳喘痰稀白多沫干呕发热恶寒无汗或渴或利或噎或小便不利
气机病机
外寒束表、内饮伏肺：寒饮（“心下有水气”）射肺则咳喘痰稀，犯胃则干呕；水饮流动不居，故或然症多达五种——皆水邪随气机乱窜之变局。
辨证推理
外寒内饮，单解表则饮不去，单化饮则表不开，且水饮遇寒药则凝、遇纯散则动——故立“姜辛味”结构：干姜细辛温而散之，五味子酸而收之，散收同炉，饮化而肺气不伤。五个或然症教人识水邪之善变：见症不同而病本同，加减各随其变而主结构不动。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄三两（9g）君
发汗解表，兼开肺发越水气
桂枝三两（9g）臣
助汗化气
干姜三两（9g）臣
温肺化饮
细辛三两（3g）臣
温散深伏之水寒
五味子半升（6g）佐
酸收肺气，防温散伤正
芍药三两（9g）佐
敛阴和营，制诸辛之燥
半夏半升，洗（9g）佐
降逆蠲饮
甘草三两，炙（9g）使
和中
麻桂解其外，姜辛味芍夏理其内；芍药五味之酸收嵌在群辛之中，是全方不燥不散之保险栓。
加减
渴者：去半夏加栝楼根
渴示饮已化燥之兆，去燥药加生津
喘者：去麻黄加杏仁
喘而正虚者避麻黄之散，取杏仁之降
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方大青龙汤麻黄汤射干麻黄汤杏苏散
禁忌与注意
阴虚干咳无痰、痰热黄稠者禁；温散之剂不可久服，饮去即当转方培本。
Key Signs
cough and wheezing with thin, white, frothy phlegmdry retchingfever, aversion to cold, no sweatingpossibly thirst, diarrhea, choking, or inhibited urination
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
External cold binding the exterior, internal rheum lurking in the Lung: cold rheum ("water qi below the heart") shooting into the Lung gives cough, wheeze, and thin phlegm; offending the stomach gives dry retching; water-rheum flows without fixed place, so the possible signs reach five in number — all variations of water pathogen careering about with the qi dynamic.
Pattern Reasoning
With external cold and internal rheum, resolving the exterior alone will not remove the rheum, transforming the rheum alone will not open the exterior; moreover water-rheum congeals with cold herbs and stirs with pure dispersal — so the "ginger–Xi Xin–Wu Wei Zi" structure is established: Gan Jiang and Xi Xin warm and disperse it, Wu Wei Zi sours and gathers it, dispersing and gathering in one crucible, the rheum transformed without harming Lung qi. The five possible signs teach one to recognize the mutability of water pathogen: the signs differ but the disease root is one; the modifications each follow the variation while the main structure stays fixed.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang9gSovereign
Gui Zhi9gMinister
Gan Jiang9gMinister
Xi Xin3gMinister
Wu Wei Zi6gAssistant
Shao Yao9gAssistant
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Gan Cao9gEnvoy
Ma Huang and Gui Zhi resolve the exterior; ginger, Xi Xin, Wu Wei Zi, Shao Yao and Ban Xia regulate the interior; the sourness of Shao Yao and Wu Wei Zi embedded among the acrid herbs is the safety catch keeping the whole formula from being too drying or dispersing.
Modifications
With thirst: Remove Ban Xia, add Gua Lou Gen
Thirst shows rheum transforming to dryness; remove the drying herb, add fluid-engendering
With wheeze: Remove Ma Huang, add Xing Ren
For wheeze with a deficient upright, avoid Ma Huang's dispersal, take Xing Ren's descent
Cautions
Contraindicated in yin-deficiency dry cough without phlegm and in phlegm-heat with yellow sticky sputum; a warm-dispersing formula must not be taken long — once the rheum is gone, turn to a root-cultivating formula.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤Ma Xing Shi Gan Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
发汗后，不可更行桂枝汤。汗出而喘，无大热者，可与麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤。（63）
方证抓手
喘咳气粗汗出身无大热（热壅于肺）口渴
气机病机
邪热壅肺，宣降俱废：热壅于肺则喘，热迫津泄则汗出；“无大热”非无热，是热不在表在肺里——体表反不显壮热。
辨证推理
“汗出而喘”四字与桂枝加厚朴杏子汤同符而病机相反：彼恶风脉缓属表虚，此汗出因热迫、喘声粗壮口渴属肺热。条文“不可更行桂枝汤”正是仲景在此立牌警告。石膏倍麻黄是本方魂魄：寒重于温，则麻黄发表之性被夺，独留宣肺之用——配伍改变药性走向的最著名范例。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄四两（12g）君
宣开肺郁（得石膏制则不发表）
石膏半斤（24g）臣
倍于麻黄，清肺中壅热
杏仁五十枚（9g）佐
降肺平喘
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
缓中
麻黄宣其闭，石膏清其热，杏仁降其逆，甘草和其中——宣、清、降三法共治一“壅”。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方麻黄汤大青龙汤桂枝加厚朴杏子汤白虎汤黄芩石膏杏子甘草汤黄连石膏半夏甘草汤桔梗甘草枳实芍药汤射干麻黄汤桑菊饮泻白散
禁忌与注意
风寒表实之无汗而喘（麻黄汤证）、表虚之汗出而喘（桂枝加朴杏证）均须严辨，误用互伤。
Key Signs
wheezing cough with coarse breathingsweatingno great heat on the body (heat congesting the Lung)thirst
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Pathogenic heat congesting the Lung, diffusion and descent both abolished: heat congesting the Lung gives wheeze, heat forcing fluid out gives sweat; "no great heat" is not no heat — the heat is not at the exterior but within the Lung, so the body surface shows no great fever.
Pattern Reasoning
The four words "sweating and wheezing" match Gui Zhi Jia Hou Po Xing Zi Tang yet the mechanism is opposite: that is aversion to wind with moderate pulse, exterior deficiency; this is sweat from heat pressure, coarse wheezing with thirst, Lung heat. The text's "do not further use Gui Zhi Tang" is Zhang Ji planting a warning post here. Shi Gao doubling Ma Huang is the soul of the formula: with cold outweighing warmth, Ma Huang's exterior-effusing nature is stripped away, leaving only its Lung-diffusing use — the most famous example of combination redirecting an herb's nature.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang12gSovereign
Shi Gao24gMinister
Xing Ren9gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Ma Huang diffuses the block, Shi Gao clears the heat, Xing Ren directs down the counterflow, Gan Cao harmonizes — diffusing, clearing, and descending jointly treat one congestion.
Cautions
The wind-cold exterior-repletion pattern of no sweat with wheeze (the Ma Huang Tang pattern) and the exterior-deficiency pattern of sweating with wheeze (the Gui Zhi Jia Po Xing pattern) must be strictly distinguished — mistaken use harms either way.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麻黄细辛附子汤Ma Huang Xi Xin Fu Zi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
少阴病，始得之，反发热，脉沉者，麻黄细辛附子汤主之。（301）
方证抓手
发热脉沉恶寒甚而蜷卧少阴体质初感外邪
气机病机
阳虚之体感寒，表里同病：“反发热”示表有邪，“脉沉”示里阳虚——发热本当脉浮，浮沉相“反”处正是病机交叉点。阳虚无力鼓邪外出，纯发汗则拔阳之根。
辨证推理
太阳篇发汗诸禁（尺中迟、脉微）在此得到正面解答：阳虚者非不可散，须温阳与散邪同行。附子守其内，麻黄开其外，细辛为表里之间的信使——三味药画出一条从少阴直通太阳的通道。凡遇体虚外感，此方是思维原型：先固本，再开门。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄二两（6g）君
开表散外寒
细辛二两（3g）臣
内起少阴、外透表寒，贯通表里
附子一枚，炮（9g）臣
温固少阴之本，托邪外出
三味等重之局：一表一里一枢，缺一即塌。
加减
二三日无里证而证轻者：去细辛加炙甘草 → 麻黄附子甘草汤
势缓者以甘草易细辛，微发其汗
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方麻黄汤麻黄附子甘草汤大青龙加附子汤
禁忌与注意
纯少阴里证（下利清谷、脉微欲绝）禁发汗，当四逆辈救里。
Key Signs
feversunken pulsesevere aversion to cold with curled lyingShao Yin constitution newly struck by exterior pathogen
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
A yang-deficient body contracts cold, exterior and interior both diseased: "conversely fever" shows a pathogen at the exterior, "deep pulse" shows interior yang deficiency — fever should give a floating pulse, and the "contrariety" of floating versus deep is precisely the crossing point of the mechanism. Yang deficient and unable to drum the pathogen outward; pure sweating would uproot the yang.
Pattern Reasoning
The sweating prohibitions of the Tai Yang chapter (slow chi pulse, faint pulse) receive here a positive answer: the yang-deficient may indeed be dispersed, but warming yang must go together with dispersing the pathogen. Fu Zi guards within, Ma Huang opens without, Xi Xin is the courier between exterior and interior — three herbs drawing a passage straight from Shao Yin through to Tai Yang. Whenever meeting exterior contraction in the deficient, this formula is the thought-prototype: secure the root first, then open the door.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang6gSovereign
Xi Xin3gMinister
Fu Zi9gMinister
A configuration of three herbs in equal weight: one exterior, one interior, one pivot — remove any and it collapses.
Modifications
After two or three days, no interior signs, the pattern mild: Remove Xi Xin, add honey-fried Gan Cao → Ma Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao Tang
For gentle momentum swap Xi Xin for Gan Cao, promoting a faint sweat
Cautions
For a pure Shao Yin interior pattern (clear-food diarrhea, faint pulse verging on expiry), sweating is contraindicated; rescue the interior with the Si Ni class.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麻黄附子甘草汤Ma Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
少阴病，得之二三日，麻黄附子甘草汤微发汗。以二三日无里证，故微发汗也。（302）
方证抓手
少阴感寒二三日无吐利等里证恶寒微热
气机病机
与麻辛附同一格局而势缓：日数稍久、里证未起，正邪相持不急。
辨证推理
细辛与甘草一字之易，是“峻”与“缓”的刻度：势急者用细辛直透，势缓者以甘草缓其发散——同一病机上的两档火力。经方的严谨在于连“微发汗”三字都有专方承担。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄二两（6g）君
微开其表
附子一枚，炮（9g）臣
温少阴之阳
甘草二两，炙（6g）佐使
甘缓其汗势，护中
去细辛之透，添甘草之缓，发汗力降一档。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方麻黄细辛附子汤
禁忌与注意
同麻黄细辛附子汤。
Key Signs
Shao Yin cold contraction of two or three daysno interior signs such as vomiting or diarrheaaversion to cold with mild fever
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The same configuration as Ma Huang Fu Zi Xi Xin Tang but with gentler momentum: the days somewhat longer, interior signs not yet arisen, upright and pathogen in unhurried standoff.
Pattern Reasoning
The one-word change of Xi Xin to Gan Cao is the gradation between "fierce" and "gentle": for urgent momentum use Xi Xin to vent straight through, for gentle momentum use Gan Cao to temper the effusion — two firepower settings on one mechanism. The rigor of the classics is that even the three words "mildly promote sweat" have a dedicated formula to carry them.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang6gSovereign
Fu Zi9gMinister
Gan Cao6gAssistant-Envoy
Removing the venting Xi Xin and adding the moderating Gan Cao lowers the sweating power by one notch.
Cautions
Same as Ma Huang Fu Zi Xi Xin Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麻黄杏仁薏苡甘草汤Ma Xing Yi Gan Tang

金匮要略Jin Gui Yao Lue
原文
病者一身尽疼，发热，日晡所剧者，名风湿。此病伤于汗出当风，或久伤取冷所致也，可与麻黄杏仁薏苡甘草汤。（金匮·痉湿暍）
方证抓手
一身尽疼发热日晡所剧汗出当风或久伤取冷病史
气机病机
风湿相搏于肌表：湿性重着黏滞，故周身尽疼；日晡阳明主令、湿郁化热之势应时而剧。湿邪非一汗可驱——“汗大出者但风气去湿气在”。
辨证推理
治湿之汗与治寒之汗是两种功夫：寒可峻汗一鼓而散，湿必“微微似欲出汗”久蒸缓化。故麻黄仅半两，且配薏苡使湿有下行之路——上开微汗、下渗水湿，两路分消。剂量之轻正是法度之严。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄半两（6g）君
轻量微汗以散风湿
杏仁十个（6g）臣
宣降肺气助行水
薏苡仁半两（12g）臣
渗利肌肉经络之湿
甘草一两，炙（3g）使
和中
麻黄汤去桂枝（不欲峻汗）易薏苡（渗湿），全方转峻为缓、转散为化。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方麻黄汤宣痹汤
禁忌与注意
峻汗则风去湿存，病必不除。
Key Signs
generalized body painfever worse in the late afternoonhistory of sweating exposed to wind or prolonged cold-damp
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Wind and damp contending at the flesh-exterior: damp is heavy, sticky, and lingering, so the whole body aches; in the late afternoon Yang Ming governs and the damp-constraint transforming to heat intensifies on schedule. Damp pathogen cannot be driven off by one sweat — "if sweat pours out, the wind qi goes but the damp qi remains."
Pattern Reasoning
Sweating to treat damp and sweating to treat cold are two different skills: cold can be fiercely sweated and dispersed in one stroke, damp must be "faintly, as if about to sweat," long-steamed and slowly transformed. So Ma Huang is only half a liang, paired with Yi Yi Ren to give the damp a downward route — opening a faint sweat above, percolating water-damp below, dispersing on two roads. The lightness of the dose is precisely the strictness of the method.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang6gSovereign
Xing Ren6gMinister
Yi Yi Ren12gMinister
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
Ma Huang Tang with Gui Zhi removed (no wish for harsh sweating) and Yi Yi Ren substituted (to percolate damp) — the whole formula turns from harsh to gentle, from dispersing to transforming.
Cautions
Fierce sweating drives off the wind but leaves the damp — the disease will not resolve.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麻黄连轺赤小豆汤Ma Huang Lian Yao Chi Xiao Dou Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒瘀热在里，身必黄，麻黄连轺赤小豆汤主之。（262）
方证抓手
身黄发热无汗身痒兼表证之黄疸初起
气机病机
湿热瘀郁在里而表气尚闭：湿热无路可出（表闭不得汗、里瘀不得泄），熏蒸肝胆而发黄。病在里而门在表——表闭一日不开，湿热一日无出路。
辨证推理
治黄而用麻黄，眼在“兼表”：湿热郁于里，若表闭则如捂锅盖蒸，故开表即是给湿热放出路。上开毛窍（麻黄）、内清瘀热（连轺梓皮）、下利水道（赤小豆）——三焦分消。同为发黄，茵陈蒿汤纯里治、栀子柏皮汤清里热，本方独任“表里双解”一格（三方鉴别后批入承气/栀子类详展）。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄二两（6g）君
开表发越湿邪
连翘二两（6g）臣
清泄血分湿热瘀郁
赤小豆一升（30g）臣
利湿从小便去
杏仁四十个（6g）佐
宣降肺气以通调水道
生姜二两（6g）佐
助散
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
护中
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
调和
生梓白皮一升（生梓白皮，今多以桑白皮代）（9g）佐
清泄肺中湿热
麻黄剂之表散骨架嫁接清利湿热三味，潦水煎之取其味薄不助湿。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方麻黄汤麻黄茯苓汤茵陈蒿汤
禁忌与注意
无表证之湿热发黄（茵陈蒿汤证）不用此开表之法。
Key Signs
yellow bodyfeverno sweating with itchingjaundice at onset with an exterior pattern
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Damp-heat pent up within with the exterior qi still shut: damp-heat has no route out (exterior shut, no sweat; interior stasis, no drainage), and steaming the Liver and Gallbladder gives jaundice. The disease is within but the door is at the exterior — for every day the exterior stays shut, the damp-heat has no exit.
Pattern Reasoning
Using Ma Huang to treat jaundice — the eye is on "with exterior signs": damp-heat pent within, if the exterior is shut, is like a covered pot steaming, so opening the exterior gives the damp-heat a way out. Open the pores above (Ma Huang), clear the stasis-heat within (Lian Qiao, Zi Bai Pi), drain the water passages below (Chi Xiao Dou) — triple-burner separate dispersal. Among jaundice formulas, Yin Chen Hao Tang treats purely the interior and Zhi Zi Bai Pi Tang clears interior heat, while this alone takes the "dual exterior-interior resolution" role.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang6gSovereign
Lian Yao6gMinister
Chi Xiao Dou30gMinister
Xing Ren6gAssistant
Sheng Jiang6gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Sheng Zi Bai Pi9gAssistant
The exterior-dispersing framework of a Ma Huang formula grafted onto three damp-heat-clearing herbs; decocted in rain-water to keep the flavor thin so as not to abet damp.
Cautions
For damp-heat jaundice without exterior signs (the Yin Chen Hao Tang pattern), this exterior-opening method is not used.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

越婢汤Yue Bi Tang

金匮要略Jin Gui Yao Lue
原文
风水恶风，一身悉肿，脉浮不渴，续自汗出，无大热者，越婢汤主之。（金匮·水气）
方证抓手
一身悉肿恶风脉浮续自汗出无大热不渴
气机病机
风水相搏，泛溢肌表：风激水行，水湿弥漫皮腠而周身肿；郁而有热（自汗出），然热不盛（无大热、不渴）。水在最表层，去之之路亦在表。
辨证推理
麻黄六两不为发汗为发水——“开鬼门”之谓：水在肌表，从汗孔驱之最近。配石膏则去其发表助热之弊、存其发越水气之用，与麻杏石甘同一配伍逻辑而任务不同（彼治气壅、此治水泛）。风水与皮水、正水、石水之辨，在脉浮与肿之部位深浅（水气病全图后批苓桂剂详展）。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄六两（18g）君
重用发越肌表之水气
石膏半斤（24g）臣
清郁热，制麻黄之温
生姜三两（9g）佐
散水
大枣十五枚（5枚）佐
护中
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
和中
麻黄石膏大剂对峙为体，姜枣草护中为辅。
加减
恶风甚者（阳虚）：炮附子一枚
防重剂麻黄拔阳之根
里水（一身面目黄肿、小便不利）：白术四两 → 越婢加术汤
兼健脾行内湿
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方越婢加术汤大青龙汤
禁忌与注意
正水、石水属阴水者禁发越。
Key Signs
generalized swellingaversion to wind, floating pulsecontinuous spontaneous sweatingno great heat, no thirst
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Wind and water contending, flooding the flesh-exterior: wind stirs water into motion, water-damp spreading through the skin gives generalized swelling; constrained, it has heat (spontaneous sweating), yet the heat is not exuberant (no great heat, no thirst). The water is in the outermost layer, and the road to remove it is likewise at the exterior.
Pattern Reasoning
Six liang of Ma Huang not to effuse sweat but to effuse water — the so-called "opening the ghost gate": water at the flesh-exterior is driven out most directly through the sweat pores. Paired with Shi Gao, its exterior-effusing heat-abetting fault is removed and its water-qi-effusing use retained — the same combinatory logic as Ma Xing Shi Gan but a different task (that treats qi congestion, this treats water flooding). The distinction of wind-water from skin-water, upright-water and stone-water lies in the floating pulse and the depth of the swelling's location.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang18gSovereign
Shi Gao24gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao5 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Large doses of Ma Huang and Shi Gao standing in contest as the body, ginger-jujube-Gan Cao protecting the center as support.
Modifications
Severe aversion to wind (yang deficiency): Blast-fried Fu Zi, one piece
Guard against the heavy Ma Huang uprooting the yang
Interior water (whole-body and facial yellow swelling, inhibited urination): Bai Zhu four liang → Yue Bi Jia Zhu Tang
Also fortify the Spleen and move internal damp
Cautions
Contraindicated in upright-water and stone-water, which are yin-water.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

越婢加术汤Yue Bi Jia Zhu Tang

金匮要略Jin Gui Yao Lue
原文
里水者，一身面目黄肿，其脉沉，小便不利，故令病水……越婢加术汤主之。（金匮·水气）
方证抓手
一身面目肿小便不利肉极湿盛
气机病机
表有水泛、内有脾湿不运：外溢之水与内生之湿同在，仅发越其表则内源不断。
辨证推理
加一味白术，治法即从“单路驱水”升级为“断源+驱流”：麻黄逐已泛之水，白术复生湿之脾。凡治水肿，问一句“水从何来”——来路不断，去路徒劳。
组成与组方逻辑
麻黄六两（18g）君
发越水气
石膏半斤（24g）臣
清郁热制温
白术四两（12g）臣
健脾运湿，断水之内源
生姜三两（9g）佐
散水
大枣十五枚（5枚）佐
护中
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
和中
越婢汤原局加术四两，表里分治。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方越婢汤麻黄茯苓汤
禁忌与注意
同越婢汤。
Key Signs
swelling of the whole body and faceinhibited urinationextreme flesh dampness
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Water flooding at the exterior with Spleen damp untransported within: outward-spilling water and internally-generated damp coexist, and merely effusing the exterior leaves the internal source unbroken.
Pattern Reasoning
Adding one Bai Zhu upgrades the method from "single-road water expulsion" to "cut the source plus expel the flow": Ma Huang drives off the already-flooded water, Bai Zhu restores the Spleen that regenerates damp. In treating any edema, ask the one question "where does the water come from" — with the source unbroken, the exit road labors in vain.
Composition & Logic
Ma Huang18gSovereign
Shi Gao24gMinister
Bai Zhu12gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao5 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The Yue Bi Tang configuration with four liang of Bai Zhu added — treating exterior and interior separately.
Cautions
Same as Yue Bi Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

葛根黄芩黄连汤Ge Gen Huang Qin Huang Lian Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，桂枝证，医反下之，利遂不止，脉促者，表未解也；喘而汗出者，葛根黄芩黄连汤主之。（34）
方证抓手
利遂不止（误下后）喘而汗出脉促肛门灼热、利下臭秽
气机病机
误下引邪内陷，表未罢而里已热：脉促（急数有力）示表邪仍欲外争，喘汗示里热已迫肺蒸表——表里两个战场同时开火，热利由此而成。
辨证推理
表里双解的定式方：葛根半斤独重，先煮——外解肌表、内升清阳，一味药同时照顾两个战场；芩连专清陷里之热。与葛根汤对读是最好的寒热镜像：同为表邪内迫之下利，彼无里热（利清稀、口不渴）故用麻桂温散＋葛根升清，此已化热（灼肛、臭秽、喘汗）故弃麻桂改芩连——下利见表证，一问渴、二察肛热、三看脉之紧促，方向立判。后世治小儿热泻、肠炎初起兼表者用之极广。
组成与组方逻辑
葛根半斤（24g）君
解肌透表、升清止利——一药两战场
黄芩三两（9g）臣
清里热
黄连三两（9g）臣
厚肠止利
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
和中
葛根表里兼行为君，芩连清里为翼，草和之——解表清里三比重自条文“表未解”三字来。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方葛根汤黄芩汤白头翁汤芍药汤藿香正气散
禁忌与注意
虚寒下利（不渴脉弱）禁苦寒；无表证之纯里热利径用芩连剂。
Key Signs
incessant diarrhea (after mistaken purging)wheezing with sweatinghurried pulseburning anus, foul putrid stool
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Mistaken purging draws the pathogen inward, exterior not yet done while the interior is already hot: the hurried pulse (rapid and forceful) shows the exterior pathogen still striving outward, wheeze and sweat show interior heat already pressing the Lung and steaming the exterior — two battlefields, exterior and interior, firing at once, from which heat-diarrhea arises.
Pattern Reasoning
The fixed formula for dual exterior-interior resolution: half a jin of Ge Gen alone weighted, boiled first — resolving the flesh-exterior without and raising clear yang within, one herb tending both battlefields at once; Huang Qin and Huang Lian clear the sunken interior heat specifically. Reading it against Ge Gen Tang gives the best cold-heat mirror: both are diarrhea from exterior pathogen pressing inward, but that has no interior heat (thin clear diarrhea, no thirst), so Ma Huang–Gui Zhi warm-disperse plus Ge Gen raise the clear; this has already transformed to heat (burning anus, foul stool, wheeze and sweat), so Ma Huang–Gui Zhi are discarded for Huang Qin–Huang Lian — for diarrhea with exterior signs, first ask about thirst, second check anal heat, third read the pulse's tightness versus hurry, and the direction is instantly settled. Later ages used it very widely for childhood heat-diarrhea and early enteritis with exterior signs.
Composition & Logic
Ge Gen24gSovereign
Huang Qin9gMinister
Huang Lian9gMinister
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Ge Gen coursing both exterior and interior as sovereign, Huang Qin and Huang Lian clearing the interior as wings, Gan Cao harmonizing — the 3:1 weighting of resolving-exterior to clearing-interior derives from the text's phrase "exterior not yet resolved."
Cautions
Contraindicated in deficiency-cold diarrhea (no thirst, weak pulse); for pure interior-heat diarrhea without exterior signs use the Huang Qin-Huang Lian class directly.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

射干麻黄汤She Gan Ma Huang Tang

金匮要略Jin Gui Yao Lue
原文
咳而上气，喉中水鸡声，射干麻黄汤主之。（金匮·肺痿肺痈咳嗽上气）
方证抓手
咳而上气喉中水鸡声（痰鸣辘辘如蛙声）寒饮郁肺
气机病机
寒饮挟痰上壅，结于喉间气道：“水鸡声”三字以声定位——饮邪已从心下（小青龙之位）上壅至喉，气过痰阻之路而作鸣。
辨证推理
与小青龙汤同族异位的对读方：同用麻辛姜夏味之化饮核心，彼饮在心下犯肺（咳而清稀痰多，配桂芍走营卫），此饮已壅结喉间（痰鸣如水鸡，故换射干开豁＋菀冬直下肺气）——听诊之“声”定方之别。姜辛味结构第三次出场（小青龙、真武加减之后），紫菀款冬这对止咳搭档自此入库。今之哮喘发作期痰鸣属寒饮者，此方与小青龙分掌两个亚型。
组成与组方逻辑
射干十三枚（一法三两）（9g）君
开豁喉中痰结
麻黄四两（12g）臣
宣肺平喘
细辛三两（3g）臣
温化寒饮
生姜四两（12g）佐
散寒行水
半夏半升，洗（9g）佐
降逆化痰
紫菀三两（9g）佐
化痰止咳
款冬花三两（9g）佐
下气止咳
五味子半升（6g）佐
敛肺护正（姜辛味结构之收端）
大枣七枚，劈（3枚）使
护中
射干开其结，麻辛姜夏味化其饮（散中有收），菀冬降其咳，枣护其中——寒哮之祖方。
类方鉴别
麻黄剂类方小青龙汤麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤三子养亲汤
禁忌与注意
热哮（痰黄稠、声高息涌、渴）者非温药所宜；虚喘无邪者勿散。
Key Signs
cough with qi ascendingfrog-croak rale in the throat (bubbling phlegm)cold rheum congesting the Lung
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Cold rheum with phlegm congesting upward, binding in the throat and airway: the three words "frog-croak sound" locate by sound — the rheum pathogen has surged up from below the heart (the Xiao Qing Long position) to the throat, and qi passing the phlegm-blocked road makes the rale.
Pattern Reasoning
A same-family, different-location reading against Xiao Qing Long Tang: both use the Ma Huang–Xi Xin–Gan Jiang–Ban Xia–Wu Wei Zi rheum-transforming core, but there the rheum is below the heart offending the Lung (cough with copious thin phlegm, paired with Gui Zhi–Shao Yao to reach nutritive-defensive), here the rheum has congested and bound in the throat (phlegm rale like a frog, so She Gan is substituted to open and disperse, plus Zi Wan–Kuan Dong Hua to send Lung qi straight down) — the auscultated "sound" settles the formula's distinction. The ginger–Xi Xin–Wu Wei Zi structure appears a third time (after Xiao Qing Long and the Zhen Wu modifications), and the cough-stopping pair Zi Wan–Kuan Dong Hua enters the repertoire here. For today's asthma in acute attack with cold-rheum phlegm rale, this formula and Xiao Qing Long govern two subtypes.
Composition & Logic
She Gan9gSovereign
Ma Huang12gMinister
Xi Xin3gMinister
Sheng Jiang12gAssistant
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Zi Wan9gAssistant
Kuan Dong Hua9gAssistant
Wu Wei Zi6gAssistant
Da Zao3 piecesEnvoy
She Gan opens the binding; Ma Huang, Xi Xin, ginger, Ban Xia and Wu Wei Zi transform the rheum (dispersing with restraint); Zi Wan and Kuan Dong Hua direct down the cough; jujube protects the center — the ancestral formula for cold wheezing.
Cautions
Heat wheezing (yellow sticky phlegm, high-pitched surging breath, thirst) is not suited to warm herbs; do not disperse deficiency wheeze without pathogen.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

小柴胡汤Xiao Chai Hu Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒五六日中风，往来寒热，胸胁苦满，嘿嘿不欲饮食，心烦喜呕，或胸中烦而不呕……小柴胡汤主之。（96）伤寒中风，有柴胡证，但见一证便是，不必悉具。（101）
方证抓手
往来寒热胸胁苦满嘿嘿不欲饮食心烦喜呕口苦咽干目眩
气机病机
邪郁少阳，枢机不利：少阳居表里之间，是气机出入之枢。邪踞其位，正邪分争——正胜欲拒邪于外则热，邪胜欲入于里则寒，故寒热“往来”；胆气郁而横犯（胸胁苦满）、上炎（口苦心烦）、犯胃（喜呕、不欲食）。一个“枢”字卡住，出入升降四面受累。
辨证推理
枢机之病，汗之无靶（邪不在表）、下之无物（里无实结）、吐之无据——三法皆禁，故立第四法：和解。“但见一证便是，不必悉具”是本方最重要的使用法则：柴胡证的诸症是同一枢机不利在不同方向的投影，见到任何一个投影即可确认病位，不必等全套集齐。这句话也是经方“抓病机”思想最直白的自我表述。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡半斤（24g）君
重用透达少阳郁邪，升发枢机
黄芩三两（9g）臣
清泄胆腑郁热，与柴胡一升一降
半夏半升，洗（9g）佐
降逆止呕，开中焦之滞
人参三两（9g）佐
补中气，扶正托邪，杜邪内传之路
生姜三两（9g）佐
助半夏和胃
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
助人参补中
甘草三两，炙（9g）使
和中调药
柴芩一对为核：柴胡从外透其郁（升、出），黄芩从内清其热（降），枢机两面同时着力。参枣草坐镇中州——少阳之邪最易乘虚内传太阴阳明，先实其中则邪无内传之阶，此“扶正即是祛邪”。姜夏和胃降逆治其呕。去滓再煎，使药性和合，专走半表半里。
加减
胸中烦而不呕：去半夏人参，加栝楼实
热聚于胸而胃不逆，去温补，加宽胸清热
渴者：去半夏，加人参、栝楼根
津伤显露，去燥药加生津
胁下痞硬：去大枣，加牡蛎
甘壅不利于结，咸软能散之
心下悸、小便不利：去黄芩，加茯苓
水饮内停，苦寒无益，淡渗利之
类方鉴别
柴胡剂类方大柴胡汤柴胡桂枝汤四逆散柴胡桂枝干姜汤柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤柴胡加芒硝汤小柴胡加茯苓汤小柴胡加黄连牡丹汤黄芩牡丹皮栝蒌半夏枳实汤柴胡黄芩芍药半夏甘草汤半夏泻心汤补中益气汤
禁忌与注意
柴胡剂禁于虚寒下利（脏寒）；“得屎而解”诸条示阳明已结者当下不当和。血弱气尽、腠理开之人（产后、体虚）用之尤宜借参枣草之护。
Key Signs
alternating chills and feverfullness and discomfort of the chest and hypochondriumsilent reluctance to eatvexation with tendency to retchbitter taste, dry throat, dizzy vision
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Pathogen constrained in Shao Yang, the pivot inhibited: Shao Yang lies between exterior and interior, the hinge of qi exiting and entering. The pathogen occupying its position, upright and pathogen divide and contend — upright prevailing and wishing to repel the pathogen outward gives heat, pathogen prevailing and wishing to enter inward gives cold, hence the "alternating" chills and fever; Gallbladder qi constrained assaults transversely (chest-hypochondrium fullness), flames upward (bitter taste, vexation), and offends the stomach (tendency to retch, no appetite). One "pivot" jammed, and exiting-entering, ascending-descending are beset on all four sides.
Pattern Reasoning
For a disease of the pivot, sweating has no target (pathogen not at the exterior), purging has nothing to purge (no interior repletion bind), vomiting has no basis — all three methods forbidden, so a fourth is established: harmonization. "Seeing but one sign it is so, one need not have them all" is this formula's most important rule of use: the various signs of a Chai Hu pattern are projections of the same pivot-inhibition in different directions, and seeing any one projection confirms the disease location without waiting for the full set. This sentence is also the plainest self-statement of the classical "grasp the mechanism" thought.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu24gSovereign
Huang Qin9gMinister
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Ren Shen9gAssistant
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao9gEnvoy
Chai Hu and Huang Qin as the core pair: Chai Hu vents the constraint from without (ascend, exit), Huang Qin clears the heat from within (descend), both faces of the pivot engaged at once. Ginseng, jujube and Gan Cao garrison the center — the Shao Yang pathogen most readily exploits vacancy to transmit inward to Tai Yin and Yang Ming, so first fortify the center and the pathogen has no stairway inward; this is "supporting the upright is itself expelling the pathogen." Ginger and Ban Xia harmonize the stomach and quell retching. Re-decocted after straining to blend the herbs, going specifically to the half-exterior half-interior.
Modifications
Chest vexation without retching: Remove Ban Xia and ginseng, add Gua Lou Shi
Heat gathered in the chest with no stomach counterflow; remove the warm-supplementing, add chest-widening heat-clearing
With thirst: Remove Ban Xia, add ginseng, Gua Lou Gen
Fluid damage emerging; remove the drying herb, add fluid-engendering
Hard focal fullness below the hypochondrium: Remove jujube, add Mu Li
The sweet-congesting is unsuited to a bind; the salty-softening can disperse it
Palpitation below the heart, inhibited urination: Remove Huang Qin, add Fu Ling
Water-rheum lodged within; bitter-cold is useless here — percolate it blandly
Cautions
The Chai Hu formulas are contraindicated in deficiency-cold diarrhea (visceral cold); the lines "resolving on passing stool" show that where Yang Ming has bound, one should purge, not harmonize. For those blood-weak and qi-exhausted with open interstices (postpartum, deficient constitution), the protection of ginseng-jujube-Gan Cao is especially apt.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

大柴胡汤Da Chai Hu Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，过经十余日，反二三下之，后四五日柴胡证仍在者，先与小柴胡。呕不止，心下急，郁郁微烦者，为未解也，与大柴胡汤，下之则愈。（103）
方证抓手
呕不止心下急郁郁微烦往来寒热便秘或下利不爽
气机病机
少阳枢机不利兼阳明里实：枢郁未解而腑气已结——邪同时卡在“半表半里之枢”与“里之通道”两处，呕不止（枢逆更甚）、心下急（结之所在）并见。
辨证推理
与小柴胡的分界线是三个升级信号：呕由“喜呕”变“不止”、烦由“心烦”变“郁郁微烦”、多出“心下急”——枢郁向里压成实。既有实，纯和解则隔靴搔痒，故去参草之补（邪实不受补）、添枳实大黄之通。本方是“和解＋通下”两法并轨的原型：少阳阳明同病，和其枢、下其结，一方两战场。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡半斤（24g）君
透解少阳之郁
黄芩三两（9g）臣
清少阳之热
大黄二两（6g）臣
泻阳明之结
枳实四枚，炙（9g）臣
破气消痞，助大黄下行
芍药三两（9g）佐
缓心下之急痛，护阴
半夏半升，洗（9g）佐
降逆止呕
生姜五两（15g）佐
重用以制呕逆之甚
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
护中
小柴胡去人参甘草（防其恋邪助壅），加枳实大黄破结通腑、芍药缓急，生姜加至五两专压呕势。柴芩剂量不减——枢机之郁仍是本病之根，下法是加挂的第二引擎。
类方鉴别
柴胡剂类方小柴胡汤柴胡加芒硝汤大承气汤黄芩牡丹皮栝蒌半夏枳实汤大陷胸汤
禁忌与注意
无阳明里实（无心下急、无便结）者不可下，仍属小柴胡；纯阳明燥实无少阳证者径用承气，不必绕行柴胡。
Key Signs
incessant retchingurgency below the heartbrooding mild vexationalternating chills and feverconstipation or ungratifying diarrhea
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Shao Yang pivot inhibited plus Yang Ming interior repletion: pivot constraint not yet resolved while the bowel qi has already bound — the pathogen jammed at once in "the pivot of half-exterior half-interior" and "the passage of the interior," incessant retching (pivot counterflow worsened) and urgency below the heart (the site of the bind) appearing together.
Pattern Reasoning
The boundary from Xiao Chai Hu is three upgrade signals: retching from "tendency to retch" to "incessant," vexation from "heart vexation" to "brooding mild vexation," plus the added "urgency below the heart" — pivot constraint pressed inward into repletion. Repletion present, pure harmonization scratches at a boot; so ginseng and Gan Cao's supplementation is removed (repletion does not accept supplementing) and Zhi Shi–Da Huang's freeing is added. This formula is the prototype of "harmonizing plus purging" on twin tracks: Shao Yang and Yang Ming both diseased, harmonize its pivot and purge its bind, one formula two battlefields.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu24gSovereign
Huang Qin9gMinister
Da Huang6gMinister
Zhi Shi9gMinister
Shao Yao9gAssistant
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Sheng Jiang15gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Xiao Chai Hu with ginseng and Gan Cao removed (lest they retain pathogen and abet congestion), with Zhi Shi and Da Huang added to break binding and free the bowel, Shao Yao to relieve urgency, and fresh ginger raised to five liang to quell the retching. Chai Hu and Huang Qin doses undiminished — pivot constraint remains the root of the disease, the purging method a second engine mounted on.
Cautions
Without Yang Ming interior repletion (no urgency below the heart, no bound stool) one may not purge — it remains Xiao Chai Hu; for pure Yang Ming dry repletion without Shao Yang signs use Cheng Qi directly, no need to detour through Chai Hu.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

柴胡桂枝汤Chai Hu Gui Zhi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒六七日，发热微恶寒，支节烦疼，微呕，心下支结，外证未去者，柴胡桂枝汤主之。（146）
方证抓手
发热微恶寒支节烦疼微呕心下支结
气机病机
太阳少阳并病而两皆轻浅：表证存而已“微”（微恶寒、支节烦疼是身疼痛之轻者），枢证起而未深（微呕、支结是喜呕苦满之轻者）——邪骑在两经门槛上，两边都只占一半。
辨证推理
两个“微”字、一个“支”字（支结者，如物支撑而未成满结）定了剂量策略：病各占一半，方即各取一半——桂枝汤半量合小柴胡半量，不多一分火力。合方之法自此方立范式：合的不是药味的堆叠，是两个完整病机结构的等比缩放拼接。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡四两（12g）君
和解枢机（半量小柴胡）
桂枝一两半（4.5g）臣
解太阳未尽之表（半量桂枝汤）
黄芩一两半（4.5g）臣
清少阳之热
芍药一两半（4.5g）佐
和营
人参一两半（4.5g）佐
扶正
半夏二合半，洗（6g）佐
降逆止微呕
生姜一两半（4.5g）佐
和卫
大枣六枚（2枚）佐
补中
甘草一两，炙（3g）使
调和
两方骨架完整保留、剂量对半：解表的天平（桂芍姜枣草）与转枢的引擎（柴芩参夏）并联运行，共用姜枣草后勤。
类方鉴别
柴胡剂类方小柴胡汤桂枝汤
禁忌与注意
表证重者当先解表；枢证重者径用小柴胡足量，不必自缚于半量。
Key Signs
fever with slight aversion to coldvexing pain of the limbs and jointsslight retchingpropping bind below the heart
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Tai Yang and Shao Yang jointly diseased, both light and shallow: the exterior pattern present but already "mild" (mild aversion to cold, vexing joint pain being a lighter form of body pain), the pivot pattern arisen but not deep (mild retching, propping bind being lighter forms of retching and fullness) — the pathogen straddling the two channels' threshold, holding but half on each side.
Pattern Reasoning
Two "mild"s and one "propping" (a propping bind, like something braced but not yet a full bind) set the dose strategy: the disease holding half each, the formula takes half of each — half-dose Gui Zhi Tang combined with half-dose Xiao Chai Hu, not one part of firepower more. The method of combining formulas takes its paradigm here: what is combined is not a piling-up of herbs but a proportional scaling and splicing of two complete mechanism-structures.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu12gSovereign
Gui Zhi4.5gMinister
Huang Qin4.5gMinister
Shao Yao4.5gAssistant
Ren Shen4.5gAssistant
Ban Xia6gAssistant
Sheng Jiang4.5gAssistant
Da Zao2 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
Both formulas' frameworks fully preserved at half dose: the exterior-resolving balance (Gui Zhi, Shao Yao, ginger, jujube, Gan Cao) and the pivot-turning engine (Chai Hu, Huang Qin, ginseng, Ban Xia) running in parallel, sharing the ginger-jujube-Gan Cao logistics.
Cautions
For a heavy exterior pattern, resolve the exterior first; for a heavy pivot pattern use full-dose Xiao Chai Hu directly, no need to bind oneself to half-doses.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

柴胡桂枝干姜汤Chai Hu Gui Zhi Gan Jiang Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒五六日，已发汗而复下之，胸胁满微结，小便不利，渴而不呕，但头汗出，往来寒热，心烦者，此为未解也，柴胡桂枝干姜汤主之。（147）
方证抓手
胸胁满微结往来寒热渴而不呕但头汗出小便不利便溏
气机病机
少阳郁热未解而太阴虚寒已起（胆热脾寒）：汗下两伤其阳，枢机之郁犹在（往来寒热、胸胁满），中阳已馁、水津不化（小便不利、渴、便溏）；阳郁于上不得周布，故“但头汗出”——上热下寒、郁与虚并存之局。
辨证推理
“渴而不呕”四字是与小柴胡分道之处：不呕，示胃无饮邪上逆，故去姜夏；渴，示津已不化，故加栝楼根。寒热两端同治：柴芩清透其郁热于上，姜桂温其脾寒于中——后世凡见“口苦便溏”并见之杂病，多可从此方寻思路，是柴胡剂中最向内科杂病开放的一首。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡半斤（24g）君
透解少阳郁结
桂枝三两（9g）臣
通阳化气，助水饮之运
干姜二两（6g）臣
温太阴之寒
栝楼根四两（12g）佐
生津止渴
黄芩三两（9g）佐
清少阳余热
牡蛎二两，熬（6g）佐
咸软散胸胁之微结
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
和中
柴芩存和解之骨，去参枣姜夏之补壅温燥；桂姜草辛甘化阳温其中，蒌根牡蛎润其津、散其结。初服微烦、复服汗出便愈——郁阳得通之瞑眩，条文预先告知。
类方鉴别
柴胡剂类方小柴胡汤柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤
禁忌与注意
纯实热之胸胁满禁干姜之温；纯虚寒无郁热者又非柴芩所宜——本方专为寒热错杂之枢证而设。
Key Signs
fullness and slight bind of the chest and hypochondriumalternating chills and feverthirst without retchingsweating only on the headinhibited urinationloose stool
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Shao Yang constrained heat unresolved while Tai Yin deficiency-cold has arisen (Gallbladder heat, Spleen cold): sweating and purging have both harmed the yang, the pivot constraint still present (alternating chills and fever, chest-hypochondrium fullness), the middle yang now feeble and water-fluid untransformed (inhibited urination, thirst, loose stool); constrained yang above cannot spread around, so "sweating only on the head" — a pattern of heat above and cold below, constraint and deficiency coexisting.
Pattern Reasoning
The four words "thirst without retching" are the parting from Xiao Chai Hu: no retching shows no rheum pathogen counterflowing in the stomach, so ginger and Ban Xia are removed; thirst shows fluid no longer transformed, so Gua Lou Gen is added. Both cold and heat ends treated together: Chai Hu–Huang Qin clear and vent the constrained heat above, ginger–Gui Zhi warm the Spleen cold in the middle — later ages, for any miscellaneous disease with "bitter taste and loose stool" together, may seek their approach from this formula, the Chai Hu formula most open to internal medicine.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu24gSovereign
Gui Zhi9gMinister
Gan Jiang6gMinister
Gua Lou Gen12gAssistant
Huang Qin9gAssistant
Mu Li6gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Chai Hu and Huang Qin retain the harmonizing skeleton; ginseng, jujube, ginger and Ban Xia (supplementing, congesting, warming, drying) are removed; Gui Zhi, ginger and Gan Cao acrid-sweet transform yang to warm the center, while Gua Lou Gen and Mu Li moisten the fluid and disperse the bind.
