Mild vexation on first dose, sweating and cure on the second — the text forewarns of the healing crisis as constrained yang breaks through.
Cautions
Pure repletion-heat chest-hypochondrium fullness forbids the warmth of Gan Jiang; pure deficiency-cold without constrained heat is not suited to Chai Hu-Huang Qin either — this formula is set specifically for the jumbled cold-heat pivot pattern.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒八九日，下之，胸满烦惊，小便不利，谵语，一身尽重，不可转侧者，柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤主之。（107）
方证抓手
胸满烦惊谵语小便不利一身尽重不可转侧
气机病机
误下后邪弥三焦、神气浮越：枢机之郁未解（胸满）、里热已扰神明（烦、谵语）、阳郁不布于周身（一身尽重）、水道不利（小便不利）——表里上下俱困，而“惊”字点出病已入神志层面：神不得潜藏。
辨证推理
症状散乱到几乎无从下手，正是学“复杂局面如何布阵”的范本：以小柴胡运其枢为中军（枢转则表里上下之气皆有出路），龙牡铅丹镇其神，大黄清其谵语之热，苓桂通阳利水治身重尿难——四路兵各对一症群，而以“转枢”统之。后世治癫痫、惊悸、脏躁诸神志病，此方是柴胡系的总入口。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡四两（12g）君
疏解枢机之郁
黄芩一两半（4.5g）臣
清胆热
龙骨一两半（4.5g）臣
镇惊安神
牡蛎一两半，熬（4.5g）臣
潜浮越之阳
铅丹一两半（（今不用，代法见禁忌））臣
重镇坠痰止惊（铅丹有毒，今以代品）
桂枝一两半（4.5g）佐
通阳和表，治身重
茯苓一两半（4.5g）佐
利水宁心，导小便
半夏二合半，洗（6g）佐
降逆化痰
大黄二两（6g）佐
后下，泻里热止谵语
人参一两半（4.5g）佐
扶下后之虚
生姜一两半（4.5g）佐
和胃
大枣六枚（2枚）佐
补中
小柴胡（减量、去甘草防壅缓）为底盘，加镇潜（龙牡铅丹）、通利（苓桂）、泻热（大黄后下）三组模块。药十二味而不乱，因每组各有统属。
类方鉴别
柴胡剂类方小柴胡汤桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤柴胡桂枝干姜汤
禁忌与注意
铅丹有毒，今已不用——临床以生铁落、磁石代之，或迳以龙牡加量补其镇坠之力。纯虚之惊悸（桂枝甘草龙牡证）无枢郁里热者，不必动用此大阵。
Key Signs
chest fullness, vexation and frightdelirious speechinhibited urinationwhole body heavy, unable to turn
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
After mistaken purging the pathogen pervades the triple burner and the spirit-qi floats unrestrained: pivot constraint unresolved (chest fullness), interior heat already disturbing the spirit-brightness (vexation, delirious speech), constrained yang not spread through the body (whole body heavy), water passages inhibited (inhibited urination) — exterior-interior and above-below all beset, and the word "fright" points to the disease having entered the spirit-mind layer: the spirit cannot store and hide.
Pattern Reasoning
Symptoms scattered almost past knowing where to start — precisely a model for learning "how to array troops in a complex situation": Xiao Chai Hu turning the pivot as the central army (pivot turned, and the qi of exterior-interior above-below all gain an exit), Long Gu–Mu Li–Qian Dan subduing the spirit, Da Huang clearing the heat of delirious speech, Ling-Gui freeing yang and draining water to treat the heaviness and difficult urination — four columns each facing one symptom-cluster, all commanded by "turning the pivot." For later ages' epilepsy, fright palpitation and visceral-agitation spirit-mind diseases, this formula is the Chai Hu system's chief gateway.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu12gSovereign
Huang Qin4.5gMinister
Long Gu4.5gMinister
Mu Li4.5gMinister
Qian DanMinister
Gui Zhi4.5gAssistant
Fu Ling4.5gAssistant
Ban Xia6gAssistant
Da Huang6gAssistant
Ren Shen4.5gAssistant
Sheng Jiang4.5gAssistant
Da Zao2 piecesAssistant
Xiao Chai Hu (reduced, with Gan Cao removed to avoid congesting and slowing) as the base, adding three modules: subduing (Long Gu, Mu Li, Qian Dan), freeing (Fu Ling, Gui Zhi), and draining heat (Da Huang added last). Twelve herbs yet unconfused, because each module has its own command.
Cautions
Qian Dan is toxic and no longer used today — clinically replace it with Sheng Tie Luo or Ci Shi, or simply increase Long Gu-Mu Li to supply the subduing weight. Pure-deficiency fright palpitation (the Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Mu pattern) without pivot-constraint interior heat need not deploy this large array.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

柴胡加芒硝汤Chai Hu Jia Mang Xiao Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒十三日不解，胸胁满而呕，日晡所发潮热，已而微利……潮热者实也，先宜服小柴胡汤以解外，后以柴胡加芒硝汤主之。（104）
方证抓手
胸胁满而呕日晡潮热微利（丸药误下后）体已虚
气机病机
少阳证兼阳明燥结，而正气已为误下所伤：潮热示里实，胸胁满呕示枢郁未罢——与大柴胡同属少阳阳明，但此人已虚，经不起枳实大黄之破。
辨证推理
与大柴胡是同一病位上“体质刻度”的两档：实人用枳黄之峻破，虚人用芒硝之润软——芒硝咸寒润下，软坚而不破气，且全方仅小柴胡三分之一量，参草枣仍在护中。选方不只问病，还要问这个身体承受得起哪一档攻法。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡二两十六铢（8g）君
续解少阳（小柴胡三分之一量）
黄芩一两（3g）臣
清热
芒硝二两（6g）臣
咸寒软坚，润下燥结
人参一两（3g）佐
扶正（下后体虚）
半夏二十铢（5g）佐
止呕
生姜一两（3g）佐
和胃
大枣四枚（1枚）佐
补中
甘草一两，炙（3g）使
调和
小柴胡微量存枢转之能、护胃之义，芒硝一味任软坚润下。
类方鉴别
柴胡剂类方大柴胡汤小柴胡汤
禁忌与注意
体实结重者此方力薄，当予大柴胡；无里实之潮热（如阴虚）禁下。
Key Signs
chest and hypochondrium fullness with retchingtidal fever in the late afternoonmild diarrhea (after mistaken purging by pill medicine)body already deficient
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
A Shao Yang pattern with Yang Ming dry bind, and the upright qi already harmed by mistaken purging: tidal fever shows interior repletion, chest-hypochondrium fullness and retching show pivot constraint unresolved — belonging with Da Chai Hu to Shao Yang–Yang Ming, but this person is already deficient and cannot bear the breaking of Zhi Shi and Da Huang.
Pattern Reasoning
With Da Chai Hu it is two settings of "constitutional gradation" on one disease location: for the replete use the fierce breaking of Zhi Shi–Da Huang, for the deficient use the moist softening of Mang Xiao — Mang Xiao, salty-cold and moist-descending, softens hardness without breaking qi, and the whole formula is only a third of Xiao Chai Hu's dose, with ginseng-Gan Cao-jujube still protecting the middle. Choosing a formula asks not only the disease but which gradation of attack this body can bear.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu8gSovereign
Huang Qin3gMinister
Mang Xiao6gMinister
Ren Shen3gAssistant
Ban Xia5gAssistant
Sheng Jiang3gAssistant
Da Zao1 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
Xiao Chai Hu in small dose retaining the power to turn the pivot and the duty to protect the stomach, with Mang Xiao alone tasked with softening hardness and moistening the descent.
Cautions
For the replete-bodied with heavy binding this formula is too weak — give Da Chai Hu; tidal fever without interior repletion (as in yin deficiency) forbids purging.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

四逆散Si Ni San

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
少阴病，四逆，其人或咳，或悸，或小便不利，或腹中痛，或泄利下重者，四逆散主之。（318）
方证抓手
四逆（指头微寒而身不寒）或腹痛或泄利下重脉弦
气机病机
阳郁致厥：阳气不虚而被郁遏于内，不得布达四末——四逆诸方中唯此一首“有阳而路不通”。与四逆汤之阳衰（脉微、下利清谷、冷过肘膝）、当归四逆之血虚寒滞（脉细）三足鼎立，同名四逆而虚实天壤。
辨证推理
厥证鉴别三问：脉微而冷甚者阳衰（四逆汤，温之）；脉细而素血虚者血弱寒凝（当归四逆，养而通之）；脉弦、仅指头寒、伴胸胁腹之气滞证者阳郁（本方，疏之）——误将阳郁作阳衰而投姜附，是助其郁热。本方四味即后世疏肝解郁一大法门（柴胡疏肝散、逍遥散）之祖，柴芍这对“升散＋柔敛”自此定型。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡十分（6g）君
疏达郁阳，透邪外出
枳实十分，炙（6g）臣
破气散结，导滞下行
芍药十分（6g）佐
和血柔肝，缓急止痛
甘草十分，炙（6g）使
合芍缓急，和中
柴胡升而散其郁，枳实降而破其滞——一升一降复其气行；芍药甘草酸甘缓其急——刚药行气恐伤阴，柔以济刚。四味两对，升降刚柔各成阴阳。
加减
咳者：五味子、干姜
肺寒气逆，温敛并施
悸者：桂枝
通心阳
小便不利：茯苓
淡渗利水
腹中痛：附子
内有沉寒，温之
泄利下重：薤白
通泄滞下之气
类方鉴别
柴胡剂类方小柴胡汤当归四逆汤黄芩牡丹皮栝蒌半夏枳实汤柴胡黄芩芍药半夏甘草汤四逆汤逍遥散柴胡疏肝散血府逐瘀汤
禁忌与注意
阳衰之厥（四逆汤证）误用此散，则疏泄更伤其阳——先摸脉，再定四逆是哪一种。
Key Signs
reversal cold (fingertips slightly cold, body not cold)possibly abdominal painpossibly diarrhea with heaviness belowwiry pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Constrained yang causing reversal: yang qi is not deficient but is constrained and hemmed within, unable to spread to the four extremities — alone among the reversal formulas, this one is "yang present but the road blocked." With Si Ni Tang's yang collapse (faint pulse, clear-food diarrhea, cold past the elbows) and Dang Gui Si Ni's blood-deficient cold stasis (thin pulse), it stands as a tripod, sharing the name "Si Ni" yet worlds apart in deficiency versus repletion.
Pattern Reasoning
Three questions differentiate reversal patterns: faint pulse with severe cold is yang collapse (Si Ni Tang, warm it); thin pulse with a constitutionally blood-deficient person is blood weakness with cold congelation (Dang Gui Si Ni, nourish and free it); wiry pulse, only fingertip cold, with qi-stagnation signs of the chest, hypochondrium and abdomen is constrained yang (this formula, course it) — mistaking constrained yang for yang collapse and giving ginger-Fu Zi abets its constrained heat. These four herbs are the ancestor of a whole later method of coursing the Liver and resolving constraint (Chai Hu Shu Gan San, Xiao Yao San), and the Chai Hu–Shao Yao pair of "ascending-dispersing plus soft-gathering" is set here.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu6gSovereign
Zhi Shi6gMinister
Shao Yao6gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Chai Hu ascends and disperses the constraint, Zhi Shi descends and breaks the stagnation — one ascending, one descending, restoring qi flow; Shao Yao and Gan Cao, sour and sweet, relieve the urgency — the hard qi-moving herbs risk harming yin, so the soft aids the hard. Four herbs, two pairs: ascend-descend and hard-soft each forming a yin-yang.
Modifications
With cough: Wu Wei Zi, Gan Jiang
Lung cold with qi counterflow — warm and gather together
With palpitation: Gui Zhi
Free the Heart yang
Inhibited urination: Fu Ling
Percolate water blandly
Abdominal pain: Fu Zi
Deep cold within — warm it
Diarrhea with heaviness below: Xie Bai
Free the stagnant qi driving down
Cautions
Reversal of yang collapse (the Si Ni Tang pattern) mistakenly given this powder — coursing-discharge harms the yang further; first feel the pulse, then decide which kind of Si Ni it is.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

半夏泻心汤Ban Xia Xie Xin Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒五六日，呕而发热者，柴胡汤证具，而以他药下之……但满而不痛者，此为痞，柴胡不中与之，宜半夏泻心汤。（149）
方证抓手
心下痞满按之濡（不痛不硬）呕逆肠鸣下利
气机病机
误下伤中，寒热错杂痞塞于心下：中焦是升降之轴，轴伤则清阳不升（下利肠鸣——寒在脾）、浊阴不降（呕逆——热在胃），寒热两股气拧在心下不上不下，即为“痞”。痞者，天地不交之卦象也。
辨证推理
“但满而不痛”五字与结胸划界：痛而硬者为结胸（有形之水热互结，攻之），满而濡者为痞（无形之气机痞塞，开之）。痞既是寒热两股气的僵持，单温则助热、单清则助寒，故立辛开苦降之法：辛药（夏姜）把寒的一股向上打开，苦药（芩连）把热的一股向下压落，参枣草在轴心处补虚——三组药各行其道而痞自解。这是继和解法之后又一独立法门，后世治脾胃病大半出于此。
组成与组方逻辑
半夏半升，洗（9g）君
辛开散结，降逆止呕
干姜三两（9g）臣
辛温开痞，温脾之寒
黄芩三两（9g）臣
苦寒降泄，清胃之热
黄连一两（3g）臣
苦降厚肠，清中焦湿热
人参三两（9g）佐
补下后之中虚，复升降之源
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
助参补中
甘草三两，炙（9g）使
和中
辛开（半夏干姜）＋苦降（黄芩黄连）＋甘补（参枣草）三组鼎立，剂量之衡：辛温总量大于苦寒（下后中阳已伤，温运为主，清热为制）。去滓再煎，与柴胡剂同法，取其和合。
加减
水气偏盛（干噫食臭、胁下有水气、腹中雷鸣）：减干姜加生姜四两 → 生姜泻心汤
食滞水气并存，须生姜之散
痞利俱甚、谷不化、心烦不得安（胃气重虚）：重用炙甘草四两 → 甘草泻心汤
虚甚者以甘缓固中为先
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方生姜泻心汤甘草泻心汤小陷胸汤小柴胡汤栀子豉汤黄连茯苓汤大黄黄连泻心汤黄连汤旋覆代赭汤大陷胸汤吴茱萸汤左金丸
禁忌与注意
痞属实热独盛（大黄黄连泻心证：按之濡而关上脉浮、无寒象）者，不需辛温之开；食积、水饮之痞各有专方，先辨痞之成因。
Key Signs
focal fullness below the heartsoft on pressure (neither painful nor hard)retching and counterflowborborygmus and diarrhea
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Mistaken purging harms the middle, cold and heat jumbled in focal fullness below the heart: the middle burner is the axle of ascending-descending; the axle harmed, clear yang does not ascend (diarrhea, borborygmus — cold in the Spleen) and turbid yin does not descend (retching — heat in the stomach), the two currents of cold and heat twisting below the heart, neither up nor down — this is "focal fullness." Focal fullness is the hexagram-image of heaven and earth not intercommunicating.
Pattern Reasoning
The five words "full but not painful" mark the boundary from chest-bind: painful and hard is chest-bind (tangible water-heat bound together, attack it), full and soft is focal fullness (formless qi-dynamic blockage, open it). Since focal fullness is a standoff of cold and heat currents, warming alone abets the heat and clearing alone abets the cold, so the method of acrid-opening and bitter-descending is established: the acrid herbs (Ban Xia, ginger) open the cold current upward, the bitter herbs (Huang Qin, Huang Lian) press the heat current down, ginseng-jujube-Gan Cao supplement deficiency at the axle — three groups each on its own road, and the focal fullness resolves. This is another independent method after harmonization; later ages' treatment of Spleen-Stomach disease mostly issues from here.
Composition & Logic
Ban Xia9gSovereign
Gan Jiang9gMinister
Huang Qin9gMinister
Huang Lian3gMinister
Ren Shen9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao9gEnvoy
Acrid-opening (Ban Xia, Gan Jiang) plus bitter-descending (Huang Qin, Huang Lian) plus sweet-supplementing (ginseng, jujube, Gan Cao) stand in tripod. Dose balance: acrid-warm exceeds bitter-cold (the middle yang already harmed after purging — warm movement leads, heat-clearing restrains). Re-decocted after straining, like the Chai Hu formulas, to draw out harmonization.
Modifications
Water qi predominant (dry belching with food odor, water qi below the hypochondrium, thunderous rumbling): Reduce Gan Jiang, add fresh ginger four liang → Sheng Jiang Xie Xin Tang
Food stagnation and water qi coexist — needs ginger's dispersal
Severe focal fullness and diarrhea, undigested food, vexation and restlessness (stomach qi severely deficient): Heavy honey-fried Gan Cao four liang → Gan Cao Xie Xin Tang
In severe deficiency, sweet-moderating to consolidate the middle comes first
Cautions
Focal fullness of pure repletion-heat (the Da Huang Huang Lian Xie Xin pattern: soft on pressure with floating guan pulse, no cold signs) needs no acrid-warm opening; food-accumulation and water-rheum focal fullness each has its own formula — first differentiate the cause.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

生姜泻心汤Sheng Jiang Xie Xin Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒汗出解之后，胃中不和，心下痞硬，干噫食臭，胁下有水气，腹中雷鸣下利者，生姜泻心汤主之。（157）
方证抓手
心下痞硬干噫食臭胁下有水气腹中雷鸣下利
气机病机
半夏泻心之寒热错杂痞，兼水食之滞：干噫食臭是食不化而气上熏，雷鸣是水走肠间——痞塞的僵局里多了有形之水食搅动。
辨证推理
三泻心的鉴别全在兼症的一两个字：此方独有“干噫食臭、胁下水气”——故君药换成生姜：走散之姜专散水气食滞，干姜减至一两退居温中。一味药的进退、三两与一两的换位，就是对病机中“水食”这一变量的精确回应。
组成与组方逻辑
生姜四两（12g）君
散水气、化食滞之壅
半夏半升，洗（9g）臣
辛开降逆
干姜一两（3g）臣
温中（减量让位于生姜）
黄芩三两（9g）臣
苦降清热
黄连一两（3g）臣
清中厚肠
人参三两（9g）佐
补中
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补中
甘草三两，炙（9g）使
和中
半夏泻心汤减干姜二两、加生姜四两：辛开的总力不变，方向从“守中之温”转“散水之动”。
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方半夏泻心汤甘草泻心汤旋覆代赭汤
禁忌与注意
同半夏泻心汤。
Key Signs
hard focal fullness below the heartdry belching with food odorwater qi below the hypochondriumthunderous rumbling in the abdomen with diarrhea
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The Ban Xia Xie Xin cold-heat jumbled focal fullness, plus water-food stagnation: dry belching with food odor is undigested food and qi steaming up, thunderous rumbling is water coursing the gut — tangible water and food stirring within the focal-fullness deadlock.
Pattern Reasoning
The three Xie Xin formulas are differentiated entirely by a word or two of concurrent signs: this one alone has "dry belching with food odor, water qi below the hypochondrium" — so the sovereign changes to fresh ginger: dispersing ginger specifically scatters water qi and food stagnation, while Gan Jiang, reduced to one liang, steps back to warm the middle. The advance and retreat of one herb, the exchange of three liang and one liang, is a precise response to the variable of "water and food" in the mechanism.
Composition & Logic
Sheng Jiang12gSovereign
Ban Xia9gMinister
Gan Jiang3gMinister
Huang Qin9gMinister
Huang Lian3gMinister
Ren Shen9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao9gEnvoy
Ban Xia Xie Xin Tang with Gan Jiang reduced by two liang and fresh ginger added at four liang: the total acrid-opening force unchanged, the direction shifting from "warming to guard the center" to "movement to disperse water."
Cautions
Same as Ban Xia Xie Xin Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

甘草泻心汤Gan Cao Xie Xin Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒中风，医反下之……其人下利日数十行，谷不化，腹中雷鸣，心下痞硬而满，干呕心烦不得安……此非结热，但以胃中虚，客气上逆，故使硬也，甘草泻心汤主之。（158）
方证抓手
下利日数十行、谷不化心下痞硬而满干呕心烦不得安再下之其痞益甚
气机病机
痞证之最虚一档：屡下之后胃气重虚，客气（无根之逆气）上聚心下而痞硬——条文自注“此非结热，但以胃中虚，客气上逆”，仲景亲手写下病机，痞硬之“硬”竟是虚象。
辨证推理
“硬”最易误导——医见痞硬愈疑有实，再下则“其痞益甚”，条文把这个错误循环原样记录下来作为反面教材。虚痞之硬与实结之硬，鉴别在全身证：利下数十行、谷不化、烦而“不得安”皆虚馁之象。故君药易为炙甘草四两：先把塌陷的中气用甘缓托住，辛开苦降退为辅佐。金匮用本方治狐惑病，后世推及口腔溃疡、白塞诸黏膜病，是三泻心中外延最广的一首。
组成与组方逻辑
甘草四两，炙（12g）君
重用甘缓，固摄重虚之胃气
半夏半升，洗（9g）臣
辛开降逆
干姜三两（9g）臣
温中
黄芩三两（9g）臣
苦降
黄连一两（3g）臣
清中
人参三两（9g）佐
补中（伤寒本无，从金匮补入，理当有之）
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补中
半夏泻心汤重其甘草至四两为君：三泻心同一底盘，君药三换（夏—姜—草），对应痞证的三种偏向（逆—水—虚）。
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方半夏泻心汤生姜泻心汤
禁忌与注意
同前；狐惑等杂病用法详金匮。
Key Signs
diarrhea dozens of times a day with undigested foodhard full focal fullness below the heartdry retching, vexation, unable to restfocal fullness worsening on further purging
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The most deficient gradation of focal fullness: after repeated purging the stomach qi is severely deficient, and guest-qi (rootless counterflow qi) gathers below the heart into hard focal fullness — the text's own note, "this is not bound heat but merely stomach vacancy with guest-qi counterflowing up," is Zhang Ji writing the mechanism in his own hand, the "hardness" of the focal fullness being in fact a deficiency sign.
Pattern Reasoning
"Hardness" most misleads — the physician, seeing hard focal fullness, suspects repletion the more, purges again, and "the focal fullness grows worse"; the text records this error-loop verbatim as a negative example. The hardness of deficiency focal fullness versus the hardness of a repletion bind is differentiated by the whole-body signs: diarrhea dozens of times, undigested food, vexation with "unable to rest" are all feeble-deficiency signs. So the sovereign changes to four liang of honey-fried Gan Cao: first prop up the collapsed middle qi with sweet-moderating, acrid-opening and bitter-descending retreating to assist. The Jin Gui uses this formula for fox-creeping disease, and later ages extended it to mouth ulcers and Behçet-type mucosal diseases — of the three Xie Xin, the one with the widest extension.
Composition & Logic
Gan Cao12gSovereign
Ban Xia9gMinister
Gan Jiang9gMinister
Huang Qin9gMinister
Huang Lian3gMinister
Ren Shen9gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Ban Xia Xie Xin Tang with Gan Cao raised to four liang as sovereign: the three Xie Xin formulas share one base, the sovereign changed thrice (Ban Xia–ginger–Gan Cao), answering the three biases of focal fullness (counterflow–water–deficiency).
Cautions
Same as the preceding; for fox-creeping and other miscellaneous uses see the Jin Gui.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

大黄黄连泻心汤Da Huang Huang Lian Xie Xin Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
心下痞，按之濡，其脉关上浮者，大黄黄连泻心汤主之。（154）
方证抓手
心下痞按之濡关上脉浮心烦或吐衄
气机病机
无形邪热壅聚心下之痞：纯热无寒、纯气无形——关上脉浮示热在中焦气分，按之濡示无有形之结。
辨证推理
本方的灵魂在煎法：麻沸汤（滚水）渍之须臾、绞汁即服，不煎——取二黄轻清之气以泄痞热，弃其重浊之味以免直走肠腑作泻。同一味大黄，煎与渍、取气与取味，是两味药。此“以法驭药”之最精者。与三泻心之别：彼寒热错杂故辛苦并进，此纯热无寒故苦寒独任。
组成与组方逻辑
大黄二两（6g）君
泄热消痞（麻沸汤渍，不取其下）
黄连一两（3g）臣
清心胃之火
二味渍服，轻手拿掉无形之热，如撇去汤面浮沫。
加减
痞而复恶寒汗出者（阳虚于外）：附子（别煮取汁兑入） → 附子泻心汤
热痞与表阳虚并见，寒热异其煎法而同服
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方半夏泻心汤附子泻心汤黄连黄芩泻心汤清胃散
禁忌与注意
寒热错杂之痞（有呕利寒象）非二黄所宜；久煎则成泻下之剂，失本方之义。
Key Signs
focal fullness below the heartsoft on pressurefloating pulse at the guan positionvexation, or vomiting and nosebleed
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Formless pathogenic heat congesting into focal fullness below the heart: pure heat without cold, pure qi without form — floating pulse at the guan shows heat in the middle-burner qi level, soft on pressure shows no tangible bind.
Pattern Reasoning
The soul of this formula is the decoction method: steeped a moment in "boiling-froth soup" (boiling water), the juice wrung out and drunk at once, not boiled — taking the light-clearing qi of the two Huang to discharge the focal-fullness heat, discarding their heavy turbid flavor lest it go straight to the gut and purge. The same Da Huang, boiled versus steeped, taking the qi versus taking the flavor, is two herbs. This is the finest instance of "governing the herb by method." Its distinction from the three Xie Xin: those have jumbled cold and heat so acrid and bitter advance together, this has pure heat without cold so bitter-cold alone takes the task.
Composition & Logic
Da Huang6gSovereign
Huang Lian3gMinister
Two herbs steeped and taken, lifting off formless heat with a light hand, like skimming froth from the surface of a broth.
Modifications
Focal fullness with renewed aversion to cold and sweating (yang deficient at the exterior): Fu Zi (boiled apart, its juice stirred in) → Fu Zi Xie Xin Tang
Heat focal fullness and exterior-yang deficiency together — cold and heat decocted separately yet taken together
Cautions
Jumbled cold-heat focal fullness (with retching, diarrhea, cold signs) is not suited to the two Huang; long boiling makes it a purgative and loses the formula's meaning.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

附子泻心汤Fu Zi Xie Xin Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
心下痞，而复恶寒汗出者，附子泻心汤主之。（155）
方证抓手
心下痞（热痞）恶寒汗出
气机病机
热痞于中而阳虚于表：两个病机方向相反、地界不同——热聚心下当清，卫阳不固当温，一身而寒热两账。
辨证推理
寒热并用之方多矣，本方独绝在“分煎”：三黄滚水渍取其轻清之气走中焦，附子别煮取其醇厚之汁走卫表——同一碗药里两股药力各奔各的战场，互不牵制。这是仲景把“病机分层”原则一路贯彻到煎药操作层面的极致示范：辨证的精度最终要落实为工艺的精度。
组成与组方逻辑
大黄二两（6g）君
渍取轻气泄痞热
黄连一两（3g）臣
清热
黄芩一两（3g）臣
清热
附子一枚，炮，别煮取汁（9g）佐
独煎浓汁温固表阳
大黄黄连泻心汤加黄芩，附子汁兑服：清的更全，温的独立。
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方大黄黄连泻心汤桂枝加附子汤附子细辛黄连黄芩汤
禁忌与注意
恶寒属表邪未解者当先解表，勿误认阳虚。
Key Signs
focal fullness below the heart (heat focal fullness)aversion to coldsweating
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Heat focal fullness in the middle with yang deficiency at the exterior: two mechanism-directions opposed, two territories different — heat gathered below the heart should be cleared, defensive yang unconsolidated should be warmed, one body with two accounts of cold and heat.
Pattern Reasoning
Formulas combining cold and heat are many, but this one is unique in "separate decoction": the three Huang steeped in boiling water to take their light-clearing qi for the middle burner, Fu Zi boiled apart to take its rich juice for the defensive exterior — two medicinal forces in one bowl each rushing to its own battlefield, neither restraining the other. This is Zhang Ji carrying the principle of "layering the mechanism" all the way down to the operation of decoction: the precision of pattern differentiation must finally become the precision of technique.
Composition & Logic
Da Huang6gSovereign
Huang Lian3gMinister
Huang Qin3gMinister
Fu Zi9gAssistant
Da Huang Huang Lian Xie Xin Tang with Huang Qin added and Fu Zi juice stirred in: the clearing made more complete, the warming kept independent.
Cautions
Aversion to cold from an unresolved exterior pathogen should have the exterior resolved first — do not mistake it for yang deficiency.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

黄连汤Huang Lian Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒，胸中有热，胃中有邪气，腹中痛，欲呕吐者，黄连汤主之。（173）
方证抓手
胸中烦热腹中痛（喜温）欲呕吐
气机病机
上热下寒，格拒不交：热踞胸中而欲呕，寒踞腹中而作痛——与泻心证寒热“绞在一处”不同，此证寒热“分居两地”，中间的通道断了。
辨证推理
与半夏泻心汤只差一味：黄芩换桂枝，黄连一两增三两。差之毫厘的背后是病机地图的不同：泻心证寒热错杂于心下一点，只需就地辛开苦降；此证热在上寒在下、上下不相往来，故撤去助芩连清降之力，换桂枝专司“交通”——温而上行，引上热下达、领下寒得温。读方对比至一味之差，是训练病机空间感的最好功课。
组成与组方逻辑
黄连三两（9g）君
清胸中之热
干姜三两（9g）臣
温腹中之寒
桂枝三两（9g）臣
辛温通阳，交通上下
半夏半升，洗（9g）佐
降逆止呕
人参二两（6g）佐
补中
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补中
甘草三两，炙（9g）使
和中
黄连清上、干姜温下、桂枝通其道，参枣草护其中——上下分治而以“通”为枢。
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方半夏泻心汤栀子干姜汤附子细辛黄连黄芩汤乌梅丸（古本剂量参照页）
禁忌与注意
寒热错杂于心下之痞（非上下分居）者归泻心；纯上热或纯下寒者各从其类。
Key Signs
vexing heat in the chestabdominal pain (better with warmth)urge to vomit
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Heat above, cold below, blockaded and not intercommunicating: heat occupying the chest gives the urge to vomit, cold occupying the abdomen gives pain — unlike the Xie Xin pattern where cold and heat "twist in one place," here cold and heat "dwell in two places" with the passage between them severed.
Pattern Reasoning
It differs from Ban Xia Xie Xin Tang by one herb: Huang Qin swapped for Gui Zhi, Huang Lian raised from one liang to three. Behind this hair's-breadth difference is a different mechanism-map: the Xie Xin pattern has cold and heat jumbled at the single point below the heart, needing only local acrid-opening and bitter-descending; this pattern has heat above and cold below with no traffic between, so the Huang Qin that aids clearing-descent is withdrawn and Gui Zhi substituted to govern "communication" alone — warm and ascending, conducting the upper heat down and leading the lower cold to warmth. Comparing formulas down to a single-herb difference is the best exercise for training a spatial sense of mechanism.
Composition & Logic
Huang Lian9gSovereign
Gan Jiang9gMinister
Gui Zhi9gMinister
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Ren Shen6gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao9gEnvoy
Huang Lian clears above, Gan Jiang warms below, Gui Zhi frees the route, ginseng-jujube-Gan Cao protect the center — treating above and below separately with "freeing" as the pivot.
Cautions
Jumbled cold-heat focal fullness below the heart (not cold and heat dwelling separately above and below) belongs to the Xie Xin formulas; pure upper heat or pure lower cold each follows its own kind.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

旋覆代赭汤Xuan Fu Dai Zhe Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒发汗，若吐若下，解后，心下痞硬，噫气不除者，旋覆代赭汤主之。（161）
方证抓手
心下痞硬噫气不除（嗳气频频不休）汗吐下之后
气机病机
胃虚痰阻，虚气上逆：诸法之后胃气已虚，痰浊乘虚聚于心下（痞硬），胃失和降而虚气频频上冲（噫气不除）——与泻心之痞同地而异质：彼是寒热之争，此是虚与痰。
辨证推理
“噫气不除”四字定方向：泻心证也可有噫（生姜泻心之干噫食臭），但服泻心当除，不除者非寒热错杂，是胃虚痰阻托不住气——故弃芩连之苦寒，改花赭之降镇。代赭石仅一两是眼目：矿石重坠，多则镇伤已虚之胃气，只借一点坠力引旋覆花下行。虚人用镇法，剂量即分寸。
组成与组方逻辑
旋覆花三两（9g）君
下气消痰，软痞散结（诸花皆升，旋覆独降）
代赭石一两（3g）臣
重镇降逆（轻用，防伤胃气）
生姜五两（15g）臣
重用散水和胃
半夏半升，洗（9g）佐
化痰降逆
人参二两（6g）佐
补吐下后之虚
大枣十二枚（4枚）佐
补中
甘草三两，炙（9g）使
和中
旋覆花降其痰气、代赭石坠其上逆、姜夏化其痰饮、参枣草补其虚——降中寓补，镇不伤正。
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方半夏泻心汤生姜泻心汤小半夏汤半夏厚朴汤镇肝熄风汤
禁忌与注意
实证嗳气（食滞肝郁）者不需参枣草之补；代赭石不可重投于虚人。
Key Signs
hard focal fullness below the heartunremitting belchingafter sweating, vomiting, or purging
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Stomach deficiency with phlegm obstruction, deficiency-qi counterflowing up: after various methods the stomach qi is deficient, phlegm-turbidity gathers below the heart into the vacancy (hard focal fullness), and the stomach, losing harmonious descent, has deficiency-qi surging up repeatedly (unremitting belching) — same location as the Xie Xin focal fullness but different in substance: that is a struggle of cold and heat, this is deficiency plus phlegm.
Pattern Reasoning
The four words "unremitting belching" set the direction: the Xie Xin pattern can also have belching (the dry belching with food odor of Sheng Jiang Xie Xin), but taking a Xie Xin should remove it; if not removed, it is not jumbled cold and heat but stomach vacancy with phlegm unable to hold the qi — so the bitter-cold Huang Qin–Huang Lian are discarded for the descending-subduing Xuan Fu Hua–Dai Zhe Shi. That Dai Zhe Shi is only one liang is the eye: a heavy mineral, in excess it would subdue and harm the already-deficient stomach qi, so only a touch of its weighting force is borrowed to lead Xuan Fu Hua down. Using a subduing method in the deficient, the dose is the measure of discretion.
Composition & Logic
Xuan Fu Hua9gSovereign
Dai Zhe Shi3gMinister
Sheng Jiang15gMinister
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Ren Shen6gAssistant
Da Zao4 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao9gEnvoy
Xuan Fu Hua directs down phlegm-qi, Dai Zhe Shi weighs down the counterflow, ginger and Ban Xia transform phlegm-rheum, ginseng-jujube-Gan Cao supplement the deficiency — supplementing lodged within descending, subduing without harming the upright.
Cautions
Repletion belching (food stagnation, Liver constraint) needs no ginseng-jujube-Gan Cao supplementation; Dai Zhe Shi must not be heavily given to the deficient.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

大陷胸汤Da Xian Xiong Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，脉浮而动数……医反下之……阳气内陷，心下因硬，则为结胸，大陷胸汤主之。（134）伤寒六七日，结胸热实，脉沉而紧，心下痛，按之石硬者，大陷胸汤主之。（135）
方证抓手
心下痛、按之石硬脉沉而紧短气烦躁甚则从心下至少腹硬满痛不可近
气机病机
水热互结于胸膈心下：表证误下，热陷于内与素有之水饮相搏，结成有形——“石硬”“痛不可近”皆有形实邪之证，与痞之无形濡软天壤之别。
辨证推理
结胸与痞的分界，条文给了触诊标准：按之痛且石硬者结胸，满而不痛按之濡者痞——一只手就能完成的鉴别，定下攻与开两条完全不同的路。水热已互结成形，非气分药所能解，故大黄芒硝泻其热、甘遂末逐其水，水热两路同攻。甘遂一钱匕以末冲服（不入煎），峻药用其锐。此方之峻与其禁忌同读：脉浮大者不可下、结胸证悉具而烦躁者亦死——攻法的边界是正气。
组成与组方逻辑
大黄六两（18g）君
泻热破结（先煮）
芒硝一升（15g）臣
咸寒软坚
甘遂一钱匕，末（1g）佐
峻逐水饮，直捣水结之巢
硝黄攻其热结，甘遂专攻其水，三味皆锐，无一味守中之药——峻剂不留缓冲，中病即止。
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方小陷胸汤半夏泻心汤大柴胡汤
禁忌与注意
脉浮大者不可下（表未罢、正欲外争）；虚人禁投；得快利止后服。孕妇绝对禁忌（甘遂）。
Key Signs
pain below the heart, stone-hard on pressuredeep tight pulseshortness of breath, vexation and agitationin severe cases, hard full pain from below the heart to the lower abdomen, unbearable to touch
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Water and heat bound together in the chest-diaphragm and below the heart: an exterior pattern mistakenly purged, heat sinking within contends with pre-existing water-rheum and binds into tangible form — "stone-hard," "unbearable to touch" are all signs of a tangible repletion pathogen, a world apart from focal fullness's formless softness.
Pattern Reasoning
For the boundary of chest-bind and focal fullness, the text gives a palpation standard: painful and stone-hard on pressure is chest-bind, full but not painful and soft on pressure is focal fullness — a differentiation completed with one hand, settling two utterly different roads of attacking versus opening. Water and heat already bound into form cannot be resolved by qi-level herbs, so Da Huang–Mang Xiao drain the heat and powdered Gan Sui expels the water, attacking water and heat on two roads. Gan Sui, one qian-bi as powder stirred in (not decocted), uses a fierce herb for its sharpness. Read the fierceness of this formula with its contraindications: for a floating large pulse it may not be purged; with the full chest-bind pattern plus vexation and agitation, death also follows — the boundary of the attacking method is the upright qi.
Composition & Logic
Da Huang18gSovereign
Mang Xiao15gMinister
Gan Sui1gAssistant
Mang Xiao and Da Huang attack the heat bind, Gan Sui attacks the water specifically, all three herbs sharp with not one guarding the center — a fierce formula leaves no buffer, so stop the moment the disease yields.
Cautions
For a floating large pulse one may not purge (exterior not yet done, upright striving outward); contraindicated in the deficient; stop further doses once swift diarrhea comes. Absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy (Gan Sui).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

小陷胸汤Xiao Xian Xiong Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
小结胸病，正在心下，按之则痛，脉浮滑者，小陷胸汤主之。（138）
方证抓手
正在心下（范围局限）按之则痛（不按不痛）脉浮滑
气机病机
痰热互结于心下：与大结胸同为“有形互结”，但结的是痰而非水、位局限于心下而不及少腹、按之才痛而非拒不可近、脉浮滑而非沉紧——四个刻度全部低一档。
辨证推理
大小陷胸对读是“同一病机不同烈度”的标尺教学：水热石硬用硝黄甘遂之峻攻，痰热按痛用连夏蒌之清化——病邪的形质（水/痰）、范围、硬度、脉象共同决定攻伐的档位。本方连夏蒌三味平和，后世治痰热胸痹、胃脘灼痛应用极广，是陷胸法向杂病的延伸口。
组成与组方逻辑
黄连一两（3g）君
清心下之热
半夏半升，洗（9g）臣
化痰开结降逆
栝楼实大者一枚（20g）臣
清热涤痰，宽胸润下（先煮）
黄连清热、半夏化痰——苦降辛开仍是底层语法；栝楼实既助清又助化，且润而不峻，全方以「小」立名。
类方鉴别
泻心·陷胸类方大陷胸汤半夏泻心汤栝楼薤白白酒汤温胆汤黄连温胆汤
禁忌与注意
大结胸之石硬拒按此方力不及；纯寒痰无热者去连而从温化。
Key Signs
located right below the heart (limited in range)painful on pressure (not painful without pressure)floating slippery pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Phlegm and heat bound together below the heart: like the great chest-bind a "tangible binding," but binding phlegm not water, limited below the heart and not reaching the lower abdomen, painful only on pressure and not unbearable to touch, floating slippery pulse not deep tight — all four gradations one notch lower.
Pattern Reasoning
Reading the great and small chest-bind together is a graduated teaching of "one mechanism, differing intensity": water-heat stone-hardness uses the fierce attack of Mang Xiao–Da Huang–Gan Sui, phlegm-heat pain-on-pressure uses the clearing-transformation of Huang Lian–Ban Xia–Gua Lou — the pathogen's substance (water/phlegm), range, hardness and pulse together decide the gradation of assault. This formula's three mild herbs — Huang Lian, Ban Xia, Gua Lou — were very widely applied by later ages to phlegm-heat chest bi and burning epigastric pain, the extension of the chest-bind method into miscellaneous disease.
Composition & Logic
Huang Lian3gSovereign
Ban Xia9gMinister
Gua Lou Shi20gMinister
Huang Lian clears heat, Ban Xia transforms phlegm — bitter-descending, acrid-opening still the underlying grammar; Gua Lou Shi both aids clearing and aids transforming, moist yet not harsh, making the whole formula truly "small" as named.
Cautions
The stone-hardness of great chest-bind refusing pressure is beyond this formula's power; for pure cold phlegm without heat, remove Huang Lian and follow warm-transformation.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

大承气汤Da Cheng Qi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
阳明病，脉迟，虽汗出不恶寒者……手足濈然汗出者，此大便已硬也，大承气汤主之。（208）伤寒若吐若下后不解……日晡所发潮热，不恶寒，独语如见鬼状……大承气汤主之。（212）
方证抓手
痞满燥实俱备潮热谵语手足濈然汗出腹满痛拒按脉沉实
气机病机
阳明腑实，燥屎内结：“降”之通道被有形燥屎彻底堵死——腑气不降则满，浊热上熏则谵语，热结于里则日晡潮热（阳明主令之时应时而张），津液被劫则燥。痞（气塞）满（胀）燥（干）实（有形）四字是这条堵死通道的四个断面。
辨证推理
下法之峻剂，用与不用全在“实”之确认：潮热、手足濈然汗出、腹满痛拒按、脉沉实——多证合参确认燥屎已成，方可放手；“若不大便六七日，恐有燥屎，欲知之法，少与小承气汤，汤入腹中，转失气者，此有燥屎也”——仲景甚至设计了小承气试探法，以失气与否作诊断性治疗。攻下如用兵，情报确认先于总攻。三承气的份量刻度见类方卡。
组成与组方逻辑
大黄四两，酒洗（12g）君
荡涤肠胃，推陈致新（后下取其锐）
芒硝三合（9g）臣
咸寒软坚，化燥屎之坚（冲服）
厚朴半斤，炙（24g）佐
重用宽肠下气，刨开弥漫之满
枳实五枚，炙（12g）佐
破结导滞，凿开聚结之痞
厚朴倍大黄，先刨满、再凿痞（枳实）、后软坚（芒硝）攻积（大黄后下）——除满、破结、软坚、攻下四道工序一气呵成。先煮朴枳，后纳大黄，芒硝冲服：工序即是煎序。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方小承气汤调胃承气汤大柴胡汤麻子仁丸白虎汤大黄香蒲汤大黄黄芩地黄牡丹汤大黄厚朴甘草汤
禁忌与注意
表证未解者禁下；阳明病心下硬满者不可攻（恐邪高位）；燥屎未成而误下则痞利变生；得下余勿服。液枯之“无水舟停”当增液行舟，非承气独任。
Key Signs
fullness, distension, dryness and hardness all presenttidal fever and delirious speechpersistent sweating of the hands and feetabdominal fullness and pain refusing pressuresunken, replete pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Yang Ming bowel repletion, dry stool bound within: the channel of "descending" is utterly blocked by tangible dry stool — bowel qi not descending gives fullness, turbid heat steaming up gives delirious speech, heat bound in the interior gives late-afternoon tidal fever (flaring on schedule at Yang Ming's governing hour), fluid plundered gives dryness. The four words focal-fullness (qi blocked), fullness (distension), dryness (parched), repletion (tangible) are four cross-sections of this blocked channel.
Pattern Reasoning
The fierce formula of the purging method — whether to use it rests entirely on confirming "repletion": tidal fever, persistent sweating of the hands and feet, abdominal fullness and pain refusing pressure, deep replete pulse — multiple signs cross-checked confirm dry stool has formed before one may act freely. "If there has been no stool for six or seven days and dry stool is suspected, the way to know is to give a little Xiao Cheng Qi Tang; if, entering the belly, it makes flatus turn, there is dry stool" — Zhang Ji even designs a Xiao Cheng Qi probe, using flatus as diagnostic treatment. Attacking and purging is like deploying troops: confirm intelligence before the general assault. The dose-gradations of the three Cheng Qi formulas are in the class card.
Composition & Logic
Da Huang12gSovereign
Mang Xiao9gMinister
Hou Po24gAssistant
Zhi Shi12gAssistant
Hou Po doubling Da Huang: first plane off the fullness, then chisel the focal blockage (Zhi Shi), then soften hardness (Mang Xiao) and attack accumulation (Da Huang added last) — eliminating fullness, breaking binding, softening hardness, and purging accomplished in one sweep. Boil Hou Po and Zhi Shi first, then add Da Huang, then stir in Mang Xiao: the sequence of steps is the sequence of decoction.
Cautions
For an unresolved exterior pattern, purging is contraindicated; in Yang Ming disease with hard fullness below the heart one may not attack (the pathogen is too high); mistaken purging before dry stool has formed breeds focal fullness and diarrhea; stop further doses once it moves. Fluid-withered "no water, the boat stalled" should have water increased to float the boat, not fierce attack.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

小承气汤Xiao Cheng Qi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
阳明病……其热不潮，未可与承气汤；若腹大满不通者，可与小承气汤，微和胃气，勿令至大泄下。（208）
方证抓手
腹大满不通便硬而热不潮谵语（轻）脉滑而疾
气机病机
阳明腑实之轻者：痞满为主而燥坚未甚——通道堵了，但堵的是气滞与初结之便，未成盘踞之燥屎。
辨证推理
“其热不潮，未可与承气”——潮热是燥屎的信号弹，热不潮则实未全成，故去芒硝之软坚（无坚可软）、减朴枳之量，且三味同煎不后下——同一味大黄，同煎则缓、后下则锐，煎法本身就是剂量。本方另一重身份是大承气的侦察兵：先与小承气，转失气者有燥屎可攻，不转失气者慎攻——一方两用，治疗与诊断一体。
组成与组方逻辑
大黄四两（12g）君
泻热通便（与朴枳同煎，力较缓）
厚朴二两，炙（6g）臣
下气除满（仅大承气四分之一量）
枳实三枚大者，炙（9g）佐
破滞消痞
大承气去芒硝、朴枳减量、三味同煎：四道工序撤掉软坚一道，其余三道全部降档。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方大承气汤调胃承气汤栀子厚朴汤大黄厚朴甘草汤枳实厚朴白术甘草汤保和丸
禁忌与注意
同大承气而戒峻：微和胃气，勿令大泄下。
Key Signs
great abdominal fullness and obstructionhard stool with heat but no tidal fevermild delirious speechslippery rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The lighter form of Yang Ming bowel repletion: focal fullness predominant with dryness and hardness not yet severe — the channel blocked, but blocked by qi stagnation and early-bound stool, not yet entrenched dry stool.
Pattern Reasoning
"If the heat is not tidal, Cheng Qi may not yet be given" — tidal fever is the flare of dry stool; heat not tidal means repletion not fully formed, so Mang Xiao's softening is removed (no hardness to soften) and Hou Po–Zhi Shi reduced, and the three boiled together without adding Da Huang last — the same Da Huang, boiled together is gentle, added last is sharp; the decoction method is itself the dose. This formula's other identity is Da Cheng Qi's scout: give Xiao Cheng Qi first, and if flatus turns there is dry stool to attack, if not, attack cautiously — one formula two uses, treatment and diagnosis as one.
Composition & Logic
Da Huang12gSovereign
Hou Po6gMinister
Zhi Shi9gAssistant
Da Cheng Qi with Mang Xiao removed and Hou Po–Zhi Shi reduced, all three boiled together: the softening step withdrawn, the other three steps all stepped down.
Cautions
Same prohibitions as Da Cheng Qi but guarding against fierceness: mildly harmonize the stomach qi, do not cause great purging.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

调胃承气汤Tiao Wei Cheng Qi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病三日，发汗不解，蒸蒸发热者，属胃也，调胃承气汤主之。（248）伤寒吐后，腹胀满者，与调胃承气汤。（249）
方证抓手
蒸蒸发热心烦腹胀满而无痞坚之甚不吐不下
气机病机
燥热初结于胃：热已成实之势（蒸蒸发热由里向外，与翕翕之表热异）而气滞未甚——燥热为主、痞满为次，与小承气恰好互为镜像。
辨证推理
三承气各主一偏：燥热甚而痞满轻者用此（硝黄清润其燥热，不用朴枳——无满可除），痞满甚而燥坚轻者小承气（朴枳大黄，不用芒硝），俱备俱重者大承气。甘草一味是本方性格所在：缓硝黄之下趋，使药力多留于胃、少走于肠，“调胃”之名由此——攻下药加一味甘缓，攻势即变清势。
组成与组方逻辑
大黄四两，清酒洗（12g）君
泻胃中之燥热
芒硝半升（12g）臣
软坚润燥
甘草二两，炙（6g）佐使
甘缓硝黄之急，留药力于胃
硝黄相须清泻燥热，甘草缓其急而调其胃。少少温服之，取和而不取下。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方大承气汤小承气汤麻子仁丸大黄黄芩地黄牡丹汤桃核承气汤增液汤
禁忌与注意
同承气诸禁；本方义在调不在攻，服法“少少温服”不可改为顿服峻投。
Key Signs
steaming fevervexationabdominal distension without severe focal hardnessneither vomiting nor diarrhea
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Dry-heat first binding in the stomach: heat already at the momentum of repletion (steaming fever from within outward, unlike the diffuse exterior heat) while qi stagnation is not yet severe — dry-heat predominant, focal fullness secondary, exactly the mirror image of Xiao Cheng Qi.
Pattern Reasoning
The three Cheng Qi each govern one bias: for severe dry-heat with light focal fullness use this (Mang Xiao–Da Huang clear and moisten the dry-heat, no Hou Po–Zhi Shi — no fullness to remove); for severe focal fullness with light dryness use Xiao Cheng Qi (Hou Po, Zhi Shi, Da Huang, no Mang Xiao); for both present and severe use Da Cheng Qi. The single Gan Cao is this formula's character: it moderates the downward drive of Mang Xiao–Da Huang, keeping the potency more in the stomach and less in the gut — hence the name "regulate the stomach." A purging formula plus one sweet-moderating herb turns its attack into a clearing.
Composition & Logic
Da Huang12gSovereign
Mang Xiao12gMinister
Gan Cao6gAssistant-Envoy
Mang Xiao and Da Huang reinforce each other to clear and drain dry-heat, Gan Cao tempers the urgency and regulates the stomach. Taken warm in small sips, seeking harmonization rather than purging.
Cautions
Same as the Cheng Qi prohibitions; this formula's meaning is regulating, not attacking, and the method "take a little at a time, warm" must not be changed to a single fierce draught.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麻子仁丸Ma Zi Ren Wan

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
趺阳脉浮而涩，浮则胃气强，涩则小便数，浮涩相搏，大便则硬，其脾为约，麻子仁丸主之。（247）
方证抓手
大便硬小便数腹无所苦趺阳脉浮涩
气机病机
脾约证：胃热气盛（浮则胃气强）灼夺脾之津液转输，津偏渗于膀胱（小便数）而不还于肠道（大便硬）——不是没有津液，是津液走错了门。
辨证推理
便硬而“腹无所苦”，与承气证的满痛拒按分处两个世界：彼是燥屎结聚之急症，此是津液分配失衡之常态（今之习惯性便秘多类此）。故不作汤剂之荡涤而作蜜丸之缓润：麻仁杏仁白蜜以脂润其道，小承气之骨架（黄朴枳）以微力推之，芍药养其阴——润七分、通三分，渐加以知为度。剂型即治法：丸者缓也。
组成与组方逻辑
麻子仁二升（20g）君
多脂润肠，濡燥结
芍药半斤（12g）臣
养阴和里
枳实半斤，炙（9g）佐
破结
大黄一斤（12g）佐
通下（丸剂缓图）
厚朴一尺，炙（9g）佐
下气
杏仁一升（9g）佐
降气润肠
小承气加三润（麻仁杏仁蜂蜜）加一养（芍药），蜜丸小量渐进——攻下阵营里的温柔派。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方调胃承气汤大承气汤桔梗甘草枳实芍药加地黄牡丹汤增液汤
禁忌与注意
津亏血枯之老人便秘可师其意而慎其黄朴；孕妇慎用。
Key Signs
hard stoolfrequent urinationno abdominal distressfloating choppy Fu Yang pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Spleen-bound pattern: stomach heat and exuberant qi (floating pulse means strong stomach qi) scorch and rob the Spleen's fluid transport, fluid leaking one-sidedly to the bladder (frequent urination) and not returning to the gut (hard stool) — it is not that there is no fluid, but that fluid has gone to the wrong door.
Pattern Reasoning
Hard stool with "no abdominal distress" is a world apart from the Cheng Qi pattern's fullness-pain refusing pressure: that is the acute condition of bound dry stool, this the ordinary state of imbalanced fluid distribution (much of today's habitual constipation is of this kind). So not a decoction's flushing but a honey-pill's gentle moistening: Huo Ma Ren, Xing Ren and white honey moisten the road with their oils, the Xiao Cheng Qi skeleton (Da Huang, Hou Po, Zhi Shi) pushes with mild force, Shao Yao nourishes the yin — seven parts moistening, three parts freeing, increased gradually to the measure of effect. The dosage form is the method: a pill means gentleness.
Composition & Logic
Ma Zi Ren20gSovereign
Shao Yao12gMinister
Zhi Shi9gAssistant
Da Huang12gAssistant
Hou Po9gAssistant
Xing Ren9gAssistant
Xiao Cheng Qi plus three moisteners (Huo Ma Ren, Xing Ren, honey) plus one nourisher (Shao Yao), in small honey-pills taken progressively — the gentle wing of the purging camp.
Cautions
For the elderly with constipation from fluid depletion and blood withering one may follow its intent but use Da Huang-Hou Po cautiously; use with caution in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

白虎汤Bai Hu Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒脉浮滑，此以表有热，里有寒（注：历代多认为当作“里有热”），白虎汤主之。（176）三阳合病，腹满身重……口不仁面垢，谵语遗尿……若自汗出者，白虎汤主之。（219）
方证抓手
大热大汗大渴脉洪大（浮滑）
气机病机
阳明经热弥漫气分：热无形无结、充斥表里内外——热蒸于外则大热大汗，热灼于内则大渴，热鼓于脉则洪大。与腑实之“结”相对，此为“散”之热：满屋子的火焰而非炉膛里的炭块。
辨证推理
清与下是阳明两条路，走错互为灾难：无形之热误下则热陷（结胸痞利变生），有形之结误清则杯水车薪。鉴别在“形”：白虎证虽谵语腹满而按之无物、大便不结、汗出濈濈；承气证潮热便闭、腹满痛拒按。石膏辛寒清而兼透（热仍有外达之路），知母苦润清而兼滋（热已伤津）——清热与存阴一体，粳米甘草护住中焦这口锅。四大症是教学口诀，临证“自汗出”与“无表证之恶寒”更是硬指征。
组成与组方逻辑
石膏一斤，碎（48g）君
辛甘大寒，清透气分弥漫之热
知母六两（18g）臣
苦润清热，滋已伤之阴
粳米六合（15g）佐
养胃护津（米熟汤成）
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
和中缓寒凉伤胃
石膏知母清滋相合，米草护中——大寒之剂必设护中之佐，与大青龙姜枣同一配伍之德。
加减
大烦渴不解、时时恶风、背微恶寒（津气两伤）：人参三两 → 白虎加人参汤
汗多伤气、渴甚伤津，加参双补
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方白虎加人参汤大承气汤麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤竹叶石膏汤大黄香蒲汤地黄知母黄连阿胶汤石膏黄连黄芩甘草汤白虎加地黄汤
禁忌与注意
表不解之无汗发热禁用（凉遏其表）；真寒假热之面赤烦躁（阴盛格阳）误投则毙——脉之虚实、渴之喜冷喜热、四肢之温凉是分水岭。
Key Signs
great heatprofuse sweatinggreat thirstsurging large pulse (floating slippery)
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Yang Ming channel heat pervading the qi level: the heat is formless and unbound, filling exterior and interior, inside and out — heat steaming outward gives great heat and great sweat, heat scorching within gives great thirst, heat drumming in the vessels gives a surging large pulse. Against the "bind" of bowel repletion, this is the heat of "dispersal": a roomful of flames, not a lump of coal in the furnace.
Pattern Reasoning
Clearing and purging are Yang Ming's two roads, and taking the wrong one is mutual disaster: formless heat mistakenly purged sinks the heat (chest-bind, focal fullness, diarrhea arise), tangible bind mistakenly cleared is a cup of water on a cartload of fire. The differentiation is in "form": the Bai Hu pattern, though with delirious speech and abdominal fullness, has nothing on pressure, no bound stool, persistent sweating; the Cheng Qi pattern has tidal fever, blocked stool, fullness-pain refusing pressure. Shi Gao, acrid-cold, clears with venting (heat still has an outward route); Zhi Mu, bitter-moist, clears with enriching (heat has already harmed fluid) — clearing heat and preserving yin as one, with rice and Gan Cao guarding the pot of the middle burner. The four bigs are a teaching mnemonic; clinically "spontaneous sweating" and "aversion to cold without an exterior pattern" are the harder indicators.
Composition & Logic
Shi Gao48gSovereign
Zhi Mu18gMinister
Jing Mi15gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Shi Gao and Zhi Mu unite clearing with enriching, rice and Gan Cao protect the center — a greatly cold formula must set an assistant to guard the center, the same combinatory virtue as the ginger-jujube in Da Qing Long.
Modifications
Great vexation-thirst unrelieved, intermittent aversion to wind, slight back aversion to cold (fluid and qi both harmed): Ginseng three liang → Bai Hu Jia Ren Shen Tang
Profuse sweat harms qi, severe thirst harms fluid; add ginseng to supplement both
Cautions
Contraindicated in unresolved exterior with no sweat and fever (it would trap the exterior with cold); mistaken use in true cold with false heat, red face and agitation (yin exuberance blockading yang), is fatal — the pulse's deficiency or repletion, thirst for cold or warm, and warmth or coldness of the limbs are the watershed.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

白虎加人参汤Bai Hu Jia Ren Shen Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
服桂枝汤，大汗出后，大烦渴不解，脉洪大者，白虎加人参汤主之。（26）伤寒若吐若下后……时时恶风，大渴，舌上干燥而烦，欲饮水数升者，白虎加人参汤主之。（168）
方证抓手
大烦渴不解、欲饮水数升大汗后脉洪大（按之已乏力）时时恶风、背微恶寒
气机病机
气分大热而津气已伤：热势未减，防线（津与气）已破——“时时恶风”“背微恶寒”非表证，是汗多卫气随津而泄、失其温分肉之职。
辨证推理
白虎与白虎加参之间隔着一个“虚”字，指征有三：渴由“大渴”升级为“欲饮水数升”而不解（津伤深）、汗后恶风背寒（气伤露）、脉洪大而按之芤（内已空）。热盛而正伤，纯清则正不支，故加人参三两于大寒队伍中双补津气——祛邪方阵里安放扶正一子，与小柴胡之参同一战略思想。后世治消渴（渴饮无度）亦取此方，即认准“热盛津气两伤”这一病机。
组成与组方逻辑
石膏一斤，碎（48g）君
清气分大热
知母六两（18g）臣
清润滋阴
人参三两（9g）臣
补气生津，救汗后之虚
粳米六合（15g）佐
养胃
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
和中
白虎汤原局加人参：清热之势不减，添生津益气一路。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方白虎汤竹叶石膏汤白虎加地黄汤竹叶石膏汤（伤暑篇用）白虎加黄连阿胶汤白虎加桂枝人参芍药汤人参石膏汤附子汤
禁忌与注意
同白虎；无虚象之实热不必早加参（甘温恋邪）。
Key Signs
great vexing thirst unrelieved, drinking water by the quartsurging large pulse after profuse sweating (already forceless on pressure)intermittent aversion to wind, slight aversion to cold on the back
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Great qi-level heat with fluid and qi already harmed: the heat undiminished, the defensive line (fluid and qi) already breached — "intermittent aversion to wind" and "slight aversion to cold on the back" are not an exterior pattern but the defensive qi leaking out with the copious sweat and fluid, failing its duty of warming the flesh.
Pattern Reasoning
Between Bai Hu and Bai Hu plus ginseng lies the single word "deficiency," with three indicators: thirst upgraded from "great thirst" to "wishing to drink water by the quart" yet unrelieved (deep fluid damage), aversion to wind and back cold after sweating (qi damage exposed), surging large pulse hollow on pressure (already empty within). Heat exuberant and upright harmed, pure clearing leaves the upright unsupported, so three liang of ginseng is added within the greatly cold troop to doubly supplement fluid and qi — placing an upright-supporting piece within the pathogen-dispelling array, the same strategic thought as the ginseng in Xiao Chai Hu. Later ages also used this formula for dispersion-thirst (immoderate thirst and drinking), recognizing the same mechanism of "heat exuberant, fluid and qi both harmed."
Composition & Logic
Shi Gao48gSovereign
Zhi Mu18gMinister
Ren Shen9gMinister
Jing Mi15gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The Bai Hu Tang configuration with ginseng added: the heat-clearing force undiminished, a route of engendering fluid and boosting qi added.
Cautions
Same as Bai Hu; for repletion-heat without deficiency signs do not add ginseng early (sweet-warm clings to the pathogen).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

竹叶石膏汤Zhu Ye Shi Gao Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒解后，虚羸少气，气逆欲吐，竹叶石膏汤主之。（397）
方证抓手
大病解后虚羸少气气逆欲吐余热未清（低热心烦口干）
气机病机
热病之尾声：大邪已去而余焰未熄，正气（气阴两分）已残——热与虚同在，但两者都只剩三分。清之太过则伤残阳，补之太急则恋余热。
辨证推理
这是白虎系的“善后方”：把白虎去知母之苦（虚人畏苦寒之过）、以竹叶之轻清易其半壁，加麦冬人参大队养阴益气，再以半夏一味辛温反佐——在滋腻队伍里安一味燥药，使补而不滞、并降其欲吐之逆。热病瘥后调理之法自此立范：清余热三分、补气阴七分。与白虎加参对读：彼热七虚三，此热三虚七——同一光谱上的攻守易位。
组成与组方逻辑
竹叶二把（9g）君
轻清透泄余热
石膏一斤（30g）君
清未尽之热
麦门冬一升（18g）臣
滋养被劫之肺胃之阴
人参二两（6g）臣
补虚羸之气
半夏半升，洗（9g）佐
降逆止吐（反佐群凉，滋而不腻）
粳米半升（12g）佐
养胃
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
和中
竹叶石膏清其余热，参麦米草补其气阴，半夏反佐降逆——七味而攻补进退之节全。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方白虎加人参汤白虎汤竹叶石膏汤（伤暑篇用）人参石膏汤麦门冬汤
禁忌与注意
余热尚盛（高热汗出脉洪）者仍属白虎之地；纯虚无热者又当纯补。
Key Signs
emaciation and shortness of qi after major illnessqi counterflow with urge to vomitresidual heat uncleared (low fever, vexation, dry mouth)
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The coda of a febrile disease: the great pathogen gone but the residual flame not yet quenched, the upright qi (both qi and yin) already remnant — heat and deficiency coexisting, but each with only three parts left. Clear too much and harm the remnant yang; supplement too fast and cling to the residual heat.
Pattern Reasoning
This is the Bai Hu family's "aftercare formula": remove Bai Hu's bitter Zhi Mu (the deficient shun excess bitter-cold), replace half with the light-clearing Zhu Ye, add a large troop of Mai Dong and ginseng to nourish yin and boost qi, then one acrid-warm Ban Xia as counter-assistant — placing a drying herb within an enriching troop, so it supplements without stagnating and descends the urge to vomit. The method of regulation after a febrile disease resolves takes its paradigm here: clear three parts residual heat, supplement seven parts qi and yin. Read against Bai Hu plus ginseng: that is heat seven, deficiency three; this is heat three, deficiency seven — an exchange of attack and defense on the same spectrum.
Composition & Logic
Zhu Ye9gSovereign
Shi Gao30gSovereign
Mai Men Dong18gMinister
Ren Shen6gMinister
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Jing Mi12gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Zhu Ye and Shi Gao clear the residual heat; ginseng, Mai Dong, rice and Gan Cao supplement qi and yin; Ban Xia as counter-assistant directs down counterflow — seven herbs, yet the full rhythm of attacking and supplementing, advancing and retreating.
Cautions
Where residual heat is still exuberant (high fever, sweating, surging pulse) it remains Bai Hu territory; for pure deficiency without heat, supplement purely.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

栀子豉汤Zhi Zi Chi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
发汗吐下后，虚烦不得眠，若剧者，必反覆颠倒，心中懊憹，栀子豉汤主之。（76）
方证抓手
虚烦不得眠心中懊憹（烦闷无可名状）反覆颠倒胸中窒或心中结痛
气机病机
无形郁热扰于胸膈：汗吐下后有形之邪已去，无形之热留扰胸膈清旷之地——“虚烦”之虚非正虚，是“无实邪”之谓。热郁在上焦最高处，下之无物、清之嫌沉。
辨证推理
病位最高、邪最无形，故用药最轻：栀子苦寒而体轻上行，清中有透；豆豉经发酵而性宣，散郁升清——两味相合，如推窗散雾，热从上从外而解。“心中懊憹”这种说不清的烦闷是抓手中最微妙者，条文用“反覆颠倒”四字白描其状。栀子豉系五方是“同一郁热、兼症各异”的微型加减教学组（见类方卡）。旧注“得吐者止后服”，实践中本方并不必致吐，义在宣泄。
组成与组方逻辑
栀子十四个，擘（9g）君
苦寒清透胸膈郁热
香豉四合，绵裹（9g）臣
轻浮宣散，解郁除烦（后纳）
一清一宣，两味成方——经方以轻取胜之典范。
加减
少气者：炙甘草二两 → 栀子甘草豉汤
热扰而气已馁，甘以益之
呕者：生姜五两 → 栀子生姜豉汤
热扰而胃气逆，辛以降之
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方栀子厚朴汤栀子干姜汤半夏泻心汤栀子甘草豉汤栀子生姜豉汤黄连黄芩栀子牡丹芍药汤栀子汤（古本）栀子连翘甘草栝蒌汤茯苓四逆汤黄连阿胶汤酸枣仁汤茵陈蒿汤丹栀逍遥散温胆汤
禁忌与注意
病人旧微溏者不可与（中阳素虚，苦寒伤中）。
Key Signs
deficiency vexation with sleeplessnessineffable oppression in the hearttossing and turningchest blockage or knotted pain in the heart region
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Formless constrained heat disturbing the chest and diaphragm: after sweating, vomiting or purging the tangible pathogen is gone, the formless heat lingers to disturb the clear open ground of the chest and diaphragm — the "deficiency" of "deficiency vexation" is not upright deficiency but means "no repletion pathogen." The heat is constrained at the highest point of the upper burner, with nothing to purge and too deep to reach by clearing.
Pattern Reasoning
The location highest, the pathogen most formless, so the herbs are lightest: Zhi Zi, bitter-cold yet light-bodied and ascending, clears with venting; fermented Dou Chi, diffusing by nature, disperses constraint and raises the clear — the two combined are like pushing open a window to scatter fog, the heat resolving from above and without. "Ineffable oppression in the heart," this indescribable vexation, is the subtlest of handles, the text sketching it plainly with "tossing and turning." The five Zhi Zi Chi formulas are a miniature modification-teaching set of "one constrained heat, differing concurrent signs" (see the class card). The old note "stop further doses if vomiting occurs" — in practice this formula need not induce vomiting; the intent is diffusing discharge.
Composition & Logic
Zhi Zi9gSovereign
Xiang Chi9gMinister
One clearing, one diffusing — a formula of two herbs, the exemplar of the classics winning by lightness.
Modifications
With shortness of qi: Honey-fried Gan Cao two liang → Zhi Zi Gan Cao Chi Tang
Heat harasses and qi is feeble; sweeten to boost it
With retching: Fresh ginger five liang → Zhi Zi Sheng Jiang Chi Tang
Heat harasses and stomach qi counterflows; use acridity to descend it
Cautions
Those with chronic mild loose stool may not be given it (the middle yang is constitutionally deficient, and bitter-cold harms the middle).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

栀子甘草豉汤Zhi Zi Gan Cao Chi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
若少气者，栀子甘草豉汤主之。（76）
方证抓手
虚烦懊憹兼少气（气息不足以言）
气机病机
胸膈郁热而中气已显不足：热扰其上、气馁其中。
辨证推理
栀子豉证叠加一个“少气”，即添一味炙甘草——加减以一症一药为单位，经方的颗粒度精细至此。
组成与组方逻辑
栀子十四个，擘（9g）君
清透郁热
香豉四合，绵裹（9g）臣
宣散解郁
甘草二两，炙（6g）佐
甘缓益气
栀子豉汤加炙甘草。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方栀子豉汤栀子生姜豉汤
禁忌与注意
同栀子豉汤。
Key Signs
deficiency vexation and oppressionwith shortness of qi (breath insufficient for speech)
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Chest-diaphragm constrained heat with the middle qi showing insufficiency: heat disturbs above, qi is feeble in the middle.
Pattern Reasoning
The Zhi Zi Chi pattern with an added "shortness of qi" adds one honey-fried Gan Cao — modification by the unit of one symptom, one herb; the granularity of the classics is this fine.
Composition & Logic
Zhi Zi9gSovereign
Xiang Chi9gMinister
Gan Cao6gAssistant
Zhi Zi Chi Tang with honey-fried Gan Cao added.
Cautions
Same as Zhi Zi Chi Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

栀子生姜豉汤Zhi Zi Sheng Jiang Chi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
若呕者，栀子生姜豉汤主之。（76）
方证抓手
虚烦懊憹兼呕
气机病机
胸膈郁热扰及胃腑，胃气上逆。
辨证推理
叠加一个“呕”字，添生姜五两——呕家圣药重用以佐清宣之师。与甘草豉汤并列为“一症一药”加减法的对子。
组成与组方逻辑
栀子十四个，擘（9g）君
清透郁热
香豉四合，绵裹（9g）臣
宣散解郁
生姜五两（15g）佐
辛散降逆止呕
栀子豉汤加生姜。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方栀子豉汤栀子甘草豉汤
禁忌与注意
同栀子豉汤。
Key Signs
deficiency vexation and oppressionwith retching
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Chest-diaphragm constrained heat reaching the stomach, with stomach qi counterflowing up.
Pattern Reasoning
With an added "retching," five liang of fresh ginger is added — the sage-herb of retching in heavy dose to assist the clearing-diffusing force. It stands with Zhi Zi Gan Cao Chi Tang as a pair illustrating "one symptom, one herb" modification.
Composition & Logic
Zhi Zi9gSovereign
Xiang Chi9gMinister
Sheng Jiang15gAssistant
Zhi Zi Chi Tang with fresh ginger added.
Cautions
Same as Zhi Zi Chi Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

栀子厚朴汤Zhi Zi Hou Po Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒下后，心烦腹满，卧起不安者，栀子厚朴汤主之。（79）
方证抓手
心烦腹满卧起不安
气机病机
郁热在胸而气滞在腹：上烦下满，热与滞分踞上下两层。
辨证推理
证已从胸膈下延及腹，故去豆豉之表宣（邪不在高位之表分），改朴枳之下气——栀子清上、朴枳畅中下，一方分治两层。与栀子豉之别在有无“腹满”：满则气滞已成，宣散不解决气分之堵。
组成与组方逻辑
栀子十四个，擘（9g）君
清胸膈之烦热
厚朴四两，炙（12g）臣
下气除腹之满
枳实四枚，水浸炙（9g）佐
破滞消痞
栀子清烦，朴枳除满——半个栀子豉合半个小承气之意。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方栀子豉汤小承气汤
禁忌与注意
同栀子豉汤；腹满痛拒按而便闭者已属承气之地。
Key Signs
vexationabdominal fullnessrestlessness whether lying or rising
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Constrained heat in the chest with qi stagnation in the abdomen: vexation above, fullness below, heat and stagnation holding the upper and lower layers.
Pattern Reasoning
The pattern has extended from the chest-diaphragm down to the abdomen, so the exterior-diffusing Dou Chi is removed (the pathogen is not in the high exterior division) and Hou Po–Zhi Shi's qi-descending is substituted — Zhi Zi clears above, Hou Po–Zhi Shi free the middle and lower, one formula treating two layers separately. Its distinction from Zhi Zi Chi is the presence of "abdominal fullness": fullness means qi stagnation has formed, which diffusing-dispersal cannot resolve.
Composition & Logic
Zhi Zi9gSovereign
Hou Po12gMinister
Zhi Shi9gAssistant
Zhi Zi clears vexation, Hou Po and Zhi Shi eliminate fullness — the sense of half a Zhi Zi Chi Tang joined to half a Xiao Cheng Qi.
Cautions
Same as Zhi Zi Chi Tang; abdominal fullness-pain refusing pressure with blocked stool already belongs to Cheng Qi territory.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

栀子干姜汤Zhi Zi Gan Jiang Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒，医以丸药大下之，身热不去，微烦者，栀子干姜汤主之。（80）
方证抓手
身热不去微烦误用丸药大下之后（中阳已伤）
气机病机
上有郁热未清、中有下药所伤之寒：寒热分踞上中两层——栀子豉系里的“黄连汤式”局面。
辨证推理
误下是本证之因也是用药之戒：热仍在上（身热微烦）故栀子照用，中阳已伤（大下之后）故豆豉之宣让位于干姜之温——清上温中两味成方，寒热并用之最小单元。与栀子豉汤禁例“旧微溏者不可与”对读：中阳虚者非绝对禁栀子，配干姜护中即可行——禁忌不是墙，是提示需要配伍解决的问题。
组成与组方逻辑
栀子十四个，擘（9g）君
清上焦未去之郁热
干姜二两（6g）臣
温误下所伤之中阳
栀子清上，干姜温中，各司一层。
类方鉴别
承气·白虎·栀子豉类方栀子豉汤黄连汤
禁忌与注意
热重寒轻或纯热者不需干姜。
Key Signs
persistent body heatmild vexationafter mistaken vigorous purging by pill medicine (middle yang already harmed)
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Constrained heat above uncleared, cold from purging-damage in the middle: cold and heat holding the upper and middle layers — a "Huang Lian Tang-style" situation within the Zhi Zi Chi family.
Pattern Reasoning
Mistaken purging is both the cause of this pattern and the caution in medicating: heat is still above (body heat, mild vexation) so Zhi Zi is used as before, the middle yang harmed (after vigorous purging) so Dou Chi's diffusing yields to Gan Jiang's warming — clearing above and warming the middle, two herbs forming the minimal unit of combined cold and heat. Read against the Zhi Zi Chi contraindication "one with chronic loose stool may not be given it": the middle-yang-deficient are not absolutely barred from Zhi Zi — paired with Gan Jiang to protect the middle it may be used; a contraindication is not a wall but a hint of a problem that combination can solve.
Composition & Logic
Zhi Zi9gSovereign
Gan Jiang6gMinister
Zhi Zi clears above, Gan Jiang warms the middle, each governing one layer.
Cautions
Heavy heat with light cold, or pure heat, needs no Gan Jiang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

苓桂术甘汤Ling Gui Zhu Gan Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒若吐若下后，心下逆满，气上冲胸，起则头眩，脉沉紧，发汗则动经，身为振振摇者，茯苓桂枝白术甘草汤主之。（67）
方证抓手
心下逆满气上冲胸起则头眩脉沉紧
气机病机
中阳不足，水饮停于心下：脾阳伤则水失运化，停饮踞于中焦——饮阻则满，饮邪乘虚上凌则气冲、清阳被冒则起则头眩（体位一动，水气即荡）。脉沉主水，紧主寒。
辨证推理
“病痰饮者，当以温药和之”（金匮）——本方即这句总纲的标准实现：水为阴邪，得寒则聚、得阳则化，故治饮不在猛攻而在温阳化气＋淡渗利水两翼。苓桂这一对是全部苓桂剂的核：苓给水找出路（降），桂给阳添动力（升化），术断其源，草和其中。条文后半“发汗则动经，身为振振摇”预演了误治：饮证误汗更伤其阳，摇摇欲坠——与真武汤证的“振振欲擗地”一线之隔，刻度之差见类方卡。
组成与组方逻辑
茯苓四两（12g）君
利水渗湿，导饮下行
桂枝三两（9g）臣
通阳化气——水寒得阳则化
白术二两（6g）佐
健脾燥湿，断生饮之源
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
和中，合桂化阳
苓四桂三术二草二，利水之力居首而温药相佐——温而不燥、利而不峻，“和之”二字的剂量表达。
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈五苓散真武汤苓桂枣甘汤茯苓白术甘草汤桂枝茯苓白术细辛汤白术茯苓厚朴汤茯苓甘草汤泽泻汤半夏白术天麻汤
禁忌与注意
饮已化热（口苦苔黄）者温药当慎；阴虚眩晕非水饮者禁温利。
Key Signs
counterflow fullness below the heartqi surging up into the chestdizziness on risingdeep tight pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Middle yang insufficient, water-rheum lodged below the heart: Spleen yang harmed, water loses transport and lodged rheum occupies the middle burner — rheum obstructing gives fullness, rheum exploiting vacancy to surge up gives qi surging, and clear yang clouded gives dizziness on rising (a shift of posture and the water qi sloshes). Deep pulse governs water, tight governs cold.
Pattern Reasoning
"For rheum disease, harmonize with warm herbs" (Jin Gui) — this formula is the standard realization of that general principle: water is a yin pathogen, gathering with cold and transforming with yang, so treating rheum lies not in fierce attack but in the two wings of warming yang to transform qi plus bland percolation to drain water. The Ling-Gui pair is the core of all the Ling-Gui formulas: Fu Ling gives water a way out (descend), Gui Zhi adds motive force to yang (ascend and transform), Bai Zhu cuts the source, Gan Cao harmonizes the middle. The latter half of the text, "sweating stirs the channels, the body trembling and shaking," foreshadows the error: rheum mistakenly sweated harms yang further, tottering unsteadily — a hair's breadth from the Zhen Wu Tang pattern's "trembling with urge to fall," the gradation-difference in the class card.
Composition & Logic
Fu Ling12gSovereign
Gui Zhi9gMinister
Bai Zhu6gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Fu Ling 4, Gui Zhi 3, Bai Zhu 2, Gan Cao 2 — the draining power foremost with warming herbs assisting: warm without drying, draining without harshness, the dose-expression of the two words "harmonize it."
Cautions
Where the rheum has transformed to heat (bitter taste, yellow coat), warm herbs must be used cautiously; yin-deficiency dizziness without water-rheum forbids warm-draining.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

五苓散Wu Ling San

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病，发汗后……若脉浮，小便不利，微热消渴者，五苓散主之。（71）中风发热，六七日不解而烦，有表里证，渴欲饮水，水入则吐者，名曰水逆，五苓散主之。（74）
方证抓手
小便不利消渴（渴而饮水不解）水入则吐（水逆）脉浮微热
气机病机
太阳表邪循经入腑，膀胱气化不利：水蓄下焦不得出（小便不利），津液不得化布于上（渴——身内有水而口渴，正因水不化津），拒水于胃口（水入则吐）。渴与小便不利并见是气化障碍的双面证据。
辨证推理
“渴”最能迷惑人——见渴投滋阴生津则水愈滞。此渴之眼在“小便不利＋饮水不解甚至水入则吐”：不是没水，是水不化气、气不布津。故不补水而通气化：四苓开水之出路，桂枝一味双面工作（外解余表、内温膀胱之化）。散剂白饮和服、多饮暖水汗出愈——剂型与将息法都在帮气化转动。与苓桂术甘对读：彼饮停中焦（心下），此水蓄下焦（膀胱），苓桂剂按水之停位换阵。
组成与组方逻辑
泽泻一两六铢（15g）君
重用直达下焦，利水渗湿
猪苓十八铢（9g）臣
专职渗利
茯苓十八铢（9g）臣
淡渗兼宁心
白术十八铢（9g）佐
健脾运水
桂枝半两（6g）佐
外解表邪，内助膀胱气化
泽泻独重坐镇下焦，二苓佐渗，术运其中，桂通其阳——五味成一部气化机器。
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈苓桂术甘汤猪苓汤茯苓甘草汤栝蒌茯苓汤桃核承气汤
禁忌与注意
津伤燥渴（无小便不利）者禁渗利；湿热之淋痛另有专治。
Key Signs
inhibited urinationdispersion-thirst (thirst unrelieved by drinking)vomiting on drinking water (water counterflow)floating pulse, mild fever
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Tai Yang exterior pathogen following the channel into the bowel, bladder qi-transformation inhibited: water amassed in the lower burner cannot exit (inhibited urination), fluid cannot transform and spread upward (thirst — water within the body yet a thirsty mouth, precisely because water does not transform into fluid), and water is refused at the stomach mouth (vomiting on drinking water). Thirst and inhibited urination together are two-faced evidence of a qi-transformation disorder.
Pattern Reasoning
"Thirst" most misleads — seeing thirst and giving yin-enriching fluid-engendering herbs makes the water stagnate more. The eye of this thirst is in "inhibited urination plus drinking not relieving it, even vomiting on drinking water": it is not that there is no water, but that water does not transform into qi and qi does not spread fluid. So do not supplement water but free the qi-transformation: the four Ling open water's exit, and Gui Zhi does double work (resolving residual exterior without, warming the bladder's transformation within). Taken as a powder with rice-water, drinking plenty of warm water to sweat and recover — both the dosage form and the aftercare help the qi-transformation turn. Read against Ling Gui Zhu Gan: that has rheum lodged in the middle burner (below the heart), this has water amassed in the lower burner (bladder), the Ling-Gui formulas changing array by the water's lodging-site.
Composition & Logic
Ze Xie15gSovereign
Zhu Ling9gMinister
Fu Ling9gMinister
Bai Zhu9gAssistant
Gui Zhi6gAssistant
Ze Xie alone weighted, anchoring the lower burner; the two Ling assist percolation; Bai Zhu moves the center; Gui Zhi frees the yang — five herbs forming one qi-transformation engine.
Cautions
Fluid-damage dry thirst (without inhibited urination) forbids percolating-draining; damp-heat strangury pain has its own treatment.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

猪苓汤Zhu Ling Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
若脉浮发热，渴欲饮水，小便不利者，猪苓汤主之。（223）少阴病，下利六七日，咳而呕渴，心烦不得眠者，猪苓汤主之。（319）
方证抓手
小便不利渴欲饮水心烦不得眠或尿血尿痛
气机病机
水热互结于下焦而阴已伤：与五苓同为水停下焦，但此局多了两个变量——热（与水互结、灼伤水道）与阴伤（心烦不眠即阴虚火扰之征）。
辨证推理
五苓与猪苓一字之差的鉴别是寒热两分：五苓证属气化不利之“寒滞”，故用桂枝温通；猪苓证属水热互结之“热滞”兼阴伤，故去桂术之温燥，换滑石清利、阿胶滋阴——利水剂里安放一味滋阴药，正如清热阵里安人参（白虎加参），攻邪不忘存正之防线。阳明篇另有明禁：“汗多而渴者不可与猪苓汤”——汗多胃燥，利之则重竭其津。后世治热淋血淋多宗此方。
组成与组方逻辑
猪苓一两（9g）君
渗利水湿
茯苓一两（9g）臣
淡渗利水
泽泻一两（9g）臣
泄下焦之水热
滑石一两，碎（9g）佐
清热利窍
阿胶一两（9g）佐
滋阴润燥（烊化），护已伤之阴
三苓渗利为体，滑石导热，阿胶护阴——利水、清热、滋阴三线并行而不悖。
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈五苓散真武汤小柴胡加茯苓汤猪苓加黄连牡丹汤地黄黄柏秦皮茯苓泽泻汤猪苓加人参汤八正散萆薢分清饮
禁忌与注意
汗多胃燥之渴禁用（重夺其津）；无热之寒水停蓄归五苓。
Key Signs
inhibited urinationthirst with desire to drinkvexation and sleeplessnesspossibly bloody or painful urination
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Water and heat bound in the lower burner with yin already damaged: like Wu Ling, water lodged in the lower burner, but this situation has two more variables — heat (bound with water, scorching the water passages) and yin damage (vexation and sleeplessness being signs of yin-deficiency fire harassment).
Pattern Reasoning
The one-word difference between Wu Ling and Zhu Ling is a cold-heat division: the Wu Ling pattern is the "cold stagnation" of inhibited qi-transformation, so Gui Zhi warms and frees; the Zhu Ling pattern is the "heat stagnation" of water-heat binding plus yin damage, so the warm-drying Gui Zhi-Bai Zhu are removed for Hua Shi to clear-drain and E Jiao to enrich yin — placing one yin-enriching herb in a water-draining formula, just as ginseng is set in a heat-clearing array (Bai Hu plus ginseng), never forgetting the defensive line of preserving the upright while attacking the pathogen. The Yang Ming chapter has a clear prohibition: "for profuse sweating with thirst, Zhu Ling Tang may not be given" — profuse sweat with stomach dryness, draining would doubly exhaust the fluid. Later ages mostly followed this formula for heat strangury and bloody strangury.
Composition & Logic
Zhu Ling9gSovereign
Fu Ling9gMinister
Ze Xie9gMinister
Hua Shi9gAssistant
E Jiao9gAssistant
The three Ling herbs percolate as the body, Hua Shi conducts out heat, E Jiao protects yin — draining water, clearing heat, and enriching yin proceeding on three lines without conflict.
Cautions
Contraindicated in thirst with profuse sweat and stomach dryness (it would doubly rob the fluid); cold-water lodging without heat belongs to Wu Ling.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

茯苓甘草汤Fu Ling Gan Cao Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
伤寒汗出而渴者，五苓散主之；不渴者，茯苓甘草汤主之。（73）伤寒厥而心下悸，宜先治水，当服茯苓甘草汤。（356）
方证抓手
厥而心下悸汗出不渴胃中停水（振水音）
气机病机
水停于胃：位置比五苓更高一层（胃而非膀胱），故不渴（津尚能布）；水气凌心则悸，阻遏阳气外达则厥。
辨证推理
73条以“渴与不渴”一字分五苓与本方：渴者水蓄下焦、津不上布；不渴者水停中焦之胃、津布未断——问诊一个字，定位差一层。356条更立规矩：厥而心下悸者“先治水”，不尔水渍入胃必作利——水饮致厥先于寒厥考虑，治序有先后。生姜三两重于苓桂，正为胃中之水而设（散水之姜）。
组成与组方逻辑
茯苓二两（9g）君
利水宁心
桂枝二两（6g）臣
通阳化饮
生姜三两（9g）佐
重于苓桂，温散胃中停水
甘草一两，炙（3g）使
和中
苓桂化饮之核加生姜专走胃分，草和之——苓桂剂中最轻灵的一首。
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈五苓散苓桂术甘汤四逆汤
禁忌与注意
渴而小便不利者属五苓；悸属心阳虚（桂甘证）者无水可利。
Key Signs
reversal cold with palpitation below the heartsweating without thirstwater lodged in the stomach (splashing sound)
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Water lodged in the stomach: a layer higher than Wu Ling (stomach, not bladder), hence no thirst (fluid can still spread); water qi overwhelming the Heart gives palpitation, obstructing yang qi from reaching outward gives reversal cold.
Pattern Reasoning
Line 73 divides Wu Ling and this formula by the one word "thirst or none": thirst is water amassed in the lower burner, fluid not spreading up; no thirst is water lodged in the middle-burner stomach, fluid-spread unbroken — one interview word, one layer of location difference. Line 356 further sets a rule: for reversal cold with palpitation below the heart, "treat the water first," else the water seeping into the stomach must cause diarrhea — water-rheum causing reversal is considered before cold-reversal, the treatment-sequence having priority. Three liang of fresh ginger outweighing the Ling-Gui is set precisely for the water in the stomach (water-dispersing ginger).
Composition & Logic
Fu Ling9gSovereign
Gui Zhi6gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
The core of Ling-Gui rheum-transformation plus fresh ginger going specifically to the stomach division, Gan Cao harmonizing — the most light and nimble of the Ling-Gui formulas.
Cautions
Thirst with inhibited urination belongs to Wu Ling; palpitation from Heart-yang deficiency (the Gui-Gan pattern) has no water to drain.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

苓桂枣甘汤Ling Gui Zao Gan Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
发汗后，其人脐下悸者，欲作奔豚，茯苓桂枝甘草大枣汤主之。（65）
方证抓手
脐下悸欲作奔豚发汗后心阳受损
气机病机
汗后心阳虚于上，下焦水饮蠢蠢欲动：脐下悸是水邪将乘虚上冲的前兆——奔豚未发而其机已现。
辨证推理
与桂枝加桂汤同在奔豚一线而时相不同：彼已发（气从少腹上冲心），此欲作（脐下悸而已）——治未病之方。且病因有别：加桂证纯属阳虚阴乘，此证有水饮参与（悸在脐下，水之信号），故茯苓半斤为君先夺其水，甘澜水煎（扬之万遍取其不助水性）——连煎药之水都要驯服，可见对“水”这个变量的警惕。
组成与组方逻辑
茯苓半斤（24g）君
重用先煎，利水宁冲
桂枝四两（12g）臣
温通心阳，镇冲降逆
大枣十五枚（5枚）佐
甘缓培土以制水
甘草二两，炙（6g）使
合桂化阳
苓重于桂：先断水路，再温心阳；枣草培土筑堤。
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈桂枝加桂汤苓桂术甘汤
禁忌与注意
已发之奔豚属加桂汤；肝气奔豚（惊恐而发、气冲咽喉）另属奔豚汤。
Key Signs
throbbing below the navelincipient running-pigletheart yang damaged after sweating
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Heart yang deficient above after sweating, lower-burner water-rheum stirring to move: throbbing below the navel is the omen of the water pathogen about to exploit the vacancy and surge up — running-piglet not yet erupted but its trigger already showing.
Pattern Reasoning
With Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang it lies on the running-piglet line but at a different phase: that has already erupted (qi surging from the lower abdomen to the heart), this is about to arise (throbbing below the navel only) — a formula of preventive treatment. And the causes differ: the Jia Gui pattern is pure yang-deficiency with yin usurping, this pattern has water-rheum participating (throbbing below the navel, water's signal), so half a jin of Fu Ling is sovereign to seize the water first, decocted in "sweet billowing water" (ladled thousands of times to strip its water-abetting nature) — even the decoction water must be tamed, showing the vigilance toward the variable of "water."
Composition & Logic
Fu Ling24gSovereign
Gui Zhi12gMinister
Da Zao5 piecesAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Fu Ling heavier than Gui Zhi: first cut off the water route, then warm the heart yang; jujube and Gan Cao cultivate earth to build the dyke.
Cautions
Already-erupted running-piglet belongs to Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang; Liver-qi running-piglet (erupting with fright, qi surging to the throat) belongs to Ben Tun Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

真武汤Zhen Wu Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
太阳病发汗，汗出不解，其人仍发热，心下悸，头眩，身瞤动，振振欲擗地者，真武汤主之。（82）少阴病……腹痛，小便不利，四肢沉重疼痛，自下利者，此为有水气……真武汤主之。（316）
方证抓手
振振欲擗地（站立不稳欲扑地）四肢沉重疼痛小便不利自下利心下悸头眩身瞤动
气机病机
肾阳虚衰，水邪泛滥：阳虚至肾则气化之根熄——水无所主而四处横流：上凌则悸眩、外渍则四肢沉重、下走则自利、留滞则小便不利；筋肉失阳之温煦则瞤动振振。较苓桂术甘之中阳不足深了一层：轴心之伤到根基之伤。
辨证推理
苓桂剂的终点站：饮停心下（苓桂术甘）→水蓄下焦（五苓）→水泛周身而根在肾阳（真武）——身摇的两个刻度写尽这条恶化线：“身为振振摇”（苓桂术甘之误汗变证）尚可扶，“振振欲擗地”已欲扑倒。故君药从茯苓换成附子：治水治到根上是治阳。芍药一味最可玩味：温阳利水阵中置一酸敛之品——利小便（开阴结）、缓四肢之急、敛阴使姜附之燥不伤真阴，一子三用。
组成与组方逻辑
附子一枚，炮（9g）君
温肾阳以复水之气化——治水之本
茯苓三两（9g）臣
利水渗湿
白术二两（6g）臣
健脾制水
生姜三两（9g）佐
温散水气
芍药三两（9g）佐
利小便、缓筋急、敛阴护营，兼制姜附之燥
附子温其根，苓术利其流，生姜散其溢，芍药收其阴——镇水之阵（真武，北方水神之名）。
加减
咳者：五味子、细辛、干姜
水寒射肺，姜辛味温化（小青龙之核嵌入）
下利甚者：去芍药，加干姜
利甚阳更虚，去酸寒增温守
呕者：去附子，生姜加至半斤
水在胃口上逆为主，重姜散之
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈苓桂术甘汤附子汤四逆汤桂枝茯苓白术细辛汤猪苓汤肾气丸泽泻汤天麻钩藤饮
禁忌与注意
阴虚水停（猪苓汤证之烦渴不眠）误投则劫阴；实热水肿禁温。
Key Signs
trembling with urge to fall to the ground (unsteady standing)heavy painful limbsinhibited urinationspontaneous diarrheapalpitation, dizziness, twitching of the flesh
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Kidney yang debilitated, water pathogen flooding: yang deficient down to the Kidney extinguishes the root of qi-transformation — water with no governor runs riot everywhere: overwhelming above gives palpitation and dizziness, seeping outward gives heavy limbs, running down gives spontaneous diarrhea, and lodging gives inhibited urination; the sinews and flesh, losing yang's warmth, twitch and tremble. A layer deeper than Ling Gui Zhu Gan's middle-yang insufficiency: from harm to the axle to harm at the root.
Pattern Reasoning
The terminus of the Ling-Gui formulas: rheum lodged below the heart (Ling Gui Zhu Gan) → water amassed in the lower burner (Wu Ling) → water flooding the whole body rooted in Kidney yang (Zhen Wu) — the two gradations of body-trembling write out this line of deterioration: "the body trembling and shaking" (the sweating-error variation of Ling Gui Zhu Gan) can still be propped up, "trembling with urge to fall to the ground" is already about to collapse. So the sovereign changes from Fu Ling to Fu Zi: treating water down to the root is treating yang. Shao Yao is the most worth pondering: placing one sour-gathering herb in a yang-warming water-draining array — draining urine (opening the yin bind), easing limb tension, gathering yin so the drying ginger-Fu Zi do not harm true yin, one piece with three uses.
Composition & Logic
Fu Zi9gSovereign
Fu Ling9gMinister
Bai Zhu6gMinister
Sheng Jiang9gAssistant
Shao Yao9gAssistant
Fu Zi warms the root, Fu Ling and Bai Zhu drain the flow, fresh ginger disperses the overflow, Shao Yao gathers the yin — a water-quelling formation (Zhen Wu, name of the northern water deity).
Modifications
With cough: Wu Wei Zi, Xi Xin, Gan Jiang
Water-cold shooting into the Lung — the ginger-Xi Xin-Wu Wei Zi warm transformation (Xiao Qing Long's core embedded)
Severe diarrhea: Remove Shao Yao, add Gan Jiang
Severe diarrhea, yang more deficient; remove the sour-cold, increase warm-guarding
With retching: Remove Fu Zi, increase fresh ginger to half a jin
Water at the stomach mouth counterflows up; heavy ginger disperses it
Cautions
Yin-deficiency water lodging (the Zhu Ling Tang pattern of vexed thirst and sleeplessness) is harmed by mistaken use; repletion-heat edema forbids warming.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

附子汤Fu Zi Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
少阴病，得之一二日，口中和，其背恶寒者，当灸之，附子汤主之。（304）少阴病，身体痛，手足寒，骨节痛，脉沉者，附子汤主之。（305）
方证抓手
背恶寒而口中和身体痛骨节痛手足寒脉沉
气机病机
少阴阳虚，寒湿凝滞于筋骨：阳虚不能温布（背恶寒、手足寒），寒湿痹着于身体骨节而痛——虚与痹并存。“口中和”三字排除热证：不渴不苦，寒象为真。
辨证推理
与真武汤只差两味（参易姜、附倍量），格局即变：真武治阳虚水“动”（泛滥横流），此治阳虚寒湿之“凝”（痹着疼痛）——水邪一动一静，方随之一散（生姜）一补（人参）。背恶寒又与白虎加参“背微恶寒”成千里之对：彼汗渴脉洪属热盛津伤，此口中和脉沉属阳虚——同一症状坐标两端，问一句口渴与否、按一部脉便分。
组成与组方逻辑
附子二枚，炮（18g）君
倍用温经逐寒湿
白术四两（12g）臣
重用健脾除湿，术附相伍走骨节
茯苓三两（9g）佐
渗湿
人参二两（6g）佐
补元气之虚
芍药三两（9g）佐
和营止痛，监制燥烈
附子二枚领衔，术附同用逐骨节寒湿（金匮术附诸方之源），参苓芍补渗和三面辅之。
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈真武汤白虎加人参汤四逆汤枳实白术茯苓甘草汤肾气丸
禁忌与注意
热痹之骨节红肿禁温；真武附子二方之辨在水动与寒凝。
Key Signs
back aversion to cold with a bland mouthbody pain and joint paincold hands and feetdeep pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Shao Yin yang deficiency, cold-damp congealing in the sinews and bones: yang deficient and unable to warm and spread (back aversion to cold, cold hands and feet), cold-damp lodged in the body's joints giving pain — deficiency and bi coexisting. The three words "a bland mouth" exclude a heat pattern: no thirst, no bitterness, the cold sign genuine.
Pattern Reasoning
Differing from Zhen Wu Tang by only two herbs (ginseng for ginger, Fu Zi doubled), the whole pattern changes: Zhen Wu treats yang-deficiency water that "moves" (flooding riot), this treats yang-deficiency cold-damp that "congeals" (bi lodging pain) — water pathogen moving versus still, the formula accordingly dispersing (fresh ginger) versus supplementing (ginseng). Its back aversion to cold forms a distant pair with Bai Hu plus ginseng's "slight back aversion to cold": that is sweat, thirst and surging pulse, heat exuberance with fluid damage; this is a bland mouth and deep pulse, yang deficiency — the two ends of one symptom-coordinate, divided by one question of thirst and one feel of the pulse.
Composition & Logic
Fu Zi18gSovereign
Bai Zhu12gMinister
Fu Ling9gAssistant
Ren Shen6gAssistant
Shao Yao9gAssistant
Two pieces of Fu Zi lead; Bai Zhu and Fu Zi together expel cold-damp from the joints (the source of the Jin Gui Zhu-Fu formulas); ginseng, Fu Ling and Shao Yao assist on three sides with supplementing, percolating, and harmonizing.
Cautions
Heat-bi with red swollen joints forbids warming; Zhen Wu and Fu Zi are distinguished by water-moving versus cold-congealing.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

四逆汤Si Ni Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
少阴病，脉沉者，急温之，宜四逆汤。（323）大汗出，热不去，内拘急，四肢疼，又下利厥逆而恶寒者，四逆汤主之。（353）
方证抓手
四肢厥逆（冷过肘膝）下利清谷脉微欲绝但欲寐恶寒蜷卧
气机病机
少阴阳衰，阴寒内盛：一身之阳退守将熄——不能温四末则厥逆，不能腐熟则下利清谷，不能鼓脉则微欲绝，不能振神则但欲寐。这是“升动温煦”这台发动机本身的熄火，与阳郁（四逆散）、血虚寒滞（当归四逆）之厥判然三途。
辨证推理
回阳救逆的原型方，三味的分工是一套救火哲学：附子走而不守，如点火之炬直入少阴；干姜守而不走，如炉膛之炭续其火力——“附子无干姜不热”；炙甘草看似闲子实为枢纽：缓其燥烈使热力绵长不至爆燃伤阴，且固护中土给药力一个立足之地。323条“脉沉者急温之”的“急”字是少阴病的时间观：阳衰之势不等人，见微知著即刻出手，不必待厥逆悉具。
组成与组方逻辑
附子一枚，生用（9-15g（今用炮附子先煎））君
生用力锐，直起垂绝之阳
干姜一两半（6g）臣
温中守而不走，接续附子之火
甘草二两，炙（6g）佐使
甘缓护中，缓姜附之烈使药力持久
生附启下焦之阳，干姜温中焦之阳，炙草缓而护之——三味自下而中的一条火线。
加减
利止脉不出、面色赤（格阳于外）：倍干姜，葱白通阳 → 通脉四逆汤
阴盛格阳，须破格通脉
恶寒脉微而复利、利止亡血（津血俱伤）：人参一两 → 四逆加人参汤
阳亡兼液脱，回阳兼益阴
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈四逆散当归四逆汤通脉四逆汤真武汤茯苓甘草汤附子汤四逆加人参汤白通汤干姜附子汤理中丸吴茱萸汤黄连阿胶汤右归丸
禁忌与注意
真热假寒（热厥之脉滑、胸腹灼热、渴喜冷饮）误投则火上浇油——厥证先辨真假寒热；生附子毒烈，今以炮附子先煎久煎为常规。〔古本按〕桂林古本四逆汤为四味：甘草、干姜、附子之外有人参二两——救逆必强化扶正，是古本一贯性格，与四逆加人参汤对读。
Key Signs
reversal cold of the four limbs (cold past elbows and knees)clear-food diarrheafaint pulse verging on expirydesire only to sleepaversion to cold, curled lying
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Shao Yin yang debilitated, yin-cold exuberant within: the whole body's yang retreating and about to extinguish — unable to warm the four extremities gives reversal cold, unable to rot-ripen gives clear-food diarrhea, unable to drum the vessels gives a faint pulse verging on expiry, unable to rouse the spirit gives desire only to sleep. This is the engine of "ascending, moving, warming" itself stalling, distinctly a third road from the reversal of constrained yang (Si Ni San) and blood-deficient cold stasis (Dang Gui Si Ni).
Pattern Reasoning
The prototype formula of restoring yang and stemming reversal, the three herbs' division of labor a firefighting philosophy: Fu Zi moves and does not guard, like a lit torch driving straight into Shao Yin; Gan Jiang guards and does not move, like coals in the furnace sustaining the fire — "Fu Zi without Gan Jiang is not hot"; honey-fried Gan Cao seems an idle piece but is in fact the pivot: it moderates the dry fierceness so the heat is lasting and does not flare to harm yin, and protects the central earth to give the potency a foothold. Line 323's "for a deep pulse, urgently warm it" — the word "urgent" is Shao Yin disease's sense of time: the momentum of yang debilitation waits for no one; seeing the subtle, know the manifest, and act at once without waiting for the full set of reversal signs.
Composition & Logic
Fu ZiSovereign
Gan Jiang6gMinister
Gan Cao6gAssistant-Envoy
Uncooked Fu Zi rouses the yang of the lower burner, Gan Jiang warms the middle burner, honey-fried Gan Cao tempers and protects — three herbs forming a single line of fire from below to the center.
Modifications
Diarrhea stopped, pulse not issuing, red face (yang blockaded outward): Double Gan Jiang, Cong Bai to free yang → Tong Mai Si Ni Tang
Yin exuberant blockading yang — must break through to free the vessels
Aversion to cold, faint pulse with renewed diarrhea, diarrhea stopped with blood loss (fluid and blood both harmed): Ginseng one liang → Si Ni Jia Ren Shen Tang
Yang collapse with fluid desertion — restore yang while boosting yin
Cautions
True heat with false cold (heat-reversal with slippery pulse, burning chest and abdomen, thirst for cold drinks) mistakenly given this is oil on fire — for reversal first distinguish true and false cold-heat; raw Fu Zi is fiercely toxic, and blast-fried Fu Zi decocted first and long is now standard. [Guilin note] The Guilin edition's Si Ni Tang has four herbs: besides Gan Cao, Gan Jiang and Fu Zi, two liang of ginseng — reinforcing the upright in rescuing reversal is the Guilin edition's consistent character; read against Si Ni Jia Ren Shen Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

通脉四逆汤Tong Mai Si Ni Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
少阴病，下利清谷，里寒外热，手足厥逆，脉微欲绝，身反不恶寒，其人面色赤……通脉四逆汤主之。（317）
方证抓手
下利清谷、厥逆脉微欲绝身反不恶寒面色赤（戴阳）里寒外热
气机病机
阴盛格阳：阴寒盛极于内，把残存之阳排拒于外——外见假热（身热面赤不恶寒），内是真寒（利清谷、厥、脉微欲绝）。阳已不在其位，危在旦夕。
辨证推理
“身反不恶寒”“面色赤”两笔假象是辨证的关键也是杀机：认作热证投凉药即死。鉴别锚点永远在“里”：下利清谷与脉微欲绝是伪装不了的真寒。方即四逆汤原三味而剂量破格（大附、倍姜）——阴寒之墙太厚，常规火力打不透，故名“通脉”：把被格拒的阳气重新接回脉道。剂量即方义：同方不同量，便是另一首方。
组成与组方逻辑
附子大者一枚，生用（15g）君
大附子破阴回阳
干姜三两（强人可四两）（9-12g）臣
倍量温中通脉
甘草二两，炙（6g）佐使
缓护
四逆汤之破格版：药不变，量升档——面赤者加葱白引阳归位（白通之意已寓其中）。
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈四逆汤白通汤
禁忌与注意
同四逆汤；服后脉即出者生，脉暴出者危（回光返照之象）——预后判断已写入条文。〔古本按〕桂林古本通脉四逆汤亦含人参，与四逆汤同例。
Key Signs
clear-food diarrhea, reversal cold, faint pulse verging on expirybody conversely without aversion to coldred facial complexion (yang float)cold within, heat without
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Yin exuberant, yang blockaded out: yin-cold exuberant to the extreme within, expelling the remnant yang to the exterior — outward showing false heat (body heat, red face, no aversion to cold), inward genuine cold (clear-food diarrhea, reversal, faint pulse verging on expiry). Yang no longer in its position, peril imminent.
Pattern Reasoning
The two false-image brushstrokes "conversely no aversion to cold" and "red face" are this line's examination point and its lethal trap: take it for a heat pattern and give cool herbs and it kills. The differentiation-anchor is always in the "interior": clear-food diarrhea and faint pulse verging on expiry are the un-disguisable genuine cold. The formula is Si Ni Tang's original three herbs with the dose broken beyond norm (large Fu Zi, doubled ginger) — the wall of yin-cold too thick for conventional firepower to pierce, hence named "free the vessels": reconnecting the blockaded-out yang qi to the vessel-path. The dose is the formula's meaning: same formula, different dose, is another formula.
Composition & Logic
Fu Zi15gSovereign
Gan Jiang9-12gMinister
Gan Cao6gAssistant-Envoy
The exception version of Si Ni Tang: herbs unchanged, doses raised — for red face, add Cong Bai to conduct yang back to its place (the sense of Bai Tong already lodged within).
Cautions
Same as Si Ni Tang; if the pulse issues gradually after the dose, the person lives; if it issues abruptly, peril (the flare-before-extinction sign) — the prognosis is written into the text. [Guilin note] The Guilin edition's Tong Mai Si Ni Tang also contains ginseng, as with Si Ni Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

四逆加人参汤Si Ni Jia Ren Shen Tang

伤寒论Shang Han Lun
原文
恶寒脉微而复利，利止亡血也，四逆加人参汤主之。（385）
方证抓手
恶寒脉微利止而非愈（无物可利之“亡血”液脱）气短神萎
气机病机
阳亡而阴液并竭：“利止”在此是凶兆——不是病退，是津液下脱已尽、无物可下。阳与阴两个账户同时见底。
辨证推理
同一个“利止”，向愈与恶化两读：脉静神清者愈，脉微恶寒者竭——症状的意义由全身脉证定，不由症状本身定。阳亡液竭之局，纯阳之剂力有不逮（阳无阴则无所附），故四逆阵中加人参一两——回阳队伍里的滋液之子，与白虎加参、猪苓汤之阿胶同一战略：攻守之外，永远留意“防线（津液）”这个第三变量。霍乱篇出此方，吐利交作之脱证尤切。
组成与组方逻辑
附子一枚，生用（9g）君
回阳
干姜一两半（6g）臣
温中
人参一两（3g）臣
益气生津，救利后之液脱
甘草二两，炙（6g）佐使
缓护
四逆汤加人参：阳阴两救。
类方鉴别
苓桂剂 · 四逆辈四逆汤茯苓四逆汤人参附子汤人参干姜汤当归四逆加人参附子汤
禁忌与注意
同四逆汤。
Key Signs
aversion to cold, faint pulsediarrhea stopped yet not cured (fluid collapse with nothing left to void)shortness of breath, spirit withered
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Yang collapsed with yin fluid simultaneously exhausted: "diarrhea stopped" here is an ominous sign — not the disease receding but the fluid already deserted below, with nothing left to void. The two accounts of yang and yin both hit bottom at once.
Pattern Reasoning
The same "diarrhea stopped" reads two ways, recovery or deterioration: a quiet pulse and clear spirit is recovery, a faint pulse and aversion to cold is exhaustion — a symptom's meaning is set by the whole-body pulse and signs, not by the symptom itself.
