时方 · 出自《医方集解》（原出《医便》） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yifang Jijie — jingfang lineage traced below.

二至丸Er Zhi Wan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
肝肾阴虚之轻证头昏眼花、须发早白腰膝酸软阴虚之出血（齿衄、月经量多色鲜）
气机病机
肝肾阴亏之轻浅档：亏而未深、火而未亢——重剂滋填（左归辈）嫌其腻，此以平和草木缓缓濡之。
辨证推理
地黄法系的最轻一档：两味皆甘凉平和之品，补而不腻、凉而不寒——“平补”的代表作。方名藏采药的时间药学：女贞子冬至采（阴之极、得水之精）、旱莲草夏至采（阳之极、得阴之全汁）——二至之名既是节气也是阴阳观的配伍表达。旱莲兼凉血止血，故阴虚渗血（齿衄、经多色鲜）尤宜。法系全谱至此排定：二至（轻）→六味（中）→左归（重），按亏损深浅取档。
经方血缘
六味“壮水”之旨的极简化——不借地黄之厚而用草木之清，滋阴谱系的轻剂端点；凉血止血一翼可对读柏叶阿胶（血分止血之经方档）。
组成与组方逻辑
女贞子12g（冬至日采）（12g）君
甘凉平补肝肾之阴
旱莲草12g（夏至日采）（12g）臣
滋阴凉血止血
一补一凉，两味等分蜜丸——平补之极简。
类方鉴别
地黄法系六味地黄丸左归丸柏叶阿胶汤
禁忌与注意
亏损已深者力薄勿误事；脾胃虚寒便溏者甘凉亦慎。
Key Signs
mild Liver-Kidney yin deficiencydizziness, blurred vision, premature grayingaching weak lower back and kneesyin-deficiency bleeding (gum bleeding, heavy bright menses)
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The lightest, shallowest gradation of Liver-Kidney yin depletion: depleted but not deep, fire but not hyperactive — heavy enriching-filling (Zuo Gui and kin) too cloying, so this moistens slowly with plain plant-and-tree herbs.
Pattern Reasoning
The lightest gradation of the Dihuang lineage: both herbs are sweet-cool plain substances, supplementing without cloying, cooling without cold — the representative work of "even supplementation." The formula-name hides the time-pharmacology of gathering herbs: Nu Zhen Zi gathered at winter solstice (yin's extreme, taking water's essence), Han Lian Cao at summer solstice (yang's extreme, taking yin's whole juice) — the name "two solstices" is both solar-term and a combinatory expression of the yin-yang view. Han Lian also cools blood and stops bleeding, so yin-deficiency seeping blood (gum bleeding, heavy bright menses) especially suits it. The lineage's whole spectrum is now arrayed: Er Zhi (light) → Liu Wei (middle) → Zuo Gui (heavy), gradation chosen by depth of depletion.
Composition & Logic
Nv Zhen Zi12gSovereign
Han Lian Cao12gMinister
One supplementing, one cooling, two herbs in equal parts as honey-pills — the utmost simplicity of even supplementation.
Classical Lineage
The utmost simplification of Liu Wei's "boost water" intent — not borrowing Di Huang's thickness but using clear plant-and-tree herbs, the light-formula endpoint of the yin-enriching lineage; the cooling-blood hemostasis wing reads across to Bai Ye E Jiao (the classical blood-level hemostasis gradation).
Cautions
Where depletion is already deep its power is too weak to serve; in Spleen-Stomach deficiency-cold with loose stool the sweet-cool nature is also used with caution.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《太平惠民和剂局方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Taiping Huimin Heji Jufang — jingfang lineage traced below.

逍遥散Xiao Yao San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
两胁作痛、头痛目眩神疲食少月经不调、乳房胀痛脉弦而虚
气机病机
肝郁血虚脾弱三环相扣：郁则血不畅生，血虚则肝愈失养愈郁，木郁又乘土——单解一环则其余两环把它拖回原地，故须三环同治。
辨证推理
「肝郁」这个现代最常见病机的标准底盘。妙处在「逍遥」二字的实现方式——不靠重剂疏破，而是疏（柴薄）养（归芍）运（术苓）三线各三分力，让气机自己松开。脉弦「而虚」是它与四逆散证（弦而有力之纯郁）的分界。加丹栀则应郁久化火（丹栀逍遥），与一贯煎互为体用两面：郁而血虚者逍遥，燥而阴亏者一贯煎——舌润与舌干一望而判。
经方血缘
四逆散（柴芍枳草——疏郁骨架）与当归芍药散（归芍术苓——肝脾血水骨架）的合体重组：取四逆散之柴芍而弃枳实之破，取当归芍药散之归芍术苓而弃泽泻之泄，再点薄荷煨姜——两首经方各取其半，拼成“疏养运”三线新格局。“见肝之病，知肝传脾，当先实脾”（金匮首篇）是其立法总纲。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡9g君
疏肝解郁、转动气机之枢
当归9g臣
养血和肝——肝体得养则用自柔
芍药9g，白（9g）臣
敛阴柔肝缓急
白术9g佐
健脾——见肝之病当先实脾
茯苓9g佐
渗湿助运
薄荷3g，后下（3g）佐
轻清升散，助柴疏达
生姜3g，煨（3g）佐
煨用温胃和中
甘草6g，炙（6g）使
和中缓急
疏（柴薄）养（归芍）运（术苓草姜）——三线均衡，故能逍遥。
加减
郁久化火（烦躁易怒、口苦、经前烦热）：牡丹皮、栀子 → 丹栀逍遥散
火起加清
类方鉴别
和肝·平肝法系四逆散当归芍药散一贯煎丹栀逍遥散柴胡疏肝散痛泻要方
禁忌与注意
肝阴虚之胁痛（舌红少津）勿用柴薄之散——转一贯煎；纯实郁脉弦有力者四逆散径疏可也。
Key Signs
pain in both hypochondria, headache and dizzinessfatigue and reduced appetiteirregular menstruation, breast distensionwiry but deficient pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Liver constraint, blood deficiency and Spleen weakness interlocking in three rings: constraint hinders the smooth generation of blood, blood deficiency makes the Liver the more unnourished and the more constrained, and constrained wood overwhelms earth — resolve one ring alone and the other two drag it back to origin, so all three rings must be treated together.
Pattern Reasoning
The standard base for "Liver constraint," the most common mechanism today. Its marvel is the way "free and easy" is realized — not relying on heavy coursing-breaking, but on coursing (Chai Hu-mint), nourishing (Dang Gui-Shao Yao), moving (Bai Zhu-Fu Ling) at three-tenths force each, letting the qi dynamic loosen of itself. The wiry "but deficient" pulse is its boundary from the Si Ni San pattern (wiry and forceful, pure constraint). Adding Mu Dan Pi-Zhi Zi answers chronic constraint transforming to fire (Dan Zhi Xiao Yao), and it forms two faces of one coin with Yi Guan Jian: constraint with blood deficiency to Xiao Yao, dryness with yin depletion to Yi Guan Jian — moist tongue versus dry tongue judged at a glance.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu9gSovereign
Dang Gui9gMinister
Shao Yao9gMinister
Bai Zhu9gAssistant
Fu Ling9gAssistant
Bo He3gAssistant
Sheng Jiang3gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Coursing (Chai Hu, mint), nourishing (Dang Gui, Shao Yao), and moving (Bai Zhu, Fu Ling, Gan Cao, ginger) — three lines in balance, hence "free and easy."
Modifications
Chronic constraint transforming to fire (irritability, bitter taste, premenstrual vexing heat): Mu Dan Pi, Zhi Zi → Dan Zhi Xiao Yao San
Fire arising, add clearing
Classical Lineage
A recombination fusing Si Ni San (Chai Hu-Shao Yao-Zhi Shi-Gan Cao — the constraint-coursing skeleton) and Dang Gui Shao Yao San (Dang Gui-Shao Yao-Bai Zhu-Fu Ling — the Liver-Spleen blood-water skeleton): taking Si Ni San's Chai Hu-Shao Yao while discarding Zhi Shi's breaking, taking Dang Gui Shao Yao San's Dang Gui-Shao Yao-Bai Zhu-Fu Ling while discarding Ze Xie's draining, then adding mint and roasted ginger — half of each of two classical formulas assembled into a new "course-nourish-move" three-line structure. "Seeing Liver disease, know it transmits to the Spleen, and first fortify the Spleen" (the Jin Gui's opening chapter) is its guiding outline.
Cautions
Hypochondriac pain of Liver-yin deficiency (red tongue, scant fluid) should not use the dispersing Chai Hu-mint — turn to Yi Guan Jian; for pure repletion constraint with a wiry forceful pulse, Si Ni San's direct coursing will serve.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《内科摘要》（薛己） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Neike Zhaiyao (Xue Ji) — jingfang lineage traced below.

丹栀逍遥散Dan Zhi Xiao Yao San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
逍遥证＋化火烦躁易怒、面赤口苦经前乳胀烦热、经血色深舌红苔薄黄、脉弦数
气机病机
郁久化火：气有余便是火——郁的时间维度加进来，寒热属性随之改变。
辨证推理
法系“时间轴加减”的示范：同一个肝郁，早期无火（逍遥）、日久化火（此方）——病机会随病程演变，方剂随之升档。丹栀这对的分工承自栀子豉与凉血诸方：栀子清气分郁火兼导下，丹皮凉血分伏热——气血两清恰对“郁火”气血两燔之性。妇科应用尤广（经前期烦躁、乳胀），以“经前加重＋舌红”为的。
经方血缘
逍遥散＋丹皮栀子。丹栀之对上溯经方两处：栀子（栀子豉之清透郁热）与丹皮（凉血散血之两面手，桂枝茯苓丸/温经汤中“温补阵中管火”之职）——在此改任“疏养阵中管火”。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡9g君
疏肝
当归9g臣
养血
芍药9g，白（9g）臣
柔肝
白术9g佐
实脾
茯苓9g佐
渗运
牡丹皮6g佐
凉血分郁热
栀子6g佐
清气分郁火、导之下行
薄荷3g，后下（3g）佐
轻散
甘草6g，炙（6g）使
和中
逍遥底盘＋丹栀双清加味。
类方鉴别
和肝·平肝法系逍遥散栀子豉汤龙胆泻肝汤
禁忌与注意
无火之纯郁不必早清（苦寒碍郁）；火盛脉弦数有力者此方力缓，参龙胆泻肝辈。
Key Signs
Xiao Yao pattern plus fire transformationirritability, red face, bitter tastepremenstrual breast distension and vexing heat, dark menstrual bloodred tongue, thin yellow coat, wiry rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Chronic constraint transforming to fire: qi in surplus is fire — add the time-dimension of constraint, and the cold-heat attribute changes accordingly.
Pattern Reasoning
A demonstration of the lineage's "time-axis modification": the same Liver constraint, early without fire (Xiao Yao), chronically transforming to fire (this formula) — the mechanism evolves with the disease-course, the formula upgrading accordingly. The Mu Dan Pi-Zhi Zi pair's division inherits from Zhi Zi Chi and the cooling-blood formulas: Zhi Zi clears qi-level constrained fire and conducts it down, Mu Dan Pi cools blood-level latent heat — qi and blood both cleared, exactly fitting constrained fire's qi-blood dual-blazing nature. Especially wide in gynecological use (premenstrual irritability, breast distension), targeted by "premenstrual worsening plus red tongue."
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu9gSovereign
Dang Gui9gMinister
Shao Yao9gMinister
Bai Zhu9gAssistant
Fu Ling9gAssistant
Mu Dan Pi6gAssistant
Zhi Zi6gAssistant
Bo He3gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
The Xiao Yao base plus a Mu Dan Pi–Zhi Zi dual-clearing module.
Classical Lineage
Xiao Yao San plus Mu Dan Pi and Zhi Zi. The Mu Dan Pi-Zhi Zi pair traces to two classical places: Zhi Zi (Zhi Zi Chi's clearing-venting of constrained heat) and Mu Dan Pi (the two-faced cool-and-disperse-blood hand, its "managing fire within a warming array" office in Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan / Wen Jing Tang) — here reassigned to "managing fire within a course-nourish array."
Cautions
Pure constraint without fire needs no early clearing (bitter-cold hinders constraint); where fire is exuberant with a wiry rapid forceful pulse this formula is too gentle — consult the Long Dan Xie Gan class.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医学统旨》（《景岳全书》引） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yixue Tongzhi — jingfang lineage traced below.

柴胡疏肝散Chai Hu Shu Gan San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
胁肋胀痛（胀甚于痛、走窜不定）情志不遂则发嗳气太息脉弦有力
气机病机
肝气郁滞之纯气分实证：胀、窜、太息皆气滞之指纹——无血虚（别于逍遥）、无化火（别于丹栀）、无阴亏（别于一贯煎），郁之纯粹形态。
辨证推理
四逆散的直系放大版：原方四味全数保留（柴芍枳草），加香附川芎陈皮三味行气活血——纯疏泄路线走到底，不设一味补养。这正是它与逍遥散的分工：脉弦有力、体不虚者径疏（此方），弦而虚者疏养兼施（逍遥）——“虚实”定两方之界。香附自此入库：“气病之总司、女科之主帅”，行气药中最平和通用者。胀痛型胁痛、肋间神经痛、慢性胆囊炎气滞型皆其地界。
经方血缘
四逆散原方＋香附川芎陈皮：经方骨架一味不动，行气血之力翻倍——“放大”式传承的典型（对比逍遥散的“重组”式）。川芎承血家三味之动，枳壳用而不用枳实又是“档位微调”一课。
组成与组方逻辑
柴胡6g君
疏肝解郁
香附5g臣
理气解郁止痛——气病之总司
川芎5g臣
血中气药，行气活血止痛
橘皮6g，醋炒（6g）佐
理气和中
枳实5g（原方枳壳）（5g）佐
破滞宽中（枳壳缓于枳实）
芍药5g佐
柔肝缓急
甘草3g，炙（3g）使
和中
四逆散骨架＋香芎陈三味助行——纯疏之阵。
类方鉴别
和肝·平肝法系四逆散逍遥散一贯煎
禁忌与注意
久痛入络之刺痛（定处、夜甚）已属血瘀，转逐瘀法系；阴虚者香燥劫阴之戒同一贯煎条。
Key Signs
distending hypochondriac pain (distension exceeding pain, wandering)triggered by emotional frustrationbelching and sighingforceful wiry pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
A pure qi-level repletion pattern of Liver qi constraint: distension, wandering, and sighing are all qi-stagnation fingerprints — no blood deficiency (unlike Xiao Yao), no fire transformation (unlike Dan Zhi), no yin depletion (unlike Yi Guan Jian), the pure form of constraint.
Pattern Reasoning
The direct enlargement of Si Ni San: the original four herbs wholly kept (Chai Hu, Shao Yao, Zhi Shi, Gan Cao) plus Xiang Fu, Chuan Xiong, Chen Pi to move qi and invigorate blood — the pure coursing-discharge line taken to the end, not one supplementing herb set. This is exactly its division from Xiao Yao San: wiry forceful pulse, body not deficient, course directly (this formula); wiry but deficient, course and nourish together (Xiao Yao) — "deficiency versus repletion" setting the two formulas' boundary. Xiang Fu enters the repertoire here: "the commander-in-chief of qi disease, the marshal of gynecology," the most even and general of qi-moving herbs. Distending-type hypochondriac pain, intercostal neuralgia, and the qi-stagnation type of chronic cholecystitis are all its territory.
Composition & Logic
Chai Hu6gSovereign
Xiang Fu5gMinister
Chuan Xiong5gMinister
Ju Pi6gAssistant
Zhi Shi5gAssistant
Shao Yao5gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
The Si Ni San skeleton plus three moving herbs (Xiang Fu, Chuan Xiong, Chen Pi) — a purely coursing formation.
Classical Lineage
The original Si Ni San plus Xiang Fu, Chuan Xiong, Chen Pi: the classical skeleton unchanged by a single herb, the qi-and-blood-moving power doubled — a paradigm of "enlargement" transmission (against Xiao Yao San's "recombination"). Chuan Xiong inherits the movement of the blood-family's three herbs, and using Zhi Ke instead of Zhi Shi is another lesson in "gradation fine-tuning."
Cautions
Stabbing pain of chronic pain entering the collaterals (fixed location, worse at night) already belongs to blood stasis — shift to the stasis-expelling lineage; the caution against acrid-drying plundering yin in yin deficiency is the same as the Yi Guan Jian note.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《丹溪心法》（原名刘草窗方） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Danxi Xinfa — jingfang lineage traced below.

痛泻要方Tong Xie Yao Fang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
肠鸣腹痛、痛而即泻、泻后痛减情绪紧张则发反复发作脉左弦右缓
气机病机
肝旺乘脾（土虚木乘）：肝气一动即横犯脾土——痛是木克土之痛、泻是土败之泻，“泻后痛减”（气随泻泄而暂缓）与食积之泻后痛减异因同形，靠“情绪诱发＋反复”分辨。
辨证推理
四味把“抑木扶土”写到极简：术补其受克之土、芍柔其乘人之木、陈皮运中、防风一味最妙——风药入脾则升清阳、入肝则散郁遏，且为引经，一子三用。脉诊“左弦右缓”是本证的签名（左候肝右候脾）。今之肠易激综合征（腹泻型）第一方，“情绪一紧张就腹痛腹泻”这句主诉几乎就是方证。
经方血缘
当归芍药散“肝脾同治”的减法版：取芍术这对核心（柔木＋扶土）而弃血分水分诸药，加陈皮防风——从妇人腹痛的血水全局收缩为痛泻一症的气机速写。芍药缓急止痛之职直承芍药甘草汤。
组成与组方逻辑
白术9g，炒（9g）君
健脾燥湿以固土
芍药6g，炒白（6g）臣
柔肝缓急止痛
橘皮5g，炒（5g）佐
理气醒脾
防风3g佐
散肝舒脾、升清止泻——风药之妙用
一扶土一抑木一运中一升散——抑木扶土的最小配置。
类方鉴别
和肝·平肝法系当归芍药散逍遥散理中丸四神丸保和丸
禁忌与注意
伤食泻（嗳腐、泻下臭秽）当消导；脾肾阳虚之五更泻归四神丸——同为久泻，诱因与时辰分途。
Key Signs
borborygmus and abdominal pain, pain then diarrhea, ease aftertriggered by emotional tensionrecurrentwiry left pulse, moderate right pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Liver exuberant overwhelming Spleen (earth deficient, wood overwhelming): once Liver qi stirs it transversely assaults the Spleen earth — the pain is wood-conquering-earth pain, the diarrhea is earth-failing diarrhea, and "pain eased after diarrhea" (qi discharged with the diarrhea, briefly relieved) is the same form as food-accumulation's pain-eased-after-diarrhea from a different cause, distinguished by "emotion-triggered plus recurrent."
Pattern Reasoning
Four herbs writing "restrain wood, brace earth" to the utmost simplicity: Bai Zhu supplements the conquered earth, Shao Yao softens the overwhelming wood, Chen Pi moves the middle, and Fang Feng shows the most marvel — a wind herb entering the Spleen raises clear yang, entering the Liver disperses constraint, and also guides the channel, one piece with three uses. The pulse sign "wiry-left moderate-right" is this pattern's signature (the left checks the Liver, the right the Spleen). Today the first formula for irritable bowel syndrome (diarrhea type); the chief complaint "abdominal pain and diarrhea the moment I get tense" is almost the formula-pattern itself.
Composition & Logic
Bai Zhu9gSovereign
Shao Yao6gMinister
Ju Pi5gAssistant
Fang Feng3gAssistant
One bracing earth, one restraining wood, one moving the middle, one ascending-dispersing — the minimal configuration of restraining wood and bracing earth.
Classical Lineage
A subtraction version of Dang Gui Shao Yao San's "Liver-Spleen co-treatment": taking the core Shao Yao-Bai Zhu pair (soften wood plus brace earth) while discarding the blood-level and water-level herbs, adding Chen Pi and Fang Feng — contracting from the woman's abdominal-pain full picture into a qi-dynamic sketch of the single pain-diarrhea sign. Shao Yao's cramp-relieving pain-stopping office directly inherits Shao Yao Gan Cao Tang.
Cautions
Food-damage diarrhea (rotten belching, foul stool) should be dispersed; daybreak diarrhea of Spleen-Kidney yang deficiency belongs to Si Shen Wan — both chronic diarrhea, divided by trigger and hour.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《丹溪心法》（朱丹溪） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Danxi Xinfa (Zhu Danxi) — jingfang lineage traced below.

左金丸Zuo Jin Wan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
胁痛口苦嘈杂吞酸、呕吐酸水舌红苔黄、脉弦数
气机病机
肝火犯胃：木火横逆、胃失和降——吞酸嘈杂是肝火夹胃气上逆之标志（酸为木之味）。
辨证推理
六比一的比例是全方的灵魂：黄连六份清肝泻火为绝对主力，吴茱萸一份不是来温的——它是反佐（防大苦大寒之格拒）、是向导（引连入肝经）、是开郁之子（辛以散肝之郁结）。与吴茱萸汤对读正好倒置：彼吴萸为君治肝寒（浊阴上逆之吐涎沫），此黄连为君治肝火（酸水上泛）——同一对药、比例互换、寒热易位，“剂量比即方义”的教科书案例。今之反流性食管炎、胆汁反流性胃炎属肝火者常用底方。
经方血缘
泻心汤类“辛开苦降”语法的极简变体：半夏泻心以夏姜开、芩连降（寒热错杂于中焦），左金以一味吴萸开、六份黄连降（火热独盛于肝胃）——同一语法按病机改写比例。吴萸黄连这对在乌梅丸中已同阵（各司上下），在此凝为二味专方。
组成与组方逻辑
黄连18g（六）（18g）君
清肝火、泻胃热——实则泻其子
吴茱萸3g（一）（3g）佐
辛热反佐：开郁下气、引连入肝、防格拒
六清一开，比例即立场。
类方鉴别
和肝·平肝法系吴茱萸汤半夏泻心汤乌梅丸（古本剂量参照页）交泰丸
禁忌与注意
胃寒吐酸（喜温、苔白）冰炭——吞酸有寒热两本，舌脉定夺。
Key Signs
hypochondriac pain, bitter tastegnawing hunger, acid swallowing, vomiting of sour fluidred tongue, yellow coat, wiry rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Liver fire offending the stomach: wood-fire transversely counterflowing, the stomach losing harmonious descent — acid swallowing and gnawing hunger are the mark of Liver fire carrying stomach qi to counterflow up (sour is wood's flavor).
Pattern Reasoning
The six-to-one ratio is the soul of the whole formula: six parts Huang Lian to clear the Liver and drain fire as the absolute main force, one part Wu Zhu Yu not there to warm — it is counter-assistant (preventing the blockade of great bitter great cold), guide (leading Huang Lian into the Liver channel), and constraint-opening piece (acrid to disperse the Liver's constrained bind). Read against Wu Zhu Yu Tang it is exactly inverted: there Wu Zhu Yu is sovereign treating Liver cold (turbid-yin counterflow spitting foam), here Huang Lian is sovereign treating Liver fire (sour water welling up) — the same herb-pair, ratio inverted, cold and heat exchanged, a textbook case of "dose ratio is formula meaning." Today a general base for reflux esophagitis and bile-reflux gastritis of the Liver-fire type.
Composition & Logic
Huang Lian18gSovereign
Wu Zhu Yu3gAssistant
Six clearing, one opening — the proportion is the standpoint.
Classical Lineage
The most simplified variant of the Xie Xin family's "acrid-opening bitter-descending" grammar: Ban Xia Xie Xin opens with Ban Xia-ginger and descends with Huang Qin-Huang Lian (jumbled cold-heat in the middle burner), Zuo Jin opens with a single Wu Zhu Yu and descends with six parts Huang Lian (fire-heat alone exuberant in Liver and stomach) — the same grammar rewritten in ratio by mechanism. The Wu Zhu Yu-Huang Lian pair already stood together in Wu Mei Wan (each governing above and below), here condensed into a two-herb specific formula.
Cautions
Stomach-cold acid vomiting (welcoming warmth, white coat) is its opposite — acid swallowing has two roots, cold and heat, decided by tongue and pulse.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《中医内科杂病证治新义》（胡光慈） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Zhongyi Neike Zabing Zhengzhi Xinyi — jingfang lineage traced below.

天麻钩藤饮Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
头痛眩晕（肝阳上亢）耳鸣目眩失眠多梦脉弦或弦数
气机病机
肝阳上亢、上盛下虚：下焦肝肾阴亏在先、肝阳失潜而上僭在后——头面之“风火”是标，腰膝之“亏虚”是本，一根跷跷板两头治。
辨证推理
现代高血压中医治疗的代表方（成方虽晚、法度纯正）：平（天麻钩藤）潜（石决明）清（栀芩）降（牛膝）补（杜仲寄生）安（夜交藤茯神）六法一炉。结构的核心是“上下对治”：上盛以平潜清折其标，下虚以杜仲寄生固其本，牛膝一味居中做电梯（引血下行）。与镇肝熄风的分档：此方证阳亢而未至化风欲仆（彼有脉弦长有力、面赤如醉、眩晕欲仆之险象），故用药平和不动重镇之全力。
经方血缘
“风由热生、治风先治热”的立法直承桂林古本风温方（黄连黄芩栀子牡丹芍药汤——撤热而风自息，不用风药）；介类潜阳承龙牡镇潜之法（桂甘龙牡、救逆汤）而换石决明专入肝经；上盛下虚之对治结构可回望肾气丸“阴中求阳”的补泻思维。
组成与组方逻辑
天麻9g君
平肝息风——风药中之定风草
钩藤12g，后下（12g）君
清热平肝息风
石决明18g，先煎（18g）臣
介类潜阳、清肝明目
栀子9g臣
清肝泻火
黄芩9g臣
清热
牛膝12g，川（12g）佐
引血下行——上盛者导之使下
杜仲9g佐
补肝肾治其下虚
桑寄生9g佐
补肝肾强筋骨
益母草9g佐
活血利水，助降压之用
夜交藤9g佐
养心安神
茯苓9g（茯神尤宜）（9g）使
宁心
平潜清降补安六法——肝阳上亢的全维处置。
类方鉴别
和肝·平肝法系镇肝熄风汤黄连黄芩栀子牡丹芍药汤真武汤半夏白术天麻汤
禁忌与注意
气血亏虚之眩晕（劳则甚、面白脉弱）与痰饮之眩（苓桂泽泻辈）另有其途——眩晕四辨（风火痰虚）先行。
Key Signs
headache and dizziness (Liver-yang ascendant hyperactivity)tinnitus, blurred visioninsomnia with profuse dreamingwiry or wiry-rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Liver yang ascendant hyperactivity, exuberant above and deficient below: lower-burner Liver-Kidney yin depletion first, Liver yang losing subdual and usurping above after — the "wind-fire" of the head and face is the branch, the "depletion" of the lower back and knees is the root, one see-saw treated at both ends.
Pattern Reasoning
The representative formula of modern TCM hypertension treatment (though a late compilation, of pure method): calming (Tian Ma-Gou Teng), subduing (Shi Jue Ming), clearing (Zhi Zi-Huang Qin), descending (Niu Xi), supplementing (Du Zhong-Sang Ji Sheng), quieting (Ye Jiao Teng-Fu Shen), six methods in one crucible. The structural core is "treating above and below oppositely": for exuberance above, calm-subdue-clear cut its branch; for deficiency below, Du Zhong-Sang Ji Sheng consolidate its root; Niu Xi in the middle as elevator (conducting blood down). Its gradation from Zhen Gan Xi Feng: this pattern is yang-ascendant but not yet transformed-to-wind-about-to-fall (that has the perilous signs of long wiry forceful pulse, drunk-red face, dizziness about to collapse), so the medicine is even and does not deploy the full force of heavy subduing.
Composition & Logic
Tian Ma9gSovereign
Gou Teng12gSovereign
Shi Jue Ming18gMinister
Zhi Zi9gMinister
Huang Qin9gMinister
Niu Xi12gAssistant
Du Zhong9gAssistant
Sang Ji Sheng9gAssistant
Yi Mu Cao9gAssistant
Ye Jiao Teng9gAssistant
Fu Ling9gEnvoy
Six methods — calming, subduing, clearing, descending, supplementing, quieting — the full-dimension management of ascendant Liver yang.
Classical Lineage
The "wind arises from heat, treat wind first treat heat" legislation directly inherits the Guilin edition's warm-wind formula (Huang Lian-Huang Qin-Zhi Zi-Mu Dan Pi-Shao Yao Tang — withdraw the heat and wind ceases of itself, no wind herbs used); the shell-kind yang-subduing inherits the Long-Mu subduing method (Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li, Jiu Ni Tang) with Shi Jue Ming substituted to enter the Liver channel specifically; the exuberant-above deficient-below treatment structure can look back to Shen Qi Wan's "seek yang within yin" supplement-drain thinking.
Cautions
Dizziness of qi-blood depletion (worse on exertion, pale face, weak pulse) and phlegm-rheum dizziness (the Ling Gui-Ze Xie class) take other roads — the four dizziness differentiations (wind, fire, phlegm, deficiency) come first.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医学衷中参西录》（张锡纯） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yixue Zhongzhong Canxi Lu (Zhang Xichun) — jingfang lineage traced below.

镇肝熄风汤Zhen Gan Xi Feng Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
头目眩晕欲仆、脑部热痛面色如醉心中烦热、时常噫气甚或肢体渐觉不利、口眼渐形歪斜脉弦长有力
气机病机
肝阳化风、气血并走于上（类中风之先兆或已发）：阴亏于下、阳亢至极而化风，携气血上冲脑府——“脉弦长有力”是气血上壅的压力表。
辨证推理
张锡纯融通中西的代表作：明言此治“脑充血”之证——中风先兆的识别（眩晕欲仆、肢体渐不利、口眼渐歪）与截断写入方证，至今是高血压危象、中风先兆期的名方。用药有一处千古心法：大队镇潜（赭石龙牡龟板）之中偏放茵陈川楝生麦芽三味疏泄之品——肝为刚脏、性喜条达，纯镇则激其反动（张氏自述早年纯用镇药其效不显、加此三味而效），“将顺其性而制之”比“硬压”高一个段位。牛膝一两为君不镇不清专司“引下”，与天麻钩藤之牛膝同职而剂量升三倍——档位即病势。
经方血缘
龙牡潜镇直承桂甘龙牡、救逆汤而剂量升档；赭石重镇承旋覆代赭（彼一两此一两半，虚实异档）；芍药甘草酸甘化阴原对嵌入；滋水涵木承地黄法系；“将顺其性”的疏泄三味则是对纯镇法的经方式反思——与白通汤加胆汁人尿（防格拒）同一“反佐”哲学的放大。
组成与组方逻辑
牛膝30g，怀（30g）君
重用引血下行——脑充血证之首务
代赭石30g，先煎（30g）臣
重镇降逆、平冲摧僭
龙骨15g，先煎（15g）臣
潜镇浮阳
牡蛎15g，先煎（15g）臣
潜阳软坚
龟板15g，先煎（15g）臣
滋阴潜阳
芍药15g，白（15g）佐
敛阴柔肝
玄参15g佐
滋水清火
天冬15g佐
滋阴清热
川楝子6g佐
疏肝泄热——顺肝之性以防镇药激其反动
麦芽6g，生（6g）佐
疏肝和胃——同上，将顺其性
茵陈蒿6g佐
清泄肝热而疏之
甘草4.5g使
和中
引（牛膝）镇（赭龙牡龟）滋（芍玄天冬）疏（茵楝麦芽）四手——镇中寓疏是其魂。
类方鉴别
和肝·平肝法系天麻钩藤饮旋覆代赭汤桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤牵正散补阳还五汤消瘰丸
禁忌与注意
气虚血瘀之中风（脉虚、半身不遂而无亢象）属补阳还五之地，误镇则愈虚——中风虚实两型是生死之辨。
Key Signs
dizziness with urge to fall, hot painful headflushed face as if drunkvexing heat in the heart, frequent belchingor gradual limb impairment and facial deviationlong wiry forceful pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Liver yang transforming to wind, qi and blood rushing up together (the omen or eruption of wind-stroke-like disease): yin depleted below, yang hyperactive to the extreme transforming to wind, carrying qi and blood surging up to the brain-mansion — "the long wiry forceful pulse" is the pressure-gauge of qi and blood congesting upward.
Pattern Reasoning
Zhang Xichun's representative work of integrating Chinese and Western: he stated plainly this treats "cerebral congestion" — the recognition of stroke prodrome (dizziness about to fall, gradual limb impairment, gradual facial deviation) and its interception written into the formula-pattern, to this day a famous formula for hypertensive crisis and the stroke-prodrome phase. The medication holds one timeless insight: amid a great subduing troop (Dai Zhe Shi, Long Gu, Mu Li, tortoise plastron) he deliberately places Yin Chen, Chuan Lian Zi and raw Mai Ya, three coursing-discharge herbs — the Liver is an unyielding viscus, loving free coursing by nature; pure subduing provokes its rebellion (Zhang recounted that his early pure use of subduing herbs had little effect, and adding these three brought results), and "complying with its nature to restrain it" is a grade above "hard suppression." Niu Xi one liang as sovereign, neither subduing nor clearing but solely tasked with "conducting down," the same office as Tian Ma Gou Teng's Niu Xi but at triple the dose — the gradation is the disease-momentum.
Composition & Logic
Niu Xi30gSovereign
Dai Zhe Shi30gMinister
Long Gu15gMinister
Mu Li15gMinister
Gui Ban15gMinister
Shao Yao15gAssistant
Xuan Shen15gAssistant
Tian Dong15gAssistant
Chuan Lian Zi6gAssistant
Mai Ya6gAssistant
Yin Chen Hao6gAssistant
Gan Cao4.5gEnvoy
Conducting (Niu Xi), subduing (Dai Zhe Shi, Long Gu, Mu Li, tortoise shell), enriching (Shao Yao, Xuan Shen, Tian Dong), coursing (Yin Chen, Chuan Lian Zi, Mai Ya) — four hands, its soul being coursing lodged within subduing.
Classical Lineage
The Long-Mu subduing directly inherits Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li and Jiu Ni Tang at a raised dose; Dai Zhe Shi's heavy subduing inherits Xuan Fu Dai Zhe (that one liang, this one-and-a-half, a deficiency-repletion gradation); the Shao Yao-Gan Cao sour-sweet yin-forming pair embedded; the enrich-water-moisten-wood inherits the Dihuang lineage; the "comply with its nature" coursing three herbs are a classical-style reflection on the pure-subduing method — the same "counter-assistant" philosophy as Bai Tong Tang plus pig-bile and human urine (preventing blockade), enlarged.
Cautions
Qi-deficiency blood-stasis stroke (deficient pulse, hemiplegia without hyperactive signs) belongs to Bu Yang Huan Wu; mistaken subduing makes it more deficient — the two stroke types, deficiency and repletion, are a life-and-death differentiation.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《杨氏家藏方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yangshi Jiacang Fang — jingfang lineage traced below.

牵正散Qian Zheng San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
口眼㖞斜（面瘫）面部肌肉抽动舌淡苔白
气机病机
风痰阻于头面阳明之络：络脉痹阻则纵缓不用、无邪之侧反急——㖞斜由此（“邪之所在为缓、正之所牵为急”）。
辨证推理
三味专病专方：白附子引药上头面、僵蚕全蝎虫药搜络——草木之力达不到的细络，虫类走窜可通。热酒调服助其行散。针药互参处正在此：面瘫针刺（地仓颊车翳风合谷之属）与此方同一「通阳明之络」逻辑，急性期虫药祛风、恢复期可合补阳还五（气虚络瘀）——方与针在同一病机地图上会师。风痰之辨是使用前提：突发㖞斜而无半身不遂者方是（兼见偏瘫者已属中风大局）。
经方血缘
虫类通络法之源可上溯经方抵当汤（水蛭虻虫——血络之瘀以虫攻）：草木不及之处以虫达之，是仲景已开之门；本方移此思想于风痰之络。
组成与组方逻辑
白附子6g君
祛风化痰，尤善治头面之风
僵蚕6g臣
祛风化痰通络
全蝎3g臣
搜风通络止痉——虫类走窜之力
一引（白附上行）二搜（蚕蝎入络）——头面风痰之专锐小队。
类方鉴别
和肝·平肝法系镇肝熄风汤身痛逐瘀汤补阳还五汤
禁忌与注意
气虚之㖞僻（久病不复）当补气通络为主；有热者白附之温燥慎之；孕妇忌虫药。
Key Signs
facial deviation (facial paralysis)facial muscle twitchingpale tongue, white coat
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Wind-phlegm obstructing the head-face Yang Ming collaterals: the collaterals obstructed give slackening and disuse, and the unafflicted side conversely tightens — deviation arises thus ("where the pathogen lies is slack, what the upright pulls is taut").
Pattern Reasoning
A three-herb specific formula for a specific disease: Bai Fu Zi guides herbs up to the head and face, Jiang Can-Quan Xie, worm herbs, track the collaterals — the fine collaterals beyond the reach of plant-and-tree herbs, the coursing worm-kinds can free. Taken with hot wine to aid its movement and dispersal. Needle-and-medicine cross-reference lies just here: facial-paralysis needling (Di Cang, Jia Che, Yi Feng, He Gu and kin) follows the same "free the Yang Ming collaterals" logic as this formula, with worm herbs expelling wind in the acute phase and, in the recovery phase, combining with Bu Yang Huan Wu (qi-deficiency collateral stasis) — formula and needle meeting on the same mechanism-map. The wind-phlegm differentiation is the premise of use: sudden deviation without hemiplegia is it (concurrent hemiplegia already belongs to the larger picture of stroke).
Composition & Logic
Bai Fu Zi6gSovereign
Jiang Can6gMinister
Quan Xie3gMinister
One conducting (Bai Fu Zi ascending), two tracking (Jiang Can, Quan Xie entering the collaterals) — a small sharp squad for wind-phlegm of the head and face.
Classical Lineage
The worm-kind collateral-freeing method traces up to the classical Di Dang Tang (Shui Zhi-Meng Chong — blood-collateral stasis attacked with worms): where plant-and-tree herbs cannot reach, worms reach — a door Zhang Ji already opened; this formula transfers the idea to the wind-phlegm collaterals.
Cautions
Deviation from qi deficiency (chronic and unrecovered) should mainly supplement qi and free the collaterals; where there is heat use the warm-drying Bai Fu Zi with caution; worm herbs shunned in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《太平惠民和剂局方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Taiping Huimin Heji Jufang — jingfang lineage traced below.

二陈汤Er Chen Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
咳嗽痰多色白易咯胸膈痞闷、恶心呕吐肢体困重舌苔白腻、脉滑
气机病机
湿痰之通证：脾失健运、湿聚成痰，随气升降无处不到——痰之为病百态，其源头只一个脾。
辨证推理
化痰法系的地基方：“治痰三原则”全在四味中——燥其已成之痰（半夏）、顺其载痰之气（陈皮：治痰先治气）、断其生痰之源（茯苓渗湿实脾）。“二陈”之名取夏陈二味以陈久者良。它与四君同为局方“底盘双璧”：几乎所有痰证方都可解构为“二陈＋X”——加竹茹枳实为温胆（痰热扰神）、加术天麻应风痰眩晕、合四君为六君（虚痰）、加连蒌向小陷胸靠拢（痰热结胸）。原方煎加乌梅一枚：散中一收，防燥散伤正——经方“姜辛味”收散哲学的时方回声。
经方血缘
小半夏加茯苓汤（夏姜苓——止呕化饮祖方）＋橘皮汤（橘姜）：两首经方合流定型。半夏茯苓这对承经方化饮全谱，陈皮理气则把金匮“病痰饮者当以温药和之”的“和”字落在气分。
组成与组方逻辑
半夏15g君
燥湿化痰、降逆和胃
橘皮15g臣
理气化痰——气顺则痰消
茯苓9g佐
渗湿以断生痰之源
甘草5g，炙（5g）使
和中（原方加生姜乌梅同煎）
燥（夏）顺（陈）渗（苓）和（草梅姜）——治痰三原则的四味实现。
加减
痰郁化热、虚烦不眠：竹茹、枳实 → 温胆汤
升级为温胆汤
风痰上扰之眩晕头痛：白术、天麻 → 半夏白术天麻汤
升级为半夏白术天麻汤
类方鉴别
化痰法系小半夏汤六君子汤温胆汤三子养亲汤
禁忌与注意
燥痰（干咳痰少而黏）、阴虚之痰忌燥——痰亦分燥湿两性。
Key Signs
cough with copious white phlegm, easily expectoratedchest and diaphragm oppression, nausea and vomitingheavy sluggish limbswhite greasy coat, slippery pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The general pattern of damp-phlegm: the Spleen losing sound transport, damp gathers into phlegm, following the qi's ascending and descending to reach everywhere — phlegm-disease is myriad in form, but its source is only one, the Spleen.
Pattern Reasoning
The base formula of the phlegm-transforming lineage: the "three principles of treating phlegm" are all in four herbs — dry the already-formed phlegm (Ban Xia), smooth the phlegm-carrying qi (Chen Pi: to treat phlegm first treat qi), cut the phlegm-generating source (Fu Ling percolating damp and firming the Spleen). The name "Er Chen" takes the two herbs Ban Xia and Chen Pi, best when aged. It stands with Si Jun as the Ju Fang's "twin bases": nearly every phlegm formula can be deconstructed as "Er Chen plus X" — add Zhu Ru-Zhi Shi for Wen Dan (phlegm-heat disturbing the spirit), add Bai Zhu-Tian Ma for wind-phlegm dizziness, combine with Si Jun for Liu Jun (deficiency phlegm), add Huang Lian-Gua Lou to approach Xiao Xian Xiong (phlegm-heat chest-bind). The original formula decocts with one Wu Mei added: a gathering amid dispersing, guarding against drying-dispersal harming the upright — the later-formula echo of the classics' "ginger-Xi Xin-Wu Wei Zi" gathering-dispersing philosophy.
Composition & Logic
Ban Xia15gSovereign
Ju Pi15gMinister
Fu Ling9gAssistant
Gan Cao5gEnvoy
Drying (Ban Xia), smoothing (Chen Pi), percolating (Fu Ling), harmonizing (Gan Cao, Wu Mei, ginger) — the four-herb realization of the three principles of treating phlegm.
Modifications
Phlegm-constraint transforming to heat, deficiency-vexation sleeplessness: Zhu Ru, Zhi Shi → Wen Dan Tang
Upgrade to Wen Dan Tang
Wind-phlegm harassing above with dizziness and headache: Bai Zhu, Tian Ma → Ban Xia Bai Zhu Tian Ma Tang
Upgrade to Ban Xia Bai Zhu Tian Ma Tang
Classical Lineage
Xiao Ban Xia Jia Fu Ling Tang (Ban Xia-ginger-Fu Ling — the anti-retching rheum-transforming ancestor) plus Ju Pi Tang (Ju Pi-ginger): two classical formulas converging into fixed form. The Ban Xia-Fu Ling pair inherits the classical rheum-transforming spectrum, and Chen Pi regulating qi lands the Jin Gui's "harmonize rheum disease with warm herbs" on the qi level.
Cautions
Dry phlegm (dry cough, scant sticky phlegm) and yin-deficiency phlegm shun drying — phlegm too divides into dry and damp natures.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《三因极一病证方论》（陈言；祖方出《集验方》） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Sanyin Jiyi Bingzheng Fanglun — jingfang lineage traced below.

温胆汤Wen Dan Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
虚烦不眠、惊悸不宁呕恶呃逆眩晕、癫痫苔白腻微黄、脉弦滑
气机病机
胆郁痰扰：胆为清净之府、喜宁谧恶烦扰——痰浊（微兼化热）扰其府则决断失司：不眠、易惊、眩呕并见。方名“温”字实为“和”义：非温热之温，乃使胆复其温和宁谧之常。
辨证推理
不寐谱系「痰扰」一格的主方（栀子豉之郁热／黄连阿胶之火亢／酸枣仁之血虚／归脾之心脾虚／此方之痰扰——五格齐）。鉴别抓手是「苔腻＋惊悸易醒＋呕恶」三联。竹茹半夏这对一凉一温直取古本竹茹半夏汤之核；痰热重加黄连即黄连温胆（临床更常用），气虚合六君、阴虚合酸枣仁——温胆是精神神志类疾病最百搭的底盘之一（焦虑、失眠、眩晕症、化疗呕吐皆见其影）。
经方血缘
二陈汤＋竹茹枳实。竹茹上溯桂林古本竹茹半夏汤（伤暑清化），枳实之破承四逆散／承气之凿——化痰底盘加“清＋破”两子即成新方；痰热扰神之机与小陷胸（连夏蒌）互为轻重两档。
组成与组方逻辑
半夏6g君
燥湿化痰降逆
竹茹6g君
清化痰热、除烦止呕（与夏一温一凉成对）
枳实6g臣
破痰滞、降胆胃之逆
橘皮9g臣
理气化痰
茯苓5g佐
渗湿宁心
甘草3g，炙（3g）使
和中（加姜枣同煎）
二陈底盘＋竹茹清之、枳实降之——痰热扰胆之和剂。
加减
痰热重（烦甚苔黄、心悸不宁）：黄连6g
即黄连温胆汤，直折其热
类方鉴别
化痰法系二陈汤栀子豉汤酸枣仁汤小陷胸汤黄连温胆汤半夏白术天麻汤安神定志丸消瘰丸
禁忌与注意
血虚之不眠（无痰象）归酸枣仁辈；阴虚舌红少苔忌燥。
Key Signs
deficiency vexation and insomnia, restless fright palpitationnausea, retching, hiccupdizziness, epilepsywhite greasy slightly yellow coat, wiry slippery pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Gallbladder constraint with phlegm harassment: the Gallbladder is a clear-pure mansion, loving quiet and hating disturbance — phlegm-turbidity (slightly transforming to heat) harassing its mansion loses its decisiveness: insomnia, easy fright, dizziness and retching appearing together. The word "warm" in the name in fact means "harmonize": not the warmth of warm-hot herbs, but restoring the Gallbladder to its normal warm-and-quiet state.
Pattern Reasoning
A chief formula for the insomnia spectrum's "phlegm-harassment" square (Zhi Zi Chi's constrained heat / Huang Lian E Jiao's fire-hyperactivity / Suan Zao Ren's blood-deficiency / Gui Pi's Heart-Spleen deficiency / this formula's phlegm-harassment — five squares complete). The differentiating handle is the triad "greasy coat plus easy-waking palpitation plus retching." The Zhu Ru-Ban Xia pair, one cool, one warm, takes the core of the Guilin edition's Zhu Ru Ban Xia Tang directly; for heavy phlegm-heat add Huang Lian for Huang Lian Wen Dan (more used clinically), for qi deficiency combine with Liu Jun, for yin deficiency with Suan Zao Ren — Wen Dan is one of the most versatile bases for psychiatric-spirit disorders (anxiety, insomnia, vertigo, chemotherapy vomiting all show its shadow).
Composition & Logic
Ban Xia6gSovereign
Zhu Ru6gSovereign
Zhi Shi6gMinister
Ju Pi9gMinister
Fu Ling5gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
The Er Chen base plus Zhu Ru to clear and Zhi Shi to descend — a harmonizing formula for phlegm-heat disturbing the Gallbladder.
Modifications
Heavy phlegm-heat (severe vexation, yellow coat, restless palpitation): Huang Lian 6g
I.e. Huang Lian Wen Dan Tang, cutting the heat directly
Classical Lineage
Er Chen Tang plus Zhu Ru and Zhi Shi. Zhu Ru traces up to the Guilin edition's Zhu Ru Ban Xia Tang (summer-damage clearing-transformation), Zhi Shi's breaking inherits Si Ni San / Cheng Qi's chiseling — the phlegm-transforming base plus a "clear plus break" pair makes a new formula; the phlegm-heat spirit-harassment mechanism forms light-versus-heavy gradations with Xiao Xian Xiong (Huang Lian-Ban Xia-Gua Lou).
Cautions
Blood-deficiency insomnia (without phlegm signs) belongs to the Suan Zao Ren class; in yin deficiency with red tongue and scant coat shun drying.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《六因条辨》（陆廷珍） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Liuyin Tiaobian — jingfang lineage traced below.

黄连温胆汤Huang Lian Wen Dan Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
温胆证＋热象显心烦不寐甚、口苦痰黄、苔黄腻脉滑数
气机病机
痰热扰心之正格：温胆证的热度再升一档——痰与火胶结，扰神更甚。
辨证推理
温胆的清火档：加黄连一味，痰热之“热”有了专职——法系内“底盘加清”与丹栀逍遥同一语法。临床常较原方更常用（今人痰热体质多）：顽固失眠、焦虑症、心律失常之痰火型皆其地界。连夏同方又回望小陷胸（连夏蒌）与黄连汤——辛开苦降的血脉在时方中继续流。
经方血缘
温胆汤＋黄连。连夏之对直承小陷胸汤辛开苦降之核——痰热互结的经方解法在神志领域的移植。
组成与组方逻辑
黄连6g君
清心胆之痰火
半夏6g臣
化痰降逆
竹茹6g臣
清化除烦
枳实6g佐
破滞
橘皮9g佐
理气
茯苓6g佐
渗湿宁心
甘草3g，炙（3g）使
和中
温胆底盘＋黄连加味。
类方鉴别
化痰法系温胆汤小陷胸汤黄连阿胶汤
禁忌与注意
无热之痰（苔白）不必连之苦寒；火亢水亏无痰者（舌绛少苔）归黄连阿胶汤。
Key Signs
Wen Dan pattern plus pronounced heat signssevere vexing insomnia, bitter tasteyellow phlegm, yellow greasy coatslippery rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The standard pattern of phlegm-heat harassing the Heart: the Wen Dan pattern's heat raised one notch — phlegm and fire glued together, harassing the spirit the more.
Pattern Reasoning
Wen Dan's fire-clearing gradation: adding one Huang Lian gives the phlegm-heat's "heat" a dedicated agent — the "base plus clearing" of the same grammar as Dan Zhi Xiao Yao. Clinically often more used than the original formula (today's phlegm-heat constitutions being many): intractable insomnia, anxiety, and the phlegm-fire type of arrhythmia are all its territory. Huang Lian and Ban Xia in one formula again look back to Xiao Xian Xiong (Lian-Ban-Gua Lou) and Huang Lian Tang — the bloodline of acrid-opening bitter-descending flowing on in later formulas.
Composition & Logic
Huang Lian6gSovereign
Ban Xia6gMinister
Zhu Ru6gMinister
Zhi Shi6gAssistant
Ju Pi9gAssistant
Fu Ling6gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
The Wen Dan base plus a Huang Lian module.
Classical Lineage
Wen Dan Tang plus Huang Lian. The Huang Lian-Ban Xia pair directly inherits Xiao Xian Xiong Tang's acrid-opening bitter-descending core — the classical solution for phlegm-heat binding transplanted into the spirit-mind domain.
Cautions
Phlegm without heat (white coat) needs no bitter-cold Huang Lian; fire-hyperactive water-depleted without phlegm (deep-red tongue, scant coat) belongs to Huang Lian E Jiao Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医学心悟》（程国彭） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yixue Xinwu (Cheng Guopeng) — jingfang lineage traced below.

半夏白术天麻汤Ban Xia Bai Zhu Tian Ma Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
眩晕（视物旋转）、头痛如裹胸闷呕恶舌苔白腻、脉弦滑
气机病机
风痰上扰清空：脾湿生痰、痰引肝风（土壅木郁而风动）、风携痰上冒——“无痰不作眩”（丹溪）与“无风不作眩”在此合流为风痰之眩。
辨证推理
眩晕地图的“风痰”一格：经方水眩谱线（苓桂术甘之起则眩／泽泻汤之苦冒眩／真武之振振欲擗）之外，时方补上痰眩（此方）与阳亢之眩（天麻钩藤）——五格眩晕地图收全。鉴别抓手：水眩舌胖苔滑、心下有振水；痰眩苔白腻、胸闷呕恶、头重如裹；阳亢之眩面赤脉弦长。方即二陈加术麻：术承泽泻汤白术之运、天麻专司定风——程氏谓“足太阴痰厥头痛非半夏不能疗，眼黑头旋、风虚内作非天麻不能除”。
经方血缘
二陈汤＋白术天麻。白术制水承苓桂术甘／泽泻汤之职；整方可视为“泽泻汤思路的痰证版”——彼泄水之冒眩、此化痰之眩晕，水痰异形而治源（脾）同。
组成与组方逻辑
半夏9g君
燥湿化痰降逆
天麻6g君
平肝息风止眩——“无天麻不能治眩晕”
白术9g臣
健脾燥湿断痰源
茯苓6g佐
渗湿
橘皮6g佐
理气化痰
甘草3g，炙（3g）使
和中（加姜枣）
二陈化其痰、术断其源、天麻定其风——风痰眩晕三手。
类方鉴别
化痰法系泽泻汤苓桂术甘汤天麻钩藤饮温胆汤
禁忌与注意
阴虚阳亢之眩（舌红脉弦细数）忌燥；气血虚之眩当补——眩晕五格先定位。
Key Signs
dizziness (spinning vision), headache as if wrappedchest oppression, nauseawhite greasy coat, wiry slippery pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Wind-phlegm harassing the clear void: Spleen damp generates phlegm, phlegm draws Liver wind (earth congestion, wood constraint, and wind stirs), and wind carries phlegm to cloud upward — Danxi's "no phlegm, no dizziness" and "no wind, no dizziness" converge here into wind-phlegm dizziness.
Pattern Reasoning
The "wind-phlegm" square of the dizziness map: beyond the classics' water-dizziness spectrum (Ling Gui Zhu Gan's dizziness-on-rising / Ze Xie Tang's bitter clouding / Zhen Wu's trembling-about-to-fall), later formulas fill in phlegm-dizziness (this formula) and yang-ascendant dizziness (Tian Ma Gou Teng) — the five-square dizziness map complete. Differentiating handles: water-dizziness has a plump tongue with slippery coat and splashing water below the heart; phlegm-dizziness has a white greasy coat, chest oppression and retching, head heavy as if wrapped; yang-ascendant dizziness has a red face and long wiry pulse. The formula is Er Chen plus Bai Zhu-Tian Ma: Bai Zhu inherits the transport of Ze Xie Tang's Bai Zhu, Tian Ma solely tasked with settling wind — Cheng stated "foot-Tai-Yin phlegm-reversal headache cannot be cured without Ban Xia; black-eyed head-spinning wind-deficiency arising within cannot be removed without Tian Ma."
Composition & Logic
Ban Xia9gSovereign
Tian Ma6gSovereign
Bai Zhu9gMinister
Fu Ling6gAssistant
Ju Pi6gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
Er Chen transforms the phlegm, Bai Zhu cuts off its source, Tian Ma settles the wind — three hands for wind-phlegm dizziness.
Classical Lineage
Er Chen Tang plus Bai Zhu and Tian Ma. Bai Zhu controlling water inherits the office of Ling Gui Zhu Gan / Ze Xie Tang; the whole formula may be seen as "the phlegm-pattern version of the Ze Xie Tang idea" — that draining water for clouding dizziness, this transforming phlegm for dizziness, water and phlegm differing in form but treating the same source (the Spleen).
Cautions
Dizziness of yin-deficiency yang-hyperactivity (red tongue, wiry thin rapid pulse) shuns drying; dizziness of qi-blood deficiency should be supplemented — first locate among the five dizziness squares.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《韩氏医通》（韩懋） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Hanshi Yitong — jingfang lineage traced below.

三子养亲汤San Zi Yang Qin Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
老人咳嗽气逆、痰多胸痞食少难消苔白腻、脉滑
气机病机
高年痰壅气实之标证：脾肾已虚为本（不任峻补亦不任峻攻），痰食气三滞为标——先治其标以通其壅，“养亲”之名点明这是给虚人老人设计的温和攻法。
辨证推理
三味种子药各主一滞：苏子降气之逆、芥子豁膜外之痰、莱菔子消食之滞——气痰食三线各一子，微炒击碎煮汤代茶、不宜煎熬太过：剂型服法处处照顾老人。“治标”的自觉是本方的方法论价值：韩氏明言标急则先治其标、继以六君辈善后——攻补的时序观（先通后补）与经方“先治水后治厥”（茯苓甘草汤条）同一思维。芥子“皮里膜外之痰”一语后世发挥极广（阳和汤等）。
经方血缘
降气化痰之法承经方射干麻黄（菀冬降气）与葶苈大枣（泻肺行水）之间的温和档；“痰食同治”则为保和丸（消导法系）预留接口——三子中莱菔子一子两属。
组成与组方逻辑
苏子9g君
降气化痰平喘
白芥子6g臣
温肺利气、豁皮里膜外之痰
莱菔子9g佐
消食导滞化痰——痰食同源之应
三子三滞，代茶缓服——虚人标实之轻攻。
类方鉴别
化痰法系二陈汤射干麻黄汤保和丸
禁忌与注意
标去即止、继以调补（气阴虚之喘咳勿久用）；无食滞者减莱菔。
Key Signs
cough and qi counterflow in the elderly, copious phlegm and chest fullnessreduced appetite, poor digestionwhite greasy coat, slippery pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The branch pattern of copious phlegm and repletion qi in the aged: Spleen and Kidney already deficient as the root (bearing neither fierce supplementation nor fierce attack), phlegm-food-qi three stagnations as the branch — treat the branch first to free the congestion, and the name "nourishing the parents" makes plain this is a gentle attacking method designed for the deficient and the aged.
Pattern Reasoning
Three seed-herbs each governing one stagnation: Su Zi descends the qi counterflow, Bai Jie Zi expels the phlegm beyond the membranes, Lai Fu Zi disperses food stagnation — qi, phlegm, food, three lines each with a seed, lightly parched and crushed, simmered as a tea-substitute, not to be over-decocted: dosage form and taking-method tend the aged throughout. The self-awareness of "treating the branch" is this formula's methodological value: Han stated plainly that with an urgent branch, treat the branch first, then follow with Liu Jun and kin for aftercare — the sequence-view of attacking and supplementing (free first, supplement after), the same thinking as the classics' "treat water first, reversal after" (the Fu Ling Gan Cao Tang line). Bai Jie Zi's phrase "phlegm within the skin and beyond the membranes" was very widely developed by later ages (Yang He Tang and the like).
Composition & Logic
Su Zi9gSovereign
Bai Jie Zi6gMinister
Lai Fu Zi9gAssistant
Three seeds for three stagnations, taken slowly in place of tea — a gentle attack on branch-excess in the deficient.
Classical Lineage
The qi-descending phlegm-transforming method inherits the gentle gradation between the classical She Gan Ma Huang (Zi Wan-Kuan Dong descending qi) and Ting Li Da Zao (draining the Lung, moving water); the "phlegm-food co-treatment" leaves an interface for Bao He Wan (the dispersing lineage) — among the three seeds, Lai Fu Zi belongs to both.
Cautions
Stop once the branch is cleared, then follow with regulation-supplementation (do not use long in qi-yin-deficiency wheeze-cough); reduce Lai Fu Zi where there is no food stagnation.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医宗金鉴》（四物汤出《仙授理伤续断秘方》） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yizong Jinjian — jingfang lineage traced below.

桃红四物汤Tao Hong Si Wu Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
血虚兼瘀之月经不调经行量少有块、色紫暗经行腹痛（刺痛）舌暗或有瘀点
气机病机
血虚与血瘀互为因果：虚则行迟、迟则成瘀，瘀阻又碍新血之生——养血阵中加活血之子，两环同解。
辨证推理
逐瘀法系的地基有两块：四物汤（养血底盘——地归芍芎，一静三动之布局）与桃红（活血药组）。四物本身已藏动静之机（芎归动、地芍静），加桃红则活血力升档而养血之底不撤——“养血为体、活血为用”是本方与纯攻诸方（抵当辈）的分界。妇科血瘀轻中档之通用底盘：经少有块、痛经色暗皆其的。它同时是王清任诸逐瘀汤的半个母亲——血府逐瘀即此方合四逆散。
经方血缘
四物汤之源即经方胶艾汤（金匮：胶艾四物八味）去胶艾——芎归胶艾汤减两味成四物，养血底盘是仲景旧物；桃仁承桃核承气之破瘀主力，红花与之成对——“桃红”一对是逐瘀法系的通用活血药组。
组成与组方逻辑
地黄12g，熟（12g）君
滋阴养血为底
当归9g臣
补血活血
芍药9g，白（9g）臣
敛阴和营
川芎6g佐
血中气药，行滞
桃仁9g佐
破瘀
红花6g佐
活血通经
四物养其体（一静三动），桃红行其瘀——养行七三开。
类方鉴别
逐瘀法系血府逐瘀汤温经汤
禁忌与注意
月经过多、崩漏无瘀者禁；孕妇忌桃红。
Key Signs
irregular menstruation from blood deficiency with stasisscant menses with dark purple clotsmenstrual abdominal pain (stabbing)dark tongue or stasis spots
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Blood deficiency and blood stasis as mutual cause and effect: deficient gives slow movement, slow gives stasis, and stasis obstructing further hinders the generation of new blood — adding blood-invigorating pieces to a blood-nourishing array resolves both rings together.
Pattern Reasoning
The Blood-Stasis lineage's foundation has two blocks: Si Wu Tang (the blood-nourishing base — Di Huang, Dang Gui, Shao Yao, Chuan Xiong, one still, three moving) and Tao-Hong (the blood-invigorating add-on). Si Wu itself already holds a still-moving trigger (Chuan Xiong-Dang Gui move, Di Huang-Shao Yao still), and adding Tao-Hong upgrades the blood-invigorating force without withdrawing the blood-nourishing base — "nourish blood as body, invigorate blood as function" is this formula's boundary from purely attacking formulas (Di Dang and kin). A general base for the mild-to-moderate gradation of gynecological blood-stasis: scant menses with clots, dark painful menses are all its target. It is also half-mother of Wang Qingren's stasis formulas — Xue Fu Zhu Yu is this formula combined with Si Ni San.
Composition & Logic
Di Huang12gSovereign
Dang Gui9gMinister
Shao Yao9gMinister
Chuan Xiong6gAssistant
Tao Ren9gAssistant
Hong Hua6gAssistant
The Four Substances nourish the body (one still, three moving), Tao Ren–Hong Hua move the stasis — nourishing to moving, seven to three.
Classical Lineage
Si Wu Tang's source is the classical Jiao Ai Tang (Jin Gui: Jiao Ai plus Si Wu, eight herbs) with Jiao and Ai removed — Xiong Gui Jiao Ai Tang minus two herbs becomes Si Wu, the blood-nourishing base a legacy of Zhang Ji; Tao Ren inherits the stasis-breaking main force of Tao He Cheng Qi, and Hong Hua pairs with it — the "Tao-Hong" pair is the Blood-Stasis lineage's general blood-invigorating herb-pair.
Cautions
Contraindicated in excessive menstruation and flooding without stasis; Tao Ren-Hong Hua are shunned in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医林改错》（王清任） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yilin Gaicuo (Wang Qingren) — jingfang lineage traced below.

血府逐瘀汤Xue Fu Zhu Yu Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
胸痛日久、痛有定处如针刺头痛经年不愈呃逆干呕、内热瞀闷入暮潮热、唇暗舌暗有瘀斑、脉涩
气机病机
气滞与血瘀互为表里、结于胸中血府：气不行则血不走、血既瘀则气愈滞——胸中为气之宗、血之聚，故此地之瘀必气血同治。
辨证推理
王清任五逐瘀汤之首、气血同治的枢纽方：结构是透明的两半拼装——桃红四物（活血半壁）合四逆散（行气半壁），再以桔梗牛膝一升一降造循环（桔梗载药入胸、牛膝引血下行——胸中血府的进出通道各设一岗）。“久痛、刺痛、定处、夜甚、舌暗脉涩”五个瘀血指纹是全法系的通用识别码，此方页立为总纲。清任所列怪症（灯笼热、瞀闷、无端呃逆）皆“怪病从瘀论治”之例——久治不愈、诸药不应者当想到瘀。
经方血缘
桃红四物汤＋四逆散（柴芍枳草原班）＋桔梗牛膝。四逆散承其疏郁骨架第三次出场（柴胡疏肝之放大、逍遥之重组、此处之合体）；一升一降之循环设计可回望桔梗（舟楫）与牛膝各自药性——经方成方在时方中的第三种用法：整方嵌入。
组成与组方逻辑
桃仁12g君
破瘀
红花9g君
活血
当归9g臣
养血活血
地黄9g，生（9g）臣
生地凉血养阴——瘀久多郁热
川芎4.5g佐
行血中之气
芍药6g，赤（6g）佐
赤芍凉血散瘀
柴胡3g佐
疏肝升达
枳实6g（原方枳壳）（6g）佐
宽胸降气
桔梗4.5g佐
载药上行入胸（血府）
牛膝9g佐
引血下行
甘草6g使
和中
活血半壁＋行气半壁＋升降二使——气血同治之枢。
类方鉴别
逐瘀法系桃红四物汤四逆散身痛逐瘀汤丹参饮膈下逐瘀汤
禁忌与注意
无瘀之痛（胀痛走窜属气、隐痛喜按属虚）勿投；孕妇忌；出血倾向者慎。
Key Signs
chronic chest pain, fixed and stabbingyears-long intractable headachehiccup and dry retching, internal heat and oppressiontidal fever at dusk; dark lips and tongue with stasis spots; choppy pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Qi stagnation and blood stasis as exterior and interior, binding in the chest's blood-mansion: qi not moving lets blood not travel, blood already stagnant makes qi the more stagnant — the chest is the ancestral seat of qi and the gathering of blood, so stasis here must treat qi and blood together.
Pattern Reasoning
First of Wang Qingren's five stasis-expelling formulas, the pivot of treating qi and blood together: the structure is a transparent assembly of two halves — Tao Hong Si Wu (the blood-invigorating half) combined with Si Ni San (the qi-moving half), then Jie Geng and Niu Xi, one ascending, one descending, to make a circulation (Jie Geng carries herbs into the chest, Niu Xi conducts blood downward — a post each set at the exit and entry of the chest blood-mansion). The five stasis-fingerprints "chronic pain, stabbing pain, fixed location, worse at night, dark tongue and choppy pulse" are the lineage's universal recognition code, set here as the general outline. The strange signs Qingren listed (lantern heat, oppression, groundless hiccup) are all instances of "treat strange disease from stasis" — for the long-unhealed unresponsive to all medicines, think of stasis.
Composition & Logic
Tao Ren12gSovereign
Hong Hua9gSovereign
Dang Gui9gMinister
Di Huang9gMinister
Chuan Xiong4.5gAssistant
Shao Yao6gAssistant
Chai Hu3gAssistant
Zhi Shi6gAssistant
Jie Geng4.5gAssistant
Niu Xi9gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
A blood-invigorating half plus a qi-moving half plus two ascending-descending envoys — the pivot of treating qi and blood together.
Classical Lineage
Tao Hong Si Wu Tang plus Si Ni San (the original Chai Hu-Shao Yao-Zhi Shi-Gan Cao cast) plus Jie Geng-Niu Xi. Si Ni San's constraint-coursing skeleton makes its third appearance (the enlargement of Chai Hu Shu Gan, the recombination of Xiao Yao, the fusion here); the ascending-descending circulation design can look back to the natures of Jie Geng (the oar) and Niu Xi — the third use of a classical whole formula in a later formula: entire embedding.
Cautions
Do not give for pain without stasis (distending wandering pain is qi, dull pain welcoming pressure is deficiency); shunned in pregnancy; used with caution where there is bleeding tendency.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医林改错》（王清任） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yilin Gaicuo (Wang Qingren) — jingfang lineage traced below.

身痛逐瘀汤Shen Tong Zhu Yu Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
肩痛臂痛腰痛腿痛周身疼痛经久不愈、痛有定处夜间加重舌暗脉涩
气机病机
痹证日久、瘀血入络：风寒湿之痹初在气分经脉，久则血伤入络成瘀——“久痛入络、久痛必瘀”，病位从经到络、病性从邪到瘀的深化。
辨证推理
慢性痛证「从瘀论治」的代表方。结构三层：桃红归芎活血底盘、灵脂没药止痛专队（化瘀定痛之对）、秦艽羌活一点风药（照顾痹之旧属性）＋地龙入络——王清任治痹的判断写在配比里：风湿药仅各三克而活血药全员，「久痹之本已是瘀，风湿只是历史」。与蠲痹汤（风湿仍盛之痹）、独活寄生（肝肾已虚之痹）三分痹证病程：早祛邪、中逐瘀、晚补虚。针灸临床中，此方所对正是激痛点「久痛定点」一类，方药与针刺同攻一个「络瘀」，可互参。
经方血缘
桃红四物之活血半壁（去地芍之滋敛——痹痛不需守）＋虫类通络（地龙承抵当汤开虫药之门、与牵正散同源）＋失笑散半张（五灵脂）——三组成方拼合，应“痹久成瘀”一机。
组成与组方逻辑
桃仁9g君
破瘀
红花9g君
活血
当归9g臣
养血活血
川芎6g臣
行气活血
五灵脂6g，炒（6g）佐
化瘀止痛
没药6g佐
散瘀定痛
香附3g佐
行气
牛膝9g佐
强腰膝、引药入下肢
地龙6g佐
虫类通络利痹
秦艽3g佐
祛风湿舒筋
羌活3g佐
祛风湿利关节
甘草6g使
和中
活血为体、止痛为用、风药为末、虫药入络——久痹从瘀之阵。
类方鉴别
逐瘀法系血府逐瘀汤牵正散失笑散独活寄生汤蠲痹汤
禁忌与注意
痹证初起风寒湿盛（游走、遇寒甚、无瘀象）者仍当祛邪为主；孕妇忌。
Key Signs
pain of shoulders, arms, low back, legs, whole bodylong unhealed, fixed in locationworse at nightdark tongue, choppy pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Chronic bi with blood stasis entering the collaterals: wind-cold-damp bi is at first in the qi-level channels, but chronically the blood is harmed and enters the collaterals into stasis — "chronic pain enters the collaterals, chronic pain must have stasis," a deepening of location from channel to collateral, of nature from pathogen to stasis.
Pattern Reasoning
The representative formula of chronic pain "treated from stasis." Three-layer structure: Tao-Hong-Dang Gui-Chuan Xiong blood-invigorating base, Wu Ling Zhi-Mo Yao pain-stopping team (the stasis-transforming pain-settling pair), Qin Jiao-Qiang Huo a touch of wind herbs (tending bi's old attribute) plus Di Long entering the collaterals — Wang Qingren's judgment in treating bi is written in the ratio: wind-damp herbs only three grams each while blood-invigorators are at full strength, "the root of chronic bi is already stasis, wind-damp is only history." With Juan Bi Tang (bi with wind-damp still exuberant) and Du Huo Ji Sheng (bi with Liver-Kidney already deficient) it divides bi's disease-course in three: early expel pathogen, middle expel stasis, late supplement deficiency. In acupuncture practice, what this formula targets is precisely the trigger-point "chronic fixed-point pain" type — formula and needling attacking the same "collateral stasis," and reading across usefully.
Composition & Logic
Tao Ren9gSovereign
Hong Hua9gSovereign
Dang Gui9gMinister
Chuan Xiong6gMinister
Wu Ling Zhi6gAssistant
Mo Yao6gAssistant
Xiang Fu3gAssistant
Niu Xi9gAssistant
Di Long6gAssistant
Qin Jiao3gAssistant
Qiang Huo3gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Blood-invigorating as the body, pain-relieving as the function, wind herbs as the tail, worm herbs entering the collaterals — the formation for chronic bi treated from stasis.
Classical Lineage
The blood-invigorating half of Tao Hong Si Wu (with Di Huang-Shao Yao's enriching-gathering removed — bi pain needs no guarding) plus worm-kind collateral-freeing (Di Long inheriting Di Dang Tang's opening of the worm-herb door, of one source with Qian Zheng San) plus half of Shi Xiao San (Wu Ling Zhi) — three formulas combined to answer the single mechanism of "chronic bi becoming stasis."
Cautions
At the onset of bi with exuberant wind-cold-damp (wandering, worse with cold, no stasis signs) still expel the pathogen first; shunned in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医林改错》（王清任） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yilin Gaicuo (Wang Qingren) — jingfang lineage traced below.

补阳还五汤Bu Yang Huan Wu Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
中风后半身不遂、口眼㖞斜语言謇涩、口角流涎下肢痿废、小便频遗脉缓无力（气虚为本）
气机病机
气虚血瘀之中风后遗：元气亏损（清任谓“亏五成则归并一侧”）、气不帅血、血滞成瘀而络痹——本在气之大虚，标在络之瘀阻。
辨证推理
剂量即医学立场的极端标本：黄芪四两（120g）对全部活血药合计不足一两——补气与活血二十比一，“气旺自能血行”的宣言。与镇肝熄风汤构成中风虚实两极（本法系与和肝法系的对峙页）：彼脉弦长有力、气血上冲（镇而降之），此脉缓无力、气虚不用（补而行之）——同一半身不遂，用药南北极，误判即祸，脉之有力无力是生死关。清任“元气亏五成”的病理想象虽朴素，气虚血瘀这一病机模型至今是中风恢复期主流治法；黄芪核心页预埋的“芪领血行”在此兑现为极致。
经方血缘
黄芪桂枝五物汤（芪领血行治血痹之肌肤不仁）的重装升级：同一“气帅血行”之机，彼芪三两治不仁、此芪四两治不遂——档位随病势；活血药组仍是桃红归芎（桃红四物之半），地龙承虫类通络之门。
组成与组方逻辑
黄芪120g，生（120g）君
大剂补气——气旺则血行，全方之魂
当归6g，尾（6g）臣
归尾活血不伤血
川芎3g佐
行血
芍药4.5g，赤（4.5g）佐
散瘀
桃仁3g佐
破瘀
红花3g佐
活血
地龙3g佐
通经络
一君独重（芪120g）、六佐皆轻——比例即病机论。
类方鉴别
逐瘀法系镇肝熄风汤牵正散黄芪桂枝茯苓细辛汤
禁忌与注意
中风急性期、阴虚阳亢者（面赤脉弦有力）绝对禁忌——虚实之辨先于一切；需久服缓功。
Key Signs
hemiplegia and facial deviation after strokeslurred speech, droolingatrophic legs, frequent urination and incontinencemoderate forceless pulse (qi deficiency as the root)
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Qi-deficiency blood-stasis stroke sequelae: original qi depleted (Qingren said "deplete five-tenths and it merges to one side"), qi not commanding blood, blood stagnating into stasis with collateral bi — the root in great qi deficiency, the branch in collateral stasis.
Pattern Reasoning
The extreme specimen of "dose is a medical standpoint": four liang of Huang Qi (120g) against all the blood-invigorating herbs totaling under one liang — supplementing qi to invigorating blood twenty to one, the declaration that "qi abundant can itself move blood." With Zhen Gan Xi Feng Tang it forms the deficiency-repletion poles of stroke (the facing-off page of this lineage and the Liver-harmonizing lineage): that has a long wiry forceful pulse with qi-blood surging up (subdue and downbear it), this has a moderate forceless pulse with qi-deficiency disuse (supplement and move it) — the same hemiplegia, medicines at the north and south poles, misjudgment a disaster, the pulse's force or forcelessness the life-and-death gate. Though Qingren's pathological imagining of "original qi depleted five-tenths" is naive, the qi-deficiency blood-stasis mechanism model remains to this day the mainstream method for the stroke recovery phase; the Huang Qi core page's foreshadowed "Qi leading blood to move" is fulfilled here to the extreme.
Composition & Logic
Huang Qi120gSovereign
Dang Gui6gMinister
Chuan Xiong3gAssistant
Shao Yao4.5gAssistant
Tao Ren3gAssistant
Hong Hua3gAssistant
Di Long3gAssistant
One sovereign alone weighted (Huang Qi 120g), six assistants all light — the proportion is the pathomechanism thesis.
Classical Lineage
A heavy re-armed upgrade of Huang Qi Gui Zhi Wu Wu Tang (Huang Qi leading blood to move, treating the numb skin of blood bi): the same "qi commands blood" mechanism, that with three liang of Huang Qi for numbness, this with four liang for disuse — gradation following disease-momentum; the blood-invigorating herbs are still Tao-Hong-Dang Gui-Chuan Xiong (half of Tao Hong Si Wu), and Di Long inherits the worm-kind collateral-freeing door.
Cautions
Absolutely contraindicated in the acute phase of stroke and in yin-deficiency yang-hyperactivity (red face, wiry forceful pulse) — the deficiency-repletion differentiation precedes all else; requires long use for gradual effect.

时方 · 出自《太平惠民和剂局方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Taiping Huimin Heji Jufang — jingfang lineage traced below.

失笑散Shi Xiao San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
瘀血停滞之心腹刺痛产后恶露不行、少腹急痛月经不调、痛经有块
气机病机
瘀阻作痛之最小模型：不通则痛——通其瘀则痛止如失（病者不觉“失”笑而愈，方名由此）。
辨证推理
二味等分的止痛专对：蒲黄五灵脂相须——灵脂化瘀止痛之力专、蒲黄活血兼能止血（生用行、炒用止，一药两向），故瘀痛兼见出血（产后恶露、经痛经多）也不忌。醋或酒调服助行散。它是逐瘀法系的“最小可用单元”：单用治轻症，嵌入大方即止痛模块（身痛逐瘀之灵脂即其半张）。蒲黄之用另有一层趣味：香蒲之花粉——古本大黄香蒲汤用其草透心，后世用其粉行血，一物两部两用。
经方血缘
“通则不痛”直承经方枳实芍药散（产后腹痛之气血郁滞、二味等分为散）——同为产后痛之最小方，彼走气分（枳芍）、此走血分（蒲灵）：气血两个最小止痛单元恰成对页。
组成与组方逻辑
蒲黄6g，包煎（6g）君
活血止血两向——行中有止
五灵脂6g君
化瘀止痛
一化一行（兼止），等分为散——瘀痛最小配置。
类方鉴别
逐瘀法系身痛逐瘀汤桂枝茯苓丸丹参饮生化汤膈下逐瘀汤
禁忌与注意
孕妇忌；无瘀之痛不投；灵脂人参相畏（十九畏），同用须知。
Key Signs
stabbing heart and abdominal pain from blood stasispostpartum retention of lochia, urgent lower-abdomen painirregular menstruation, painful menses with clots
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The minimal model of stasis-obstruction pain: no free flow gives pain — free its stasis and the pain vanishes as if lost (the patient, unaware, "loses" a smile at the cure, whence the name).
Pattern Reasoning
The two-herb equal-parts pain-stopping pair: Pu Huang and Wu Ling Zhi reinforce each other — Wu Ling Zhi's stasis-transforming pain-stopping power focused, Pu Huang invigorating blood while also able to stop bleeding (raw it moves, fried it stops, one herb two directions), so stasis pain with concurrent bleeding (postpartum lochia, painful heavy menses) is not shunned. Taken with vinegar or wine to aid movement and dispersal. It is the Blood-Stasis lineage's "minimal usable unit": used alone for mild cases, embedded in a large formula as the pain-stopping module (the Wu Ling Zhi of Shen Tong Zhu Yu is half of it). Pu Huang's use holds a further interest: the pollen of cattail flower — the Guilin edition's Da Huang Xiang Pu Tang uses its herb to vent the heart, later ages use its pollen to move blood, one thing two parts two uses.
Composition & Logic
Pu Huang6gSovereign
Wu Ling Zhi6gSovereign
One transforming, one moving (also arresting), in equal parts as a powder — the minimal configuration for stasis pain.
Classical Lineage
"Free flow, no pain" directly inherits the classical Zhi Shi Shao Yao San (postpartum abdominal pain of qi-blood constraint, two herbs in equal parts as a powder) — both the smallest formulas for postpartum pain, that traveling the qi level (Zhi Shi-Shao Yao), this the blood level (Pu Huang-Wu Ling Zhi): the two smallest pain-stopping units of qi and blood forming a facing pair.
Cautions
Shunned in pregnancy; do not give for pain without stasis; Wu Ling Zhi and ginseng are mutually averse (of the nineteen antagonisms) — know this if using them together.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《时方歌括》（陈修园） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Shifang Gekuo (Chen Xiuyuan) — jingfang lineage traced below.

丹参饮Dan Shen Yin

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
心胃气血瘀滞之心痛胃脘痛痛处固定、时作时止气滞与血瘀并见
气机病机
血瘀为主、气滞为辅之心胃痛：丹参一两独任血分，檀砂两味轻取气分——七血三气的配比对准“刺痛为主兼闷胀”之候。
辨证推理
心胃同治的轻剂名方：心痛胃痛古来难分（部位相邻、经络相贯），此方索性一网兜住——丹参通心络兼化胃络之瘀，檀香砂仁温行中焦之气。与栝楼薤白诸方分工：彼胸痹之阳微阴弦（痰浊痹阻、通阳为法），此血瘀气滞（活血为法）——胸痛两大机转各有其方，苔腻脉沉滑者归蒌薤、舌暗刺痛者归此。今之冠心病心绞痛、慢性胃炎之瘀滞型皆常用；丹参自此入库，现代心血管常用药，其经方渊源由此可溯。
经方血缘
活血法在胸胃之地的轻剂化：承栝楼薤白（胸阳之痹）与失笑散（瘀痛小对）之间的空档——痹属痰浊者通阳、痛属血瘀者用此，胸痛地图补全一格。
组成与组方逻辑
丹参30g君
重用活血祛瘀、通心络——“一味丹参功同四物”
檀香5g，后下（5g）臣
温中行气止痛
砂仁5g，后下（5g）臣
芳香行气和胃
一血二气、七三之比——心胃瘀痛轻剂。
类方鉴别
逐瘀法系栝楼薤白白酒汤失笑散血府逐瘀汤
禁忌与注意
阴寒之胸痹（遇寒即发、苔白滑）当通阳，凉血之丹参非其治；孕妇慎。
Key Signs
heart and stomach pain from qi-blood stasisfixed pain, intermittentqi stagnation and blood stasis together
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Heart-stomach pain of blood-stasis predominant, qi-stagnation secondary: Dan Shen one liang alone tasked with the blood level, Tan Xiang and Sha Ren two herbs lightly taking the qi level — the seven-blood three-qi ratio aimed at the sign of "stabbing pain predominant with oppression and distension."
Pattern Reasoning
A famous light formula treating Heart and stomach together: heart pain and stomach pain have been hard to distinguish since antiquity (adjacent in location, joined by channel), and this formula simply catches both in one net — Dan Shen frees the Heart collaterals and transforms the stomach collaterals' stasis, Tan Xiang-Sha Ren warm and move middle-burner qi. Its division of labor from the Gua Lou-Xie Bai formulas: those are chest bi's yang-faint yin-wiry (phlegm-turbidity obstruction, freeing yang the method), this is blood-stasis qi-stagnation (invigorating blood the method) — chest pain's two great mechanisms each with its formula, greasy coat and deep slippery pulse to Gua Lou-Xie Bai, dark tongue and stabbing pain to this. Today commonly used for the stasis type of coronary angina and chronic gastritis; Dan Shen enters the repertoire here, and modern cardiovascular medicine's first herb finds its pre-modern lineage recorded on here.
Composition & Logic
Dan Shen30gSovereign
Tan Xiang5gMinister
Sha Ren5gMinister
One blood herb, two qi herbs, in a 7:3 ratio — a light formula for heart-stomach stasis pain.
Classical Lineage
The lightening of the blood-invigorating method in the chest-stomach region: inheriting the gap between Gua Lou Xie Bai (chest-yang bi) and Shi Xiao San (the small stasis-pain pair) — chest pain of phlegm-turbidity has yang freed, pain of blood stasis uses this, completing a square of the chest-pain map.
Cautions
Yin-cold chest bi (erupting with cold, white slippery coat) should have yang freed; the cooling-blood Dan Shen is not its treatment; used with caution in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《温病条辨》（吴鞠通） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Wenbing Tiaobian (Wu Jutong) — jingfang lineage traced below.

银翘散Yin Qiao San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
发热无汗或有汗不畅微恶风寒、头痛咽痛口渴咳嗽、舌尖红、脉浮数
气机病机
温邪上受、首先犯肺：风热袭于卫分——热象（咽痛口渴舌尖红）与表象（微恶寒脉浮）并见，病在“辛凉透之”一档，失治则入气入营。
辨证推理
辛凉平剂、温病学派的开山方：银翘为君清解、荆芥豆豉一点辛温反佐助透（纯凉则邪遏不出——“制性存用”之法）、鲜芦根煎汤香气大出即取服（轻剂不可久煎，“治上焦如羽、非轻不举”）。与麻桂剂立分水岭：同为外感初起，恶寒重无汗身痛者风寒（辛温），咽痛口渴舌尖红者风热（辛凉）——寒温之辨是外感第一辨。吴鞠通自注此方“纯然清肃上焦，不犯中下”，剂型服法皆是方义。
经方血缘
温病学派与古本温病篇的合流点：古本以柴胡剂改装治伏气温病（自内而发），叶吴一系立卫气营血治新感温病（自外而受）——两条温病学脉在此相遇。豆豉承栀子豉之宣、竹叶承竹叶石膏之轻清、连翘承古本燥邪乘心方之正名首用、桔梗甘草整对嵌入（利咽原对）——新学派的用药零件半数是经方旧物。
组成与组方逻辑
金银花15g君
清热解毒、芳香透邪
连翘15g君
清热解毒、轻宣透表
桔梗6g臣
宣肺利咽
牛蒡子9g臣
疏散风热、利咽透疹
薄荷6g，后下（6g）臣
辛凉透表
香豉5g佐
宣郁透邪
荆芥5g佐
辛温一点，助透而不助热——制性存用
竹叶4g佐
清上焦热
芦根15g，鲜（15g）佐
清热生津
甘草5g使
调和利咽
双君清解、群佐透宣、一点辛温反佐——辛凉平剂之范。
类方鉴别
温病法系桑菊饮麻黄汤桂枝汤
禁忌与注意
风寒表证（恶寒重、无汗、不渴）误用辛凉则冰伏其邪；湿温初起忌纯辛凉（当合芳化）。
Key Signs
fever with no sweating or inhibited sweatingslight aversion to wind-cold, headachesore throat, thirstcough, red tongue tip, floating rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Warm pathogen received above, first offending the Lung: wind-heat assailing the defensive level — heat signs (sore throat, thirst, red tongue tip) and exterior signs (mild aversion to cold, floating pulse) appearing together, the disease at the "acrid-cool venting" gradation, mistreated it enters qi and nutritive levels.
Pattern Reasoning
The acrid-cool balanced formula, the founding formula of the Warm-Disease school: Yin Hua-Lian Qiao as sovereign to clear and resolve, a touch of acrid-warm Jing Jie-Dou Chi as counter-assistant to aid venting (pure cold would trap the pathogen from issuing — the method of "curb the nature, keep the use"), fresh Lu Gen decocted and taken the moment its aroma issues fully (a light formula must not be long-boiled — "treat the upper burner as with a feather; without lightness there is no lifting"). It draws a watershed with the Ma-Gui formulas: both are early exterior contraction, but heavy aversion to cold with no sweat and body pain is wind-cold (acrid-warm), sore throat with thirst and red tongue tip is wind-heat (acrid-cool) — cold versus warm is the first differentiation of exterior contraction. Wu Jutong's own note that this formula "purely clears and depurates the upper burner, not touching middle or lower" — dosage form and method of taking are both the formula's meaning.
Composition & Logic
Jin Yin Hua15gSovereign
Lian Yao15gSovereign
Jie Geng6gMinister
Niu Bang Zi9gMinister
Bo He6gMinister
Xiang Chi5gAssistant
Jing Jie5gAssistant
Zhu Ye4gAssistant
Lu Gen15gAssistant
Gan Cao5gEnvoy
Twin sovereigns clear and resolve, a group of assistants vents and diffuses, a touch of acrid-warm as counter-assistant — the model of an acrid-cool balanced formula.
Classical Lineage
The confluence point of the Warm-Disease school and the Guilin edition's warm-disease chapter: the Guilin edition adapts Chai Hu formulas to treat latent-qi warm disease (arising from within), while the Ye-Wu line establishes defensive-qi-nutritive-blood to treat new-contraction warm disease (received from without) — two warm-disease lineage-streams meeting here. Dou Chi inherits Zhi Zi Chi's diffusion, Zhu Ye inherits Zhu Ye Shi Gao's light clearing, Lian Qiao inherits its first proper-named use in the Guilin edition's dryness-offending-the-Heart formula, and Jie Geng-Gan Cao are embedded as a whole pair (the throat-benefiting original pair) — half the new school's medicinal parts are classical legacies.
Cautions
Mistaken use in a wind-cold exterior pattern (heavy aversion to cold, no sweat, no thirst) freezes and traps the pathogen with acrid-cool; at the onset of damp-warmth avoid pure acrid-cool (combine aromatic transformation).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《温病条辨》（吴鞠通） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Wenbing Tiaobian (Wu Jutong) — jingfang lineage traced below.

桑菊饮Sang Ju Yin

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
但咳、身热不甚口微渴脉浮数
气机病机
风热犯肺之轻证：邪浅热微、肺失清肃——“但咳”二字定档：咳是主症、热渴皆微。
辨证推理
辛凉轻剂：与银翘散同出一门而分轻平两档——银翘证热象已显（发热咽痛口渴），桑菊证“但咳身热不甚”——吴鞠通以轻平辛凉三级（桑菊轻、银翘平、白虎重）给风热外感做了刻度化分层，与经方麻黄剂之轻重分档（葱豉—麻黄—大青龙）异曲同工。方中桔梗杏仁一宣一降恰是肺之治节两翼（桔梗条预埋之对在此兑现）。感冒初起之咳、今所谓上感咳嗽期最常用。
经方血缘
桔梗杏仁之升降对直承经方（桔梗汤之提、麻杏之降）；桑菊薄荷轻清之法与古本燥邪干肺方（竹叶石膏杏子甘草——燥忌苦、以轻凉润）一脉同调——“治上焦如羽”的思想经方温病两见。
组成与组方逻辑
桑叶7.5g君
疏散上焦风热、清肺止咳
菊花3g君
疏风清热利头目
杏仁6g臣
降肺止咳
连翘5g臣
轻清透热
薄荷2.5g，后下（2.5g）佐
辛凉轻散
桔梗6g佐
宣肺——与杏仁一升一降
芦根6g佐
清热生津
甘草2.5g使
调和
桑菊轻清为君、杏桔升降为翼——辛凉轻剂。
类方鉴别
温病法系银翘散竹叶石膏杏子甘草汤麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤杏苏散
禁忌与注意
咳而痰多清稀属寒（当温化）；热甚渴甚者升档银翘白虎。
Key Signs
cough only, mild body heatslight thirstfloating rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
The mild pattern of wind-heat offending the Lung: pathogen shallow, heat slight, the Lung losing clearing and depuration — the two words "cough only" set the gradation: cough is the chief sign, heat and thirst both slight.
Pattern Reasoning
The acrid-cool light formula: same origin as Yin Qiao San but divided into light and balanced gradations — the Yin Qiao pattern already shows heat signs (fever, sore throat, thirst), the Sang Ju pattern is "cough only with slight body heat." Wu Jutong gave wind-heat exterior contraction a graduated stratification with the three levels of light-balanced-heavy acrid-cool (Sang Ju light, Yin Qiao balanced, Bai Hu heavy), an echo of the classical Ma Huang formulas' light-heavy gradation (Cong-Chi — Ma Huang — Da Qing Long). In it Jie Geng and Xing Ren, one diffusing, one descending, are precisely the two wings of the Lung's regulation (the pair foreshadowed on the Jie Geng page fulfilled here). Most used for cough at the onset of a cold, today's so-called upper-respiratory cough phase.
Composition & Logic
Sang Ye7.5gSovereign
Ju Hua3gSovereign
Xing Ren6gMinister
Lian Yao5gMinister
Bo He2.5gAssistant
Jie Geng6gAssistant
Lu Gen6gAssistant
Gan Cao2.5gEnvoy
Sang Ye and Ju Hua, light and clearing, as sovereigns; Xing Ren and Jie Geng, ascending and descending, as wings — an acrid-cool light formula.
Classical Lineage
The Jie Geng-Xing Ren ascending-descending pair directly inherits the classics (Jie Geng Tang's lifting, Ma Xing's descending); the Sang-Ju-mint light-clearing method is of one tune with the Guilin edition's dryness-offending-the-Lung formula (Zhu Ye-Shi Gao-Xing Ren-Gan Cao — dryness shuns bitterness, moisten with light coolness) — the "treat the upper burner as with a feather" idea appearing in both classics and warm-disease.
Cautions
Cough with copious thin clear phlegm is cold (warm-transform it); for severe heat and thirst upgrade to Yin Qiao or Bai Hu.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《温病条辨》（吴鞠通） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Wenbing Tiaobian (Wu Jutong) — jingfang lineage traced below.

沙参麦冬汤Sha Shen Mai Dong Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
燥伤肺胃阴分咽干口渴干咳少痰或热病后期低热不退舌红少苔
气机病机
燥热已去七八、阴伤留居主位：邪退正伤之局——清之无邪可清、补之又忌温燥，甘寒生津是唯一通道。
辨证推理
“甘寒法”的标准方：全方无一味苦寒（苦能化燥伤阴）、无一味温补——沙麦玉竹蒌根清一色甘寒柔润，桑叶一味轻宣扫余热、扁豆一味护脾防呆滞。与麦门冬汤对读见两代人的取舍：仲景以人参半夏温运佐滋（虚火上气、需降需运），吴氏纯甘凉不设温运（燥伤为主、无逆可降）——同治肺胃阴伤，佐使之有无标出“火逆”与“燥伤”两个亚型。今之放疗后干燥、干燥综合征、热病恢复期通用底盘。
经方血缘
麦门冬汤（麦冬七比一之滋）去参夏之温运、换沙参玉竹之纯凉——“甘寒生津”一路自经方分蘖；桑叶轻宣承桑菊之法；古本伤燥篇“燥忌苦”的立法在此成为学派共识。
组成与组方逻辑
沙参9g君
养肺胃之阴
麦门冬9g君
滋液润燥
玉竹6g臣
甘润生津
桑叶4.5g佐
轻宣燥热之余
白扁豆4.5g佐
和中护脾——滋阴阵中的脾胃保险
栝楼根4.5g佐
生津止渴
甘草3g使
调和
五润一宣一护——甘寒法之范。
类方鉴别
温病法系麦门冬汤益胃汤增液汤
禁忌与注意
痰湿咳嗽（痰多苔腻）忌滋；脾虚便溏者甘寒亦滑肠。
Key Signs
dryness damaging Lung and Stomach yindry throat and thirstdry cough with scant phlegm, or lingering low fever in late-stage febrile diseasered tongue with scant coat
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Dry-heat seven or eight parts gone, yin damage lodged in the host position: a situation of pathogen retreating and upright harmed — clearing has no pathogen to clear, supplementing shuns warm-drying, and sweet-cool fluid-engendering is the only road.
Pattern Reasoning
The standard formula of the "sweet-cool method": the whole formula has not one bitter-cold herb (bitter can transform dryness and harm yin), not one warm-supplementing herb — Sha Shen, Mai Dong, Yu Zhu, Gua Lou Gen all sweet-cool and soft-moist, one mulberry leaf lightly diffusing to sweep residual heat, one Bian Dou protecting the Spleen against dull stagnation. Read against Mai Men Dong Tang to see two generations' choices: Zhang Ji used ginseng-Ban Xia to warm-transport and assist enrichment (deficiency-fire surging up, needing descent and transport), Wu purely sweet-cool without warm-transport (dryness-damage predominant, no counterflow to descend) — both treating Lung-Stomach yin damage, the presence or absence of assistants marking the "fire-counterflow" and "dryness-damage" subtypes. Today a general base for post-radiotherapy dryness, Sjögren's, and the recovery phase of febrile disease.
Composition & Logic
Sha Shen9gSovereign
Mai Men Dong9gSovereign
Yu Zhu6gMinister
Sang Ye4.5gAssistant
Bai Bian Dou4.5gAssistant
Gua Lou Gen4.5gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
Five moisteners, one diffuser, one protector — the model of the sweet-cold method.
Classical Lineage
The stomach-yin-enriching method comes from Mai Men Dong Tang (the ancestor of stomach-yin deficiency with fire counterflow) with the warm-transporting wing removed and Sha Shen-Yu Zhu's pure coolness substituted — the "sweet-cool fluid-engendering" line branching from the classics; mulberry leaf's light diffusion inherits the Sang-Ju method; the Guilin dryness-chapter's legislation "dryness shuns bitterness" becomes here a school consensus.
Cautions
Phlegm-damp cough (copious phlegm, greasy coat) shuns enriching; in Spleen deficiency with loose stool the sweet-cool nature also loosens the bowel.
