时方 · 出自《温病条辨》（吴鞠通） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Wenbing Tiaobian (Wu Jutong) — jingfang lineage traced below.

益胃汤Yi Wei Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
热病后胃阴受伤不饥不食（饥不欲食）口干咽燥舌红少苔、脉细数
气机病机
胃阴伤而纳化失职：胃喜润恶燥——津亏则不饥不纳，非食积非脾虚，是“燥土不纳”。
辨证推理
“不饥不食”的鉴别专页：不欲食一症三个方向——食积之不食（嗳腐苔厚，消导）、脾虚之不食（倦怠便溏，四君），胃阴伤之不食（舌红少苔口干，此方）——舌苔有无是第一眼分诊。吴氏立此方于下法之后：温病下后邪去而阴伤，“食养不进者以此复其胃阴”——与温病篇茯苓白术甘草汤（下后伤脾之阳）恰成阴阳两张善后牌：下后利不止者温脾、下后不饥纳呆舌红者滋胃，一个误下伤阳一个下后伤阴。冰糖入药是甘凉悦胃的剂型巧思。
经方血缘
滋胃阴之法从麦门冬汤（胃阴虚火逆之祖）删运降之翼而来，与沙参麦冬汤同源异位（彼肺胃并重、此专主胃）；“下后护阴”的立场承古本大黄黄芩地黄牡丹汤（下之兼护其阴）一路。
组成与组方逻辑
地黄15g，生（15g）君
甘凉滋阴
麦门冬15g君
滋养胃阴
沙参9g臣
益胃生津
玉竹4.5g佐
甘润
甘草3g（原方冰糖三钱代甘）（3g）使
甘缓（原方用冰糖，甘凉悦胃）
四润一甘——胃阴之专剂。
类方鉴别
温病法系沙参麦冬汤麦门冬汤茯苓白术甘草汤
禁忌与注意
食积与脾虚之不食勿滋（舌苔定夺）；便溏者慎。
Key Signs
Stomach yin damaged after febrile diseaseno hunger and no eating (hungry yet not wishing to eat)dry mouth and throatred tongue with scant coat, thin rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Stomach yin damaged with intake and transformation failing: the stomach likes moisture and hates dryness — fluid depleted gives no hunger and no intake, not food accumulation, not Spleen deficiency, but "dry earth not taking in."
Pattern Reasoning
The differentiation page for "no hunger, no eating": the one sign of not wishing to eat has three directions — food-accumulation not eating (belching, thick coat; disperse), Spleen-deficiency not eating (fatigue, loose stool; Si Jun), stomach-yin-damage not eating (red tongue, scant coat, dry mouth; this formula) — the tongue coat's presence or absence is the first-glance triage. Wu set this formula after purging: in warm disease after purging, pathogen gone and yin damaged, "for those whose food-nourishment will not advance, restore stomach yin with this" — forming two aftercare cards, yin and yang, with the Warm-Disease chapter's Fu Ling Bai Zhu Gan Cao Tang (Spleen yang damaged after purging): warm the Spleen for incessant diarrhea after purging, enrich the stomach for red tongue and poor appetite after purging, one mistaken-purge harming yang, one post-purge harming yin. Rock sugar in the formula is the sweet-cool stomach-pleasing craft of the dosage form.
Composition & Logic
Di Huang15gSovereign
Mai Men Dong15gSovereign
Sha Shen9gMinister
Yu Zhu4.5gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
Four moisteners, one sweet — a formula dedicated to Stomach yin.
Classical Lineage
The stomach-yin-enriching method comes from Mai Men Dong Tang with the transport-descending wing deleted, of the same source but different position as Sha Shen Mai Dong (that weighting Lung and stomach both, this governing the stomach specifically); the "protect yin after purging" stance inherits the Guilin edition's Da Huang-Huang Qin-Di Huang-Mu Dan Tang (purge while protecting the yin).
Cautions
Do not enrich for the non-eating of food accumulation or Spleen deficiency (the tongue coat decides); used with caution in loose stool.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《温病条辨》（吴鞠通） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Wenbing Tiaobian (Wu Jutong) — jingfang lineage traced below.

增液汤Zeng Ye Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
阳明温病、津亏便秘大便干结、数日不行而无痞满燥实之全局口干舌燥、脉细
气机病机
津枯肠燥之“无水舟停”：便结非因实积（无痞满拒按），是河道无水——攻下无物可攻，增水则舟自行。
辨证推理
“增水行舟”四字立法：三味大剂纯滋（玄参一两领衔）、不用一味攻下——治便秘而不通便，把因果关系拆对了：津亏是因、便结是果，补因则果自解。吴氏并设后手：服增液不下者，增液承气汤主之（本方合硝黄）——纯滋与滋攻两档接力，恰是承气家族思维（分档接力）的温病版。虚人便秘、老人津亏之秘、习惯性便秘舌红少津者第一方；与麻子仁丸（脾约之润下）分工：彼润而兼通（有小承气在内）、此纯增其水。
经方血缘
直承桂林古本大黄黄芩地黄牡丹汤——温病下法“半攻半滋”的原型在此走到纯滋一端：地黄凉血生津之职千年一贯，玄参麦冬入替攻药之位；增液承气则回归原型之半攻半滋。经方麻子仁丸为其“润下”近亲。
组成与组方逻辑
玄参30g君
重用滋阴降火、软坚润下
麦门冬24g臣
滋液
地黄24g，生（24g）臣
凉血生津
三味重剂纯滋——增水行舟，治因不治果。
加减
服之不下者：大黄、芒硝（即增液承气汤）
津增而结仍不解，滋攻并进
类方鉴别
温病法系麻子仁丸大黄黄芩地黄牡丹汤调胃承气汤沙参麦冬汤养阴清肺汤
禁忌与注意
实积之秘（痞满拒按苔厚）当下不当滋——滋之则腻膈助壅；便溏者禁。
Key Signs
Yang Ming warm disease with fluid-depletion constipationdry hard stool, days without passage, without the full picture of fullness-dryness-repletedry mouth and tongue, thin pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Fluid-withered intestinal dryness of "no water, the boat stalled": constipation not from repletion accumulation (no fullness refusing pressure) but a riverbed without water — attacking-purging has nothing to attack, increase the water and the boat moves of itself.
Pattern Reasoning
Legislating with the four words "increase water to float the boat": three heavy-dose purely-enriching herbs (Xuan Shen one liang leading), not one purging herb — treating constipation without freeing the stool, pairing cause and effect correctly: fluid depletion is cause, constipation is effect, supplement the cause and the effect resolves of itself. Wu set a follow-up move: if increasing fluid does not free the stool, Zeng Ye Cheng Qi Tang governs (this formula plus Mang Xiao-Da Huang) — pure enrichment and enrichment-attack in two-gradation relay, precisely the Warm-Disease version of the Cheng Qi family's thinking (graded relay). The first formula for the deficient's constipation, the elderly's fluid-depletion constipation, and habitual constipation with red tongue and scant fluid; its division from Ma Zi Ren Wan: that moistens with freeing (Xiao Cheng Qi within), this purely increases its water.
Composition & Logic
Xuan Shen30gSovereign
Mai Men Dong24gMinister
Di Huang24gMinister
Three heavy-dose herbs, purely enriching — increasing water to float the boat, treating the cause not the effect.
Modifications
If taking it does not free the stool: Da Huang, Mang Xiao (i.e. Zeng Ye Cheng Qi Tang)
Fluid increased yet the bind unresolved — enrich and attack together
Classical Lineage
Directly inheriting the Guilin edition's Da Huang-Huang Qin-Di Huang-Mu Dan Tang — the prototype of the warm-disease purging method's "half-attack half-enrich" runs here to the pure-enrichment end: Di Huang's cooling-blood fluid-engendering office consistent for a millennium, Xuan Shen-Mai Dong stepping into the attacking herbs' place; Zeng Ye Cheng Qi returns to the prototype's half-attack half-enrich. The classical Ma Zi Ren Wan is its "moisten and free" close relative.
Cautions
Constipation of repletion accumulation (focal fullness refusing pressure, thick coat) should be purged, not enriched — enriching greases the diaphragm and abets congestion; contraindicated in loose stool.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《重楼玉钥》（郑梅涧） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Chonglou Yuyao — jingfang lineage traced below.

养阴清肺汤Yang Yin Qing Fei Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
阴虚燥热之咽喉肿痛（白喉及虚火喉痹）咽干鼻燥干咳少痰舌红少苔、脉细数
气机病机
素体阴虚、燥热客于咽喉：肾脉循喉咙——阴亏于下则虚火挟燥上灼咽门，非实火喉痹（彼红肿剧痛脉洪）。
辨证推理
白喉专方而法度通用：郑氏立“白喉忌表”之训（阴虚燥热之喉误发汗则劫阴助燥）——与银翘之辛凉透表恰成咽痛治法的两极：风热客咽者透之（银翘）、阴虚燥热者滋之（此方），红肿之鲜与暗、起病之急与缓、舌之尖红与全红少苔分途。方即增液汤（玄麦地原班）加贝母丹皮薄荷芍药——滋阴底盘加“化痰、凉血、轻宣、酸敛”四个咽科加味。慢性咽炎之阴虚型（咽干痒、异物感、晨轻暮重）今用最广。
经方血缘
增液汤为底盘（玄麦地三味原班嵌入）＋咽科四佐；利咽之桔草不用而用薄荷（忌提之升、取散之轻）——与桔梗汤、半夏厚朴汤、麦门冬汤共成咽科四方鉴别组（风热客咽／少阴客热／痰气梅核／虚火喉痹）。
组成与组方逻辑
地黄12g，生（12g）君
滋肾凉血——金水相生之本
麦门冬9g臣
养肺阴
玄参9g臣
滋阴降火、解毒利咽
贝母6g，川（6g）佐
润肺化痰散结
牡丹皮5g佐
凉血消肿
芍药5g，白（5g）佐
敛阴
薄荷3g，后下（3g）佐
轻散利咽
甘草3g使
解毒调和
增液底盘＋贝丹薄芍四味加减——虚火喉痹之滋清方。
类方鉴别
温病法系增液汤桔梗汤麦门冬汤半夏厚朴汤
禁忌与注意
风热实火之咽痛（红肿剧痛脉洪数）当清透，滋之则留邪；白喉今属法定传染病，中西并治勿延误。
Key Signs
throat swelling and pain from yin-deficiency dry-heat (diphtheria and deficiency-fire throat bi)dry throat and nosedry cough with scant phlegmred tongue with scant coat, thin rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
A constitutionally yin-deficient body with dry-heat lodged in the throat: the Kidney vessel follows the throat — yin depleted below lets deficiency-fire carry dryness up to scorch the throat gate, not a repletion-fire throat bi (that has severe red swelling and a surging pulse).
Pattern Reasoning
A diphtheria formula whose method is universal: Zheng set the maxim "diphtheria shuns exterior-resolving" (yin-deficiency dry-heat throat mistakenly sweated plunders yin and abets dryness) — forming, with Yin Qiao's acrid-cool exterior-venting, the two poles of sore-throat treatment: for wind-heat lodged in the throat vent it (Yin Qiao), for yin-deficiency dry-heat enrich it (this formula), divided by the bright versus dark redness, the acute versus gradual onset, the red-tip versus wholly-red scant-coat tongue. The formula is Zeng Ye Tang (the original Xuan Shen-Mai Dong-Di Huang cast) plus Bei Mu, Mu Dan Pi, mint and Shao Yao — a yin-enriching base plus four throat add-ons of "transform phlegm, cool blood, lightly diffuse, sour-gather." Today most widely used for the yin-deficiency type of chronic pharyngitis (dry itchy throat, foreign-body sensation, mild by morning worse by evening).
Composition & Logic
Di Huang12gSovereign
Mai Men Dong9gMinister
Xuan Shen9gMinister
Bei Mu6gAssistant
Mu Dan Pi5gAssistant
Shao Yao5gAssistant
Bo He3gAssistant
Gan Cao3gEnvoy
The Zeng Ye base plus a four-herb module of Bei Mu, Mu Dan Pi, mint and Shao Yao — an enriching-clearing formula for deficiency-fire throat bi.
Classical Lineage
Zeng Ye Tang as base (the original Xuan Shen-Mai Dong-Di Huang cast embedded) plus four throat assistants; the throat-benefiting Jie Geng-Gan Cao are not used but mint instead (shunning the lifting, taking the light dispersal) — forming, with Jie Geng Tang, Ban Xia Hou Po Tang and Mai Men Dong Tang, a four-formula throat differentiation set (wind-heat lodging in the throat / Shao Yin guest-heat / phlegm-qi plum-pit / deficiency-fire throat bi).
Cautions
Sore throat of wind-heat repletion fire (severe red swelling, surging rapid pulse) should be cleared and vented; enriching retains the pathogen; diphtheria is today a notifiable infectious disease — treat with both Chinese and Western medicine and do not delay.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医方集解》（方源李东垣） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yifang Jijie — jingfang lineage traced below.

龙胆泻肝汤Long Dan Xie Gan Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
肝胆实火上炎：头痛目赤、胁痛口苦、耳聋耳肿或肝经湿热下注：阴肿阴痒、小便淋浊、带下黄臭舌红苔黄腻、脉弦数有力
气机病机
肝胆实火与湿热循经上下两窜：肝经绕阴器、布胁肋、上头目入耳——火性炎上（目赤耳聋）、湿性趋下（阴痒淋浊），一经之病两头发作。
辨证推理
清利肝胆的代表重剂：上炎下注一方两治，全靠肝经这条通路定位——凡症状沿肝经分布（目·耳·胁·阴器）而见实火湿热之象者皆其的。结构三层暗藏心法：苦寒直折（胆芩栀）＋渗利分消（泽通车）为攻，归地养血滋阴为守——大队苦燥渗利最易劫阴伤肝体，先埋两味护着（「泻中寓养、疏中有柔」），柴胡疏达兼引经防凉遏。与丹栀逍遥分档：彼郁火之轻（虚实夹杂），此实火之盛（脉弦数有力）——脉力与苔腻定档。
经方血缘
清法骨架承黄芩汤（芩芍——肝胆热利之祖）与栀子豉之栀；渗利一翼承猪苓汤（导热从小便）；归地之护阴则是古本温病“凉泻兼护阴”立场（大黄黄芩地黄牡丹汤）的清利版——攻邪阵中设护阴之子，经方古本一脉相承。
组成与组方逻辑
龙胆草6g君
大苦大寒，上泻肝胆实火、下清下焦湿热——一君两战场
黄芩9g臣
清热燥湿
栀子9g臣
清泻三焦、导火下行
泽泻12g佐
渗利下焦湿热
通草6g（木通）（6g）佐
清利导热从小便去
车前子9g，包煎（9g）佐
利水通淋
当归3g佐
养血护肝体——泻中寓养
地黄9g，生（9g）佐
滋阴凉血——苦燥渗利阵中的护阴之子
柴胡6g佐
疏达肝气、引经
甘草6g使
调和护中
折（胆芩栀）利（泽通车）养（归地）达（柴）——攻守兼备之清利重剂。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神丹栀逍遥散黄芩汤八正散
禁忌与注意
脾胃虚寒者禁；苦寒不可久服（中病即止）；阴虚之目涩耳鸣（脉细无力）勿投。
Key Signs
Liver-Gallbladder excess fire flaring up: headache, red eyes, hypochondriac pain, bitter taste, deafness, ear swellingor Liver-channel damp-heat pouring down: genital swelling and itch, turbid painful urination, foul yellow dischargered tongue, yellow greasy coat, wiry rapid forceful pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Liver-Gallbladder repletion fire and damp-heat coursing up and down the channel: the Liver channel encircles the genitals, spreads the hypochondrium, ascends to head and eyes and enters the ears — fire's nature flames up (red eyes, deafness), damp's nature tends down (genital itch, turbid strangury), one channel's disease erupting at both ends.
Pattern Reasoning
A representative heavy formula for clearing-draining the Liver and Gallbladder: flaring-up and pouring-down treated by one formula, all relying on the Liver channel's pathway for location — whenever symptoms distribute along the Liver channel (eye, ear, hypochondrium, genitals) with signs of repletion fire and damp-heat, it is its target. The three-layer structure hides the core method: bitter-cold cutting fire (Long Dan, Huang Qin, Zhi Zi) plus percolating-draining separation (Ze Xie, Mu Tong, Che Qian) as attack, Dang Gui-Di Huang nourishing blood and enriching yin as defense — a great bitter-drying percolating troop most readily plunders yin and harms the Liver's body, so plant two protectors first ("nourishing lodged within draining, softness within coursing"), Chai Hu coursing while guiding the channel and preventing cold-constraint. Its gradation from Dan Zhi Xiao Yao: that is mild constraint-fire (deficiency-repletion mixed), this is exuberant repletion fire (wiry rapid forceful pulse) — gradation set by pulse force and greasy coat.
Composition & Logic
Long Dan Cao6gSovereign
Huang Qin9gMinister
Zhi Zi9gMinister
Ze Xie12gAssistant
Tong Cao6gAssistant
Che Qian Zi9gAssistant
Dang Gui3gAssistant
Di Huang9gAssistant
Chai Hu6gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Cutting fire (Long Dan, Huang Qin, Zhi Zi), draining damp (Ze Xie, Mu Tong, Che Qian), nourishing (Dang Gui, Di Huang), coursing (Chai Hu) — a heavy clearing formula both offensive and protective.
Classical Lineage
The clearing skeleton inherits Huang Qin Tang (Huang Qin-Shao Yao — the ancestor of Liver-Gallbladder heat diarrhea) and Zhi Zi Chi's Zhi Zi; the percolating-draining wing inherits Zhu Ling Tang (conducting heat out through urine); the Dang Gui-Di Huang yin-protection is the clearing-draining version of the Guilin warm-disease "cool-drain with yin-protection" stance (Da Huang-Huang Qin-Di Huang-Mu Dan Tang) — placing a yin-protecting piece in a pathogen-attacking array, classics and Guilin edition of one lineage.
Cautions
Contraindicated in Spleen-Stomach deficiency-cold; bitter-cold must not be taken long (stop when the disease yields); do not give for yin-deficiency dry eyes and tinnitus (thin forceless pulse).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《素问病机气宜保命集》（刘完素） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Suwen Bingji Qiyi Baoming Ji (Liu Wansu) — jingfang lineage traced below.

芍药汤Shao Yao Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
下痢脓血、赤白相兼腹痛、里急后重肛门灼热、小便短赤苔黄腻、脉弦数
气机病机
湿热壅滞肠中、气血俱病：气滞则后重、血伤则脓血——痢之为病气血两条战线，“行血则便脓自愈、调气则后重自除”十四字是其总纲。
辨证推理
痢疾治法的定型方：与经方热利三方各据一格——黄芩汤清其热（气分轻档）、白头翁解其毒（血分毒痢）、此方调其气血（湿热痢之标准型：赤白相兼、后重明显）。刘完素的十四字纲领把痢疾从“清热止利”的思路扭到“调气行血”：芍药重用为君（和血缓急）、木香槟榔调气、归芍行血、大黄通因通用（积滞不去痢不止——与桂枝茯苓丸“癥不去血不止”同一逻辑）、肉桂二克反佐。全方无一味止涩——痢禁早涩，涩则闭邪。
经方血缘
黄芩汤（芩芍草枣——热利祖方）的扩编：芩芍原对保留且芍升为君，加连（承葛根芩连之厚肠）、加大黄（承承气之通、用于痢即“通因通用”）、加香槟归桂成气血两翼——祖方管“热”，此方兼管“滞”。
组成与组方逻辑
芍药15-30g（18g）君
重用和血缓急、止腹痛后重
黄芩9g臣
清肠中湿热
黄连5g臣
燥湿厚肠
大黄6g佐
通因通用——泻积滞以除致痢之因
当归9g佐
和血——行血则便脓自愈
木香5g佐
行气——调气则后重自除
槟榔5g佐
下气导滞
肉桂2g佐
辛热反佐：防苦寒凉遏、助归芍行血
甘草5g，炙（5g）使
缓急调和
和血（芍归）调气（香槟）清热（芩连）导滞（黄）反佐（桂）——痢疾五法一炉。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神黄芩汤白头翁汤葛根黄芩黄连汤真人养脏汤
禁忌与注意
痢禁早涩；虚寒久痢（无灼热、脉弱）冰炭；孕妇慎大黄槟榔。
Key Signs
bloody purulent dysentery, red and white mixedabdominal pain, tenesmusburning anus, scant red urineyellow greasy coat, wiry rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Damp-heat congesting the intestines, qi and blood both diseased: qi stagnation gives heaviness below, blood harm gives purulent blood — dysentery is a disease on two fronts of qi and blood, and the fourteen words "move the blood and the pus resolves of itself, regulate the qi and the heaviness disperses of itself" are its general outline.
Pattern Reasoning
The fixed formula of dysentery treatment: with the classics' three heat-diarrhea formulas each holding a square — Huang Qin Tang clears its heat (the light qi-level gradation), Bai Tou Weng resolves its toxin (blood-level toxin dysentery), and this regulates its qi and blood (the standard type of damp-heat dysentery: red and white mixed, marked heaviness). Liu Wansu's fourteen-word outline twisted dysentery from the thinking of "clear heat, stop diarrhea" to "regulate qi, move blood": Shao Yao heavily used as sovereign (harmonize blood, ease urgency), Mu Xiang-Bing Lang regulate qi, Dang Gui-Shao Yao move blood, Da Huang frees to treat what freely leaks (accumulation ungone, dysentery unceasing — the same logic as Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan's "concretion ungone, blood unstopped"), Rou Gui two grams as counter-assistant. The whole formula has not one astringent — dysentery shuns early astringing, which would shut in the pathogen.
Composition & Logic
Shao Yao18gSovereign
Huang Qin9gMinister
Huang Lian5gMinister
Da Huang6gAssistant
Dang Gui9gAssistant
Mu Xiang5gAssistant
Bing Lang5gAssistant
Rou Gui2gAssistant
Gan Cao5gEnvoy
Harmonizing blood (Shao Yao, Dang Gui), regulating qi (Mu Xiang, Bing Lang), clearing heat (Huang Qin, Huang Lian), conducting out stagnation (Da Huang), counter-assisting (Gui Zhi) — the five methods of dysentery in one crucible.
Classical Lineage
An enlargement of Huang Qin Tang (Huang Qin-Shao Yao-Gan Cao-jujube — the heat-diarrhea ancestor): the Huang Qin-Shao Yao original pair kept with Shao Yao raised to sovereign, plus Huang Lian (inheriting Ge Gen Qin Lian's gut-thickening), plus Da Huang (inheriting Cheng Qi's freeing, used in dysentery as "free to treat what freely leaks"), plus Mu Xiang-Bing Lang-Dang Gui-Rou Gui as qi-blood wings — the ancestral formula governs "heat," this formula governs "stagnation" as well.
Cautions
Dysentery shuns early astringing; deficiency-cold chronic dysentery (no burning, weak pulse) is its opposite; use Da Huang-Bing Lang with caution in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《太平惠民和剂局方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Taiping Huimin Heji Jufang — jingfang lineage traced below.

八正散Ba Zheng San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
尿频尿急、溺时涩痛淋沥不畅、尿色浑赤甚则癃闭、小腹急满舌红苔黄腻、脉滑数
气机病机
湿热蕴结膀胱、水道涩滞：热灼则痛、湿阻则涩——下焦水府被湿热占据，气化之路全堵。
辨证推理
热淋的标准重剂：八味通利之品集团作战——与经方治淋两方成三档谱系：猪苓汤（水热互结兼阴伤——利中护阴）、小柴胡加茯苓汤（古本：从枢机治淋）、八正散（湿热盛实——纯清纯利不设护阴）。纯攻的代价条文自带提醒：中病即止、不宜久服（通利伤阴之戒）。甘草独取“梢”直达茎中、灯心草煎汤送服——部位药学的细节。今急性尿路感染之典型证第一方。
经方血缘
猪苓汤“利水清热”骨架的重装版：滑石原班（承其清利），去胶之护阴（实证不需守）、添瞿萹车通之群利＋栀黄之泻火——经方留的“护阴位”被撤掉，正反映虚实两档之别；大黄前后分消承茵陈蒿汤三味之局。
组成与组方逻辑
瞿麦9g君
利水通淋、清心与小肠之热
萹蓄9g臣
利尿通淋
车前子9g，包煎（9g）臣
利水清热
滑石12g，包煎（12g）臣
滑利窍道、清热通淋
通草6g（木通）（6g）佐
导心火下行从小便去
栀子9g佐
清泻三焦湿热
大黄6g佐
泻火导浊、前后分消
甘草6g，梢（6g）使
甘草梢直达茎中止淋痛（灯心草煎汤送服）
群利（瞿萹车滑通）双泻（栀黄）一引（草梢灯心）——湿热淋之纯攻阵。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神猪苓汤小柴胡加茯苓汤龙胆泻肝汤萆薢分清饮
禁忌与注意
中病即止勿久服；淋证日久之虚淋（劳淋）、阴伤之淋禁纯攻；孕妇慎滑利。
Key Signs
frequent urgent urination with painful dribblinginhibited flow, turbid red urinein severe cases retention with lower-abdomen urgencyred tongue, yellow greasy coat, slippery rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Damp-heat brewing and binding in the bladder, water passages inhibited and rough: heat scorching gives pain, damp obstructing gives roughness — the lower-burner water-mansion occupied by damp-heat, the road of qi-transformation wholly blocked.
Pattern Reasoning
The standard heavy formula for heat strangury: eight percolating-freeing herbs in team combat — with the classics' two strangury formulas forming a three-gradation spectrum: Zhu Ling Tang (water-heat bound with yin damage — drain while protecting yin), Xiao Chai Hu plus Fu Ling (Guilin edition: treat strangury from the pivot), Ba Zheng San (damp-heat exuberant repletion — pure clearing, pure draining, no yin-protection). The cost of pure attack the text itself warns: stop when the disease yields, not for long use (the caution of freeing-draining harming yin). Gan Cao taking only the "tip" to reach the urethra directly, Deng Xin Cao decocted to carry it down — the detail of location-pharmacology. Today the first formula for the typical pattern of acute urinary-tract infection.
Composition & Logic
Qu Mai9gSovereign
Bian Xu9gMinister
Che Qian Zi9gMinister
Hua Shi12gMinister
Tong Cao6gAssistant
Zhi Zi9gAssistant
Da Huang6gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
A group of drainers (Qu Mai, Bian Xu, Che Qian, Hua Shi, Mu Tong), a double drain (Zhi Zi, Da Huang), one conductor (Gan Cao tip, Deng Xin) — a purely offensive formation for damp-heat strangury.
Classical Lineage
A re-armed version of Zhu Ling Tang's "drain water, clear heat" skeleton: Hua Shi kept from the original cast (inheriting its clearing-draining), E Jiao's yin-protection removed (repletion needs no guarding) and Qu Mai-Bian Xu-Che Qian-Mu Tong's group percolation plus Zhi Zi-Da Huang's fire-draining added — the classics' reserved "yin-protecting slot" removed, precisely reflecting the deficiency-versus-repletion gradation; Da Huang's fore-and-aft dispersal inherits the three-herb arrangement of Yin Chen Hao Tang.
Cautions
Stop when the disease yields, do not take long; chronic deficiency strangury (taxation strangury) and yin-damage strangury forbid pure attack; use percolating-freeing with caution in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《小儿药证直诀》（钱乙） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Xiaoer Yaozheng Zhijue (Qian Yi) — jingfang lineage traced below.

泻白散Xie Bai San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
肺热咳喘皮肤蒸热、日晡尤甚舌红苔黄、脉细数
气机病机
肺中伏火郁热：非表邪之闭（无寒热）、非痰热之壅（痰不多）——热伏于肺之本脏，日晡（肺金主时之申酉）潮热是其时间签名。
辨证推理
清肺的“柔剂”：钱乙为小儿稚阴稚阳之体立法——不用苦寒（芩连伤胃）、不用辛散（麻杏走表），桑白皮地骨皮皆甘寒之品，泻肺而不伤娇脏、清热而兼顾阴分（地骨皮本退虚热之药）。与麻杏石甘、黄芩石膏杏子甘草成清肺三档：表邪化热之喘（麻杏——有汗喘急）、温邪乘肺之衄咳（芩膏杏——邪盛）、伏火之咳喘蒸热（此方——郁而不盛、体又偏嫩）。“泻白”即泻肺（肺色白），与泻青（肝）泻黄（脾）导赤（心）同出钱氏五脏证治一盘棋。
经方血缘
清肺存阴之意承麦门冬汤与古本燥邪干肺方（竹叶石膏杏子甘草——燥忌苦之立法）：三方共守“肺为娇脏、清勿过刚”一条家训；粳米护胃承白虎之例。
组成与组方逻辑
桑白皮12g君
泻肺中伏火、平喘
地骨皮12g臣
清肺中深伏之热、退虚热
甘草6g，炙（6g）佐使
和中
粳米一撮（15g）佐
养胃护肺气
二皮甘寒清泻、米草护养——清肺柔剂。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤黄芩石膏杏子甘草汤竹叶石膏杏子甘草汤
禁忌与注意
风寒咳嗽、痰湿咳喘皆非其治；此方力缓，邪盛者勿误事。
Key Signs
Lung-heat cough and wheezesteaming skin heat, worse in late afternoonred tongue, yellow coat, thin rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Latent fire and constrained heat in the Lung: not the closure of an exterior pathogen (no chills and fever), not the congestion of phlegm-heat (little phlegm) — heat latent in the Lung's own viscus, and late-afternoon (the shen-you hours when Lung metal governs) tidal fever is its time-signature.
Pattern Reasoning
The "soft formula" of Lung-clearing: Qian Yi legislated for the tender-yin tender-yang body of children — no bitter-cold (Huang Qin-Huang Lian harm the stomach), no acrid-dispersal (Ma Huang-Xing Ren travel the exterior), Sang Bai Pi and Di Gu Pi both sweet-cool, draining the Lung without harming the delicate viscus, clearing heat while tending the yin (Di Gu Pi is itself a deficiency-heat-abating herb). With Ma Xing Shi Gan and Huang Qin-Shi Gao-Xing Zi-Gan Cao it forms three Lung-clearing gradations: exterior-pathogen-transformed-heat wheeze (Ma Xing — sweat and urgent wheeze), warm-pathogen offending the Lung nosebleed-cough (Qin-Gao-Xing — pathogen exuberant), latent-fire cough-wheeze steaming heat (this formula — constrained but not exuberant, and the body tender). "Draining white" means draining the Lung (the Lung's color is white), of one board with draining green (Liver), draining yellow (Spleen), and conducting red (Heart) in Qian Yi's five-viscera pattern-treatment scheme.
Composition & Logic
Sang Bai Pi12gSovereign
Di Gu Pi12gMinister
Gan Cao6gAssistant-Envoy
Jing Mi15gAssistant
Two sweet-cold barks clearing and draining, rice and Gan Cao protecting and nourishing — a gentle Lung-clearing formula.
Classical Lineage
The clear-the-Lung preserve-yin intent inherits Mai Men Dong Tang and the Guilin dryness-offending-the-Lung formula (Zhu Ye-Shi Gao-Xing Ren-Gan Cao — dryness shuns bitterness): the three formulas share one family maxim, "the Lung is a delicate viscus, clear it not too harshly"; the rice protecting the stomach inherits the Bai Hu precedent.
Cautions
Wind-cold cough and phlegm-damp cough-wheeze are neither its treatment; its power is gentle — do not let it fail where the pathogen is exuberant.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《脾胃论》（李东垣） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Piwei Lun (Li Dongyuan) — jingfang lineage traced below.

清胃散Qing Wei San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
牙痛牵引头脑、面颊发热齿龈红肿溃烂或出血口气热臭、口干舌红脉滑数
气机病机
胃火循经上攻：足阳明之脉入上齿中——胃腑积热沿经上灼齿龈，火迫血分则肿烂出血。
辨证推理
牙痛的胃火正治方：连折其火、升麻一味最见东垣手眼——苦寒直折之外再给郁火一个“升散”的出口（火郁发之），且升麻引经入阳明、与黄连一升一降相反相成；地丹归凉血和血应齿龈之肿烂血证。与玉女煎的对页是牙痛之虚实辨：此方实火（红肿剧痛、口臭便结、脉滑数——清泻），玉女煎虚实夹杂（隐痛烦热、齿松、脉细数——清滋并进）——齿龈之肿烂与松动、脉之滑与细分途。
经方血缘
黄连清胃承泻心诸方；升麻之用承经方升麻鳖甲汤（解毒透邪）而转任“火郁发之”；地丹凉血之对承温病诸方——凉血入清火阵仍是古本“清泻兼护阴血”的家法。
组成与组方逻辑
黄连6g君
直折胃腑之火
升麻9g臣
清热解毒、升散郁遏之伏火——“火郁发之”，兼引阳明经
地黄12g，生（12g）佐
凉血滋阴
牡丹皮9g佐
凉血散瘀消肿
当归6g佐
养血和血
一折一发（连升相反相成）三凉养（地丹归）——胃火牙痛之专剂。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神玉女煎大黄黄连泻心汤
禁忌与注意
风冷牙痛（遇冷甚、齿龈不红）与虚火牙痛（玉女煎证）皆非苦寒直折所宜。
Key Signs
toothache radiating to the head, hot cheeksred swollen ulcerated or bleeding gumshot foul breath, dry mouth, red tongueslippery rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Stomach fire assaulting up along the channel: the foot Yang Ming vessel enters the upper teeth — stomach-bowel accumulated heat scorches the gums up the channel, and fire pressing the blood level gives swelling, ulceration and bleeding.
Pattern Reasoning
The correct fire-treating formula for toothache from stomach fire: Huang Lian cuts its fire, and Sheng Ma shows Dongyuan's craft most — beyond bitter-cold cutting, give the constrained fire an "ascending-dispersing" outlet ("constrained fire, effuse it"), and Sheng Ma also guides the channel into Yang Ming, opposing yet complementing Huang Lian one ascending, one descending; Di Huang-Mu Dan Pi-Dang Gui cool and harmonize blood, answering the gums' swelling-ulceration blood sign. Its facing page with Yu Nu Jian is toothache's deficiency-repletion differentiation: this is repletion fire (severe red swelling, foul breath, constipation, slippery rapid pulse — clear and drain), Yu Nu Jian is deficiency-repletion mixed (dull pain, vexing heat, loose teeth, thin rapid pulse — clear and enrich together) — divided by the gums' ulceration versus looseness, the pulse's slipperiness versus thinness.
Composition & Logic
Huang Lian6gSovereign
Sheng Ma9gMinister
Di Huang12gAssistant
Mu Dan Pi9gAssistant
Dang Gui6gAssistant
One cutting, one venting (Huang Lian and Sheng Ma, opposing yet complementary), three cooling-nourishing (Di Huang, Mu Dan Pi, Dang Gui) — a formula dedicated to stomach-fire toothache.
Classical Lineage
Huang Lian clearing the stomach inherits the Xie Xin formulas; Sheng Ma's use inherits the classical Sheng Ma Bie Jia Tang (resolving toxin and venting pathogen) and reassigns it to "constrained fire, effuse it"; the Di Huang-Mu Dan Pi cooling-blood pair inherits the warm-disease formulas — placing cooling-blood in a fire-clearing array is still the Guilin "clear-drain with yin-blood protection" house-method.
Cautions
Wind-cold toothache (worse with cold, gums not red) and deficiency-fire toothache (the Yu Nu Jian pattern) are neither suited to bitter-cold direct cutting.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《景岳全书》（张景岳） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Jingyue Quanshu (Zhang Jingyue) — jingfang lineage traced below.

玉女煎Yu Nv Jian

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
牙痛齿松、烦热干渴头痛、齿龈出血（衄）舌红苔黄而干脉浮洪滑大、按之无力（重按虚）
气机病机
胃热有余而肾水不足：阳明火炎于上、少阴水亏于下——实火与虚亏同框，“脉洪大而重按无力”一指两读是其签名。
辨证推理
清滋并进的定式方：石膏与熟地同锅——气分实火与阴分不足各有专药，景岳明言此治“水亏火盛”之牙痛齿衄。它是白虎加地黄汤（古本）的直系后身：同一“膏地同用”结构，古本以生地凉血应温邪、景岳以熟地滋水应虚亏——一字之改（生熟）标出外感与内伤两个战场。牛膝引热下行承镇肝熄风同一“电梯”用法而剂量轻。与清胃散之辨已见彼页：实火清泻、水亏火盛清滋——牙痛两方成对读之典。
经方血缘
白虎汤（膏知米草）取其膏知＋地黄法系取其熟地麦冬——经方清火骨架与滋阴法系的正面嫁接；古本白虎加地黄汤为其千年前原型（生熟之别即外感内伤之别）。
组成与组方逻辑
石膏15-30g（24g）君
清阳明气分有余之火
地黄9-30g，熟（18g）臣
滋少阴不足之水
麦门冬6g佐
滋阴生津
知母5g佐
助膏清火、滋润
牛膝5g佐使
引热引血下行、兼补肝肾
一清（膏知）一滋（地麦）一引（牛膝）——清滋并进之范式。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神清胃散白虎加地黄汤知柏地黄丸
禁忌与注意
大便溏泄者熟地石膏皆慎；纯实火归清胃散、纯阴虚归知柏辈——此方专为“两头都占”之局。
Key Signs
toothache with loose teeth, vexing heat and thirstheadache, bleeding gumsred tongue, dry yellow coatfloating surging slippery large pulse, forceless on deep pressure
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Stomach heat in surplus with Kidney water insufficient: Yang Ming fire flaming above, Shao Yin water depleted below — repletion fire and deficiency depletion in one frame, "surging large pulse forceless on deep pressure" its one-finger two-reading signature.
Pattern Reasoning
The fixed formula of clearing and enriching together: Shi Gao and Shu Di in one pot — qi-level repletion fire and yin-level insufficiency each with its own herb, Jingyue stating plainly this treats "water-depleted fire-exuberant" toothache and gum-bleeding. It is the direct descendant of Bai Hu Jia Di Huang Tang (Guilin edition): the same "Shi Gao-Di Huang together" structure, the Guilin edition using raw Di Huang to cool blood for warm pathogen, Jingyue using Shu Di to enrich water for deficiency-depletion — the one-word change (raw versus prepared) marking the exterior-contraction versus internal-damage battlefields. Niu Xi conducts heat downward, the same "elevator" use as in Zhen Gan Xi Feng but at a lighter dose. Its differentiation from Qing Wei San already seen on that page: repletion fire clear-drain, water-depleted fire-exuberant clear-enrich — the two toothache formulas a paired reading.
Composition & Logic
Shi Gao24gSovereign
Di Huang18gMinister
Mai Men Dong6gAssistant
Zhi Mu5gAssistant
Niu Xi5gAssistant-Envoy
One clearing (Shi Gao, Zhi Mu), one enriching (Di Huang, Mai Dong), one conducting (Niu Xi) — the paradigm of clearing and enriching advancing together.
Classical Lineage
Bai Hu Tang (Shi Gao-Zhi Mu-rice-Gan Cao) taking its Shi Gao-Zhi Mu plus the Dihuang lineage taking its Shu Di-Mai Dong — a head-on grafting of the classical fire-clearing skeleton and the yin-enriching lineage; the Guilin edition's Bai Hu Jia Di Huang Tang is its millennium-old prototype (the raw-versus-prepared difference being the exterior-contraction versus internal-damage difference).
Cautions
For loose stool use both Shu Di and Shi Gao with caution; pure repletion fire belongs to Qing Wei San, pure yin deficiency to the Zhi Bai class — this formula is set for the situation of "holding both ends."
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《杨氏家藏方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yangshi Jiacang Fang — jingfang lineage traced below.

萆薢分清饮Bi Xie Fen Qing Yin

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
小便频数浑浊、白如米泔凝如膏糊（膏淋、白浊）舌淡苔白、脉沉
气机病机
下元虚寒、气化不摄而清浊不分：肾阳失于蒸化——水谷精微不循常道、混入溲中而为浊，寒证之浊非热证之淋。
辨证推理
清利法系里的“反例”教学页：同在下焦水道，八正散治湿热之淋（灼痛色赤——纯清），此方治虚寒之浊（浑白不痛——温化）——尿之色（赤与白）、感（灼痛与不痛）、舌（红与淡）三对指标把寒热两型钉死。萆薢“分清化浊”专才为君，益智乌药温摄其下、菖蒲化浊开窍——利中带固、化中带温，与纯攻之八正结构相反。入盐少许煎服引药入肾。今之乳糜尿、前列腺炎之白浊属虚寒者用之。
经方血缘
温摄下元之意承肾气丸（气化失灵之总方）与乌梅丸之温固；“分清别浊”一职则是猪苓辈淡渗法在寒证方向的改装——同为治水，热者清利、寒者温化，法系树在此打了个明白的对折。
组成与组方逻辑
萆薢12g君
利湿分清化浊——膏淋浊尿之专药
益智仁9g臣
温肾缩尿固下
石菖蒲6g佐
芳香化浊通窍
乌药9g佐
温肾行气——助膀胱气化
一分清（萆薢）二温摄（益智乌药）一化浊（菖蒲）——虚寒白浊之温化方。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神八正散肾气丸猪苓汤缩泉丸
禁忌与注意
湿热之淋浊（色赤灼痛苔黄）冰炭——尿色与痛感先辨寒热。
Key Signs
frequent turbid urination, white as rice-watercongealed like paste (unctuous strangury, white turbidity)pale tongue, white coat, deep pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Lower-origin deficiency-cold, qi-transformation failing to restrain so clear and turbid are not separated: Kidney yang failing to steam-transform lets grain-water essence stray from its normal course and mix into the urine as turbidity — cold-pattern turbidity, not heat-pattern strangury.
Pattern Reasoning
The "counter-example" teaching page within the clearing lineage: both at the lower-burner water passages, Ba Zheng San treats damp-heat strangury (burning pain, red color — pure clearing), this treats deficiency-cold turbidity (cloudy white, painless — warm transformation) — the urine's color (red versus white), sensation (burning versus painless), and tongue (red versus pale), three paired indicators nailing the cold and heat types. Bi Xie, the "separate-clear transform-turbid" specialist, is sovereign, Yi Zhi Ren-Wu Yao warm and restrain the below, Shi Chang Pu transforms turbidity and opens the orifices — draining with consolidating, transforming with warming, structurally opposite to the purely attacking Ba Zheng. Taken with a little salt to guide the herbs into the Kidney. Today used for chyluria and prostatitis white-turbidity of the deficiency-cold type.
Composition & Logic
Bi Xie12gSovereign
Yi Zhi Ren9gMinister
Shi Chang Pu6gAssistant
Wu Yao9gAssistant
One separating the clear (Bi Xie), two warm-restraining (Yi Zhi Ren, Wu Yao), one transforming turbidity (Shi Chang Pu) — a warming-transforming formula for deficiency-cold white turbidity.
Classical Lineage
The warm-restrain-the-lower-origin intent inherits Shen Qi Wan (the general formula for failed qi-transformation) and Wu Mei Wan's warm-consolidation; the "separate clear from turbid" office is an adaptation of the Zhu Ling-class bland-percolating method in the cold-pattern direction — both treating water, the hot cleared-and-drained, the cold warm-transformed, the lineage-tree folded cleanly in half here.
Cautions
Damp-heat strangury-turbidity (red color, burning pain, yellow coat) is its opposite — first distinguish cold from heat by urine color and pain sensation.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《备急千金要方》（孙思邈） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Beiji Qianjin Yaofang (Sun Simiao) — jingfang lineage traced below.

独活寄生汤Du Huo Ji Sheng Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
痹证日久、腰膝冷痛肢节屈伸不利、麻木不仁畏寒喜温心悸气短、脉细弱（肝肾气血俱虚）
气机病机
痹久正衰、邪恋不去：风寒湿踞下焦日久，肝肾之精血、脾胃之气血皆被拖垮——纯攻则正不支、纯补则邪愈锢，攻补必须同炉。
辨证推理
慢性腰腿痛的总底盘。十五味大方而层次分明：祛邪四将（独活细辛秦艽防风）、补肝肾三柱（寄生杜仲牛膝）、八珍去术之气血双补（参苓草＋归芎地芍即四物全班）——「扶正以驱邪、邪去而正安」的经典配置。孙思邈立此方即声明其病程定位：「夫腰背痛者皆由肾气虚弱、卧冷湿地当风所得」——虚字当头。痹证三期地图至此收全：蠲痹汤（邪盛期——祛邪为主）→身痛逐瘀（瘀阻期——通络为主）→独活寄生（正虚期——攻补兼施），病程即选方坐标。针灸临床中，此方所对正是老年慢性腰腿痛兼体虚一类。
经方血缘
骨架上溯桂枝芍药知母汤（金匮历节：祛邪与养正同炉之祖——桂麻防风攻、芍草姜术养）：千金将其“攻养并进”扩编为全维配置；四物之底承胶艾血脉、参苓草承四君之气——三条经方血脉（历节方＋血家＋中轴）汇于一方。
组成与组方逻辑
独活9g君
祛下焦风寒湿、蠲痹止痛
桑寄生9g臣
祛风湿兼补肝肾
杜仲9g臣
补肝肾强腰膝
牛膝9g臣
强筋骨引药下行
细辛3g佐
搜剔深伏之寒
秦艽9g佐
舒筋祛风湿
防风6g佐
祛风胜湿
肉桂3g佐
温通血脉
当归9g佐
养血活血
川芎6g佐
行血
地黄9g，熟（9g）佐
滋阴养血
芍药9g，白（9g）佐
和营缓急
人参6g佐
补气
茯苓9g佐
健脾渗湿
甘草6g，炙（6g）使
调和
四祛三补八养——痹证正虚期的全维底盘。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神蠲痹汤身痛逐瘀汤宣痹汤
禁忌与注意
痹证初起邪盛正未虚者勿早补（闭门留寇）；湿热痹（红肿灼热）冰炭——归宣痹汤。
Key Signs
chronic bi with aching cold lower back and kneesstiff joints, numbnessaversion to cold, preference for warmthpalpitation, shortness of breath, thin weak pulse (Liver-Kidney and qi-blood all deficient)
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Bi chronic with the upright debilitated, pathogen lingering unremoved: wind-cold-damp occupying the lower burner long, the Liver-Kidney essence-blood and Spleen-Stomach qi-blood all dragged down — pure attack leaves the upright unsupported, pure supplementation locks in the pathogen the more, so attack and supplement must share one crucible.
Pattern Reasoning
The general base for chronic low-back and leg pain. A large formula of fifteen herbs, yet clearly layered: four pathogen-expelling generals (Du Huo, Xi Xin, Qin Jiao, Fang Feng), three Liver-Kidney-supplementing pillars (Sang Ji Sheng, Du Zhong, Niu Xi), and Ba Zhen minus Bai Zhu for dual qi-blood supplementation (ginseng-Fu Ling-Gan Cao plus Dang Gui-Chuan Xiong-Di Huang-Shao Yao, the full Si Wu cast) — the classic configuration of "support the upright to expel the pathogen, pathogen gone and the upright at peace." Sun Simiao in setting this formula declared its disease-course position: "low back and back pain all arise from Kidney qi deficiency, lying on cold damp ground and meeting wind" — deficiency at the head. The bi three-phase map is now complete: Juan Bi Tang (excess phase — expel pathogen) → Shen Tong Zhu Yu (stasis-obstruction phase — free collaterals) → Du Huo Ji Sheng (deficiency phase — attack and supplement together), the disease-course being the formula-choosing coordinate. In acupuncture practice, what this formula targets is precisely elderly chronic low-back and leg pain with a deficient constitution.
Composition & Logic
Du Huo9gSovereign
Sang Ji Sheng9gMinister
Du Zhong9gMinister
Niu Xi9gMinister
Xi Xin3gAssistant
Qin Jiao9gAssistant
Fang Feng6gAssistant
Rou Gui3gAssistant
Dang Gui9gAssistant
Chuan Xiong6gAssistant
Di Huang9gAssistant
Shao Yao9gAssistant
Ren Shen6gAssistant
Fu Ling9gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Four expelling, three supplementing, eight nourishing — the full-dimension base for the deficiency stage of bi.
Classical Lineage
The skeleton traces up to Gui Zhi Shao Yao Zhi Mu Tang (Jin Gui joint-running disease: the ancestor of expelling pathogen and nourishing the upright in one crucible — Gui Zhi-Ma Huang-Fang Feng attack, Shao Yao-Gan Cao-ginger-Bai Zhu nourish): the Qian Jin enlarged its "attack and nourish together" into a full-dimension configuration; the Si Wu base inherits the Jiao Ai bloodline, ginseng-Fu Ling-Gan Cao inherit Si Jun's qi — three classical bloodlines (joint-running formula, blood-family, central-axle) converging in one formula.
Cautions
At the onset of bi with exuberant pathogen and the upright not yet deficient, do not supplement early (shutting the door on the bandit); damp-heat bi (red swelling, burning) is its opposite — go to Xuan Bi Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《杨氏家藏方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yangshi Jiacang Fang — jingfang lineage traced below.

蠲痹汤Juan Bi Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
肩项臂痛、举动艰难风寒湿痹之上半身证手足麻痹脉浮或紧
气机病机
风寒湿客于肩背经隧、卫气不固：邪在上在表在经——尚未深入络与骨节，正气微虚而未败。
辨证推理
上肢痹的代表方：与独活寄生成「上下对」（羌活主上／独活主下——羌独分工是痹证方的地理学）与「早晚对」（此方邪盛期／彼方正虚期）。姜黄一味是方眼：破血行气而「横行肩臂」——引经报使之说在此有实感（肩周炎、颈肩综合征以此为的）。芪归同用暗藏两句家训：「治风先治血、血行风自灭」（归芍）与「邪之所凑其气必虚」（芪防）——祛邪阵中气血两护，正是它与纯散风药堆砌之方的差距。
经方血缘
黄芪桂枝五物汤（芪领卫行治血痹不仁）的祛邪扩编：芪之固卫原职保留，换桂枝为羌防姜黄之专攻——血痹（不仁为主）与风痹（痛为主）两方接力；“治风先治血”之归芍承血家诸方。
组成与组方逻辑
羌活9g君
祛上半身风寒湿、利关节
姜黄9g臣
破血行气、横行肩臂——上肢痹之引经
当归9g臣
养血活血——治风先治血
黄芪12g佐
益气实卫——风湿之袭乘卫虚而入
芍药9g，赤（9g）佐
活血通络
防风9g佐
祛风胜湿
甘草6g，炙（6g）使
调和（加姜枣煎）
羌防散其邪、姜黄引其经、芪固其卫、归芍养其血——邪盛期之攻中带护。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神独活寄生汤身痛逐瘀汤黄芪桂枝茯苓细辛汤宣痹汤
禁忌与注意
湿热痹禁温散；久痹已虚者转独活寄生——病程坐标先定位。
Key Signs
pain of shoulders, nape, and arms, difficult movementupper-body pattern of wind-cold-damp binumbness of the extremitiesfloating or tight pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Wind-cold-damp lodging in the shoulder-back channel conduits, defensive qi unconsolidated: pathogen above, at the exterior, in the channels — not yet deep in the collaterals and joints, the upright slightly deficient but not yet failed.
Pattern Reasoning
A representative upper-limb bi formula: with Du Huo Ji Sheng it forms an "upper-lower pair" (Qiang Huo governs above, Du Huo below — the Qiang-Du division of labor is the geography of bi formulas) and an "early-late pair" (this the excess phase, that the deficiency phase). Jiang Huang is the formula's eye: breaking blood and moving qi while "traversing the shoulder and arm" — the guiding-channel messenger idea made tangible here (frozen shoulder, neck-shoulder syndrome are its target). Huang Qi and Dang Gui used together hide two family maxims: "to treat wind first treat the blood; blood moving, wind extinguishes of itself" (Dang Gui-Shao Yao) and "where pathogen gathers, the qi must be deficient" (Huang Qi-Fang Feng) — protecting qi and blood within a pathogen-expelling array, exactly its gap from formulas that merely pile up wind-dispersing herbs.
Composition & Logic
Qiang Huo9gSovereign
Jiang Huang9gMinister
Dang Gui9gMinister
Huang Qi12gAssistant
Shao Yao9gAssistant
Fang Feng9gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Qiang Huo and Fang Feng disperse the pathogen, Jiang Huang conducts to the channel, Huang Qi consolidates the defense, Dang Gui–Shao Yao nourish the blood — attacking with protection in the excess stage.
Classical Lineage
The pathogen-expelling enlargement of Huang Qi Gui Zhi Wu Wu Tang (Huang Qi leading the defensive, treating the numbness of blood bi): Huang Qi's exterior-consolidating office kept, Gui Zhi swapped for the specialist attackers Qiang Huo-Fang Feng-Jiang Huang — blood bi (numbness predominant) and wind bi (pain predominant) in relay; the Dang Gui-Shao Yao of "to treat wind first treat the blood" inherits the blood-family formulas.
Cautions
Damp-heat bi forbids warm-dispersal; chronic bi already deficient shifts to Du Huo Ji Sheng — first locate the disease-course coordinate.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《温病条辨》（吴鞠通） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Wenbing Tiaobian (Wu Jutong) — jingfang lineage traced below.

宣痹汤Xuan Bi Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
湿热痹：关节红肿灼热疼痛痛处焮热、得凉稍舒寒战热炽（湿热郁蒸）舌红苔黄腻、脉滑数
气机病机
湿热蕴于经络关节：湿裹热、热蒸湿——痹证的“热”型：红肿灼热与风寒湿痹之冷痛喜温正相反。
辨证推理
痹证寒热之辨的“热”半张：蠲痹独活寄生皆温药阵（寒痹），关节红肿灼热者投之如火上浇油——宣痹汤补上湿热痹一格，痹证地图（寒痹三期＋热痹一格）至此完整。吴鞠通的解法承其三焦法：杏仁开上源（启肺气以化湿——“宣痹”之宣字着落在此）、滑苡防己利中下、栀翘清其热、蚕沙化浊舒筋——不用一味风药、不用一味温散。今之痛风急性发作、类风湿活动期之红肿热痛即其的。
经方血缘
防己承麻黄茯苓汤／防己黄芪汤之利水通痹；薏苡承麻杏薏甘汤（风湿身疼之轻清）；“湿热痹”之立目则接古本湿病篇（湿分上下内外）之未尽处——古本详寒湿而略湿热，吴氏补其阙。
组成与组方逻辑
防己15g君
利湿通络止痹痛
杏仁15g臣
开肺气之上源——气化则湿化
滑石15g臣
清利湿热
薏苡仁15g臣
渗湿舒筋
连翘9g佐
清热散结
栀子9g佐
清泻郁热
半夏9g佐
化浊开结
蚕沙9g，包煎（9g）佐
祛湿化浊、舒筋定痛
赤小豆9g佐
利湿消肿
开上（杏）利下（滑苡己豆）清中（栀翘）化浊（夏蚕沙）——湿热痹之三焦分消。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神蠲痹汤独活寄生汤麻黄杏仁薏苡甘草汤
禁忌与注意
寒痹（冷痛喜温、苔白）冰炭——关节之红肿与否是痹证第一眼。
Key Signs
damp-heat bi: red swollen hot painful jointsburning pain, slightly relieved by coldchills alternating with intense heat (damp-heat steaming)red tongue, yellow greasy coat, slippery rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Damp-heat brewing in the channels and joints: damp wrapping heat, heat steaming damp — the "heat" type of bi: red swelling and burning, exactly opposite to the cold pain welcoming warmth of wind-cold-damp bi.
Pattern Reasoning
The "heat" half of bi's cold-heat differentiation: Juan Bi and Du Huo Ji Sheng are both warm-herb arrays (cold bi), and giving them for red swollen burning joints is like pouring oil on fire — Xuan Bi Tang fills in the damp-heat bi square, and the bi map (three cold-bi phases plus one hot-bi square) is now complete. Wu Jutong's solution follows his triple-burner method: Xing Ren opens the upper source (raising Lung qi to transform damp — the word "diffuse" in the name lands here), Hua Shi-Yi Yi Ren-Fang Ji drain the middle and lower, Zhi Zi-Lian Qiao clear its heat, Can Sha transforms turbidity and relaxes sinews — not one wind herb, not one warm-disperser. Today the target for acute gout attacks and the active phase of rheumatoid arthritis with red swollen hot pain.
Composition & Logic
Fang Ji15gSovereign
Xing Ren15gMinister
Hua Shi15gMinister
Yi Yi Ren15gMinister
Lian Yao9gAssistant
Zhi Zi9gAssistant
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Can Sha9gAssistant
Chi Xiao Dou9gAssistant
Opening above (Xing Ren), draining below (Hua Shi, Yi Yi Ren, Fang Ji, Chi Xiao Dou), clearing the middle (Zhi Zi, Lian Qiao), transforming turbidity (Ban Xia, Can Sha) — triple-burner separate drainage for damp-heat bi.
Classical Lineage
Fang Ji inherits Ma Huang Fu Ling Tang / Fang Ji Huang Qi Tang's draining water and freeing bi; Yi Yi Ren inherits Ma Xing Yi Gan Tang (the light-clearing of wind-damp body pain); the establishment of a "damp-heat bi" category picks up where the Guilin edition's damp-disease chapter (dividing damp into upper-lower inner-outer) left off — the Guilin edition details cold-damp and slights damp-heat, and Wu supplies the omission.
Cautions
Cold bi (cold pain welcoming warmth, white coat) is its opposite — whether the joint is red and swollen is the first glance in bi.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《校注妇人良方》（薛己校注本） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Jiaozhu Furen Liangfang — jingfang lineage traced below.

天王补心丹Tian Wang Bu Xin Dan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
虚烦失眠、心悸神疲健忘、梦遗手足心热、口舌生疮舌红少苔、脉细数
气机病机
心肾两亏、阴虚血少而虚火内扰：肾水不足以上济、心血不足以自养——心火失制而独亢于上，扰神灼阴。
辨证推理
滋养安神的集大成方：黄连阿胶汤“泻南补北”之局的滋养版重写——彼以芩连直折其火（火亢为主），此以三才（地黄天冬人参）滋其水源（阴亏为主），火之轻重定两方之取舍。十四味而章法井然：滋（地二冬玄）、养（归枣柏）、益（参苓）、敛（味子）、通（远志丹参）、引（桔梗）——酸枣仁远志五味子诸安神旧部悉数归队，丹参一味任“静中一动”（笔法第五现）。虚烦失眠兼见口舌生疮、手足心热者是其的——不寐五格之外的“心肾阴虚”补充格。
经方血缘
黄连阿胶汤（泻南补北之祖）的滋养化：撤芩连之折、扩地胶之滋为三才群阴；枣仁承酸枣仁汤、远志五味承其各自经方职；桔梗舟楫载药上行承其本性——安神法系的经方零件总动员。
组成与组方逻辑
地黄12g，生（12g）君
滋肾水以上济心火
麦门冬9g臣
养心阴
天冬9g臣
滋阴清热
玄参5g臣
滋水降火
丹参5g佐
活血养心安神——静阵中之动
当归9g佐
养血
人参5g佐
益气生血
茯苓5g佐
宁心
酸枣仁9g佐
养肝血安魂
柏子仁9g佐
养心安神润燥
远志5g佐
交通心肾
五味子5g佐
敛心气之耗散
桔梗5g使
载药上行入心（朱砂为衣今多不用）
滋养益敛通引六法——心肾阴虚之全配置。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神黄连阿胶汤酸枣仁汤归脾汤交泰丸
禁忌与注意
脾胃虚弱便溏者滋腻当慎；痰火之不寐（苔腻）归温胆辈。
Key Signs
deficiency vexation and insomnia, palpitation and spirit fatigueforgetfulness, dream emissionhot palms and soles, mouth and tongue soresred tongue with scant coat, thin rapid pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Heart and Kidney both depleted, yin deficient and blood scant with deficiency-fire harassing within: Kidney water insufficient to aid upward, Heart blood insufficient to nourish itself — Heart fire losing its check flares alone above, harassing the spirit and scorching the yin.
Pattern Reasoning
The culminating formula of enriching-nourishing spirit-calming: a nourishing rewrite of Huang Lian E Jiao Tang's "drain the south, supplement the north" — that cuts fire directly with Huang Qin-Huang Lian (fire-hyperactivity predominant), this enriches the water-source with the "three powers" (Di Huang, Tian Dong, ginseng) (yin depletion predominant), the weight of fire deciding the two formulas' choice. Fourteen herbs yet orderly: enriching (Di Huang, two Dong, Xuan Shen), nourishing (Dang Gui, Suan Zao Ren, Bai Zi Ren), boosting (ginseng, Fu Ling), gathering (Wu Wei Zi), freeing (Yuan Zhi, Dan Shen), guiding (Jie Geng) — the spirit-calming veterans Suan Zao Ren, Yuan Zhi, Wu Wei Zi all rejoin, and Dan Shen takes the "one mover amid stillness" (the fifth appearance). Deficiency-vexation insomnia with mouth-tongue sores and hot palms and soles is its target — the "Heart-Kidney yin deficiency" supplementary square beyond the five insomnia squares.
Composition & Logic
Di Huang12gSovereign
Mai Men Dong9gMinister
Tian Dong9gMinister
Xuan Shen5gMinister
Dan Shen5gAssistant
Dang Gui9gAssistant
Ren Shen5gAssistant
Fu Ling5gAssistant
Suan Zao Ren9gAssistant
Bai Zi Ren9gAssistant
Yuan Zhi5gAssistant
Wu Wei Zi5gAssistant
Jie Geng5gEnvoy
Six methods — enriching, nourishing, boosting, astringing, freeing, conducting — the full configuration for Heart-Kidney yin deficiency.
Classical Lineage
The nourishing transformation of Huang Lian E Jiao Tang (the ancestor of draining the south, supplementing the north): withdraw Huang Qin-Huang Lian's cutting, enlarge Di Huang-E Jiao's enriching into the "three powers" yin-troop; Suan Zao Ren inherits Suan Zao Ren Tang, Yuan Zhi-Wu Wei Zi inherit their respective classical offices; Jie Geng the oar carrying herbs upward inherits its nature — a full muster of the spirit-calming lineage's classical parts.
Cautions
In Spleen-Stomach weakness with loose stool the cloying nature is used with caution; phlegm-fire insomnia (greasy coat) belongs to the Wen Dan class.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医学心悟》（程国彭） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yixue Xinwu (Cheng Guopeng) — jingfang lineage traced below.

安神定志丸An Shen Ding Zhi Wan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
心胆气虚之惊悸夜寐易惊、梦中惊跳胆怯善恐、遇事易惊舌淡、脉细弱
气机病机
心胆气虚、神不守舍：气虚则神怯——非火扰（无热象）、非血虚（无萎黄）、非痰盛（苔不腻），是“胆气”这根定神之柱本身不足，闻响即惊。
辨证推理
不寐惊悸地图的“气虚胆怯”一格：与温胆汤共享“易惊”一症而虚实分途——温胆之惊由痰扰（苔腻呕恶、实），此方之惊由气怯（舌淡脉弱、虚）。结构是“补＋镇＋通”三线：参苓补其气、龙齿镇其惊、菖远开其窍通其志——补气药坐镇而镇静药为佐，主从关系写明病机立场（怯之本在虚不在扰）。今之焦虑症之“惊恐易惊”型、儿童夜惊属气虚者常用。
经方血缘
镇惊之龙齿承龙骨镇潜一族（桂甘龙牡之敛神）；参苓之补承四君之核；菖蒲远志开窍定志之对为后世定志诸方通用零件——本方把“虚人之惊”从重镇法中独立出来：经方龙牡诸证多阳浮神越（镇为主），此证气怯神虚（补为主），镇法在虚实间的再分档。
组成与组方逻辑
人参9g君
大补心气——气壮则胆自壮
茯苓12g（合茯神）（12g）臣
茯苓茯神并用，宁心健脾
远志6g佐
交通心肾、化痰定志
石菖蒲6g佐
开窍化浊宁神
龙齿15g，先煎（15g）佐
镇惊安魂
补（参苓）镇（龙齿）通（菖远）——气虚胆怯之惊的三线方。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神温胆汤归脾汤桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤
禁忌与注意
痰火之惊（苔腻脉滑）归温胆；阴虚火扰归补心丹——惊悸先辨虚实痰火。
Key Signs
fright palpitation from Heart-Gallbladder qi deficiencyeasily startled sleep, jumping in dreamstimidity and fearfulness, easily alarmed by eventspale tongue, thin weak pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Heart-Gallbladder qi deficiency, the spirit unsettled: qi deficient gives a timid spirit — not fire harassment (no heat signs), not blood deficiency (no sallow yellow), not phlegm exuberance (coat not greasy), but the very "Gallbladder qi" pillar of spirit-settling itself insufficient, startling at any sound.
Pattern Reasoning
The "qi-deficiency timidity" square of the insomnia-palpitation map: sharing the sign of "easily startled" with Wen Dan Tang but divided by deficiency and repletion — Wen Dan's fright is from phlegm harassment (greasy coat, retching, repletion), this formula's fright from qi timidity (pale tongue, weak pulse, deficiency). The structure is "supplement plus subdue plus free" on three lines: ginseng-Fu Ling supplement its qi, Long Chi subdues its fright, Shi Chang Pu-Yuan Zhi open its orifices and free its will — the qi-supplementing herbs commanding and the sedating herbs assisting, the host-servant relation stating the mechanism-standpoint (the root of timidity is in deficiency, not harassment). Today commonly used for the "panic and easy fright" type of anxiety and childhood night-terror of the qi-deficiency type.
Composition & Logic
Ren Shen9gSovereign
Fu Ling12gMinister
Yuan Zhi6gAssistant
Shi Chang Pu6gAssistant
Long Chi15gAssistant
Supplementing (ginseng, Fu Ling), subduing (Long Chi), freeing (Shi Chang Pu, Yuan Zhi) — a three-line formula for fright from qi-deficiency timidity.
Classical Lineage
The fright-quelling Long Chi inherits the Long Gu subduing family (Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li's spirit-gathering); the ginseng-Fu Ling supplementation inherits Si Jun's core; the Shi Chang Pu-Yuan Zhi orifice-opening will-settling pair is a general part of later will-settling formulas — this formula separates "fright in the deficient" from the heavy-subduing method: the classical Long-Mu patterns are mostly yang-float spirit-desertion (subdue predominant), this pattern is qi-timidity spirit-deficiency (supplement predominant), a re-gradation of the subduing method between deficiency and repletion.
Cautions
Fright from phlegm-fire (greasy coat, slippery pulse) belongs to Wen Dan; fright from yin-deficiency fire harassment to Bu Xin Dan — for fright palpitation first distinguish deficiency, repletion and phlegm-fire.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《韩氏医通》（方名定于《四科简效方》） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Hanshi Yitong — jingfang lineage traced below.

交泰丸Jiao Tai Wan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
心肾不交之失眠心悸不宁、怔忡上热（口疮心烦）下寒（足冷）并见者尤宜
气机病机
心肾不交、水火失济：心火不下温肾水、肾水不上济心火——天地不交谓之否，此丸使之交泰（卦名即方义）。
辨证推理
二味立一个宇宙观：黄连十份使心火下行、肉桂一份使肾阳上蒸——一降一升、水火既济，“交泰”取泰卦（天地交而万物通）之象。十比一的比例与左金丸（连六萸一）同一语法家族：主药定方向、反佐子定通路——肉桂在此非为温补，是给下行的心火指一条归元之路。与黄连阿胶汤分工：彼水亏火亢（滋水为主——阴虚之不交），此水火不交而阴未大亏（交通为主——枢机之不交），足冷与舌绛分之。安神三方至此成谱：阴虚火亢（补心丹）、气虚胆怯（定志丸）、水火不交（此丸）——加经方四格，不寐地图八格收全。
经方血缘
泻南补北之枢机化：黄连阿胶汤以胶黄滋交（实体之补），交泰丸以连桂气交（枢机之通）——同一“心肾”命题的两种解法；连桂寒热同炉承乌梅丸／附子泻心之家法，比例语法承左金。
组成与组方逻辑
黄连18g（十）（18g）君
清心火使之下降
肉桂2g（一）（2g）佐
温肾阳、引火归元使之上承
十降一升、水火交泰——枢机之最小方。
类方鉴别
清利·痹证·安神黄连阿胶汤左金丸天王补心丹
禁忌与注意
阴虚火旺（舌绛少苔）当滋，纯交通力薄；下寒甚者桂量可增——比例随证微调。
Key Signs
insomnia from Heart-Kidney non-interactionrestless palpitationespecially fitting when upper heat (mouth sores, vexation) and lower cold (cold feet) coexist
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Heart and Kidney not interacting, water and fire failing to aid each other: Heart fire not descending to warm Kidney water, Kidney water not ascending to aid Heart fire — heaven and earth not intercommunicating is called Blockage, and this pill makes them interact and communicate (the hexagram-name is the formula's meaning).
Pattern Reasoning
Two herbs establishing a cosmology: ten parts Huang Lian to send Heart fire down, one part Rou Gui to steam Kidney yang up — one descending, one ascending, water and fire in mutual completion, "communion-peace" taking the image of the Peace hexagram (heaven and earth interacting and the myriad things flowing). The ten-to-one ratio is of one grammar-family with Zuo Jin Wan (Lian six, Yu one): the main herb sets the direction, the counter-assistant piece sets the passage — Rou Gui here is not for warm-supplementation but to point the descending Heart fire a road home to the origin. Its division from Huang Lian E Jiao Tang: that is water-depleted fire-hyperactive (enrich water predominant — yin-deficiency non-interaction), this is water and fire non-interacting with yin not greatly depleted (communication predominant — pivot non-interaction), divided by cold feet and deep-red tongue. The three spirit-calming formulas now form a spectrum: yin-deficiency fire-hyperactive (Bu Xin Dan), qi-deficiency timidity (Ding Zhi Wan), water-fire non-interacting (this pill) — plus the classics' four squares, the insomnia map's eight squares complete.
Composition & Logic
Huang Lian18gSovereign
Rou Gui2gAssistant
Ten descending, one ascending — Heart and Kidney intercommunicating; the minimal formula of the pivot.
Classical Lineage
The pivot-transformation of draining the south and supplementing the north: Huang Lian E Jiao Tang enriches the interaction with E Jiao-Di Huang (substantial supplementation), Jiao Tai Wan communicates the qi with Huang Lian-Rou Gui (pivot freeing) — two solutions to the same "Heart-Kidney" proposition; Huang Lian-Rou Gui's cold-heat in one crucible inherits the house-method of Wu Mei Wan / Fu Zi Xie Xin, the ratio grammar inheriting Zuo Jin.
Cautions
In yin-deficiency effulgent fire (deep-red tongue, scant coat) enrich — pure communication is too weak; where lower cold is severe the Rou Gui dose may be increased — the ratio finely adjusted to the pattern.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《妇产科学》（上海中医学院方，20世纪50年代） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Shanghai TCM College formula — jingfang lineage traced below.

二仙汤Er Xian Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
更年期综合征：烘热汗出与畏寒并见头晕耳鸣、腰酸乏力烦躁易怒月经紊乱、血压不稳
气机病机
肾之阴阳两虚而虚火上扰：天癸将竭、阴阳同衰——阳虚见畏寒腰冷、阴虚火浮见烘热烦躁，寒热两组症状在同一人身上轮班。
辨证推理
寒热并用之法的现代应用典范：仙茅仙灵脾巴戟大队温阳与知柏一队泻火同锅——初看矛盾，实为围绝经期「阴阳俱虚于下、虚火独浮于上」量身定制的更年期主方。方虽成于1950年代（原为治高血压更年期而设），其配伍哲学纯然古典：温而不助火（知柏看守）、清而不伤阳（三仙坐镇）——与乌梅丸、附子泻心一脉的寒热同炉家法隔两千年呼应。烘热与畏寒并见是使用指征的钥匙：单纯阴虚（知柏地黄证）或单纯阳虚（右归证）皆不必此方。
经方血缘
寒热并用直承乌梅丸／附子泻心汤之家法（两个病机同在则两队药同锅）；知柏一翼即知柏地黄之核（上溯古本地黄黄柏骨架）；温阳一翼为右归益火思路的草本轻装版——三条血脉拧成一方。
组成与组方逻辑
仙茅9g君
温肾阳——二仙之一
淫羊藿9g君
补命门、强筋骨——二仙之二
巴戟天9g臣
温润助阳而不燥
当归9g佐
养血调冲
知母6g佐
滋肾清相火
黄柏6g佐
泻虚火坚阴
三温（二仙巴戟）二清（知柏）一养（归）——阴阳两调之更年方。
类方鉴别
固摄·消导·调冲乌梅丸（古本剂量参照页）知柏地黄丸右归丸
禁忌与注意
单纯阴虚火旺或单纯阳虚者各归其方；烘热与畏寒并见方为此方之的。
Key Signs
menopausal syndrome: hot flushes and aversion to cold togetherdizziness, tinnitus, aching weak lower backirritabilitymenstrual disorder, unstable blood pressure
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Both yin and yang of the Kidney deficient with deficiency-fire harassing above: the heavenly-gui about to be exhausted, yin and yang declining together — yang deficiency shows aversion to cold and cold lower back, yin-deficiency floating-fire shows hot flushes and irritability, the two symptom-groups taking turns in the same person.
Pattern Reasoning
A model of the modern application of the combined cold-heat method, and a chief menopause formula: a great warming-yang troop of Xian Mao, Yin Yang Huo, Ba Ji Tian in one pot with a fire-draining team of Zhi Mu-Huang Bai — seemingly contradictory, in fact tailored for perimenopause's "both yin and yang deficient below, deficiency-fire floating alone above." Though the formula was composed in the 1950s (originally for hypertensive menopause), its combinatory philosophy is purely classical: warm without abetting fire (Zhi Mu-Huang Bai keeping watch), clear without harming yang (the three "immortal" herbs garrisoning) — echoing across two millennia the combined-cold-heat house-method of Wu Mei Wan and Fu Zi Xie Xin. Hot flushes with aversion to cold together is the key indicator: pure yin deficiency (the Zhi Bai Di Huang pattern) or pure yang deficiency (the You Gui pattern) need not this formula.
Composition & Logic
Xian Mao9gSovereign
Yin Yang Huo9gSovereign
Ba Ji Tian9gMinister
Dang Gui9gAssistant
Zhi Mu6gAssistant
Huang Bo6gAssistant
Three warming (Xian Mao, Yin Yang Huo, Ba Ji Tian), two clearing (Zhi Mu, Huang Bai), one nourishing (Dang Gui) — a menopause formula regulating both yin and yang.
Classical Lineage
The combined cold-heat directly inherits the house-method of Wu Mei Wan / Fu Zi Xie Xin Tang (two mechanisms coexisting, so two herb-teams in one pot); the Zhi Mu-Huang Bai wing is the core of Zhi Bai Di Huang (tracing up to the Guilin Di Huang-Huang Bai skeleton); the yang-warming wing is a plant-based light-armed version of You Gui's boost-the-fire idea — three bloodlines twisted into one formula.
Cautions
Pure yin-deficiency effulgent fire or pure yang deficiency each returns to its own formula; hot flushes and aversion to cold appearing together is this formula's target.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《内科摘要》（薛己） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Neike Zhaiyao (Xue Ji) — jingfang lineage traced below.

四神丸Si Shen Wan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
五更泄泻（黎明前脐腹作痛、肠鸣即泻、泻后则安）久泻不愈畏寒肢冷、腰酸舌淡苔白、脉沉迟无力
气机病机
命门火衰、火不暖土：五更之时阳气当至而不至（阴气极盛、阳未来复之刻）——脾失温煦、关门不固，应时而泻。时间症状学的又一典范：泻的钟点就是诊断。
辨证推理
久泻地图的“肾”格：与痛泻要方（肝乘脾——情绪诱发）、参苓白术（脾虚湿泻——食少倦怠）三分久泻，诱因与时辰是分诊台——黎明定时而泻者直指命门。“补火暖土”是其立法：补骨脂温命门为君（治土之病求之于火——五行相生的临床化），蔻萸温中散寒、五味酸敛固涩。丸剂晚服（临睡送下），赶在五更之前布防——服药时间与发病时间对表，剂法又是方义。
经方血缘
吴茱萸承吴茱萸汤温肝暖脾之职、五味子承其酸敛之性（姜辛味结构之收端在此独任固涩）；“补火暖土”之思承四逆辈脾肾同温（彼救急之温、此缓固之温）——桃花汤（涩肠固脱之祖）为其经方近邻：彼滑脱在即之涩、此定时之泻的温固。
组成与组方逻辑
补骨脂12g君
补命门之火以温脾土
肉豆蔻6g，煨（6g）臣
温脾涩肠止泻
吴茱萸3g佐
温肝散寒下气
五味子6g佐
酸敛固涩（生姜大枣煎汤送服）
一补火二温中一酸敛——五更泻之专方。
类方鉴别
固摄·消导·调冲痛泻要方参苓白术散理中丸真人养脏汤缩泉丸
禁忌与注意
湿热泻、伤食泻禁温涩；泻而有灼热臭秽者南辕北辙。
Key Signs
daybreak diarrhea (pre-dawn periumbilical pain, rumbling then diarrhea, ease after)chronic unhealed diarrheaaversion to cold, cold limbs, aching backpale tongue, white coat, deep slow forceless pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Ming Men fire declined, fire failing to warm earth: at the fifth watch, when yang qi should arrive yet does not (the moment yin qi is at extreme and yang has not returned) — the Spleen losing warmth, the gate unconsolidated, gives diarrhea on schedule. Another model of time-symptomatology: the clock-hour of the diarrhea is the diagnosis.
Pattern Reasoning
The "Kidney" square of the chronic-diarrhea map: with Tong Xie Yao Fang (Liver overwhelming Spleen — emotion-triggered) and Shen Ling Bai Zhu (Spleen-deficiency damp diarrhea — reduced appetite, fatigue) it divides chronic diarrhea in three, the trigger and hour being the triage desk — diarrhea fixed at daybreak points straight to Ming Men. "Supplement fire to warm earth" is its legislation: Bu Gu Zhi warms Ming Men as sovereign (seek the fire for an earth disease — the five-phase mutual generation clinically applied), Rou Dou Kou-Wu Zhu Yu warm the middle and disperse cold, Wu Wei Zi sours-gathers and consolidates. The pill taken at night (swallowed at bedtime), deploying defenses before the fifth watch — the medicine-taking hour matched to the onset hour, the method of dosing again the formula's meaning.
Composition & Logic
Bu Gu Zhi12gSovereign
Rou Dou Kou6gMinister
Wu Zhu Yu3gAssistant
Wu Wei Zi6gAssistant
One supplementing fire, two warming the middle, one sour-astringing — a formula dedicated to daybreak diarrhea.
Classical Lineage
Wu Zhu Yu inherits Wu Zhu Yu Tang's office of warming the Liver and warming the Spleen, Wu Wei Zi inherits its sour-gathering nature (the gathering end of the ginger-Xi Xin-Wu Wei Zi structure solely tasked with consolidation here); the "supplement fire, warm earth" idea inherits the Si Ni class's Spleen-Kidney co-warming (that acute-rescue warmth, this gradual-consolidating warmth) — Tao Hua Tang (the ancestor of astringing the gut and consolidating desertion) is its classical near-neighbor: that the astringing of imminent efflux, this the warm-consolidation of timed diarrhea.
Cautions
Damp-heat diarrhea and food-damage diarrhea forbid warm-astringing; diarrhea with burning and foulness is heading the opposite way.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《太平惠民和剂局方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Taiping Huimin Heji Jufang — jingfang lineage traced below.

真人养脏汤Zhen Ren Yang Zang Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
久泻久痢、滑脱不禁甚则脱肛坠下脐腹疼痛、喜温喜按倦怠食少、舌淡苔白
气机病机
泻痢日久、脾肾虚寒而关门不固：滑脱已成——气随利泄、阳随气衰，再不涩固则脱势不止。
辨证推理
固涩法的重剂代表：罂粟壳诃子肉蔻三涩为主力（涩之峻者罂壳领衔——今受管制，临床多以赤石脂石榴皮代）、参术桂温补其本、归芍养其血、木香一味在满盘涩药中独任行气（“静中一动”笔法第六现——涩而不滞之保险栓）。使用前提写在方名对面：**涩法是最后一道闸**——邪未净而早涩则闭门留寇（痢禁早涩之戒自芍药汤页贯穿至此），必“泻痢无度、滑脱不禁、无里急后重之实象”方可落闸。与四神丸分工：彼定时之泻（温固为主）、此滑脱之泻（涩固为主）——脱与不脱定档。
经方血缘
桃花汤（赤石脂干姜粳米——涩肠固脱之经方祖）的全维扩编：涩之一职从石脂换罂诃蔻三味、温之一职从干姜换桂、再添参术归芍之补养——祖方三味的骨架撑成十味的大阵；木香防壅承归脾同一笔法。
组成与组方逻辑
罂粟壳9g，蜜炙（9g）君
涩肠固脱——固涩之峻
诃子6g，煨（6g）臣
涩肠止泻
肉豆蔻6g，煨（6g）臣
温中涩肠
人参6g佐
补气
白术9g佐
健脾
肉桂3g佐
温肾暖脾
当归6g佐
养血——久痢伤血之顾
芍药9g，白（9g）佐
缓急止痛
木香5g佐
行气醒脾——涩阵中防壅之动
甘草6g，炙（6g）使
和中
三涩三补二养一行——滑脱之闸。
类方鉴别
固摄·消导·调冲四神丸芍药汤
禁忌与注意
痢疾初起、湿热积滞未净者绝对禁涩；罂粟壳有依赖性受管制，中病即止或以他涩代之。
Key Signs
chronic diarrhea and dysentery with efflux desertionin severe cases prolapseperiumbilical pain, better with warmth and pressurefatigue, reduced appetite, pale tongue, white coat
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Diarrhea and dysentery chronic, Spleen-Kidney deficiency-cold with the gate unconsolidated: efflux-desertion already formed — qi leaking with the diarrhea, yang declining with the qi; astringe and consolidate no more, and the desertion momentum will not stop.
Pattern Reasoning
The heavy-formula representative of the astringing-consolidating method: Ying Su Ke, He Zi, Rou Dou Kou, three astringents, as the main force (the fierce astringent Ying Su Ke leading — now controlled, clinically often replaced by Chi Shi Zhi-Shi Liu Pi), ginseng-Bai Zhu-Rou Gui warm and supplement the root, Dang Gui-Shao Yao nourish the blood, and Mu Xiang alone tasked with moving qi amid a board of astringents (the sixth appearance of "one mover amid stillness" — the safety catch against astringing-into-stagnation). The premise of use is written on the reverse of the formula-name: astringing is the last floodgate — pathogen not yet cleared and astringed early shuts the door on the bandit (the caution against early astringing in dysentery runs from the Shao Yao Tang page to here), so only "immoderate diarrhea, efflux-desertion, without the repletion signs of urgency and heaviness" may lower the gate. Its division from Si Shen Wan: that is timed diarrhea (warm-consolidate predominant), this is efflux-desertion diarrhea (astringe-consolidate predominant) — deserting or not sets the gradation.
Composition & Logic
Ying Su Qiao9gSovereign
He Zi6gMinister
Rou Dou Kou6gMinister
Ren Shen6gAssistant
Bai Zhu9gAssistant
Rou Gui3gAssistant
Dang Gui6gAssistant
Shao Yao9gAssistant
Mu Xiang5gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Three astringing, three supplementing, two nourishing, one moving — the floodgate for efflux desertion.
Classical Lineage
A full-dimension enlargement of Tao Hua Tang (Chi Shi Zhi-Gan Jiang-rice — the classical ancestor of astringing the gut and consolidating desertion): the astringing office switched from Chi Shi Zhi to the three herbs Ying Su Ke-He Zi-Rou Dou Kou, the warming office from Gan Jiang to Rou Gui, plus ginseng-Bai Zhu-Dang Gui-Shao Yao's supplement-nourishment — the ancestor's three-herb skeleton propped into a ten-herb array; Mu Xiang preventing congestion inherits the same Gui Pi brushwork.
Cautions
At the onset of dysentery, with damp-heat accumulation not yet cleared, astringing is absolutely contraindicated; Ying Su Ke is addictive and controlled — stop when the disease yields or replace with another astringent.

时方 · 出自《魏氏家藏方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Weishi Jiacang Fang — jingfang lineage traced below.

缩泉丸Suo Quan Wan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
小便频数小儿遗尿下元虚冷、舌淡
气机病机
下元虚寒、膀胱失约：肾司二便、与膀胱相表里——阳虚则气化失权、约束无力，水府之门关不紧。
辨证推理
三味小方立“温摄”一法：益智温摄为君、乌药温行为臣——一摄一行是方眼：纯涩则气滞、纯行则愈失，摄中带行方合膀胱“气化则能出”之性；山药固脾肾为底。与萆薢分清饮同用益智乌药而侧重各异（彼分清化浊治白浊、此缩尿止遗治频遗）——两方共享“温摄下元”零件包。小儿遗尿、老人尿频、产后尿失禁属虚寒者通用；与肾气丸分工：气化失灵之全局（小便不利或反多）归肾气丸，单纯失约之频遗归此轻剂。
经方血缘
温摄下元承肾气丸“阴中求阳助气化”之旨的轻装化；山药固肾即肾气丸三补之一味单传——大方拆零件成小方，法系树的“减法”一枝。
组成与组方逻辑
益智仁9g君
温肾缩尿
乌药9g臣
温肾行气、助膀胱气化
山药12g（原方酒煮糊丸）（12g）佐
补脾固肾
一摄一行一固——温摄下元之最小方。
类方鉴别
固摄·消导·调冲肾气丸萆薢分清饮四神丸
禁忌与注意
湿热下注之尿频急痛（八正散证）冰炭——频数有寒热两本。
Key Signs
frequent urinationchildhood enuresislower-origin deficiency-cold, pale tongue
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Lower-origin deficiency-cold, the bladder losing restraint: the Kidney governs the two excretions and is exterior-interior with the bladder — yang deficient loses qi-transformation authority, the restraint powerless, the water-mansion gate not shut tight.
Pattern Reasoning
Three herbs establishing the "warm-restrain" method: Yi Zhi Ren warm-restraining as sovereign, Wu Yao warm-moving as minister — one restraining, one moving, is the formula's eye: pure astringing gives qi stagnation, pure moving loses the more, so restraining with movement suits the bladder's nature of "qi-transformation enabling voiding"; Shan Yao consolidates Spleen and Kidney as base. It shares Yi Zhi Ren-Wu Yao with Bi Xie Fen Qing but with different emphases (that separates-clear transforms-turbidity for white turbidity, this contracts urine and stops incontinence for frequent enuresis) — the two formulas sharing a "warm-restrain the lower origin" parts-kit. General for childhood enuresis, elderly urinary frequency, and postpartum incontinence of the deficiency-cold type; its division from Shen Qi Wan: the whole picture of failed qi-transformation (inhibited or excessive urination) goes to Shen Qi Wan, simple restraint-failure frequent-enuresis to this light formula.
Composition & Logic
Yi Zhi Ren9gSovereign
Wu Yao9gMinister
Shan Yao12gAssistant
One restraining, one moving, one consolidating — the minimal formula for warming and restraining the lower origin.
Classical Lineage
The warm-restrain-the-lower-origin inherits the lightening of Shen Qi Wan's "seek yang within yin to aid qi-transformation"; Shan Yao consolidating the Kidney is a single-herb transmission of one of Shen Qi Wan's three supplements — a large formula's parts disassembled into a small formula, a "subtraction" branch of the lineage-tree.
Cautions
Urinary frequency, urgency and pain from damp-heat pouring down (the Ba Zheng San pattern) is its opposite — frequency has two roots, cold and heat.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《傅青主女科》（傅山） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Fu Qingzhu Nvke (Fu Shan) — jingfang lineage traced below.

生化汤Sheng Hua Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
产后恶露不行或行而不畅小腹冷痛血块紫暗舌淡紫、脉细涩
气机病机
产后血虚寒凝、瘀血内阻：新产之体血室空虚、寒邪易乘——瘀不去则新血不生、新血不生则瘀愈难化，“生化”二字即此循环的破解：化瘀所以生新、生新乃能化瘀。
辨证推理
产后第一方（民间至今坐月子沿用）：归芎桃活血化瘀为主而当归独重八钱——攻中以补为体，正合产后“多虚多瘀”的体质底色；炮姜二克最见手眼：炮黑入血、温经而兼止血——与柏叶阿胶汤之炮姜同一“黑姜守血”笔法。傅山立方之旨：产后勿拘“恶露当尽攻之”，亦勿惧“产后大虚纯补之”——生化汤在攻补之间取中道。与失笑散分工：恶露不行之痛（虚寒瘀——温化，此方）与瘀实之急痛（径攻，失笑）。
经方血缘
温经汤（寒瘀虚三线并治之祖）的产后特化：归芎承其血分双动、温经之职由桂萸姜换为一味炮姜（产后忌过温散）、大队滋养全撤（急则治瘀为先）——祖方十二味收缩为五味速写；桃仁承桂枝茯苓丸之化癥主力。
组成与组方逻辑
当归24g君
重用补血活血——生新之本
川芎9g臣
行血中之气
桃仁6g臣
化瘀
干姜2g，炮黑（2g）佐
炮黑入血分，温经止血
甘草2g，炙（2g）使
和中（黄酒童便同煎助行）
重归生新、芎桃化瘀、炮姜温守——生与化的循环方。
类方鉴别
固摄·消导·调冲温经汤失笑散桂枝茯苓丸
禁忌与注意
产后血热之恶露不绝（色鲜臭秽）禁温；恶露过多属冲任不固者当摄——产后三审（腹痛、恶露、乳食）先行。
Key Signs
postpartum lochia retention or inhibited flowcold lower-abdomen paindark purple clotsdull purple tongue, thin choppy pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Postpartum blood deficiency with cold congelation, blood stasis obstructing within: the newly-delivered body's blood-chamber is empty and cold pathogen readily exploits it — stasis ungone lets new blood not generate, new blood ungenerated makes stasis the harder to transform, and the two words "engender and transform" are the breaking of this loop: transform stasis so as to engender the new, engender the new so as to transform stasis.
Pattern Reasoning
The first postpartum formula (still used in folk "sitting the month" to this day): Dang Gui-Chuan Xiong-Tao Ren invigorate blood and transform stasis, with Dang Gui alone heavy at eight qian — attacking with supplementing as the body, exactly fitting the postpartum "much deficiency, much stasis" constitutional ground; blast-fried ginger at two grams shows the most craft: charred black it enters the blood, warming the channels while stopping bleeding — the same "black ginger guards the blood" brushwork as the blast-fried ginger of Bai Ye E Jiao Tang. Fu Shan's intent in setting the formula: postpartum, neither cling to "lochia should be exhaustively attacked" nor fear "the postpartum great deficiency, purely supplement it" — Sheng Hua Tang takes the middle road between attacking and supplementing. Its division from Shi Xiao San: pain of retained lochia (deficiency-cold stasis — warm transformation, this formula) versus acute pain of stasis-repletion (direct attack, Shi Xiao).
Composition & Logic
Dang Gui24gSovereign
Chuan Xiong9gMinister
Tao Ren6gMinister
Gan Jiang2gAssistant
Gan Cao2gEnvoy
Dang Gui heavily to engender the new, Chuan Xiong–Tao Ren to transform stasis, blast-fried ginger to warm and guard — a formula of the engendering-and-transforming cycle.
Classical Lineage
The postpartum specialization of Wen Jing Tang (the ancestor of treating cold, stasis and deficiency on three lines): Dang Gui-Chuan Xiong inherit its blood-level dual movement, the warming office switched from Gui Zhi-Wu Zhu Yu-ginger to a single blast-fried ginger (postpartum shuns over-warm-dispersal), the great nourishing troop wholly withdrawn (in urgency, treat stasis first) — the ancestor's twelve herbs contracted into a five-herb sketch; Tao Ren inherits Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan's concretion-transforming main force.
Cautions
Postpartum incessant lochia of blood-heat (bright foul color) forbids warming; excessive lochia from Chong-Ren non-consolidation should be restrained — the three postpartum examinations (abdominal pain, lochia, breast-feeding) come first.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《丹溪心法》（朱丹溪） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Danxi Xinfa (Zhu Danxi) — jingfang lineage traced below.

保和丸Bao He Wan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
脘腹痞满胀痛嗳腐吞酸、恶食呕逆或大便泄泻（泻下臭如败卵、泻后痛减）舌苔厚腻、脉滑
气机病机
饮食自倍、肠胃乃伤：食积中阻——气机被有形之积堵塞则胀，腐熟不及则嗳腐，积郁化热则酸臭。
辨证推理
消法的底盘方：三消（楂曲莱菔各主一类积——肉积／酒积／谷积，消导药的分工地图）＋二陈之半（夏陈苓和胃化浊）＋连翘一味清积郁之热——“保和”之名点明档次：平和消导、不用攻下，食积轻中档皆宜（重则枳实导滞辈）。与痛泻要方共享“泻后痛减”一症而诱因分途（伤食之嗳腐苔厚 vs 情绪之左弦右缓）——同症异机在消导与抑木之间的分诊。今之消化不良、小儿伤食第一方。
经方血缘
二陈汤为其和胃底盘（夏陈苓原班）；“消而勿攻”的档位意识承承气家族的分级思维（食积之轻重如燥屎之缓急——保和消其轻、枳实导滞下其重）；莱菔子回望三子养亲之痰食同治。
组成与组方逻辑
山楂18g君
消一切饮食积滞，尤善肉食油腻之积
神曲6g臣
消酒食陈腐之积
莱菔子6g臣
消谷面之积、降气除胀
半夏9g佐
和胃降逆
橘皮6g佐
理气化滞
茯苓9g佐
渗湿健脾
连翘6g佐
清食积所酿之郁热——消导阵中一点清凉
三消一清、二陈托底——食积之平剂。
类方鉴别
固摄·消导·调冲三子养亲汤痛泻要方小承气汤平胃散
禁忌与注意
脾虚之食少（无积滞实象）当补不当消；积重便闭者此方力缓。
Key Signs
epigastric and abdominal focal fullness and distending painsour belching, aversion to food, retchingor diarrhea (foul as rotten eggs, pain eased after)thick greasy coat, slippery pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Food and drink doubled, the gut and stomach thereby harmed: food accumulation obstructing the middle — the qi dynamic blocked by tangible accumulation gives distension, rot-ripening falling short gives sour belching, and accumulation constrained transforming to heat gives sour foulness.
Pattern Reasoning
The base formula of the dispersing method: three food-dispersers (Shan Zha, Shen Qu, Lai Fu Zi each governing a type — meat, wine, grain accumulation, the division-of-labor map of food-dispersing herbs) plus half an Er Chen (Ban Xia-Chen Pi-Fu Ling harmonize the stomach and transform turbidity) plus one Lian Qiao to clear the heat of constrained accumulation — the name "preserve harmony" marks the gradation: mild dispersing, no purging, suited to the light-to-moderate gradation of food accumulation (heavy goes to Zhi Shi Dao Zhi and kin). It shares "pain eased after diarrhea" with Tong Xie Yao Fang but divided by trigger (food-damage's sour belching and thick coat versus emotion's wiry-left moderate-right pulse) — same sign, different mechanism, triaged between dispersing and restraining wood. Today the first formula for indigestion and childhood food-damage.
Composition & Logic
Shan Zha18gSovereign
Shen Qu6gMinister
Lai Fu Zi6gMinister
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Ju Pi6gAssistant
Fu Ling9gAssistant
Lian Yao6gAssistant
Three food-dispersers, one clearing, an Er Chen base — a mild formula for food accumulation.
Classical Lineage
Er Chen Tang as its stomach-harmonizing base (the Ban Xia-Chen Pi-Fu Ling cast); the "disperse but do not attack" gradation-awareness inherits the Cheng Qi family's graded thinking (food accumulation's light-versus-heavy like dry stool's gentle-versus-urgent — Bao He disperses the light, Zhi Shi Dao Zhi purges the heavy); Lai Fu Zi looks back to San Zi Yang Qin's phlegm-food co-treatment.
Cautions
Reduced appetite of Spleen deficiency (without repletion signs of accumulation) should be supplemented, not dispersed; for heavy accumulation with blocked stool this formula is too gentle.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《太平惠民和剂局方》 — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Taiping Huimin Heji Jufang — jingfang lineage traced below.

藿香正气散Huo Xiang Zheng Qi San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
外感风寒、内伤湿滞恶寒发热、头痛胸膈满闷、脘腹疼痛恶心呕吐、肠鸣泄泻（胃肠型感冒）舌苔白腻
气机病机
表里同病、寒湿两犯：风寒束表于外、湿浊困脾于内——表证与吐泻并见是其签名，两个战场必须同时开工。
辨证推理
表里双解的湿浊版：与经方双解诸方各据一格——葛根芩连解表清里（热）、桂枝人参汤解表温里（虚寒）、此方解表化浊（湿）。藿香为君一药三任（芳香化浊之首药自此入库），苏芷助其散、夏陈朴腹化其湿滞、术苓草守其中、桔梗宣上——三焦气机全线疏通而以中焦为主战场。“胃肠型感冒”“水土不服”“夏月乘凉饮冷之寒湿吐泻”皆其地界——今日藿香正气水之家喻户晓即其生命力；但暑热无湿之证（大汗大渴）误用则助热。
经方血缘
表里双解之格局承桂枝人参汤（表里同治之经方范）而换战场（彼虚寒、此寒湿）；平胃之核（朴陈草）与二陈之核（夏陈苓）双双嵌入——两个后世底盘方的零件同炉，加藿苏芷之芳香一翼；古本湿病篇“湿分表里”之辨为其病机地图。
组成与组方逻辑
藿香9g君
芳香化浊、外散风寒、内和脾胃——一药三任
苏叶6g臣
辛散风寒、行气宽中
白芷6g臣
散寒燥湿
半夏9g（原方半夏曲）（9g）佐
燥湿降逆止呕
橘皮6g佐
理气化湿
厚朴6g佐
行气除满
大腹皮6g佐
下气宽中利湿
白术9g佐
健脾
茯苓9g佐
渗湿
桔梗6g佐
宣肺利膈
甘草6g，炙（6g）使
调和（姜枣煎）
芳香三味散其表化其浊、平胃二陈理其中、桔梗宣上腹皮导下——寒湿表里之全维方。
类方鉴别
固摄·消导·调冲葛根黄芩黄连汤平胃散桂枝人参汤
禁忌与注意
暑热证（高热大汗大渴）与湿热证（苔黄腻）禁辛温香燥；阴虚者慎。
Key Signs
external wind-cold with internal damp stagnationaversion to cold, fever, headachechest and diaphragm oppression, abdominal painnausea, vomiting, borborygmus and diarrhea (gastrointestinal cold)white greasy tongue coat
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Exterior and interior both diseased, cold and damp both offending: wind-cold binding the exterior without, damp-turbidity encumbering the Spleen within — an exterior pattern with vomiting and diarrhea together is its signature, the two battlefields must open work simultaneously.
Pattern Reasoning
The damp-turbidity version of dual exterior-interior resolution: with the classics' dual-resolution formulas each holding a square — Ge Gen Qin Lian resolves exterior and clears interior (heat), Gui Zhi Ren Shen resolves exterior and warms interior (deficiency-cold), this resolves exterior and transforms turbidity (damp). Huo Xiang as sovereign does triple duty (the chief aromatic turbidity-transformer enters the repertoire here), Su Ye-Bai Zhi aid its dispersal, Ban Xia-Chen Pi-Hou Po-Da Fu Pi transform its damp stagnation, Bai Zhu-Fu Ling-Gan Cao guard the middle, Jie Geng diffuses above — the triple-burner qi dynamic freed along the whole line with the middle burner as main battlefield. "Gastrointestinal cold," "acclimatization illness," and "summer cold-damp vomiting-diarrhea from taking cold" are all its territory — today's household-name Huo Xiang Zheng Qi liquid is its vitality; but for summer-heat without damp (great sweat, great thirst) mistaken use abets the heat.
Composition & Logic
Huo Xiang9gSovereign
Su Ye6gMinister
Bai Zhi6gMinister
Ban Xia9gAssistant
Ju Pi6gAssistant
Hou Po6gAssistant
Da Fu Pi6gAssistant
Bai Zhu9gAssistant
Fu Ling9gAssistant
Jie Geng6gAssistant
Gan Cao6gEnvoy
Three aromatic herbs disperse the exterior and transform turbidity, a Ping Wei–Er Chen core regulates the middle, Jie Geng diffuses above and Da Fu Pi conducts below — a full-dimension formula for cold-damp exterior-interior disease.
Classical Lineage
The dual exterior-interior resolution inherits Gui Zhi Ren Shen Tang (the classical model of treating exterior and interior together) with a changed battlefield (that deficiency-cold, this cold-damp); Ping Wei's core (Hou Po-Chen Pi-Gan Cao) and Er Chen's core (Ban Xia-Chen Pi-Fu Ling) both embedded — the parts of two later base-formulas in one pot, plus a Huo Xiang-Su Ye-Bai Zhi aromatic wing; the Guilin damp-disease chapter's "damp divided into exterior and interior" is its mechanism-map.
Cautions
Summer-heat patterns (high fever, great sweat, great thirst) and damp-heat patterns (yellow greasy coat) forbid acrid-warm aromatic-drying; used with caution in yin deficiency.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《简要济众方》（后收入《太平惠民和剂局方》） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Jianyao Jizhong Fang — jingfang lineage traced below.

平胃散Ping Wei San

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
脘腹胀满不思饮食、口淡无味恶心呕哕、嗳气吞酸肢体沉重怠惰舌苔白厚腻、脉缓
气机病机
湿滞脾胃、运化呆钝：湿为阴邪、其性黏滞——困于中土则脾不升胃不降，满、呆、重、腻四字是其全息像。
辨证推理
燥湿运脾的祖方：苍术自此入库并直登君位——白术守补、苍术走燥（术家兄弟的分工：虚者白、湿者苍），配厚朴陈皮之行——“燥湿＋行气”两轮驱动是治湿滞的标准解法（湿非气行不化）。它是后世脾胃湿滞诸方的公共底盘：合二陈为平陈汤、加藿苏为不换金正气散（藿香正气之近亲）、合五苓为胃苓汤——与四君（虚）、二陈（痰）并列为中焦三大底盘方。苔之厚腻程度即其用药指征的刻度尺。
经方血缘
古本湿病篇白术茯苓厚朴汤（湿中满方——术苓朴三味）的定型放大：术升级为苍术专司燥、朴之“刨满”原职保留、添陈皮成气分双翼——古本速写与后世定式的直系血缘。
组成与组方逻辑
苍术12g君
苦温燥湿、运脾——燥湿力冠术类
厚朴9g臣
行气除满化湿
橘皮9g佐
理气和胃
甘草4g，炙（4g）使
调和（姜枣煎）
一燥二行一和——湿滞中焦之最小标准解。
类方鉴别
固摄·消导·调冲白术茯苓厚朴汤藿香正气散保和丸
禁忌与注意
阴虚舌红少苔、脾虚无湿者忌苍朴之燥散；孕妇慎。
Key Signs
epigastric and abdominal distensionno desire to eat, bland tasteless mouthnausea, retching, belching, acid regurgitationheavy sluggish limbswhite thick greasy coat, moderate pulse
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Damp stagnation in the Spleen-Stomach, transport dull and sluggish: damp is a yin pathogen, sticky by nature — encumbering the central earth, the Spleen does not ascend and the stomach does not descend, and the four words fullness, dullness, heaviness, greasiness are its holographic image.
Pattern Reasoning
The ancestral formula of drying damp and moving the Spleen: Cang Zhu enters the repertoire here and rises straight to sovereign — Bai Zhu guards and supplements, Cang Zhu travels and dries (the Zhu brothers' division: for the deficient Bai, for damp Cang), paired with Hou Po-Chen Pi's moving — "dry damp plus move qi" dual-wheel drive is the standard solution for damp stagnation (damp does not transform without qi moving). It is the public base of later Spleen-Stomach damp-stagnation formulas: combined with Er Chen for Ping Chen Tang, plus Huo Xiang-Su Ye for Bu Huan Jin Zheng Qi San (a close relative of Huo Xiang Zheng Qi), combined with Wu Ling for Wei Ling Tang — standing with Si Jun (deficiency) and Er Chen (phlegm) as the three great middle-burner bases. The degree of the coat's greasy thickness is the measuring-stick of its medication indicator.
Composition & Logic
Cang Zhu12gSovereign
Hou Po9gMinister
Ju Pi9gAssistant
Gan Cao4gEnvoy
One drying, two moving, one harmonizing — the minimal standard solution for damp stagnation in the middle burner.
Classical Lineage
The fixed enlargement of the Guilin damp-disease chapter's Bai Zhu Fu Ling Hou Po Tang (a damp middle-fullness formula — Bai Zhu-Fu Ling-Hou Po three herbs): Bai Zhu upgraded to Cang Zhu to specialize in drying, Hou Po's "scraping fullness" office kept, Chen Pi added to form qi-level twin wings — the direct bloodline of Guilin sketch and later fixed form.
Cautions
Those with yin deficiency, red tongue and scant coat, or Spleen deficiency without damp, shun the drying-dispersing Cang Zhu-Hou Po; used with caution in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医林改错》（王清任） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yilin Gaicuo (Wang Qingren) — jingfang lineage traced below.

膈下逐瘀汤Ge Xia Zhu Yu Tang

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
膈下（胁腹）积块、痛有定处卧则腹坠、久泻不愈（气滞血瘀型）肚腹疼痛、痛处不移
气机病机
瘀血结于膈下、气滞与积块互抱：清任按解剖分区布阵——血府（胸中）、膈下（腹胁）、少腹各设一方，此方主膈下之积与痛。
辨证推理
五逐瘀汤的“腹部分册”：与血府逐瘀共享桃红归芎底盘而佐使全换——彼配桔梗牛膝造胸中升降，此配乌药香附枳壳延胡一队行气止痛之品（腹为气之海，膈下之瘀气滞尤重）——同一基础方按部位调整佐使，清任逐瘀家族自身就是一部“部位药学”教科书。灵脂延胡二味止痛专才领衔（失笑散之半再现），肝脾肿大、慢性肝病之胁下积块属瘀者今用最广。可与内科积聚门互参。
经方血缘
血府逐瘀之同胞：桃红四物半壁共享，行气翼从四逆散（胸）换为乌药香附延胡（腹）——部位定佐使；积块之治遥承桂枝茯苓丸（缓消癥块）与鳖甲煎丸之意而剂型改汤取其速。
组成与组方逻辑
五灵脂6g，炒（6g）君
化瘀止痛
当归9g臣
养血活血
川芎6g臣
行气活血
桃仁9g臣
破瘀
红花9g臣
活血
牡丹皮6g佐
凉血散瘀
芍药6g，赤（6g）佐
散瘀止痛
乌药6g佐
行气止痛
延胡索3g佐
活血行气止痛——气血两行之止痛专才
香附5g佐
理气解郁
枳实5g（原方枳壳）（5g）佐
宽中行滞
甘草9g使
缓急调和
桃红底盘＋腹部行气止痛加味——膈下分册。
类方鉴别
逐瘀法系血府逐瘀汤失笑散桂枝茯苓丸
禁忌与注意
积块日久正虚者攻补兼施勿纯攻；孕妇忌。
Key Signs
mass below the diaphragm (hypochondrium/flank), fixed in locationabdominal sagging when lying, chronic diarrhea (qi-stagnation blood-stasis type)abdominal pain, unmoving in location
Qi Dynamic & Pathomechanism
Blood stasis binding below the diaphragm, qi stagnation and accumulation-mass embracing each other: Qingren arrayed by anatomical region — a formula each for the blood-mansion (chest), below-diaphragm (abdomen-hypochondrium), and lower abdomen, and this governs the below-diaphragm accumulation and pain.
Pattern Reasoning
The "abdominal volume" of the five stasis-expelling formulas: sharing the Tao-Hong-Dang Gui-Chuan Xiong base with Xue Fu Zhu Yu but with the assistants wholly changed — that pairs Jie Geng-Niu Xi to make chest ascending-descending, this pairs Wu Yao-Xiang Fu-Zhi Ke-Yan Hu Suo, a qi-moving pain-stopping team (the abdomen is the sea of qi, and below-diaphragm stasis has heavy qi stagnation) — the same base changing add-ons by location, Qingren's stasis-expelling family being itself a textbook of "location-pharmacology." Wu Ling Zhi-Yan Hu Suo, two pain-stopping specialists, lead (half of Shi Xiao San reappearing), and it is today most used for hepatosplenomegaly and chronic liver disease with below-hypochondrium mass of the stasis type. The docking formula of this collection's internal-medicine module's accumulation-gathering section.
Composition & Logic
Wu Ling Zhi6gSovereign
Dang Gui9gMinister
Chuan Xiong6gMinister
Tao Ren9gMinister
Hong Hua9gMinister
Mu Dan Pi6gAssistant
Shao Yao6gAssistant
Wu Yao6gAssistant
Yan Hu Suo3gAssistant
Xiang Fu5gAssistant
Zhi Shi5gAssistant
Gan Cao9gEnvoy
A Tao-Hong base plus an abdominal qi-moving pain-relieving module — the abdominal-region volume of the Blood-Stasis lineage.
Classical Lineage
A sibling of Xue Fu Zhu Yu: the Tao Hong Si Wu half shared, the qi-moving wing switched from Si Ni San (chest) to Wu Yao-Xiang Fu-Yan Hu Suo (abdomen) — location sets the assistants; the treatment of accumulation-masses distantly inherits Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan (gently dissolving concretions) and Bie Jia Jian Wan's intent, the dosage form changed to a decoction for speed.
Cautions
Where accumulation-masses are chronic with the upright deficient, attack and supplement together, not pure attack; shunned in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home
时方 · 出自《医学心悟》（程国彭） — 承经方血缘，见下方血缘栏Later formula from Yixue Xinwu (Cheng Guopeng) — jingfang lineage traced below.

消瘰丸Xiao Luo Wan

时方Later Formula
方证抓手
瘰疬痰核（颈项结块）咽干、舌红脉弦滑略数
气机病机
