甘，平。归脾、胃、大肠经。
气机定位
降 · 润（润肠通便）
方中之职
多脂质润，滋脾润肠而通便——通便药中最平和者，专主津亏肠燥之便硬（脾约证），老人虚人皆宜。
所在方
麻子仁丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · moisten
Role in Formula
Oily and moist, enriching the Spleen and moistening the bowel to free the stool — the most even of the stool-freeing herbs, treating the hard stool of fluid-depletion dry bowel (the Spleen-bind pattern) specifically, apt for the aged and deficient.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

竹叶Zhu Ye

Phyllostachydis Folium
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：淡竹叶（后世常代）
性味归经
甘、淡，寒。归心、肺、胃经。
气机定位
出 · 清（轻清透泄）
竹之叶，甘淡而寒，体轻气清——清热药中最轻的一员：透余热而不伤正（竹叶石膏汤）、清暑热而不碍虚（伤暑篇两方）、导心火从小便去而不苦寒败胃。凡热势已非鼎盛、正气已见亏虚之局，重剂寒凉皆嫌其过，竹叶恰补这一档——“轻可去实”在清法中的代表。
功用与机理
清热除烦
余热虚烦、暑热扰心，竹叶轻清透之。
生津利尿
导热从小便去而兼护津——后世导赤散之源意。
经典药对
配 石膏 — 轻重相配
膏清其盛、叶透其余——竹叶石膏汤之双清结构。
配 麦门冬 — 清养相合
叶清其热、冬养其阴，热病尾声的标准搭档。
类药鉴别
石膏栀子
所在方
竹叶石膏汤竹叶石膏汤（伤暑篇用）人参石膏汤竹叶石膏杏子甘草汤银翘散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bland, cold. Enters the Heart, Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · clear
The leaf of bamboo, sweet-bland and cold, light-substanced and clear in qi — the lightest of heat-clearing herbs: venting residual heat without harming the upright (Zhu Ye Shi Gao Tang), clearing summer-heat without hindering deficiency (the two summer-damage formulas), conducting Heart fire out through urine without bitter-cold spoiling the stomach. Wherever the heat is no longer at its peak and the upright shows depletion, heavy cold-cool herbs are all too much, and Zhu Ye fills exactly this gradation — the representative of "the light can remove the replete" within the clearing method.
Functions & Mechanism
Clear heat, remove vexation
For residual-heat deficiency-vexation and summer-heat harassing the Heart, Zhu Ye light-clears and vents it.
Engender fluid, promote urination
Conducting heat out through urine while protecting fluid — the source idea of the later Dao Chi San.
Classic Pairings
with Shi Gao — Pairing light with heavy
Shi Gao clears its exuberance, Zhu Ye vents its residue — the dual-clearing structure of Zhu Ye Shi Gao Tang.
with Mai Men Dong — Clearing and nourishing combined
Zhu Ye clears its heat, Mai Dong nourishes its yin, the standard partnership for the tail end of febrile disease.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

粳米Jing Mi

Oryzae Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘，平。归脾、胃经。
气机定位
中 · 养（养胃护津）
方中之职
谷气之正，养胃气、生胃津。大寒之剂（白虎辈）中以米熟汤成为度——护住中焦这口锅，寒药乃可放胆用。
所在方
白虎汤白虎加人参汤竹叶石膏汤麦门冬汤白虎加地黄汤竹叶石膏汤（伤暑篇用）白虎加黄连阿胶汤白虎加桂枝人参芍药汤泻白散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Spleen, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Centering · nourish
Role in Formula
The upright of grain qi, nourishing stomach qi and engendering stomach fluid. In greatly cold formulas (the Bai Hu class) the rice being cooked to soup-readiness is the measure — guarding the middle-burner cauldron, so the cold herbs can be used boldly.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

泽泻Ze Xie

Alismatis Rhizoma
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
甘、淡，寒。归肾、膀胱经。
气机定位
降 · 泄（直泄下焦水湿）
甘淡渗利而性寒，在利水三将（苓、猪苓、泽泻）中走得最深——直达肾与膀胱，泄下焦停蓄之水兼泄水中郁伏之热。茯苓利水兼宁心健脾（多一分“守”），猪苓专渗无补（纯一分“利”），泽泻则深而带泄（下焦为地盘）。五苓散中独重用为君，即取其直捣水蓄之巢。
功用与机理
利水渗湿
导下焦停水从小便出，五苓、猪苓汤皆倚之。
泄热
水停久郁之热随水而泄；饮邪冒眩者泽泻汤重用之（金匮：心下有支饮，其人苦冒眩）。
经典药对
配 白术 — 泽泻汤
泽泻五两泄其饮，白术二两运其脾——支饮冒眩之专方，一泄一运（后批杂病详展）。
配 茯苓 — 渗利相须
苓守中兼渗，泽直下而泄，深浅两层合围停水。
类药鉴别
茯苓 · 猪苓 · 泽泻利水药选用茯苓猪苓
所在方
五苓散猪苓汤肾气丸泽泻汤当归芍药散猪苓加黄连牡丹汤地黄黄柏秦皮茯苓泽泻汤猪苓加人参汤六味地黄丸知柏地黄丸杞菊地黄丸龙胆泻肝汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bland, cold. Enters the Kidney, Bladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · discharge
Sweet-bland percolating and draining, cold in nature, traveling deepest among the three water-draining generals (Fu Ling, Zhu Ling, Ze Xie) — reaching straight to the Kidney and bladder, draining the lower-burner lodged water and the heat lurking within it. Fu Ling drains water while also quieting the Heart and fortifying the Spleen (a measure more of "guarding"), Zhu Ling percolates purely without supplementing (a pure measure of "draining"), Ze Xie is deep with a draining edge (the lower burner its domain). Its heavy sovereign use in Wu Ling San takes precisely its charge straight into the water-amassment nest.
Functions & Mechanism
Drain water, percolate damp
Conducting lower-burner lodged water out through urine, relied on by Wu Ling and Zhu Ling Tang.
Drain heat
Heat from long-lodged water draining out with the water; for rheum-pathogen clouding-dizziness, Ze Xie Tang uses it in heavy dose (Jin Gui: propping rheum below the heart, the person suffering clouding-dizziness).
Classic Pairings
with Bai Zhu — Ze Xie Tang
Ze Xie five liang drains its rheum, Bai Zhu two liang transports the Spleen — the specialist formula for propping-rheum clouding-dizziness, one draining, one transporting.
with Fu Ling — Percolating and draining reinforcing each other
Fu Ling guards the middle while percolating, Ze Xie descends straight down and drains, encircling lodged water at both the shallow and deep layers.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

猪苓Zhu Ling

Polyporus
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
甘、淡，平。归肾、膀胱经。
气机定位
降 · 渗（专职渗利）
多孔菌核，甘淡而平——利水三将中最纯之一员：无补益、无寒温之偏，渗利之力却胜茯苓。凡需要纯粹“排水”而不需兼职者用之；其平性使它寒热两适：五苓（寒滞）与猪苓汤（热结）两阵皆在列，随配伍而变阵。
功用与机理
利水渗湿
小便不利、水湿停蓄，猪苓专司渗泄——较茯苓利力更专。
经典药对
配 茯苓 — 二苓相须
苓守中兼渗、猪苓纯渗，深浅两层合力。
配 滑石 — 渗利清热
猪苓渗其水、滑石清其热——水热互结之对（猪苓汤）。
类药鉴别
茯苓 · 猪苓 · 泽泻利水药选用茯苓泽泻
所在方
五苓散猪苓汤猪苓加黄连牡丹汤猪苓加人参汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bland, neutral. Enters the Kidney, Bladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · percolate damp
A porous fungal sclerotium, sweet-bland and even — the purest of the three water-draining generals: no supplementation, no cold-warm bias, yet its percolating-draining force exceeds Fu Ling's. Used wherever pure "drainage" is needed without a second job; its even nature suits it to both cold and heat: it stands in both Wu Ling (cold stagnation) and Zhu Ling Tang (heat bind), changing array with the combination.
Functions & Mechanism
Drain water, percolate damp
For inhibited urination and lodged water-damp, Zhu Ling specializes in percolating-draining — more focused in draining force than Fu Ling.
Classic Pairings
with Fu Ling — The two Ling reinforcing each other
Fu Ling guards the middle while percolating, Zhu Ling percolates purely, the shallow and deep layers combining force.
with Hua Shi — Percolate water, clear heat
Zhu Ling percolates its water, Hua Shi clears its heat — the pair for water-heat binding (Zhu Ling Tang).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

滑石Hua Shi

Talcum
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
甘、淡，寒。归膀胱、肺、胃经。
气机定位
降 · 滑（清热利窍）
甘淡而寒、质滑体重：“滑以利窍”一性三用——利水道（猪苓汤／八正散之通淋）、清湿热（宣痹汤之利痹）、解暑热（六一散之君：滑石六甘草一，暑月身热烦渴小便不利一方兜住）。它的本事在“给邪开门”：湿与热胶结无路可出时，滑石把小便这扇门滑开——利水阵中最“快”的一员，而甘淡之性使它快而不峻。
功用与机理
利水通淋
湿热淋痛、小便不利——滑利窍道，猪苓汤／八正散两代利水阵之通用件。
清热利湿
湿温、湿热痹（宣痹汤）——分消湿热从小便去。
解暑
暑热烦渴溲赤——六一散之君：清暑利湿一石二鸟。
经典药对
配 猪苓 — 利水双滑
猪苓渗、滑石滑——猪苓汤水热互结之通道组。
配 甘草 — 六一之比
滑六草一：利而不伤、清而带缓——比例语法又一例。
类药鉴别
利水药选用猪苓泽泻通草
所在方
猪苓汤猪苓加黄连牡丹汤猪苓加人参汤八正散宣痹汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bland, cold. Enters the Bladder, Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · lubricate
Sweet-bland and cold, slippery-substanced and heavy: "slippery to benefit the orifices," one nature three uses — benefiting the water passages (the strangury-freeing of Zhu Ling Tang / Ba Zheng San), clearing damp-heat (the bi-freeing of Xuan Bi Tang), resolving summer-heat (the sovereign of Liu Yi San: Hua Shi six to Gan Cao one, catching in one formula the summer body heat, vexing thirst and inhibited urination). Its skill is "opening a door for the pathogen": when damp and heat are glued with no route out, Hua Shi slides open the door of urine — the "fastest" of the water-draining array, its sweet-bland nature making it fast without being fierce.
Functions & Mechanism
Benefit water, free strangury
For damp-heat strangury pain and inhibited urination — sliding and benefiting the orifice-passages, a general part of two generations of water-draining arrays (Zhu Ling Tang / Ba Zheng San).
Clear heat, benefit damp
For damp-warmth and damp-heat bi (Xuan Bi Tang) — separating and dispersing damp-heat out through urine.
Resolve summer-heat
For summer-heat vexing thirst with red urine — the sovereign of Liu Yi San: clearing summer-heat and benefiting damp, two birds one stone.
Classic Pairings
with Zhu Ling — A twin-slippery water-benefiting pair
Zhu Ling percolates, Hua Shi slides — the passage set of Zhu Ling Tang for water-heat binding.
with Gan Cao — The six-to-one ratio
Hua Shi six to Gan Cao one: benefiting without harming, clearing with a measure of moderation — another instance of ratio-grammar.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

阿胶E Jiao

Asini Corii Colla
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：驴皮胶
性味归经
甘，平。归肺、肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 滋（血肉有情，滋阴养血）
驴皮久熬成胶，血肉有情之品——以形补形，直入血分而滋填：滋阴、养血、止血三职一体。其“入”最深最静：利水阵中护阴（猪苓汤）、清火阵中育阴（黄连阿胶汤）、温养阵中补血润燥（温经汤、胶艾汤）——凡阴血这道“防线”告急处，阿胶都是守将。烊化兑服，不入煎。
功用与机理
滋阴养血
阴血亏虚之烦、燥、悸，胶以厚味填之。
止血
崩漏下血、妊娠下血，养血而摄血（胶艾汤为君，后批详展）。
润燥
血虚之燥，润而濡之。
经典药对
配 黄连 — 泻南补北
连折心火于上、胶滋肾水于下——黄连阿胶汤之两极。
配 地黄 — 滋填相济
地黄填精、阿胶养血，滋阴阵中的地基与守将。
类药鉴别
补血药选用地黄麦门冬
所在方
猪苓汤黄连阿胶汤温经汤人参附子汤柏叶阿胶汤黄连茯苓汤地黄知母黄连阿胶汤猪苓加黄连牡丹汤黄连黄芩阿胶甘草汤白虎加黄连阿胶汤猪苓加人参汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Lung, Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · enrich yin
Donkey hide long-simmered into glue, a blood-and-flesh substance — supplementing form with form, entering the blood level directly to enrich and fill: enriching yin, nourishing blood, stopping bleeding, three offices in one. Its "entering" is the deepest and stillest: protecting yin in a water-draining array (Zhu Ling Tang), fostering yin in a fire-clearing array (Huang Lian E Jiao Tang), supplementing blood and moistening dryness in a warm-nourishing array (Wen Jing Tang, Jiao Ai Tang) — wherever the defensive line of yin-blood is in crisis, E Jiao is the guarding general. Melted and stirred in, not decocted.
Functions & Mechanism
Enrich yin, nourish blood
For the vexation, dryness and palpitation of yin-blood depletion, E Jiao with its thick flavor fills it.
Stop bleeding
For flooding and pregnancy bleeding, nourishing blood while containing it (sovereign in Jiao Ai Tang).
Moisten dryness
For dryness of blood deficiency, moistening it.
Classic Pairings
with Huang Lian — Drain the south, supplement the north
Huang Lian cuts Heart fire above, E Jiao enriches Kidney water below — the two poles of Huang Lian E Jiao Tang.
with Di Huang — Enriching and filling aiding each other
Di Huang fills essence, E Jiao nourishes blood, the foundation and guarding general of a yin-enriching array.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

葱白Cong Bai

Allii Fistulosi Bulbus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛，温。归肺、胃经。
气机定位
出 · 通（辛滑通阳）
方中之职
辛温滑利，走窜通达——通的是“阳气之路”而非补阳之体：阴阳格拒之际（白通汤），以其辛滑为姜附之热开出一条接引虚阳的通道。药食同源之品而担回阳阵中之通信兵。
所在方
白通汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · free
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm, slippery and freely coursing — what it frees is the "road of yang qi" rather than the yang-supplementing substance: at the moment of yin-yang blockade-rejection (Bai Tong Tang), its acrid-slipperiness opens a road for ginger-Fu Zi's heat to escort the deficient yang back. A food-medicine substance serving as the signal-runner in the yang-restoring array.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

吴茱萸Wu Zhu Yu

Evodiae Fructus
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：吴萸
性味归经
辛、苦，热，小毒。归肝、脾、胃、肾经。
气机定位
降（温肝降浊）
大辛大热而味兼苦，专入肝经——温里药中唯一以肝为主场者。肝寒则浊阴循经上僭（巅顶痛、呕涎沫）、横犯脾胃（吐利）、下迫少腹（寒疝）——吴茱萸温其脏寒于本位，浊阴失其上逆之根则自降：又一味“以温为降”之药（与桂枝平冲同理而地界在肝）。
功用与机理
温肝暖胃、降逆止呕
肝胃虚寒之干呕吐涎沫、巅顶头痛，吴萸直入其脏而温之。
温中止泻
脾肾虚寒之久泻（后世四神丸倚之）。
散寒止痛
寒疝腹痛、经行冷痛，温肝散下焦之寒（温经汤为君）。
经典药对
配 生姜 — 温降相须
吴萸温其脏、生姜散其逆——吴茱萸汤中生姜六两为全书之最，专任降浊。
配 黄连 — 辛开苦降之变局
后世左金丸：连六萸一，清肝火而以萸之辛热反佐防格拒——寒热比例倒置的活用。
类药鉴别
吴茱萸 · 干姜 · 附子干姜附子
所在方
吴茱萸汤温经汤当归四逆加吴茱萸生姜附子汤左金丸四神丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, hot, mildly toxic. Enters the Liver, Spleen, Stomach, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending
Greatly acrid and greatly hot with a bitter flavor too, entering the Liver channel specifically — the only warm-the-interior herb whose main field is the Liver. Liver cold lets turbid yin usurp upward along the channel (vertex pain, vomiting of foam), transgress the Spleen-Stomach transversely (vomiting and diarrhea), and press down on the lower abdomen (cold mounting hernia) — Wu Zhu Yu warms the visceral cold at its home position, and the turbid yin, losing its root for counterflowing up, descends of itself: another herb of "descending through warming" (the same principle as Gui Zhi calming the surge, but with the Liver as its territory).
Functions & Mechanism
Warm the Liver and stomach, descend counterflow, stop retching
For dry retching, vomiting of foam and vertex headache of Liver-stomach deficiency-cold, Wu Zhu Yu enters that viscus directly and warms it.
Warm the middle, stop diarrhea
For chronic diarrhea of Spleen-Kidney deficiency-cold (relied on by the later Si Shen Wan).
Disperse cold, stop pain
For cold-hernia abdominal pain and cold menstrual pain, warming the Liver and dispersing lower-burner cold (sovereign in Wen Jing Tang).
Classic Pairings
with Sheng Jiang — Warming and descending reinforcing each other
Wu Zhu Yu warms its viscus, Sheng Jiang disperses its counterflow — the six-liang Sheng Jiang in Wu Zhu Yu Tang is the heaviest in the whole text, tasked with descending the turbid.
with Huang Lian — A variant of acrid-opening bitter-descending
The later Zuo Jin Wan: Huang Lian six to Wu Zhu Yu one, clearing Liver fire with Wu Zhu Yu's acrid-heat as counter-assistant to prevent rejection — a live use of inverted cold-heat ratio.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

地黄Di Huang

Rehmanniae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：干地黄、生地黄
性味归经
甘，寒（干者微寒）。归心、肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 填（滋阴填精）
甘寒多汁，质润而重，直入下焦填补真阴——滋阴药中的地基级：肾气丸八两冠首、炙甘草汤一斤为最（后批详展）、胶艾汤养血皆倚之。阴者阳之宅，填其阴正所以安其阳——肾气丸以大剂地黄承载一点桂附，即“阴中求阳”之式。
功用与机理
滋肾填精
肾阴亏之腰痛、消渴、虚劳，地黄补其本。
养血凉血
血分之虚与热，生用凉血、干用滋养（炮制分档）。
经典药对
配 泽泻 — 补泻相配
肾气丸三补三泻之首对：地黄填其精，泽泻泄其浊——补药身边站一个清道夫，补而不滞。
类药鉴别
补血药选用清热药选用麦门冬阿胶
所在方
肾气丸大黄香蒲汤地黄知母黄连阿胶汤大黄黄芩地黄牡丹汤地黄黄柏秦皮茯苓泽泻汤白虎加地黄汤百合地黄牡丹皮半夏茯苓汤百合地黄加牡蛎汤地黄黄柏黄连半夏汤地黄黄柏茯苓栝蒌汤桔梗甘草枳实芍药加地黄牡丹汤六味地黄丸知柏地黄丸杞菊地黄丸左归丸右归丸一贯煎桃红四物汤血府逐瘀汤益胃汤增液汤养阴清肺汤龙胆泻肝汤清胃散玉女煎独活寄生汤天王补心丹
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, cold (slightly cold when dried). Enters the Heart, Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · fill essence
Sweet-cold and full of juice, moist-substanced and heavy, entering the lower burner directly to fill and supplement true yin — foundation-grade among yin-enriching herbs: Shen Qi Wan crowns it at eight liang, Zhi Gan Cao Tang uses the most at one jin, and Jiao Ai Tang's blood-nourishing all rely on it. Yin is yang's dwelling, and filling the yin is precisely how to settle the yang — Shen Qi Wan carrying a touch of Gui-Fu on a great dose of Di Huang is the very form of "seeking yang within yin."
Functions & Mechanism
Enrich the Kidney, fill essence
For low-back pain, wasting-thirst and taxation of Kidney-yin depletion, Di Huang supplements its root.
Nourish and cool blood
For blood-level deficiency and heat, raw it cools blood, dried it enriches and nourishes (the processing sets the gradation).
Classic Pairings
with Ze Xie — Supplementing and draining paired
The first of Shen Qi Wan's three-supplement three-drain pairs: Di Huang fills its essence, Ze Xie drains its turbidity — a street-sweeper standing beside the supplementing herb, supplementing without stagnation.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

川芎Chuan Xiong

Chuanxiong Rhizoma
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：芎䓖
性味归经
辛，温。归肝、胆、心包经。
气机定位
升 · 行（血中气药）
辛温香窜，升散走动，“血中气药”四字是其全部纲领——血属阴主静，芎以气行之：上行头目（头痛要药）、下行血海（调经行滞）、旁达四肢。它在补血静药阵中的角色如发动机：归芍胶地皆静，得芎则活——酸枣仁汤、当归芍药散、温经汤三方一以贯之的“静中一动”。
功用与机理
活血行气
血滞气郁之痛（头痛、胁痛、经行不畅），芎行而散之。
祛风止痛
辛散上行，风袭头目之痛尤宜——后世“头痛不离川芎”。
经典药对
配 当归 — 归芎相偕
归补而芎行，补血不滞——血家最常之对。
配 芍药 — 动静相制
芎散芍敛，行血而不破血。
类药鉴别
当归 · 川芎 · 芍药活血药选用当归芍药
所在方
酸枣仁汤当归芍药散温经汤柴胡疏肝散桃红四物汤血府逐瘀汤身痛逐瘀汤补阳还五汤独活寄生汤生化汤膈下逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Liver, Gallbladder, Pericardium channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Ascending · move
Acrid-warm, aromatic and boring-through, ascending-dispersing and moving, the four words "qi-herb within the blood" are its whole outline — blood belongs to yin and governs stillness, and Chuan Xiong moves it with qi: ascending to the head and eyes (a headache essential), descending to the sea of blood (regulating menses, moving stagnation), reaching out to the four limbs. Its role in a blood-nourishing still-herb array is like an engine: Dang Gui, Shao Yao, E Jiao and Di Huang are all still, and with Chuan Xiong they come alive — the "one mover amid stillness" consistent across Suan Zao Ren Tang, Dang Gui Shao Yao San and Wen Jing Tang.
Functions & Mechanism
Invigorate blood, move qi
For pain of blood stagnation and qi constraint (headache, hypochondriac pain, uneven menses), Chuan Xiong moves and disperses it.
Expel wind, stop pain
Acrid-dispersing and ascending, especially apt for pain of wind assailing the head and eyes — later, "headache never departs from Chuan Xiong."
Classic Pairings
with Dang Gui — Dang Gui and Chuan Xiong together
Dang Gui supplements and Chuan Xiong moves, supplementing blood without stagnation — the most frequent pair of the blood family.
with Shao Yao — Movement and stillness checking each other
Chuan Xiong disperses, Shao Yao gathers, moving blood without breaking it.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

山药Shan Yao

Dioscoreae Rhizoma
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：薯蓣
性味归经
甘，平。归脾、肺、肾经。
气机定位
中 · 固（平补脾肺肾）
甘平质润，脾肺肾三补而带一分涩性——补药中罕见的“补涩同体”：补脾而止泻（参苓白术散）、益肾而固精缩尿（肾气丸、缩泉丸）、养肺而助纳气。它的性格是“守”：不温不燥不峻，久服可任——薯蓣丸以之为君治虚劳百疾，正取其平和可久。三补三泻结构中它守脾之位（配茯苓之泻），地黄法系全谱一员不缺。
功用与机理
补脾止泻
脾虚食少便溏久泻——甘补而涩敛，补涩一体（参苓白术散借其固）。
益肾固精
肾虚遗精尿频带下——固摄下元之平补子（肾气丸三补之一、缩泉丸之底）。
养肺益阴
肺虚久咳虚喘——培土生金之实体化，兼滋肺阴。
经典药对
配 茯苓 — 一补一渗
山药守补、茯苓渗泄——三补三泻的脾家一对。
配 山茱萸 — 脾肝肾三固
山药固脾肾之精、山萸固肝肾之脱——肾气丸双臣。
配 莲子 — 补涩实肠
两味皆补涩同体——脾虚久泻之参苓白术散核心组。
类药鉴别
补气药选用白术莲子山茱萸
所在方
肾气丸参苓白术散六味地黄丸知柏地黄丸杞菊地黄丸左归丸右归丸缩泉丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Spleen, Lung, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Centering · consolidate
Sweet-even and moist-substanced, supplementing Spleen, Lung and Kidney with a measure of astringency — a rare "supplement-and-astringe in one body" among supplements: supplementing the Spleen and stopping diarrhea (Shen Ling Bai Zhu San), boosting the Kidney and consolidating essence and contracting urine (Shen Qi Wan, Suo Quan Wan), nourishing the Lung and aiding qi-grasping. Its character is "guarding": neither warm, drying nor fierce, it bears long use — Shu Yu Wan takes it as sovereign to treat the hundred ills of taxation, precisely for its even, enduring nature. In the three-supplement three-drain structure it guards the Spleen position (paired with Fu Ling's draining), not one member short of the Dihuang lineage's full spectrum.
Functions & Mechanism
Supplement the Spleen, stop diarrhea
For reduced appetite, loose stool and chronic diarrhea of Spleen deficiency — sweet-supplementing and astringing, supplement and astringe in one (Shen Ling Bai Zhu San borrows its consolidation).
Boost the Kidney, consolidate essence
For seminal emission, urinary frequency and discharge of Kidney deficiency — the even-supplementing herb that consolidates the lower origin (one of Shen Qi Wan's three supplements, the base of Suo Quan Wan).
Nourish the Lung, boost yin
For chronic cough and deficiency wheeze of Lung deficiency — the embodiment of banking earth to engender metal, also enriching Lung yin.
Classic Pairings
with Fu Ling — One supplementing, one percolating
Shan Yao guards and supplements, Fu Ling percolates and drains — a Spleen-family pair of the three-supplement three-drain.
with Shan Zhu Yu — Triple consolidation of Spleen, Liver and Kidney
Shan Yao consolidates Spleen-Kidney essence, Shan Zhu Yu consolidates Liver-Kidney desertion — the twin ministers of Shen Qi Wan.
with Lian Zi — Supplement and astringe, firm the gut
Both herbs supplement and astringe in one — the core set of Shen Ling Bai Zhu San for Spleen-deficiency chronic diarrhea.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

山茱萸Shan Zhu Yu

Corni Fructus
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：山萸肉
性味归经
酸，微温。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 敛（酸收固脱）
酸温质润入肝肾，“补”与“敛”一身两职：补肝肾之精血、敛将脱之气阴——肾气丸三补中它守肝之位（配丹皮之泻），而张锡纯发其大用：救脱之力“较参芪尤捷”（来复汤以萸肉二两敛元气之涣散）。凡下焦之滑（遗精滑泄、小便不禁、崩漏、大汗虚脱）皆其地界——酸收的哲学在补药中的化身。
功用与机理
补益肝肾
肝肾亏虚之腰膝酸软、头晕耳鸣——地黄法系全谱之臣（六味、左右归皆在）。
收敛固脱
遗精滑泄、崩漏带下、大汗欲脱——酸敛之性直接抓住“脱”之势。
经典药对
配 地黄 — 滋敛相成
地黄滋其体、山萸敛其用——肾气丸君臣原配。
配 牡丹皮 — 一补一泻
山萸温敛、丹皮凉泻——三补三泻的肝家一对，敛而不留瘀。
配 五味子 — 双酸固脱
两味皆酸收——气阴两脱之局并肩。
类药鉴别
五味子山药龙骨
所在方
肾气丸六味地黄丸知柏地黄丸杞菊地黄丸左归丸右归丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sour, slightly warm. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · astringe
Sour-warm and moist-substanced, entering the Liver and Kidney, holding "supplementing" and "gathering" as two offices in one body: supplementing Liver-Kidney essence-blood, gathering the about-to-desert qi and yin — among Shen Qi Wan's three supplements it guards the Liver position (paired with Mu Dan Pi's draining), and Zhang Xichun developed its great use: its desertion-rescuing power "swifter even than ginseng and Huang Qi" (Lai Fu Tang uses two liang of the flesh to gather the dispersing original qi). All lower-burner slippage (seminal emission, incontinence, flooding, great sweating with desertion) is its territory — the philosophy of sour-gathering incarnated in a supplement.
Functions & Mechanism
Supplement Liver and Kidney
For aching lower back and knees, dizziness and tinnitus of Liver-Kidney depletion — the minister across the Dihuang lineage's full spectrum (present in Liu Wei, Zuo Gui and You Gui).
Gather and consolidate desertion
For seminal emission, flooding, discharge and great sweating verging on desertion — the sour-gathering nature grips the momentum of "desertion" directly.
Classic Pairings
with Di Huang — Enriching and gathering completing each other
Di Huang enriches its body, Shan Zhu Yu gathers its function — the original sovereign-minister pair of Shen Qi Wan.
with Mu Dan Pi — One supplementing, one draining
Shan Zhu Yu warm-gathers, Mu Dan Pi cool-drains — a Liver-family pair of the three-supplement three-drain, gathering without retaining stasis.
with Wu Wei Zi — Twin-sour consolidation of desertion
Both herbs sour-gather — standing shoulder to shoulder for the situation of qi and yin both deserting.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

牡丹皮Mu Dan Pi

Moutan Cortex
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：丹皮
性味归经
苦、辛，微寒。归心、肝、肾经。
气机定位
出 · 凉（凉血散瘀）
苦辛微寒，花木之皮而走血分——血分药中的“两面手”：凉血而不留瘀（辛能散）、散瘀而不动血（寒能凉），故血分之郁热、伏火、瘀滞交织处最见其功。肾气丸中清肝肾之伏火以制山萸之温，温经汤中化瘀兼清那一缕上浮之虚热——它总是在“温补阵中管着火”。
功用与机理
清热凉血
血分郁热、阴分伏火（无汗骨蒸），丹皮凉而透之。
活血散瘀
瘀血经闭、癥瘕（桂枝茯苓丸之列，后批详展），辛散其滞。
经典药对
配 桃仁 — 凉散相合
桃仁破其瘀、丹皮凉其血——化瘀而不助热之对。
配 山茱萸 — 敛泻相制
肾气丸三泻之一：萸敛而温、丹泻而凉，相反相成。
类药鉴别
清热药选用桃仁栀子
所在方
肾气丸温经汤桂枝茯苓丸柏叶阿胶汤小柴胡加黄连牡丹汤大黄香蒲汤大黄黄芩地黄牡丹汤黄连黄芩栀子牡丹芍药汤猪苓加黄连牡丹汤桂枝去桂加黄芩牡丹汤百合地黄牡丹皮半夏茯苓汤黄芩牡丹皮栝蒌半夏枳实汤桔梗甘草枳实芍药加地黄牡丹汤六味地黄丸知柏地黄丸杞菊地黄丸丹栀逍遥散养阴清肺汤清胃散膈下逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, acrid, slightly cold. Enters the Heart, Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · cool blood
Bitter-acrid and slightly cold, the bark of a flowering shrub yet traveling the blood level — the "two-faced hand" of blood-level herbs: cooling blood without retaining stasis (acridity can disperse), dispersing stasis without stirring blood (coldness can cool), so it shows its merit most where blood-level constrained heat, latent fire and stasis interweave. In Shen Qi Wan it clears Liver-Kidney latent fire to check Shan Zhu Yu's warmth, in Wen Jing Tang it transforms stasis while clearing that thread of floating deficiency-heat — always "managing fire within a warming array."
Functions & Mechanism
Clear heat, cool blood
For blood-level constrained heat and yin-level latent fire (sweatless steaming-bone), Mu Dan Pi cools with venting.
Invigorate blood, disperse stasis
For stasis blocked menses and concretions (in the Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan line), acridly dispersing its stagnation.
Classic Pairings
with Tao Ren — Cooling and dispersing combined
Tao Ren breaks its stasis, Mu Dan Pi cools its blood — a pair transforming stasis without abetting heat.
with Shan Zhu Yu — Gathering and draining checking each other
One of Shen Qi Wan's three drains: Shan Zhu Yu gathers and warms, Mu Dan Pi drains and cools, opposing yet completing each other.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

薤白Xie Bai

Allii Macrostemonis Bulbus
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：薤白头
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归心、肺、胃、大肠经。
气机定位
通 · 滑（通阳散结）
辛苦而温，滑利通降——胸中阳气之“开路者”：胸痹之病，阴浊痹阻阳位，薤白辛以散其凝、温以助其阳、滑以利其行，三性合而“通阳散结”。与葱白同科而分工判然：葱白在少阴接引被格之阳（白通汤），薤白在胸中扫荡痹阻之阴（栝楼薤白诸方）——一个通“上下之格”，一个通“胸中之痹”。滑利又能下行，泄利下重者借其滑（四逆散加薤白）。
功用与机理
通阳散结
胸痹之胸背痛、短气，薤白散阴凝而复胸阳——胸痹诸方之魂。
行气导滞
滑利下行，泄利下重之气滞借以通泄。
经典药对
配 栝楼实 — 涤痰通阳
蒌涤其浊、薤通其阳——扫云见日之对。
配 葱白 — 葱薤之辨
同科异任：葱通格拒于少阴，薤散痹阻于胸中。
类药鉴别
葱白桂枝
所在方
栝楼薤白白酒汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Heart, Lung, Stomach, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Freeing · lubricate
Acrid-bitter and warm, slippery and freeing-descending — the "road-opener" for chest yang qi: in chest bi, yin-turbidity obstructs the yang position, and Xie Bai acridly disperses its congelation, warmly aids its yang, slipperily benefits its movement, the three natures combining into "freeing yang and dissipating bind." Of the same genus as Cong Bai but distinctly divided: Cong Bai conducts the blockaded yang in Shao Yin (Bai Tong Tang), Xie Bai sweeps the obstructing yin in the chest (the Gua Lou Xie Bai formulas) — one frees the "blockade of above and below," the other the "bi of the chest." Slippery and downward too, it borrows its slipperiness for diarrhea with heaviness below (Si Ni San plus Xie Bai).
Functions & Mechanism
Free yang, dissipate binds
For chest-and-back pain and shortness of breath of chest bi, Xie Bai disperses the yin-congelation and restores chest yang — the soul of the chest-bi formulas.
Move qi, conduct stagnation
Slippery and downward, the qi stagnation of diarrhea with heaviness below is freed by it.
Classic Pairings
with Gua Lou Shi — Sweep phlegm, free yang
Gua Lou sweeps its turbidity, Xie Bai frees its yang — the pair that sweeps the clouds to reveal the sun.
with Cong Bai — Distinguishing Cong Bai and Xie Bai
Same genus, different offices: Cong Bai frees the blockade-rejection in Shao Yin, Xie Bai disperses the obstruction in the chest.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

酸枣仁Suan Zao Ren

Ziziphi Spinosae Semen
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：枣仁
性味归经
甘、酸，平。归肝、胆、心经。
气机定位
入 · 养（养肝血安魂）
酸枣之仁，甘酸而平，质润多脂——肝藏血、血舍魂：魂之安否全系于肝血之盈亏。枣仁直入肝家，以甘润养其血、以酸收敛其魂，是“养血安神”一路的君药级人物（酸枣仁汤二升冠首）。与重镇安神（龙牡）分属两路：彼镇浮越之标，此养血虚之本——虚烦不眠者养，惊狂躁越者镇。
功用与机理
养肝安神
肝血虚之虚烦不得眠、心悸，枣仁养血以归魂。
敛汗生津
酸收之性兼摄虚汗（虚劳盗汗）。
经典药对
配 知母 — 养清相济
枣仁养其血、知母清其虚烦——酸枣仁汤之纲。
配 川芎 — 静中一动
大队养血药中置一味行药，补而不滞。
类药鉴别
安神药选用龙骨麦门冬
所在方
酸枣仁汤归脾汤天王补心丹
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, sour, neutral. Enters the Liver, Gallbladder, Heart channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · nourish
The kernel of the sour jujube, sweet-sour and even, moist-substanced and oily — the Liver stores blood and blood houses the ethereal soul: whether the soul is settled hinges entirely on the fullness of Liver blood. Suan Zao Ren enters the Liver directly, nourishing its blood with sweet-moistness and gathering its soul with sourness, a sovereign-grade figure of the "nourish blood, calm the spirit" line (Suan Zao Ren Tang crowns it at two sheng). It and heavy-subduing spirit-calming (Long-Mu) belong to two lines: that subdues the floating branch, this nourishes the deficient root — nourish for deficiency-vexation sleeplessness, subdue for fright, mania and agitation.
Functions & Mechanism
Nourish the Liver, calm the spirit
For deficiency-vexation sleeplessness and palpitation of Liver-blood deficiency, Suan Zao Ren nourishes blood to return the ethereal soul.
Gather sweat, engender fluid
The sour-gathering nature also restrains deficiency sweat (taxation night sweats).
Classic Pairings
with Zhi Mu — Nourishing and clearing aiding each other
Suan Zao Ren nourishes its blood, Zhi Mu clears its deficiency-vexation — the outline of Suan Zao Ren Tang.
with Chuan Xiong — One mover amid stillness
Placing one moving herb amid a board of blood-nourishing herbs, supplementing without stagnation.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

茵陈蒿Yin Chen Hao

Artemisiae Scopariae Herba
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：茵陈
性味归经
苦，微寒。归脾、胃、肝、胆经。
气机定位
降 · 利（利湿退黄专药）
蒿之嫩苗，苦而微寒，气清芬芳——专入肝胆脾胃而解“湿热之胶结”：湿热相合如油入面，寻常清热药解不开这种缠结，茵陈禀春生发陈之气，能分解湿热使各归其道（湿从小便去、热随之泄），故为退黄专药：阳黄为君（茵陈蒿汤），阴黄亦不弃（茵陈术附配温药）——黄必用茵陈，寒热定于配伍。
功用与机理
利湿退黄
湿热熏蒸之黄疸，茵陈解其胶结、利之从小便去——先煮以取其专。
清利肝胆
肝胆湿热之口苦胁胀溲赤，清而利之。
经典药对
配 栀子 — 分消湿热
茵陈解其结、栀子导之从小便——退黄之核心二味。
配 大黄 — 前后分消
加大黄则湿热自大便亦有出路——茵陈蒿汤三味之局。
类药鉴别
栀子滑石
所在方
茵陈蒿汤镇肝熄风汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, slightly cold. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Liver, Gallbladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · drain damp
The tender shoot of Artemisia, bitter and slightly cold, clear in qi and fragrant — entering the Liver, Gallbladder, Spleen and stomach specifically to resolve the "glued bind of damp-heat": damp joining heat is like oil into flour, and ordinary heat-clearing herbs cannot untangle this snarl; Yin Chen, holding the spring's engendering-and-renewing qi, can dissolve damp-heat so each returns to its road (damp out through urine, heat draining with it), hence the jaundice specialist: sovereign for yang jaundice (Yin Chen Hao Tang), not abandoned for yin jaundice either (Yin Chen with Bai Zhu-Fu Zi and warm herbs) — jaundice must use Yin Chen, cold or heat settled by the combination.
Functions & Mechanism
Benefit damp, abate jaundice
For jaundice of damp-heat steaming, Yin Chen resolves its glued bind and drains it out through urine — boiled first to take its focus.
Clear and benefit Liver-Gallbladder
For bitter taste, hypochondriac distension and red urine of Liver-Gallbladder damp-heat, clearing and benefiting it.
Classic Pairings
with Zhi Zi — Separate and disperse damp-heat
Yin Chen resolves its bind, Zhi Zi conducts it out through urine — the core two herbs for abating jaundice.
with Da Huang — Separate front and back
Adding Da Huang gives damp-heat an exit through the stool as well — the arrangement of Yin Chen Hao Tang's three herbs.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桃仁Tao Ren

Persicae Semen
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
苦、甘，平。归心、肝、大肠经。
气机定位
降 · 破（活血破瘀）
桃之仁，苦泄甘缓而质润——“破”字当头的血分主力：瘀血已成有形之结（少腹急结、癥瘕、经闭），非行气和血之品所能动，桃仁苦以泄其滞、脂以润其行，直入血络破其凝结。桃核承气、抵当、桂枝茯苓丸、大黄牡丹汤——凡瘀之有形处皆其阵地。质润又滑肠，瘀而兼便结者一举两得。孕妇忌。
功用与机理
活血破瘀
蓄血、经闭、癥瘕诸有形之瘀，桃仁破而下之。
润肠通便
脂润下行，肠燥便结兼瘀者宜。
经典药对
配 大黄 — 逐瘀下行
桃破其瘀、黄导其下——瘀血从大便去之路（桃核承气）。
配 牡丹皮 — 凉散相合
破瘀而不助热。
类药鉴别
活血药选用牡丹皮当归
所在方
桃核承气汤桂枝茯苓丸桃红四物汤血府逐瘀汤身痛逐瘀汤补阳还五汤生化汤膈下逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, sweet, neutral. Enters the Heart, Liver, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · break stasis
The kernel of the peach, bitter-draining, sweet-moderating and moist-substanced — a blood-level main force with "breaking" at the head: blood stasis already formed into a tangible bind (urgent lower-abdomen binding, concretions, blocked menses) cannot be moved by qi-moving blood-harmonizing herbs, and Tao Ren bitterly drains its stagnation, oily moistens its movement, entering the blood collaterals directly to break its congelation. Tao He Cheng Qi, Di Dang, Gui Zhi Fu Ling Wan, Da Huang Mu Dan Tang — wherever stasis is tangible is its battlefield. Moist too and loosening the bowel, it hits two birds where stasis comes with bound stool. Shunned in pregnancy.
Functions & Mechanism
Invigorate blood, break stasis
For amassed blood, blocked menses and concretions, any tangible stasis, Tao Ren breaks and drives it down.
Moisten the bowel, free the stool
Oily and moist, downward-flowing, apt for dry-bowel bound stool with stasis.
Classic Pairings
with Da Huang — Expel stasis downward
Tao Ren breaks its stasis, Da Huang conducts it down — the route of blood stasis exiting through the stool (Tao He Cheng Qi).
with Mu Dan Pi — Cooling and dispersing combined
Breaking stasis without abetting heat.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桔梗Jie Geng

Platycodonis Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
苦、辛，平。归肺经。
气机定位
升 · 提（舟楫之药）
辛开苦泄而其性独升——“舟楫之药”四字定其纲：肺居至高，药力难达，桔梗如舟载药上行，开提肺气、宣通门户（咽喉）。提之中自有泄：肺气开则壅者宣、脓者排、咽者利——排脓利咽皆“提”字的下游。与杏仁一升一降，恰是肺之宣肃两翼。
功用与机理
宣肺利咽
邪郁咽喉之痛，桔梗开提肺气以通门户（桔梗汤）。
排脓
肺痈脓成，开提载脓外出——排脓汤散皆倚之。
载药上行
引诸药达于胸膈以上，后世“舟楫”之谓。
经典药对
配 甘草 — 利咽最小方
一提一缓，桔梗汤两味立咽科之祖。
配 杏仁 — 宣降两翼
桔升杏降，肺之治节赖此一开一阖。
类药鉴别
杏仁麦门冬
所在方
桔梗汤黄连黄芩麦冬桔梗甘草汤桔梗甘草枳实芍药汤桔梗甘草枳实芍药加地黄牡丹汤枳实橘皮桔梗半夏生姜甘草汤参苓白术散血府逐瘀汤银翘散桑菊饮天王补心丹藿香正气散杏苏散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, acrid, neutral. Enters the Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Ascending · lift
Acrid-opening and bitter-draining yet unique in its ascending nature — the four words "the oar herb" set its outline: the Lung sits highest and herb-potency reaches it with difficulty, and Jie Geng like a boat carries herbs upward, opening and lifting Lung qi and freeing the gateway (the throat). Within the lifting is draining: Lung qi opened, the congested is diffused, pus is expelled, the throat is benefited — expelling pus and benefiting the throat are downstream of "lift." With Xing Ren, one ascending, one descending, they are precisely the Lung's diffusing-and-depurating two wings.
Functions & Mechanism
Diffuse the Lung, benefit the throat
For throat pain of pathogen constraining the throat, Jie Geng opens and lifts Lung qi to free the gateway (Jie Geng Tang).
Expel pus
For Lung abscess with pus formed, opening and lifting to carry the pus out — Pai Nong Tang and San rely on it.
Carry herbs upward
Guiding the herbs to reach above the chest-diaphragm, the later "oar" designation.
Classic Pairings
with Gan Cao — The smallest throat-benefiting formula
One lifting, one moderating, the two herbs of Jie Geng Tang establish the ancestor of throat medicine.
with Xing Ren — The diffusing-descending two wings
Jie Geng ascends, Xing Ren descends, the Lung's regulation relying on this opening and closing.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

鸡子黄Ji Zi Huang

Galli Vitellus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：蛋黄
性味归经
甘，平。归心、肾经。
气机定位
中 · 交（血肉有情，交通心肾）
方中之职
血肉有情之品，滋阴养血、安中交通心肾——黄连阿胶汤中待药汁小冷后生搅而入（勿煮熟），存其全性以为水火之桥。
所在方
黄连阿胶汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Heart, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Centering · connect
Role in Formula
A blood-flesh animate substance, enriching yin and nourishing blood, quieting the middle and linking Heart and Kidney — in Huang Lian E Jiao Tang, stirred in raw after the decoction has cooled slightly (not boiled), preserving its full nature as the bridge of water and fire.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

白酒Bai Jiu

Vinum Fermentatum
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：清酒、米酒（今代）
性味归经
辛、甘，温。归心、肝、肺、胃经。
气机定位
升 · 行（轻扬载药）
方中之职
古之白酒为米酒之清淡者（非今之烈性蒸馏酒），轻扬善行、通血脉载药上行——栝楼薤白诸方以之煮药助通阳，胶艾汤炙甘草汤以清酒合水煎取其行。今以黄酒、米酒代。
所在方
栝楼薤白白酒汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, sweet, warm. Enters the Heart, Liver, Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Ascending · move
Role in Formula
The white wine of antiquity was the light, mild kind of rice wine (not today's strong distilled liquor), light-rising and good at moving, freeing the blood vessels and carrying herbs upward — the Gua Lou Xie Bai formulas boil the herbs in it to aid freeing yang, and Jiao Ai Tang and Zhi Gan Cao Tang combine clear wine with water to take its moving. Today substitute yellow wine or rice wine.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

黄柏Huang Bo

Phellodendri Cortex
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：黄檗
性味归经
苦，寒。归肾、膀胱、大肠经。
气机定位
降 · 坚（清下焦湿热）
苦寒沉降，三黄之居下者——连折心胃、芩清胆肺、柏清下焦，三兄弟以病位分疆。柏之“下”有两义：一清下焦湿热之实（利、淋、黄、痿），一清阴分伏火之虚（骨蒸盗汗）——与地黄相配（古本三条移肾方一以贯之）即“滋清并进”治下焦之定式，知柏地黄丸千年前的原型骨架。
功用与机理
清下焦湿热
湿热之利、淋、足肿热痛，柏燥而清之。
泻火坚阴
阴分伏火之骨蒸、足热腰痛，柏清其火所以存其阴——乌梅丸中与黄连分清上下两层。
经典药对
配 地黄 — 滋清骨架
地滋其水、柏清其火——古本移肾三方共用之底盘，知柏地黄之源。
配 黄连 — 上下分清
连清上、柏清下，乌梅丸中各守一层。
类药鉴别
清热药选用黄连黄芩秦皮
所在方
白头翁汤桂枝当归汤乌梅丸（古本剂量参照页）地黄黄柏秦皮茯苓泽泻汤地黄黄柏黄连半夏汤地黄黄柏茯苓栝蒌汤知柏地黄丸二仙汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, cold. Enters the Kidney, Bladder, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · firm yin
Bitter-cold and sinking-descending, the low-dwelling one of the three Huang — Huang Lian cuts the Heart-stomach, Huang Qin clears the Gallbladder-Lung, Huang Bai clears the lower burner, the three brothers dividing territory by disease-location. Huang Bai's "below" has two senses: clearing lower-burner damp-heat repletion (diarrhea, strangury, jaundice, atrophy) and clearing yin-level latent-fire deficiency (steaming-bone night sweats) — paired with Di Huang (consistent across the Guilin edition's three Kidney-shifting formulas) it is the fixed form of "enrich and clear together" for the lower burner, the millennium-old prototype skeleton of Zhi Bai Di Huang Wan.
Functions & Mechanism
Clear lower-burner damp-heat
For damp-heat diarrhea, strangury and hot painful foot swelling, Huang Bai dries and clears it.
Drain fire, firm yin
For steaming-bone, hot feet and low-back pain of yin-level latent fire, Huang Bai clears its fire and thereby preserves its yin — in Wu Mei Wan it divides upper and lower layers with Huang Lian.
Classic Pairings
with Di Huang — The enrich-and-clear skeleton
Di Huang enriches its water, Huang Bai clears its fire — the shared foundation of the Guilin edition's three Kidney-shifting formulas, the source of Zhi Bai Di Huang.
with Huang Lian — Separate upper and lower to clear
Huang Lian clears above, Huang Bai clears below, each guarding a layer in Wu Mei Wan.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

柏叶Bai Ye

Platycladi Cacumen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：侧柏叶
性味归经
苦、涩，微寒。归肺、肝、大肠经。
气机定位
入 · 敛（凉血止血）
方中之职
苦涩微寒，凉血分之热而敛其溢——止血要药，上治吐衄（金匮柏叶汤）、下治便血脓血（古本柏叶阿胶汤），与炮姜相配则温凉互制、止血不留瘀。
所在方
人参附子汤柏叶阿胶汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, astringent, slightly cold. Enters the Lung, Liver, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · astringe
Role in Formula
Bitter-astringent and slightly cold, cooling blood-level heat and gathering its overflow — an essential bleeding-stopping herb, treating vomiting and nosebleed above (the Jin Gui Bai Ye Tang) and bloody-purulent stool below (the Guilin edition Bai Ye E Jiao Tang); paired with blast-fried ginger, warm and cool check each other, stopping bleeding without retaining stasis.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

香蒲Xiang Pu

Typhae Herba
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：蒲（蒲黄之草）
性味归经
甘，平（气芳香）。归心、肝经。
气机定位
出 · 透（芳香透心）
方中之职
蒲草之芳香者，古本大黄香蒲汤用之透心开窍、清心经热毒——热毒神昏方中任“透”之一子，芳香开窍法之早期形态。
所在方
大黄香蒲汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral (aromatic). Enters the Heart, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · vent
Role in Formula
The aromatic kind of cattail, used in the Guilin edition Da Huang Xiang Pu Tang to vent the Heart and open the orifices, clearing Heart-channel heat-toxin — the "venting" member in a heat-toxin clouded-spirit formula, an early form of the aromatic orifice-opening method.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

乌梅Wu Mei

Mume Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：梅实
性味归经
酸，平。归肝、脾、肺、大肠经。
气机定位
入 · 敛（酸收之极）
方中之职
酸收第一药：敛肝、安蛔（蛔得酸则静）、涩肠止利、生津止渴——乌梅丸以三百枚苦酒渍之为君，一酸而四用俱出。
所在方
乌梅丸（古本剂量参照页）
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sour, neutral. Enters the Liver, Spleen, Lung, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · astringe
Role in Formula
The foremost sour-gathering herb: gathering the Liver, quieting roundworms (roundworms still with sourness), astringing the intestine to stop diarrhea, engendering fluid to stop thirst — Wu Mei Wan takes three hundred, steeped in vinegar, as sovereign, one sourness yielding four uses at once.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

蜀椒Shu Jiao

Zanthoxyli Pericarpium
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：花椒、川椒
性味归经
辛，热，小毒。归脾、胃、肾经。
气机定位
升 · 温（辛热杀虫）
方中之职
大辛大热，温中散寒、杀虫伏蛔（蛔得辛则伏）——乌梅丸、大建中汤（后批）之要角。炒去汗（微炒出油）而用。
所在方
乌梅丸（古本剂量参照页）
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, hot, mildly toxic. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Ascending · warm
Role in Formula
Greatly acrid and hot, warming the middle and dispersing cold, killing worms and subduing roundworms (roundworms subdued with acridity) — a key player in Wu Mei Wan and Da Jian Zhong Tang. Stir-fried to remove the sweat (lightly fried until the oil emerges) before use.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

秦皮Qin Pi

Fraxini Cortex
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦、涩，寒。归肝、胆、大肠经。
气机定位
降 · 涩（清热坚阴）
方中之职
苦寒而兼涩性——清热燥湿之中自带收敛：热利下重（白头翁汤之臣）、温邪移肾之溲赤（地黄黄柏秦皮汤）皆取其“清而能坚”，寒不滑肠。兼清肝明目（后世洗眼之用）。
所在方
白头翁汤地黄黄柏秦皮茯苓泽泻汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, astringent, cold. Enters the Liver, Gallbladder, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · astringe
Role in Formula
Bitter-cold with an astringent nature — carrying gathering within clearing heat and drying damp: heat-diarrhea with heaviness below (the minister of Bai Tou Weng Tang) and the red urine of warm-pathogen shifting to the Kidney (Di Huang Huang Bai Qin Pi Tang) both take its "clearing yet able to firm," cold without slippery bowel. Also clears the Liver and brightens the eyes (the later eye-wash use).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

百合Bai He

Lilii Bulbus
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
甘，微寒。归心、肺经。
气机定位
入 · 润（润养心肺、清百脉）
百合之瓣，甘润微寒，色白入肺而气通于心——润肺清心、安神定志一身兼之。金匮以之名病（百合病：意欲食复不能食、如寒无寒如热无热、口苦溲赤脉微数——热病后百脉受累之神志恍惚证）又名方，一药系一病，经方中仅此一例。其用法亦独：泉水渍煮、去白沫，取其清润之全性——古本两方（下焦伏热、暑伤肺液）沿用同法。
功用与机理
润肺清心
肺阴伤之声嘶干咳、心营热之烦悸，百合两顾。
清百脉安神
百合病之恍惚不宁——百脉一宗、皆致其病，百合清养其宗。
经典药对
配 地黄 — 百合地黄之核
百合清养其上、地黄汁凉滋其下——百合病主方，古本移用于伏热与暑伤两局。
配 牡蛎 — 润潜相配
润其液而潜其浮阳——液伤阳浮之轻剂结构。
类药鉴别
麦门冬地黄
所在方
百合地黄牡丹皮半夏茯苓汤百合地黄加牡蛎汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, slightly cold. Enters the Heart, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · moisten
The petals of the lily, sweet-moist and slightly cold, white in color entering the Lung and its qi communicating with the Heart — moistening the Lung, clearing the Heart, calming the spirit and settling the will all in one. The Jin Gui names a disease after it (lily disease: wishing to eat yet unable, as if cold but not cold, as if hot but not hot, bitter taste, red urine, faint rapid pulse — a spirit-mind trance from the hundred vessels being beset after febrile disease) and names a formula, one herb tied to one disease, the only such case in the classics. Its use too is unique: steeped and boiled in spring water, the white froth removed, taking the full clear-moist nature — the Guilin edition's two formulas (lower-burner latent heat, summer-damage to Lung fluid) follow the same method.
Functions & Mechanism
Moisten the Lung, clear the Heart
For hoarse voice and dry cough of Lung-yin damage and vexing palpitation of Heart-nutritive heat, Bai He tends both.
Clear the hundred vessels, calm the spirit
For the trance and restlessness of lily disease — the hundred vessels sharing one ancestor all fall ill, and Bai He clears and nourishes that ancestor.
Classic Pairings
with Di Huang — The core of Bai He Di Huang
Bai He clears and nourishes above, Di Huang juice cool-enriches below — the chief formula for lily disease, borrowed in the Guilin edition for latent-heat and summer-damage situations.
with Mu Li — Moistening and subduing paired
Moistening its fluid and subduing its floating yang — a light-formula structure for fluid-damage with yang-floating.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

黄芪Huang Qi

Astragali Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：黄耆
性味归经
甘，微温。归脾、肺经。
气机定位
升 · 充（益气固表）
甘温质轻而气厚，专走气分而性升——它补的是“卫外与升举”这一路的气：实卫表（御外邪、固汗孔）、行水气（气行则水行——防己黄芪、芪芍桂酒诸方治水治汗皆借其运）、通血痹（气足则血行——黄芪桂枝五物汤）。与人参对比见分工：参补五脏之里、救垂绝之元（走里走下），芪固卫表之外、举下陷之清（走表走上）——里外之判，后世“参芪”并称而各有疆界。
功用与机理
益气固表
卫气虚之自汗、易感，芪实其藩篱（后世玉屏风之君）。
益气行水
气虚水停之风水、黄汗，芪运其气则水自行（防己黄芪汤、湿病篇芪桂苓辛汤）。
补气通痹
气虚血滞之肌肤不仁，芪领血行（黄芪桂枝五物汤——血痹主方）。
升阳举陷
中气下陷诸证——后世补中益气之君，时方补气法系之源。
经典药对
配 桂枝 — 益气通阳
芪充其气、桂通其行——血痹与表虚之水皆此对开路。
配 防己 — 固表行水
芪固其表、防己行其水——汗出恶风之风水专对。
配 人参 — 参芪相济
参守里、芪走表，气分双补而各司一路。
类药鉴别
补气药选用人参白术
所在方
黄芪桂枝茯苓细辛汤补中益气汤归脾汤玉屏风散补阳还五汤蠲痹汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, slightly warm. Enters the Spleen, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Ascending · replenish
Sweet-warm, light-substanced yet thick in qi, traveling the qi level specifically with an ascending nature — what it supplements is the "guarding-the-exterior and raising-up" line of qi: consolidating the defensive exterior (warding outer pathogen, securing the sweat pores), moving water qi (qi moving, water moves — Fang Ji Huang Qi, Qi Shao Gui Jiu and other water- and sweat-treating formulas all borrow its transport), freeing blood bi (qi sufficient, blood moves — Huang Qi Gui Zhi Wu Wu Tang). Against ginseng, the division: ginseng supplements the five viscera's interior and rescues the about-to-expire origin (traveling interior and below), Huang Qi consolidates the defensive exterior and raises the sunken clear (traveling exterior and above) — an interior-exterior division, later ages calling them "ginseng-Huang Qi" together yet each with its domain.
Functions & Mechanism
Boost qi, consolidate the exterior
For spontaneous sweat and easy contraction of defensive-qi deficiency, Huang Qi firms its fence (the sovereign of the later Yu Ping Feng).
Boost qi, move water
For wind-water and yellow sweat of qi-deficiency water-lodging, Huang Qi transports its qi and water moves of itself (Fang Ji Huang Qi Tang, the damp-chapter Qi-Gui-Ling-Xin Tang).
Supplement qi, free bi
For numb skin of qi-deficiency blood-stagnation, Huang Qi leads the blood to move (Huang Qi Gui Zhi Wu Wu Tang — the chief blood-bi formula).
Raise yang, lift the sunken
For patterns of middle-qi sinking — the sovereign of the later Bu Zhong Yi Qi, the source of the later qi-supplementing lineage.
Classic Pairings
with Gui Zhi — Boost qi, free yang
Huang Qi fills its qi, Gui Zhi frees its movement — both blood-bi and exterior-deficiency water open the road with this pair.
with Fang Ji — Consolidate the exterior, move water
Huang Qi consolidates its exterior, Fang Ji moves its water — the specialist pair for wind-water with sweating and aversion to wind.
with Ren Shen — Ginseng and Huang Qi aiding each other
Ginseng guards the interior, Huang Qi travels the exterior, dual qi-level supplementation each along its own line.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

竹茹Zhu Ru

Bambusae Caulis in Taenia
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
甘，微寒。归肺、胃、胆经。
气机定位
降 · 清（清化痰热、和胃除烦）
竹之中层刮丝，甘微寒而清润：清化痰热、和胃止呕、除烦安神——它与半夏是化痰界的阴阳两仪：夏温燥主湿痰、茹凉润主痰热，温胆汤以二味同锅（一温一凉相制相成）正是“痰热”这个寒热夹缝病机的精确配置。经方出身在古本竹茹半夏汤（伤暑清化）——温胆系之核的千年前原型。
功用与机理
清化痰热
痰热之咳嗽烦惊——温胆／黄连温胆之清化主力。
和胃止呕
胃热之呕逆呃逆——凉降而不伤胃（妊娠恶阻亦常用）。
除烦安神
痰热扰心之虚烦不眠——清其扰则神自安。
经典药对
配 半夏 — 温凉两仪
夏燥其湿、茹清其热——痰热夹缝之精确对（温胆汤之君臣）。
配 枳实 — 清降之对
茹清其热、枳降其滞——温胆汤之臣佐组。
类药鉴别
化痰药选用半夏贝母栀子
所在方
竹茹半夏汤温胆汤黄连温胆汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, slightly cold. Enters the Lung, Stomach, Gallbladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · clear
The scraped filaments of bamboo's middle layer, sweet and slightly cold, clear-moist: clearing and transforming phlegm-heat, harmonizing the stomach and stopping retching, removing vexation and calming the spirit — it and Ban Xia are the yin-yang two principles of the phlegm-transforming world: Ban Xia warm-drying governs damp phlegm, Zhu Ru cool-moist governs phlegm-heat, and Wen Dan Tang's pairing them in one pot (one warm, one cool, checking and completing each other) is precisely the exact configuration for the cold-heat straddling mechanism of "phlegm-heat." Its classical origin is the Guilin edition's Zhu Ru Ban Xia Tang (summer-damage clearing-transformation) — the millennium-old prototype of the Wen Dan family's core.
Functions & Mechanism
Clear and transform phlegm-heat
For cough and vexing fright of phlegm-heat — the clearing-transforming main force of Wen Dan / Huang Lian Wen Dan.
Harmonize the stomach, stop retching
For retching and hiccup of stomach heat — cooling-descending without harming the stomach (also often used for pregnancy morning sickness).
Remove vexation, calm the spirit
For deficiency-vexation sleeplessness of phlegm-heat harassing the Heart — clearing the harassment and the spirit calms of itself.
Classic Pairings
with Ban Xia — The warm-cool two principles
Ban Xia dries its damp, Zhu Ru clears its heat — the precise pair for the phlegm-heat crevice (the sovereign-minister of Wen Dan Tang).
with Zhi Shi — A clearing-descending pair
Zhu Ru clears its heat, Zhi Shi descends its stagnation — the minister-assistant set of Wen Dan Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

瓜蒂Gua Di

Melo Pedicellus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：甜瓜蒂、苦丁香
性味归经
苦，寒，有毒。归胃经。
气机定位
出 · 涌（涌吐宣泄）
方中之职
苦泄之性极锐：大量为涌吐第一药（瓜蒂散吐胸中寒实），小量煎服则宣泄皮中水气而不吐（一物瓜蒂汤）——同药两用全凭剂量。诸亡血虚家忌。
所在方
一物瓜蒂汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, cold, toxic. Enters the Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · induce vomiting
Role in Formula
Extremely sharp in bitter-draining: in large dose the foremost emetic (Gua Di San vomits cold-repletion in the chest), in small dose boiled and taken it diffuses water qi in the skin without vomiting (the single-herb Gua Di Tang) — one herb two uses entirely by dose. Shunned in all the blood-losing and deficient.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

防己Fang Ji

Stephaniae Tetrandrae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：汉防己
性味归经
苦、辛，寒。归膀胱、肺经。
气机定位
降 · 行（行水消肿）
苦辛而寒、性降而行：专司“肌表经隧之水”——水之为病有在脏腑水道者（苓泽之职）、有溢于肌肤经隧者（风水身重、皮水四肢肿、湿痹关节肿），防己正是后者的专才：经方三阵（防己黄芪之表虚风水／麻黄茯苓之黄肿／防己茯苓之皮水）加时方宣痹汤之湿热痹——四方连成“肌表之水”完整地图。兼祛风湿止痛，湿热痹尤宜（性寒）。
功用与机理
利水消肿
风水皮水之身重浮肿——行肌表经隧之水，与苓泽之走水道分疆。
祛风湿止痛
湿热痹之关节肿痛（宣痹汤之君）——寒性利水，热痹之的。
经典药对
配 黄芪 — 固表行水
芪固其表、己行其水——防己黄芪汤治汗出恶风之风水。
配 薏苡仁 — 利痹双子
己行水、薏舒筋——宣痹汤湿热痹之利下组。
类药鉴别
利水药选用茯苓薏苡仁麻黄
所在方
麻黄茯苓汤宣痹汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, acrid, cold. Enters the Bladder, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · move
Bitter-acrid and cold, descending and moving in nature: tasked specifically with "water at the flesh-exterior and channel conduits" — water disease has forms in the visceral water passages (the office of Fu Ling-Ze Xie) and forms spilling into the skin and channel conduits (wind-water body heaviness, skin-water four-limb swelling, damp bi joint swelling), and Fang Ji is the specialist of the latter: three classical arrays (Fang Ji Huang Qi's exterior-deficiency wind-water, Ma Huang Fu Ling's yellow swelling, Fang Ji Fu Ling's skin-water) plus the later Xuan Bi Tang's damp-heat bi — four formulas joining into a complete map of "water at the flesh-exterior." Also expelling wind-damp and stopping pain, especially apt for damp-heat bi (cold in nature).
Functions & Mechanism
Benefit water, disperse swelling
For body heaviness and edema of wind-water and skin-water — moving water at the flesh-exterior and channel conduits, divided from Fu Ling-Ze Xie which travel the water passages.
Expel wind-damp, stop pain
For joint swelling and pain of damp-heat bi (the sovereign of Xuan Bi Tang) — cold-natured water-benefiting, the target of heat bi.
Classic Pairings
with Huang Qi — Consolidate the exterior, move water
Huang Qi consolidates its exterior, Fang Ji moves its water — Fang Ji Huang Qi Tang treating wind-water with sweating and aversion to wind.
with Yi Yi Ren — A bi-benefiting twin set
Fang Ji moves water, Yi Yi Ren relaxes the sinews — the drain-below set of Xuan Bi Tang for damp-heat bi.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

橘皮Ju Pi

Citri Reticulatae Pericarpium
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：陈皮
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归脾、肺经。
气机定位
行 · 化（理气化痰）
辛行苦泄温通，专司“气”与“痰”两界的翻译官：脾肺气滞得之则行、湿聚成痰得之则化——“治痰先治气、气顺则痰消”这句法系宪法就是为它写的。全库出场十四次冠绝常用药：二陈以之配夏（化痰双核）、六君香砂以之防补药之壅、橘枳姜汤以之宽胸——补泻消和诸阵皆需此一味“动”药疏其滞。陈久者良（燥烈之性随年而柔），故又名陈皮。
功用与机理
理气健脾
中焦气滞之脘腹胀满、食少吐泻——辛行其滞、苦降其逆，脾胃升降赖之复常。
燥湿化痰
湿痰咳嗽之要药：气行则湿化、湿去则痰消——二陈汤之半壁。
防壅醒脾
大队补药中置一味陈皮则补而不滞（六君、补中益气、归脾皆此用）——“静中一动”最常任之子。
经典药对
配 半夏 — 二陈之核
陈皮理气以行痰、半夏燥湿以化痰——气痰双解，化痰法系的地基一对。
配 人参 — 补而不滞
参之滞得陈之行——六君以降补气阵的标准保险。
配 枳实 — 橘枳之宽
陈皮行散、枳实破降——胸痹气塞之橘枳姜汤原对。
类药鉴别
理气药选用枳实厚朴半夏
所在方
枳实橘皮桔梗半夏生姜甘草汤六君子汤香砂六君子汤补中益气汤柴胡疏肝散痛泻要方二陈汤温胆汤黄连温胆汤半夏白术天麻汤保和丸藿香正气散平胃散杏苏散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Spleen, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · transform
Acrid-moving, bitter-draining and warm-freeing, the specialist translator between the two worlds of "qi" and "phlegm": Spleen-Lung qi stagnation meets it and moves, damp gathered into phlegm meets it and transforms — the lineage constitution "to treat phlegm first treat qi, qi flowing, phlegm dissolves" was written for it. Appearing fourteen times across the collection, crowning the common herbs: Er Chen pairs it with Ban Xia (the phlegm-transforming twin core), Liu Jun and Xiang Sha use it to prevent supplementing-herbs' congestion, Ju Zhi Jiang Tang uses it to widen the chest — supplementing, draining, dispersing and harmonizing arrays all need this one "moving" herb to course their stagnation. Aged is best (the drying-fierce nature softens with years), hence also named Chen Pi.
Functions & Mechanism
Regulate qi, fortify the Spleen
For epigastric-abdominal distension, reduced appetite and vomiting-diarrhea of middle-burner qi stagnation — acridly moving its stagnation, bitterly descending its counterflow, the Spleen-Stomach ascent-descent relying on it to restore.
Dry damp, transform phlegm
An essential for damp-phlegm cough: qi moving, damp transforms; damp gone, phlegm dissolves — half of Er Chen Tang.
Prevent congestion, rouse the Spleen
Placing one Chen Pi in a board of supplementing herbs makes supplementation without stagnation (Liu Jun, Bu Zhong Yi Qi, Gui Pi all this use) — the most frequently appointed piece of "one mover amid stillness."
Classic Pairings
with Ban Xia — The core of Er Chen
Chen Pi regulates qi to move phlegm, Ban Xia dries damp to transform phlegm — resolving both qi and phlegm, the foundation pair of the phlegm-transforming lineage.
with Ren Shen — Supplement without stagnation
Ginseng's stagnation gains Chen Pi's movement — the standard safeguard of the qi-supplementing array from Liu Jun downward.
with Zhi Shi — The widening of Chen Pi and Zhi Shi
Chen Pi moves and disperses, Zhi Shi breaks and descends — the original pair of Ju Zhi Jiang Tang for chest-bi qi blockage.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

小麦Xiao Mai

Tritici Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：淮小麦
性味归经
甘，微寒。归心经。
气机定位
中 · 养（养心安神）
方中之职
五谷之一而独入心：甘润养心气、安心神——脏躁之悲伤欲哭以之为君（甘麦大枣汤一升）。谷气养脏、以平为补的代表；浮小麦（水淘浮起者）则专走敛汗一职。
所在方
甘麦大枣汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, slightly cold. Enters the Heart channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Centering · nourish
Role in Formula
One of the five grains but uniquely entering the Heart: sweet-moist nourishing Heart qi and quieting the Heart spirit — for the grief and weeping of visceral agitation it is sovereign (one sheng in Gan Mai Da Zao Tang). The representative of grain-qi nourishing the viscera, supplementing through evenness; Fu Xiao Mai (the ones floating on water-rinsing) takes the sweat-gathering office alone.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

苏叶Su Ye

Perillae Folium
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：紫苏叶、干苏叶
性味归经
辛，温。归肺、脾经。
气机定位
出 · 行（芳香行气宽中）
辛温芳香而性轻扬：外散风寒（力缓于麻桂——轻证微感之宜）、内行气滞宽中（半夏厚朴汤借其芳香疏郁气之结）、中和胃止呕（鱼蟹之毒亦解）——“散、行、和”三职皆带芳香之性。与苏子一物两部：叶轻扬主散主行、子沉降主降主化——杏苏散用叶（散凉燥）、三子养亲用子（降痰气），部位药学之现成教案。
功用与机理
发散风寒
风寒轻证、凉燥外束（杏苏散之君）——微汗即解之轻散档。
行气宽中
气郁痰结之梅核气（半夏厚朴汤）、湿滞脘闷（藿香正气）——芳香疏解之职。
和胃安胎解毒
妊娠恶阻、鱼蟹中毒——和降之余职。
经典药对
配 藿香 — 芳香双散
藿香化浊、苏叶散寒——藿香正气表分之两翼。
配 半夏 — 行降化结
苏行其气、夏化其痰——半夏厚朴汤气痰双解之半。
类药鉴别
解表药选用荆芥藿香苏子
所在方
半夏厚朴汤藿香正气散杏苏散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Lung, Spleen channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · move
Acrid-warm, aromatic and light-rising: dispersing wind-cold outward (gentler than Ma-Gui — apt for light contraction), moving qi stagnation and widening the middle within (Ban Xia Hou Po Tang borrows its aroma to course the constrained qi-bind), harmonizing the stomach and stopping retching in the middle (also resolving fish and crab toxin) — the three offices of "disperse, move, harmonize" all carrying an aromatic nature. It and Su Zi are one plant two parts: the leaf light-rising governs dispersing and moving, the seed sinking-descending governs descending and transforming — Xing Su San uses the leaf (dispersing cool-dryness), San Zi Yang Qin uses the seed (descending phlegm-qi), a ready lesson in location-pharmacology.
Functions & Mechanism
Effuse and disperse wind-cold
For light wind-cold and cool-dryness binding the exterior (the sovereign of Xing Su San) — the light-dispersing gradation resolved by a faint sweat.
Move qi, widen the middle
For plum-pit qi of qi-constraint phlegm-binding (Ban Xia Hou Po Tang) and damp-stagnation epigastric oppression (Huo Xiang Zheng Qi) — the office of aromatic coursing-resolution.
Harmonize the stomach, calm the fetus, resolve toxin
For pregnancy morning sickness and fish-and-crab poisoning — the residual offices of harmonizing and descending.
Classic Pairings
with Huo Xiang — A twin-aromatic dispersing pair
Huo Xiang transforms turbidity, Su Ye disperses cold — the two exterior wings of Huo Xiang Zheng Qi.
with Ban Xia — Move, descend, transform binds
Su Ye moves its qi, Ban Xia transforms its phlegm — half of Ban Xia Hou Po Tang's dual qi-phlegm resolution.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

白头翁Bai Tou Weng

Pulsatillae Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦，寒。归胃、大肠经。
气机定位
降 · 清（清热解毒凉血）
方中之职
苦寒入血分，清肠中热毒、凉血止痢——热毒血痢（下重、便脓血、渴欲饮水）之专药，白头翁汤以之名方为君。
所在方
白头翁汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, cold. Enters the Stomach, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · clear
Role in Formula
Bitter-cold entering the blood level, clearing intestinal heat-toxin and cooling blood to stop dysentery — the specialist for heat-toxin blood dysentery (heaviness below, pus-and-blood stool, thirst with desire to drink), Bai Tou Weng Tang naming the formula after it as sovereign.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

射干She Gan

Belamcandae Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦，寒。归肺经。
气机定位
降 · 开（清肺利咽豁痰）
方中之职
苦寒降泄，清肺中痰火、利咽喉之闭——“喉中水鸡声”之痰阻气道以之开豁（射干麻黄汤为君），咽喉肿痛亦倚之。
所在方
射干麻黄汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, cold. Enters the Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · open
Role in Formula
Bitter-cold, descending and draining, clearing Lung phlegm-fire and freeing the throat-obstruction — for the phlegm-obstructed airway of the "frog-croak sound in the throat" it opens and clears (sovereign of She Gan Ma Huang Tang), and sore swollen throat also relies on it.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

紫菀Zi Wan

Asteris Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦、辛，温。归肺经。
气机定位
降 · 润（温润化痰止咳）
方中之职
温而不燥、润而不寒，化痰止咳之平和主力——与款冬花相须为用（一偏于痰、一偏于咳），寒热咳嗽皆可随配伍出入。
所在方
射干麻黄汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, acrid, warm. Enters the Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · moisten
Role in Formula
Warm without drying, moist without cold, the even main force for transforming phlegm and stopping cough — used mutually with Kuan Dong Hua (one biased to phlegm, one to cough), usable in cold and heat cough alike through combination.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

款冬花Kuan Dong Hua

Farfarae Flos
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：冬花
性味归经
辛、微苦，温。归肺经。
气机定位
降 · 润（润肺下气止咳）
方中之职
辛温而润，下气止咳之专药——与紫菀为固定搭档（菀化其痰、冬止其咳），射干麻黄汤同阵，后世止咳诸方之常客。
所在方
射干麻黄汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, slightly bitter, warm. Enters the Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · moisten
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm and moist, the specialist for descending qi and stopping cough — a fixed partner with Zi Wan (Zi Wan transforms its phlegm, Kuan Dong stops its cough), in the same array in She Gan Ma Huang Tang, a regular in later cough-stopping formulas.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

木香Mu Xiang

Aucklandiae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归脾、胃、大肠、三焦经。
气机定位
行 · 通（行气止痛）
辛苦而温、芳香气烈，三焦气分之通药而主场在脾胃与大肠：行气之力专于“滞”处——脘腹胀痛、泻痢后重皆其的。它最专业的身份是“静中一动”的执行者：香砂六君防补气之壅、归脾防滋养之滞、真人养脏防涩固之闭、芍药汤司“调气则后重自除”——全库四阵皆任同一职：在大队静药中保持气机流动。生用行气力锐、煨用实肠止泻。
功用与机理
行气止痛
脾胃气滞之脘腹胀痛——芳香行散，虚人可用（不似枳朴之破）。
调气除后重
泻痢里急后重——气滞于肠之“坠”感专司（芍药汤十四字之气翼）。
防壅醒脾
补涩诸阵之保险栓——归脾／香砂六君／真人养脏三度出任。
经典药对
配 槟榔 — 行坠之对
木香行其滞、槟榔坠其积——痢疾后重双解。
配 砂仁 — 香砂芳醒
二香相合醒脾开胃——香砂六君之名即此对。
类药鉴别
理气药选用砂仁槟榔香附
所在方
香砂六君子汤归脾汤芍药汤真人养脏汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Large Intestine, San Jiao channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · free
Acrid-bitter and warm, aromatic and fierce in qi, a triple-burner qi-level freeing herb with its main field in the Spleen-Stomach and large intestine: its qi-moving force specialized at the "stagnant" place — epigastric-abdominal distending pain, diarrhea-dysentery with heaviness below, are its target. Its most professional identity is executor of "one mover amid stillness": Xiang Sha Liu Jun preventing qi-supplementing congestion, Gui Pi preventing nourishing stagnation, Zhen Ren Yang Zang preventing astringing-consolidating closure, Shao Yao Tang's "regulate the qi and heaviness disperses of itself" — four arrays across the collection all taking the same office: keeping the qi dynamic flowing amid a board of still herbs. Raw it moves qi sharply, roasted it firms the gut and stops diarrhea.
Functions & Mechanism
Move qi, stop pain
For epigastric-abdominal distending pain of Spleen-Stomach qi stagnation — aromatic moving-dispersing, usable in the deficient (unlike Zhi Shi-Hou Po's breaking).
Regulate qi, remove heaviness below
For diarrhea-dysentery with heaviness below — specialized for the "dragging" sensation of qi stagnating in the intestine (the qi wing of Shao Yao Tang's dictum).
Prevent congestion, rouse the Spleen
The safety pin of supplementing-astringing arrays — appointed thrice in Gui Pi, Xiang Sha Liu Jun and Zhen Ren Yang Zang.
Classic Pairings
with Bing Lang — A moving-and-dropping pair
Mu Xiang moves its stagnation, Bing Lang drops its accumulation — dual resolution of dysentery heaviness-below.
with Sha Ren — Xiang-Sha aromatic rousing
The two aromatics combining rouse the Spleen and open the appetite — the name Xiang Sha Liu Jun is this pair.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

砂仁Sha Ren

Amomi Fructus
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：缩砂仁
性味归经
辛，温。归脾、胃、肾经。
气机定位
行 · 醒（芳香醒脾）
辛温芳香之最“醒”者：化湿醒脾、行气开胃、温中安胎——湿困与滞塞之中焦一闻此香即转。它最著名的岗位是“滋腻阵中的化滞员”：熟地伍砂仁是后世铁律（滋而不腻的标准解法）、参苓白术／香砂六君／丹参饮皆借其醒——与木香分工：木香行“气滞”、砂仁化“湿滞”兼醒呆钝之脾。后下取气（久煎香散力失）。
功用与机理
化湿醒脾开胃
湿困中焦之脘痞纳呆——芳香一开，脾机自转。
行气温中
脾胃气滞兼寒之胀痛吐泻——温行两得。
化滋腻之滞
补养阵之保险（熟地伍砂仁之惯例、香砂六君之名）——使补药可久服。
经典药对
配 木香 — 香砂之对
木香行气、砂仁化湿——醒脾双香。
配 地黄 — 滋而不腻
熟地得砂仁则滞性解——滋补配伍学的标准答案。
类药鉴别
理气药选用木香藿香白扁豆
所在方
香砂六君子汤参苓白术散丹参饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · rouse spleen
The most "rousing" of the acrid-warm aromatics: transforming damp and rousing the Spleen, moving qi and opening the appetite, warming the middle and calming the fetus — a middle burner encumbered by damp and blocked by stagnation turns the moment it smells this aroma. Its most famous post is "the stagnation-transformer within an enriching array": Shu Di paired with Sha Ren is a later iron rule (the standard solution for enriching without cloying), and Shen Ling Bai Zhu, Xiang Sha Liu Jun and Dan Shen Yin all borrow its rousing — its division from Mu Xiang: Mu Xiang moves "qi stagnation," Sha Ren transforms "damp stagnation" and rouses a dull Spleen. Added last to take its qi (long boiling loses the aromatic-dispersing force).
Functions & Mechanism
Transform damp, rouse the Spleen, open the appetite
For epigastric fullness and poor appetite of damp encumbering the middle burner — one aromatic opening and the Spleen mechanism turns of itself.
Move qi, warm the middle
For distending pain and vomiting-diarrhea of Spleen-Stomach qi stagnation with cold — moving and warming both.
Transform the stagnation of enriching-cloying herbs
The safeguard of a nourishing array (the convention of Shu Di paired with Sha Ren, the name Xiang Sha Liu Jun) — letting supplementing herbs bear long use.
Classic Pairings
with Mu Xiang — The Xiang-Sha pair
Mu Xiang moves qi, Sha Ren transforms damp — twin aromatics rousing the Spleen.
with Di Huang — Enrich without cloying
Shu Di gains Sha Ren and its stagnating nature dissolves — the standard answer of enriching-combination pharmacology.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

莲子Lian Zi

Nelumbinis Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：莲肉
性味归经
甘、涩，平。归脾、肾、心经。
气机定位
中 · 固（补脾涩肠养心）
方中之职
甘可补、涩可固：补脾止泻、益肾固精、养心安神一身三职——药食同源之平补品，参苓白术散借其涩以固久泻。
所在方
参苓白术散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, astringent, neutral. Enters the Spleen, Kidney, Heart channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Centering · consolidate
Role in Formula
Sweet supplements, astringent consolidates: supplementing the Spleen and stopping diarrhea, boosting the Kidney and consolidating essence, nourishing the Heart and calming the spirit — three offices in one, a food-medicine even-supplement; Shen Ling Bai Zhu San borrows its astringency to consolidate chronic diarrhea.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

白扁豆Bai Bian Dou

Lablab Semen Album
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：扁豆
性味归经
甘，微温。归脾、胃经。
气机定位
中 · 化（健脾化湿）
方中之职
甘温和缓，健脾而兼化湿、消暑——脾虚夹湿之轻补品，炒用健脾力增。
所在方
参苓白术散沙参麦冬汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, slightly warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Centering · transform
Role in Formula
Sweet-warm and mild, fortifying the Spleen while transforming damp and dispelling summer-heat — a light supplement for Spleen deficiency with damp, its Spleen-fortifying force increased when stir-fried.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

升麻Sheng Ma

Cimicifugae Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛、微甘，微寒。归肺、脾、胃、大肠经。
气机定位
升 · 举（升阳举陷）
方中之职
升提之力最专：举下陷之清阳（补中益气以小量为向导）、透发斑疹、清热解毒（升麻鳖甲汤之经方出身）。剂量定其职：小量升举、大量解毒。
所在方
补中益气汤清胃散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, slightly sweet, slightly cold. Enters the Lung, Spleen, Stomach, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Ascending · raise yang
Role in Formula
The most focused in raising-lifting force: raising the sunken clear-yang (a small-dose guide in Bu Zhong Yi Qi), venting maculae and papules, clearing heat and resolving toxin (its classical origin in Sheng Ma Bie Jia Tang). The dose sets its office: small raises, large resolves toxin.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

龙眼肉Long Yan Rou

Longan Arillus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：桂圆
性味归经
甘，温。归心、脾经。
气机定位
入 · 养（补心脾养血安神）
方中之职
甘温滋润，补心血、益脾气而安神——归脾汤之君，思虑劳倦之心悸健忘专此。药食同源。
所在方
归脾汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, warm. Enters the Heart, Spleen channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · nourish
Role in Formula
Sweet-warm and enriching, supplementing Heart blood and boosting Spleen qi while calming the spirit — the sovereign of Gui Pi Tang, the specialist for the palpitation and forgetfulness of over-thinking and fatigue. Food-medicine.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

远志Yuan Zhi

Polygalae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
苦、辛，温。归心、肾、肺经。
气机定位
通 · 交（交通心肾安神）
苦辛性温而气通：“交通心肾”是其独门——苦泄心气使之下交、辛散肾郁使之上达，心肾这对最远的君相由它牵线（安神三方全勤：归脾／补心丹／定志丸）。兼两支线：祛痰开窍（痰蒙之惊痫健忘——与菖蒲成开窍对）、消痈肿。安神药分三路（养·镇·通），远志独任“通”路——不寐之因若在“心肾不接”，养与镇皆隔靴，通之即效。
功用与机理
交通心肾安神
心肾不交之失眠健忘惊悸——安神三方之通用件。
祛痰开窍
痰阻心窍之神志昏蒙、癫痫——通窍之辛散一翼。
经典药对
配 石菖蒲 — 开窍定志
菖蒲芳开其窍、远志辛通其志——定志丸原对，后世益智诸方通用。
配 酸枣仁 — 养通相济
枣仁养其体、远志通其路——归脾补心丹两阵同现。
类药鉴别
安神药选用石菖蒲酸枣仁茯苓
所在方
归脾汤天王补心丹安神定志丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, acrid, warm. Enters the Heart, Kidney, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Freeing · connect
Bitter-acrid, warm in nature and freeing in qi: "linking Heart and Kidney" is its unique skill — bitterly draining Heart qi so it descends to interact, acridly dispersing Kidney constraint so it reaches up, this most distant sovereign-minister pair matchmade by it (present in all three spirit-calming formulas: Gui Pi, Bu Xin Dan, Ding Zhi Wan). Plus two side branches: expelling phlegm and opening the orifices (fright-epilepsy and forgetfulness from phlegm-clouding — forming an orifice-opening pair with Shi Chang Pu), and dispersing abscess-swelling. Spirit-calming herbs divide into three lines (nourish, subdue, free), and Yuan Zhi alone takes the "free" line — if the cause of insomnia is "Heart and Kidney not connecting," nourishing and subduing both scratch at a boot, and freeing it takes effect.
Functions & Mechanism
Link Heart and Kidney, calm the spirit
For insomnia, forgetfulness and fright-palpitation of Heart-Kidney non-interaction — a general part of the three spirit-calming formulas.
Expel phlegm, open the orifices
For clouded spirit-mind and epilepsy of phlegm obstructing the Heart orifices — the acrid-dispersing orifice-freeing wing.
Classic Pairings
with Shi Chang Pu — Open the orifices, settle the will
Shi Chang Pu aromatically opens its orifices, Yuan Zhi acridly frees its will — the original pair of Ding Zhi Wan, common to later mind-benefiting formulas.
with Suan Zao Ren — Nourishing and freeing aiding each other
Suan Zao Ren nourishes its body, Yuan Zhi frees its road — appearing together in both Gui Pi and Bu Xin Dan.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

防风Fang Feng

Saposhnikoviae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
辛、甘，微温。归膀胱、肝、脾经。
气机定位
出 · 走（祛风之润剂）
“风药中之润剂”：辛甘微温、走表祛风而不燥烈伤津——这份温和使它成为最百搭的风药：入固表阵则引芪达卫（玉屏风之“补中寓散”、芪防相畏相使功愈大）、入抑木阵则散肝舒脾（痛泻要方之升清）、入痹证阵则胜湿止痛（蠲痹、独活寄生）。风药的三重现代解读——解表、升清、引经——防风一味全占。
功用与机理
祛风解表
外感风寒风热皆可配用——性平和故寒热两用。
胜湿止痛
风湿痹痛之通用卒（蠲痹、独活寄生同阵）。
升清舒脾
痛泻要方之眼：入脾升清阳止泻、入肝散郁遏——风药入内科的代表用法。
经典药对
配 黄芪 — 补中寓散
芪得防风固表而不留邪、防风得芪祛邪而不伤正——玉屏风之机关。
配 白术 — 扶土御风
术补其中、防风走其表兼舒其木——玉屏风与痛泻要方双双在用。
类药鉴别
解表药选用荆芥羌活薄荷
所在方
玉屏风散痛泻要方独活寄生汤蠲痹汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, sweet, slightly warm. Enters the Bladder, Liver, Spleen channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · move outward
"The moist herb among wind herbs": acrid-sweet and slightly warm, traveling the exterior to expel wind without drying-fierce harm to fluid — this mildness makes it the most versatile wind herb: in an exterior-consolidating array it leads Huang Qi to the defensive (Yu Ping Feng's "dispersing lodged within supplementing," Huang Qi-Fang Feng's mutual fear and use growing the greater in merit), in a wood-restraining array it disperses the Liver and relaxes the Spleen (Tong Xie Yao Fang's raising the clear), in a bi-treating array it overcomes damp and stops pain (Juan Bi, Du Huo Ji Sheng). Wind herbs' three modern readings — resolving the exterior, raising the clear, guiding the channel — Fang Feng holds all in one herb.
Functions & Mechanism
Expel wind, resolve the exterior
Combinable for both wind-cold and wind-heat contraction — even and mild in nature, hence used for cold and heat alike.
Overcome damp, stop pain
A general soldier for wind-damp bi pain (in the same array as Juan Bi, Du Huo Ji Sheng).
Raise the clear, relax the Spleen
The eye of Tong Xie Yao Fang: entering the Spleen it raises the clear yang and stops diarrhea, entering the Liver it disperses constraint — the representative internal-medicine use of a wind herb.
Classic Pairings
with Huang Qi — Dispersing lodged within supplementing
Huang Qi with Fang Feng consolidates the exterior without retaining pathogen, Fang Feng with Huang Qi expels pathogen without harming the upright — the mechanism of Yu Ping Feng.
with Bai Zhu — Support earth, ward off wind
Bai Zhu supplements the middle, Fang Feng travels the exterior and also relaxes the wood — used in both Yu Ping Feng and Tong Xie Yao Fang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

枸杞子Gou Qi Zi

Lycii Fructus
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：枸杞
性味归经
甘，平。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 滋（平补肝肾益精明目）
甘平质润，滋而不腻、补而不燥——平补肝肾之典范：地黄法系四方全勤（杞菊之明目、左归右归之填精、一贯煎之养体），阴阳两方通用（左归右归同在）正是“平”字的证明。益精明目是其专长：肝开窍于目、精血上注则明——枸杞补精血之源而菊花清头目之标，一沉一浮成明目定对。药食同源、久服可任。
功用与机理
滋补肝肾
精血亏虚之腰酸眩晕——左右归通用之滋养主力（阴阳两阵皆收即其平性之证）。
益精明目
肝肾亏之视昏目涩——杞菊地黄之杞：补下以明上。
经典药对
配 菊花 — 杞菊明目
杞滋其下、菊清其上——下亏上燥两头兜住。
配 地黄 — 精血双滋
地黄填其髓、枸杞益其精——滋养阵之纵深配。
类药鉴别
地黄女贞子菟丝子
所在方
杞菊地黄丸左归丸右归丸一贯煎
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · enrich yin
Sweet-even and moist-substanced, enriching without cloying, supplementing without drying — the paradigm of even supplementation of Liver and Kidney: present in all four Dihuang lineage formulas (Qi-Ju's eye-brightening, Zuo Gui-You Gui's essence-filling, Yi Guan Jian's body-nourishing), used in both yin and yang formulas (standing in both Zuo Gui and You Gui) — the very proof of the word "even." Boosting essence and brightening the eyes is its specialty: the Liver opens into the eyes, and essence-blood pouring up brightens them — Gou Qi supplements the source of essence-blood while Ju Hua clears the branch at head and eyes, one sinking, one floating, a fixed eye-brightening pair. Food-medicine same source, bearing long use.
Functions & Mechanism
Enrich and supplement Liver and Kidney
For aching lower back and dizziness of essence-blood depletion — the enriching main force common to Zuo Gui and You Gui (standing in both yin and yang arrays is proof of its even nature).
Boost essence, brighten the eyes
For blurred and dry vision of Liver-Kidney depletion — the Gou Qi of Qi Ju Di Huang: supplementing below to brighten above.
Classic Pairings
with Ju Hua — Gou Qi-Ju Hua brighten the eyes
Gou Qi enriches below, Ju Hua clears above — catching both the depletion below and the dryness above.
with Di Huang — Twin enrichment of essence and blood
Di Huang fills its marrow, Gou Qi boosts its essence — the depth-pairing of a nourishing array.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

菊花Ju Hua

Chrysanthemi Flos
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘、苦，微寒。归肺、肝经。
气机定位
出 · 清（疏风清肝明目）
方中之职
体轻上行，疏散头目风热、平降肝阳——与枸杞一清一滋成明目之对；黄菊疏散力胜，白菊平肝力胜。
所在方
杞菊地黄丸桑菊饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bitter, slightly cold. Enters the Lung, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · clear
Role in Formula
Light-substanced and rising, coursing and dispersing wind-heat of the head and eyes and settling-descending Liver yang — forming with Gou Qi a clearing-enriching eye-brightening pair; yellow chrysanthemum wins in coursing-dispersing, white in settling the Liver.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

菟丝子Tu Si Zi

Cuscutae Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛、甘，平。归肝、肾、脾经。
气机定位
入 · 固（平补阴阳固精）
方中之职
辛甘而平，补阳益阴、固精缩尿、明目止泻——阴阳双向之平补品，左右归两阵通用之子。
所在方
左归丸右归丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, sweet, neutral. Enters the Liver, Kidney, Spleen channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · consolidate
Role in Formula
Acrid-sweet and even, supplementing yang and boosting yin, consolidating essence and contracting urine, brightening the eyes and stopping diarrhea — a bidirectional even-supplement, used in both the Zuo Gui and You Gui arrays.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

鹿角胶Lu Jiao Jiao

Cervi Cornus Colla
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘、咸，温。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 填（温补精血，通督）
方中之职
鹿角熬胶，血肉有情而性温——峻补精血、温督脉之阳：右归以之益火填精，左归借其一点温使阴得阳生（阳中求阴）。烊化。
所在方
左归丸右归丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, salty, warm. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · fill essence
Role in Formula
Deer-antler boiled into glue, blood-flesh animate and warm in nature — fiercely supplementing essence-blood and warming the Governing vessel yang: You Gui uses it to boost fire and fill essence, Zuo Gui borrows a touch of its warmth so yin gains yang to engender (seeking yin within yang). Melt-dissolved.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

龟板胶Gui Ban Jiao

Testudinis Carapacis Colla
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：龟甲胶
性味归经
甘、咸，寒。归肝、肾、心经。
气机定位
入 · 填（滋阴潜阳，通任）
方中之职
龟板熬胶，血肉有情而性寒——大补真阴、潜镇浮阳：与鹿胶一任一督、一阴一阳，左归并用即龟鹿二仙之意。烊化。
所在方
左归丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, salty, cold. Enters the Liver, Kidney, Heart channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · fill essence
Role in Formula
Tortoise-plastron boiled into glue, blood-flesh animate and cold in nature — greatly supplementing true yin and subduing floating yang: with deer glue, one on the Conception vessel, one on the Governing, one yin, one yang, used together in Zuo Gui in the sense of the Gui-Lu Er Xian. Melt-dissolved.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

牛膝Niu Xi

Achyranthis Bidentatae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：川牛膝、怀牛膝
性味归经
苦、甘、酸，平。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
降 · 引（引血下行，强腰膝）
性善下行是它全部身份：引血下行（上炎之火、上冲之血以之为电梯——镇肝熄风一两为君）、引药下行（下肢腰膝之疾以之为向导——独活寄生、天麻钩藤皆用）、活血通经、补肝肾强腰膝。一“下”字四职：降、引、通、补——升降出入图上最纯粹的“降”性药之一。怀牛膝偏补肝肾、川牛膝偏活血行——一名两药按补行取舍。
功用与机理
引血（火）下行
肝阳上亢、气血上冲之眩晕头痛齿衄——导上壅之势下归（镇肝熄风30g为君、玉女煎5g为使，剂量即病势）。
补肝肾强腰膝
腰膝酸软无力——下焦之痿弱标本兼顾（独活寄生、左归之佐）。
活血通经
瘀阻经闭、痹痛——血府逐瘀借其“降”与桔梗之“升”造胸中循环。
经典药对
配 桔梗 — 一升一降
桔梗载药上行、牛膝引血下行——血府逐瘀的循环双使。
配 代赭石 — 重镇引降
赭石镇其逆、牛膝引其下——镇肝熄风之降压双臂。
配 杜仲 — 腰膝之对
杜仲补其筋骨、牛膝引至病所——腰痛标配。
类药鉴别
代赭石杜仲川芎
所在方
左归丸天麻钩藤饮镇肝熄风汤血府逐瘀汤身痛逐瘀汤玉女煎独活寄生汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, sweet, sour, neutral. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · conduct downward
Its nature apt to travel downward is its whole identity: conducting blood downward (upflaming fire and upsurging blood take it as an elevator — Zhen Gan Xi Feng uses one liang as sovereign), conducting herbs downward (lower-limb and lower-back-knee ailments take it as a guide — Du Huo Ji Sheng, Tian Ma Gou Teng both use it), invigorating blood and freeing menses, supplementing Liver-Kidney and strengthening the lower back and knees. One word "down," four offices: descend, conduct, free, supplement — one of the purest "descending" herbs on the ascending-descending map. Huai Niu Xi biased to supplementing Liver-Kidney, Chuan Niu Xi biased to invigorating and moving — one name, two herbs chosen by supplement or move.
Functions & Mechanism
Conduct blood (and fire) downward
For dizziness, headache and tooth-bleeding of Liver-yang hyperactivity and qi-blood surging up — conducting the upward-congesting momentum back down (30g as sovereign in Zhen Gan Xi Feng, 5g as envoy in Yu Nu Jian, the dose being the disease-momentum).
Supplement Liver-Kidney, strengthen lower back and knees
For aching weak lower back and knees — tending both branch and root of lower-burner atrophy (the assistant of Du Huo Ji Sheng and Zuo Gui).
Invigorate blood, free menses
For stasis-blocked menses and bi pain — Xue Fu Zhu Yu borrows its "descent" with Jie Geng's "ascent" to make a circulation in the chest.
Classic Pairings
with Jie Geng — One ascending, one descending
Jie Geng carries herbs upward, Niu Xi conducts blood downward — the circulation twin-envoys of Xue Fu Zhu Yu.
with Dai Zhe Shi — Heavy-subdue and conduct downward
Dai Zhe Shi subdues its counterflow, Niu Xi conducts it down — the pressure-lowering twin arms of Zhen Gan Xi Feng.
with Du Zhong — The low-back-knee pair
Du Zhong supplements the sinews and bones, Niu Xi conducts to the diseased place — the standard low-back-pain pairing.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

杜仲Du Zhong

Eucommiae Cortex
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
甘，温。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 壮（补肝肾强筋骨）
甘温入肝肾，丝连之皮（折之有白丝相连）古人取象筋骨相连——补肝肾、强筋骨、安胎三职而主场在腰膝：“腰为肾之府”，杜仲是腰痛方的常任理事（右归／独活寄生／天麻钩藤三阵皆在）。与牛膝成腰膝标配对：杜仲补其体、牛膝引其至。在天麻钩藤饮中任“下虚”一翼——上盛下虚之局，压下不如固下。盐炒引入肾经。
功用与机理
补肝肾强筋骨
肾虚腰痛、筋骨无力——腰膝专药之首（独活寄生／右归之柱）。
固下安上
肝阳上亢之下虚一翼（天麻钩藤饮）——固其根则阳不上僭。
安胎
肝肾虚之胎动不安——补肾即安胎之实体化。
经典药对
配 牛膝 — 腰膝标配
杜仲补其筋骨、牛膝引至病所——腰痛方之双柱。
配 桑寄生 — 补肾祛湿
二味皆补肝肾兼祛风湿——独活寄生之补翼。
类药鉴别
补阳药选用牛膝桑寄生枸杞子
所在方
右归丸天麻钩藤饮独活寄生汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, warm. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · invigorate yang
Sweet-warm, entering the Liver and Kidney, the bark with connecting threads (broken, white threads connect it), the ancients taking the image of sinews and bones connecting — supplementing Liver-Kidney, strengthening sinews and bones, and calming the fetus, three offices with its main field at the lower back and knees: "the lower back is the mansion of the Kidney," and Du Zhong is a standing director of low-back-pain formulas (present in all three arrays of You Gui, Du Huo Ji Sheng, Tian Ma Gou Teng). It and Niu Xi form the standard low-back-knee pair: Du Zhong supplements its body, Niu Xi conducts to it. In Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin it takes the "deficient below" wing — in an exuberant-above deficient-below situation, consolidating below beats pressing down. Salt-fried to guide it into the Kidney channel.
Functions & Mechanism
Supplement Liver-Kidney, strengthen sinews and bones
For low-back pain and weak sinews and bones of Kidney deficiency — the foremost low-back-knee specialist (the pillar of Du Huo Ji Sheng / You Gui).
Consolidate below, settle above
The deficient-below wing for Liver-yang hyperactivity (Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin) — consolidating its root so yang does not usurp upward.
Calm the fetus
For restless fetus of Liver-Kidney deficiency — the embodiment of supplementing the Kidney to calm the fetus.
Classic Pairings
with Niu Xi — The standard low-back-knee pairing
Du Zhong supplements the sinews and bones, Niu Xi conducts to the diseased place — the twin pillars of low-back-pain formulas.
with Sang Ji Sheng — Supplement the Kidney, expel damp
Both herbs supplement Liver-Kidney and also expel wind-damp — the supplementing wing of Du Huo Ji Sheng.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

肉桂Rou Gui

Cinnamomi Cortex
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
辛、甘，大热。归肾、脾、心、肝经。
气机定位
入 · 温（温命门引火归元）
桂树之干皮，气厚味浓而下守——与桂枝（嫩枝轻扬走表）同源而分道：枝走表通阳、皮入里温火。三职皆在“下”与“里”：温命门之火（右归益火之源）、引火归元（虚阳上浮之格阳、交泰丸导心火下交）、温通血脉散沉寒（寒凝痛经腹痛）。肾气丸原方用桂枝、后世多易肉桂——一字之换即“通阳化气”与“温补命火”的重心之移。
功用与机理
补火助阳
命门火衰之畏寒肢冷、阳痿宫冷——右归之火种、“益火之源以消阴翳”。
引火归元
虚阳上浮之面赤咽痛（下寒上热）——导浮火下归其宅：交泰丸一份肉桂即此职。
温通血脉
寒凝血滞之痛经腹痛阴疽——温而兼通（芍药汤二克反佐防凉遏亦此性）。
经典药对
配 附子 — 桂附之温
附子走而不守、肉桂守而不走——命门之火一动一守。
配 黄连 — 交泰水火
连十桂一：心火下降、肾阳上承——枢机之最小配置。
配 地黄 — 阴中求阳
熟地大队滋阴中一点桂火——景岳右归之心法。
类药鉴别
补阳药选用桂枝附子干姜
所在方
右归丸芍药汤独活寄生汤交泰丸真人养脏汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, sweet, very hot. Enters the Kidney, Spleen, Heart, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · warm
The trunk bark of the cinnamon tree, thick in qi and rich in flavor, guarding below — of the same source as Gui Zhi (the tender twig, light-rising, traveling the exterior) but parting ways: the twig travels the exterior and frees yang, the bark enters the interior and warms the fire. Its three offices are all in the "below" and "interior": warming Ming Men fire (You Gui's boosting the source of fire), guiding fire back to the origin (blockaded yang of floating deficient-yang, Jiao Tai Wan's conducting Heart fire down to interact), warming and freeing the blood vessels and dispersing deep cold (cold-congelation dysmenorrhea and abdominal pain). The original Shen Qi Wan uses Gui Zhi, later ages mostly substitute Rou Gui — a one-word change is the shift of emphasis from "free yang and transform qi" to "warm-supplement Ming Men fire."
Functions & Mechanism
Supplement fire, aid yang
For aversion to cold, cold limbs, impotence and cold womb of Ming Men fire debilitation — the fire-seed of You Gui, "boosting the source of fire to dispel the yin shade."
Guide fire back to the origin
For red face and sore throat of floating deficient-yang (cold below, heat above) — conducting the floating fire back to its dwelling: the one part of Rou Gui in Jiao Tai Wan is this office.
Warm and free the blood vessels
For dysmenorrhea, abdominal pain and yin-abscess of cold-congelation blood-stagnation — warming with freeing (the two grams as counter-assistant in Shao Yao Tang preventing cold-constraint is also this nature).
Classic Pairings
with Fu Zi — The warmth of Rou Gui and Fu Zi
Fu Zi travels and does not guard, Rou Gui guards and does not travel — the Ming Men fire, one moving, one guarding.
