with Huang Lian — Jiao Tai water and fire
Huang Lian ten to Rou Gui one: Heart fire descending, Kidney yang bearing up — the smallest configuration of the pivot.
with Di Huang — Seek yang within yin
A touch of Rou Gui fire amid a board of Shu Di yin-enrichment — the heart-method of Jingyue's You Gui.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

沙参Sha Shen

Glehniae/Adenophorae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：北沙参、南沙参
性味归经
甘、微苦，微寒。归肺、胃经。
气机定位
入 · 润（养阴清肺益胃）
甘凉柔润入肺胃，“甘寒法”的当家药：养阴而不腻、清热而不寒——燥伤阴亏之局（邪已退七八、纯滋则碍、苦寒则燥）恰需这一档轻柔。三方全勤（一贯煎金水相生佐金平木／沙参麦冬肺胃双养／益胃汤专滋胃阴）勾出它的疆界：麦冬之近亲而更轻清——麦冬滋中带守（兼益心气）、沙参滋中带清（兼疏余热），北沙参滋养力胜、南沙参兼化痰，一名两药按虚痰取舍。
功用与机理
养肺阴清肺热
燥咳干咳、劳嗽——温燥伤肺之后段主力。
益胃生津
胃阴伤之口干不饥（益胃汤）——甘凉悦胃。
佐金平木
一贯煎借其滋肺以制肝——五行生克的用药化。
经典药对
配 麦门冬 — 甘寒双柱
沙麦并肩——沙参麦冬汤之名即此对，肺胃阴伤之标配。
配 玉竹 — 润而不腻
二味皆轻清之润——滋阴不恋邪之组。
类药鉴别
麦门冬玉竹天冬
所在方
一贯煎沙参麦冬汤益胃汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, slightly bitter, slightly cold. Enters the Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · moisten
Sweet-cool, soft-moist, entering the Lung and stomach, the flagship herb of the "sweet-cool method": nourishing yin without cloying, clearing heat without cold — the situation of dryness-damaged yin depletion (pathogen already seven-eighths retreated, pure enrichment hinders, bitter-cold dries) needs just this gentle gradation. Present in all three formulas (Yi Guan Jian's metal-water mutual generation assisting metal to calm wood, Sha Shen Mai Dong's dual Lung-stomach nourishing, Yi Wei Tang's stomach-yin enriching), sketching its territory: a close relative of Mai Dong but lighter-clearing — Mai Dong enriches with a measure of guarding (also boosting Heart qi), Sha Shen enriches with a measure of clearing (also coursing residual heat); Bei Sha Shen stronger in nourishing, Nan Sha Shen also transforming phlegm, one name two herbs chosen by deficiency or phlegm.
Functions & Mechanism
Nourish Lung yin, clear Lung heat
For dry cough and taxation cough — the main force of the later stage of warm-dryness harming the Lung.
Boost the stomach, engender fluid
For dry mouth without hunger of stomach-yin damage (Yi Wei Tang) — sweet-cool pleasing the stomach.
Assist metal to calm wood
Yi Guan Jian borrows its enriching of the Lung to check the Liver — the pharmacological form of five-phase engendering and restraining.
Classic Pairings
with Mai Men Dong — The sweet-cold twin pillars
Sha Shen and Mai Dong shoulder to shoulder — the name Sha Shen Mai Dong Tang is this pair, the standard pairing for Lung-stomach yin damage.
with Yu Zhu — Moisten without cloying
Both light-clearing moist herbs — a set that enriches yin without clinging to the pathogen.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

川楝子Chuan Lian Zi

Toosendan Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：金铃子
性味归经
苦，寒，小毒。归肝、小肠、膀胱经。
气机定位
行 · 泄（疏肝泄热止痛）
方中之职
苦寒入肝，疏肝气、泄肝火而止痛——疏泄药中唯一性凉者，阴虚肝郁非它莫属（一贯煎之点睛）。有小毒不宜过量久服。
所在方
一贯煎镇肝熄风汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, cold, mildly toxic. Enters the Liver, Small Intestine, Bladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · discharge
Role in Formula
Bitter-cold entering the Liver, coursing Liver qi, draining Liver fire and stopping pain — the only cool herb among the coursing-draining herbs, indispensable for yin-deficiency Liver-constraint (the finishing touch of Yi Guan Jian). Slightly toxic, not for excessive or prolonged use.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

女贞子Nv Zhen Zi

Ligustri Lucidi Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘、苦，凉。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 滋（平补肝肾）
方中之职
冬至采实，甘凉平补肝肾之阴、乌须明目——补而不腻之典范，二至丸之君。酒蒸用。
所在方
二至丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bitter, cool. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · enrich yin
Role in Formula
Fruit gathered at winter solstice, sweet-cool evenly supplementing Liver-Kidney yin, darkening the beard and brightening the eyes — a model of supplementing without cloying, the sovereign of Er Zhi Wan. Used wine-steamed.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

旱莲草Han Lian Cao

Ecliptae Herba
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：墨旱莲
性味归经
甘、酸，寒。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 凉（滋阴凉血止血）
方中之职
夏至采草，折之有墨汁——滋肝肾之阴兼凉血止血：阴虚之衄血、经多色鲜专此。与女贞子成二至之对。
所在方
二至丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, sour, cold. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · cool blood
Role in Formula
Grass gathered at summer solstice, exuding an ink-like juice when broken — enriching Liver-Kidney yin while cooling blood and stopping bleeding: the specialist for yin-deficiency nosebleed and heavy bright menses. Forms with Nu Zhen Zi the Er Zhi pair.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

香附Xiang Fu

Cyperi Rhizoma
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：莎草根
性味归经
辛、微苦、微甘，平。归肝、脾、三焦经。
气机定位
行 · 解（疏肝理气之总司）
“气病之总司、女科之主帅”（李时珍语）：辛散苦降甘缓而性平——行气药中唯一不偏寒热者，故肝郁气滞无论兼寒兼热皆可为帅。专入肝经血分之气：疏肝解郁（柴胡疏肝之臣）、调经止痛（气行则血行，经带胎产之气滞皆司）——“气中之血药”与川芎之“血中之气药”恰成镜像一对。醋制入肝止痛更专。
功用与机理
疏肝解郁
肝郁气滞之胁痛脘胀——柴胡疏肝散、膈下逐瘀之行气翼。
调经止痛
气滞之月经不调痛经乳胀——女科主帅之本义：调气即调经。
经典药对
配 柴胡 — 疏肝之纲
柴胡升散解郁、香附行滞止痛——柴胡疏肝散双核。
配 川芎 — 气血双行
香附气中之血药、川芎血中之气药——镜像一对同攻郁痛。
类药鉴别
理气药选用柴胡川芎乌药
所在方
柴胡疏肝散身痛逐瘀汤膈下逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, slightly bitter, slightly sweet, neutral. Enters the Liver, Spleen, San Jiao channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · resolve
"The commander-in-chief of qi disease, the marshal of gynecology" (Li Shizhen's words): acrid-dispersing, bitter-descending, sweet-moderating and even in nature — the only qi-moving herb without cold or heat bias, so it can marshal Liver-constraint qi-stagnation whether with cold or with heat. Entering specifically the qi of the Liver channel's blood level: coursing the Liver and resolving constraint (the minister of Chai Hu Shu Gan), regulating menses and stopping pain (qi moving, blood moves — governing the qi stagnation of menstruation, discharge, pregnancy and delivery) — "the blood-herb within qi" forms exactly a mirror pair with Chuan Xiong's "qi-herb within blood." Vinegar-processed it enters the Liver and stops pain more specifically.
Functions & Mechanism
Course the Liver, resolve constraint
For hypochondriac pain and epigastric distension of Liver-constraint qi-stagnation — the qi-moving wing of Chai Hu Shu Gan San and Ge Xia Zhu Yu.
Regulate menses, stop pain
For irregular menses, dysmenorrhea and breast distension of qi stagnation — the original meaning of the gynecology marshal: regulating qi is regulating menses.
Classic Pairings
with Chai Hu — The outline of coursing the Liver
Chai Hu ascends-disperses and resolves constraint, Xiang Fu moves stagnation and stops pain — the twin core of Chai Hu Shu Gan San.
with Chuan Xiong — Move both qi and blood
Xiang Fu the blood-herb within qi, Chuan Xiong the qi-herb within blood — a mirror pair together attacking constraint-pain.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

薄荷Bo He

Menthae Herba
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
辛，凉。归肺、肝经。
气机定位
出 · 散（辛凉轻散）
辛凉之最轻者，一药跨两法系：在温病阵中司“透”（银翘桑菊之辛凉解表——散风热、清头目、利咽喉），在和肝阵中司“扬”（逍遥散三克助柴疏达——轻清上行以开郁遏）。两职同源：薄荷之性是“轻扬宣散”，遇表则透表、遇郁则开郁。后下取其气（久煎则辛香尽失）——剂法即药性的注脚。
功用与机理
疏散风热
风热表证之头痛咽痛目赤——辛凉解表阵之标配（银翘桑菊养阴清肺皆在）。
清利头目咽喉
轻扬上行，头面诸窍之风热专达。
疏肝解郁
逍遥散之佐：三克轻扬助肝气条达——剂量定职（大则散表、小则疏肝）。
经典药对
配 柴胡 — 疏达之对
柴胡转枢、薄荷轻扬——逍遥散疏肝双子。
配 连翘 — 辛凉透散
薄荷透其表、连翘散其结——卫分标配。
类药鉴别
解表药选用荆芥桑叶柴胡
所在方
逍遥散丹栀逍遥散银翘散桑菊饮养阴清肺汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, cool. Enters the Lung, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · disperse
The lightest of the acrid-cool herbs, one herb spanning two lineages: in a warm-disease array it takes "venting" (the acrid-cool exterior-resolving of Yin Qiao and Sang Ju — dispersing wind-heat, clearing head and eyes, benefiting the throat), in a Liver-harmonizing array it takes "lifting" (Xiao Yao San's three grams aiding Chai Hu to course — light-clearing and ascending to open constraint). The two offices are of one source: mint's nature is "light-rising diffusing-dispersal," meeting the exterior it vents the exterior, meeting constraint it opens constraint. Added last to take its qi (long boiling loses all its acrid aroma) — the decoction method a footnote to the herb's nature.
Functions & Mechanism
Course and disperse wind-heat
For headache, sore throat and red eyes of a wind-heat exterior pattern — the standard part of the acrid-cool exterior-resolving array (present in Yin Qiao, Sang Ju and Yang Yin Qing Fei).
Clear and benefit head, eyes and throat
Light-rising and ascending, reaching wind-heat of the head-and-face orifices specifically.
Course the Liver, resolve constraint
The assistant of Xiao Yao San: three grams light-rising to aid the Liver qi to course — the dose sets the office (large disperses the exterior, small courses the Liver).
Classic Pairings
with Chai Hu — A coursing-reaching pair
Chai Hu turns the pivot, Bo He light-rises — the Liver-coursing twins of Xiao Yao San.
with Lian Yao — Acrid-cool venting-dispersal
Bo He vents its exterior, Lian Qiao dissipates its bind — the standard defensive-level pairing.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

天麻Tian Ma

Gastrodiae Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：定风草
性味归经
甘，平。归肝经。
气机定位
入 · 定（息风止痉平肝）
方中之职
风药中之定风草：甘平不燥，息肝风、定眩晕——内风诸证（眩晕、头痛、抽搐）无问寒热虚实皆可配伍出入，“无天麻不能治眩晕”。
所在方
天麻钩藤饮半夏白术天麻汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · settle
Role in Formula
The wind-settling grass among wind-herbs: sweet-even and not drying, extinguishing Liver wind and settling dizziness — for all internal-wind patterns (dizziness, headache, convulsion), regardless of cold-heat or deficiency-repletion it can be combined in, "without Tian Ma one cannot treat dizziness."
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

钩藤Gou Teng

Uncariae Ramulus cum Uncis
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘，凉。归肝、心包经。
气机定位
降 · 清（清热平肝息风）
方中之职
甘凉入肝，清热平肝、息风定惊——肝热生风之首选，轻清而不伤正。后下（久煎失效）。
所在方
天麻钩藤饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, cool. Enters the Liver, Pericardium channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · clear
Role in Formula
Sweet-cool entering the Liver, clearing heat and settling the Liver, extinguishing wind and settling fright — the first choice for Liver-heat engendering wind, light-clearing without harming the upright. Added last (long boiling loses its effect).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

石决明Shi Jue Ming

Haliotidis Concha
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：鲍鱼壳
性味归经
咸，寒。归肝经。
气机定位
降 · 潜（介类潜阳明目）
方中之职
介类之潜专入肝经：平肝潜阳、清肝明目——与龙牡之别在专（龙牡兼心肾之神，此专肝阳肝火之目）。先煎。
所在方
天麻钩藤饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
salty, cold. Enters the Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · subdue
Role in Formula
A shell-substance subduer entering the Liver channel specifically: settling the Liver and subduing yang, clearing the Liver and brightening the eyes — differing from Long-Mu in focus (Long-Mu also tend the Heart-Kidney spirit, this focuses on the Liver-yang and Liver-fire eye). Boiled first.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

白附子Bai Fu Zi

Typhonii Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：禹白附
性味归经
辛，温，有毒。归胃、肝经。
气机定位
升 · 引（祛风痰上行头面）
方中之职
辛温燥烈而性上行，专祛头面之风痰——牵正散引经之君。有毒制用，与附子（乌头属）非一物。
所在方
牵正散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm, toxic. Enters the Stomach, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Ascending · conduct downward
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm, drying-fierce and rising in nature, dispelling wind-phlegm of the head and face specifically — the channel-guiding sovereign of Qian Zheng San. Toxic, used processed; not the same herb as Fu Zi (the Wu Tou genus).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

僵蚕Jiang Can

Bombyx Batryticatus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：白僵蚕
性味归经
咸、辛，平。归肝、肺经。
气机定位
通 · 搜（虫类祛风化痰）
方中之职
感菌而僵之蚕，得金气而燥：祛风止痉、化痰散结、通络——风痰阻络（面瘫、惊痫、瘰疬）之虫药主力。
所在方
牵正散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
salty, acrid, neutral. Enters the Liver, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Freeing · track wind
Role in Formula
A silkworm stiffened by fungal infection, gaining metal qi and thus drying: dispelling wind and stopping spasm, transforming phlegm and dissipating binds, freeing the collaterals — the main insect-herb for wind-phlegm blocking the collaterals (facial palsy, fright-epilepsy, scrofula).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

全蝎Quan Xie

Scorpio
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛，平，有毒。归肝经。
气机定位
通 · 搜（搜风通络止痉）
方中之职
虫类搜风第一梯队：息风止痉、攻毒散结、通络止痛——草木不及之细络非虫不达。有毒量宜小（3g内），孕妇忌。
所在方
牵正散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, neutral, toxic. Enters the Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Freeing · track wind
Role in Formula
The first tier of insect wind-searchers: extinguishing wind and stopping spasm, attacking toxin and dissipating binds, freeing the collaterals and stopping pain — the fine collaterals that plants cannot reach, only insects arrive at. Toxic, dose small (within 3g), shunned in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

龟板Gui Ban

Testudinis Carapax et Plastrum
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：龟甲
性味归经
甘、咸，寒。归肝、肾、心经。
气机定位
降 · 潜（滋阴潜阳）
方中之职
龟甲生用：滋阴潜阳、益肾健骨——与其胶（龟板胶）分工：生板潜镇力胜（镇肝熄风用之），熬胶填补力专（左归用之）。先煎。
所在方
镇肝熄风汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, salty, cold. Enters the Liver, Kidney, Heart channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · subdue
Role in Formula
Tortoise-plastron used raw: enriching yin and subduing yang, boosting the Kidney and strengthening the bones — divided from its glue (Gui Ban Jiao): the raw plastron wins in subduing (used in Zhen Gan Xi Feng), the boiled glue focuses on filling (used in Zuo Gui). Boiled first.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

玄参Xuan Shen

Scrophulariae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：元参
性味归经
甘、苦、咸，微寒。归肺、胃、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 滋（滋阴降火解毒）
色黑入肾、质润多液而味兼咸苦：一身三职全在“阴分之热”——滋阴降火（肾水亏而虚火炎：镇肝熄风、天王补心之滋翼）、凉血解毒（温毒发斑咽肿）、软坚散结（咸能软坚：消瘰丸君药）。增液汤以之为君一两（超地黄麦冬）正因它“滋而能行”：润下通便兼软坚——滋阴药中带“动”性者。
功用与机理
滋阴降火
阴虚火炎之骨蒸咽痛心烦——壮水制火之常备（补心丹、镇肝熄风皆用）。
凉血解毒利咽
温毒咽肿、白喉（养阴清肺之臣）——咽科阴分之专药。
软坚散结润下
瘰疬痰核（消瘰丸君）、津枯便结（增液汤君）——咸软与润行一体。
经典药对
配 麦门冬 — 增液之核
玄参咸润软坚、麦冬甘润滋液——增水行舟双柱。
配 牡蛎 — 咸寒软坚
二咸相合专消痰核之坚——消瘰丸之君臣。
配 地黄 — 凉滋两深
生地凉血、玄参降火——温病伤阴与咽科共用之底。
类药鉴别
清热药选用地黄麦门冬知母
所在方
镇肝熄风汤增液汤养阴清肺汤天王补心丹消瘰丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bitter, salty, slightly cold. Enters the Lung, Stomach, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · enrich yin
Black in color entering the Kidney, moist-substanced and full of fluid with a flavor also salty-bitter: its three offices all in "heat of the yin level" — enriching yin and downbearing fire (Kidney water depleted with deficiency-fire flaming: the enriching wing of Zhen Gan Xi Feng and Tian Wang Bu Xin), cooling blood and resolving toxin (warm-toxin maculae, throat swelling), softening hardness and dissipating binds (salty can soften: the sovereign of Xiao Luo Wan). Zeng Ye Tang takes it as sovereign at one liang (over Di Huang and Mai Dong) precisely because it "enriches yet can move": moistening-descending to free stool while softening hardness — a yin-enriching herb with a "moving" nature.
Functions & Mechanism
Enrich yin, downbear fire
For steaming-bone, sore throat and vexation of yin-deficiency fire flaming — a staple of boosting water to check fire (used in Bu Xin Dan and Zhen Gan Xi Feng).
Cool blood, resolve toxin, benefit the throat
For warm-toxin throat swelling and diphtheria (the minister of Yang Yin Qing Fei) — the yin-level throat specialist.
Soften hardness, dissipate binds, moisten downward
For scrofula and phlegm-nodes (sovereign of Xiao Luo Wan) and fluid-withered bound stool (sovereign of Zeng Ye Tang) — salty-softening and moist-moving in one.
Classic Pairings
with Mai Men Dong — The core of Zeng Ye
Xuan Shen salty-moist softens hardness, Mai Dong sweet-moist enriches fluid — the twin pillars of boosting-water-to-float-the-boat.
with Mu Li — Salty-cold softening hardness
Two salty herbs combining specifically to dissolve the hardness of phlegm-nodes — the sovereign-minister of Xiao Luo Wan.
with Di Huang — Cooling and enriching, both deep
Sheng Di cools blood, Xuan Shen downbears fire — a foundation shared by warm-disease yin-damage and throat medicine.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

天冬Tian Dong

Asparagi Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：天门冬
性味归经
甘、苦，寒。归肺、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 润（滋阴润燥）
方中之职
甘寒多汁：养肺肾之阴而清虚火——与麦冬相较更寒更滋（麦冬兼益胃生津，天冬专肺肾之燥）。
所在方
镇肝熄风汤天王补心丹
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bitter, cold. Enters the Lung, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · moisten
Role in Formula
Sweet-cold and juicy: nourishing Lung-Kidney yin and clearing deficiency fire — colder and more enriching than Mai Dong (Mai Dong also boosts the stomach and engenders fluid, Tian Dong focuses on Lung-Kidney dryness).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麦芽Mai Ya

Hordei Fructus Germinatus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘，平。归脾、胃、肝经。
气机定位
行 · 消（消食和中疏肝）
方中之职
谷芽之属而兼入肝：消米面之积、和胃，生用尤能疏肝解郁（张锡纯谓其“虽为脾胃之药实善舒肝气”）——镇肝熄风以生麦芽顺肝之性。回乳大量炒用。
所在方
镇肝熄风汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · disperse food
Role in Formula
Of the grain-sprout kind but also entering the Liver: dissolving grain-and-flour accumulation and harmonizing the stomach, and used raw it especially courses the Liver and resolves constraint (Zhang Xichun called it "though a Spleen-Stomach herb, truly good at soothing Liver qi") — Zhen Gan Xi Feng uses raw Mai Ya to go along with the Liver's nature. For weaning, stir-fry in large dose.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

益母草Yi Mu Cao

Leonuri Herba
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦、辛，微寒。归肝、心包、膀胱经。
气机定位
行 · 利（活血调经利水）
方中之职
妇科经产之要药：活血调经、利水消肿——血水同治之性（血不利则为水的用药化身），天麻钩藤饮借其活血利水以助降压。
所在方
天麻钩藤饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, acrid, slightly cold. Enters the Liver, Pericardium, Bladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · drain damp
Role in Formula
An essential for gynecological menstruation and delivery: invigorating blood and regulating menses, benefiting water and dispersing swelling — a blood-water co-treating nature (the herb-embodiment of "blood not moving becomes water"), Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin borrowing its blood-invigorating water-benefiting to aid pressure-lowering.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桑寄生Sang Ji Sheng

Taxilli Herba
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦、甘，平。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 养（补肝肾祛风湿）
方中之职
寄生桑木而得其气：祛风湿、补肝肾、强筋骨、安胎——痹证日久肝肾已虚者最宜（独活寄生汤之要角），补养与祛邪一身兼。
所在方
天麻钩藤饮独活寄生汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, sweet, neutral. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · nourish
Role in Formula
Parasitic on the mulberry and gaining its qi: dispelling wind-damp, supplementing Liver-Kidney, strengthening sinews and bones, and calming the fetus — most apt for chronic bi with Liver-Kidney already deficient (a key player in Du Huo Ji Sheng Tang), holding both supplementation and pathogen-expulsion in one.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

夜交藤Ye Jiao Teng

Polygoni Multiflori Caulis
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：首乌藤
性味归经
甘，平。归心、肝经。
气机定位
入 · 通（养心安神通络）
方中之职
何首乌之藤，夜则相交：养血安神（阴血虚之失眠多梦）兼祛风通络（血虚之肢体酸痛）——安神药中兼走络者。
所在方
天麻钩藤饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Heart, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · free
Role in Formula
The vine of He Shou Wu, its tendrils intertwining at night: nourishing blood and calming the spirit (insomnia and dreaminess of yin-blood deficiency) while dispelling wind and freeing the collaterals (aching limbs of blood deficiency) — the spirit-calmer that also travels the collaterals.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

苏子Su Zi

Perillae Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：紫苏子
性味归经
辛，温。归肺、大肠经。
气机定位
降 · 化（降气化痰平喘）
方中之职
苏之子实专主降：降肺气之逆、化痰平喘、润肠——气逆痰壅之喘咳首选（三子养亲、苏子降气汤之君）。与苏叶分工：叶散表、子降气。
所在方
三子养亲汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Lung, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · transform
Role in Formula
The seed of perilla governs descent specifically: descending Lung-qi counterflow, transforming phlegm and calming wheeze, moistening the bowel — the first choice for wheeze-cough of qi-counterflow phlegm-congestion (sovereign of San Zi Yang Qin and Su Zi Jiang Qi Tang). Divided from Su Ye: the leaf disperses the exterior, the seed descends qi.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

白芥子Bai Jie Zi

Sinapis Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛，温。归肺经。
气机定位
行 · 豁（温肺豁痰利气）
方中之职
辛温气锐，善豁“皮里膜外之痰”——痰在胸胁经络关节之间、他药不能达者芥子达之（三子养亲、阳和汤、控涎丹皆倚此性）。
所在方
三子养亲汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · expel phlegm
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm and sharp in qi, good at opening "phlegm beneath the skin and membranes" — phlegm lodged between the chest, hypochondria, channels and joints that other herbs cannot reach, Bai Jie Zi reaches (San Zi Yang Qin, Yang He Tang and Kong Xian Dan all rely on this nature).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

莱菔子Lai Fu Zi

Raphani Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：萝卜子
性味归经
辛、甘，平。归脾、胃、肺经。
气机定位
降 · 消（消食降气化痰）
方中之职
萝卜之子：消食除胀之力最著，兼降气化痰——食积与痰气互结之胸痞喘满一子两解（三子养亲、保和丸同用）。生升熟降，炒用为常。
所在方
三子养亲汤保和丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, sweet, neutral. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · disperse food
Role in Formula
The seed of the radish: most notable in dissolving food accumulation and removing distension, while descending qi and transforming phlegm — resolving both the chest focal fullness and wheeze of food accumulation bound with phlegm-qi (used together in San Zi Yang Qin and Bao He Wan). Raw it rises, cooked it descends; stir-fried is standard.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

红花Hong Hua

Carthami Flos
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
辛，温。归心、肝经。
气机定位
行 · 活（活血通经）
辛温行散、色赤入血：活血通经、祛瘀止痛——与桃仁天生一对（“桃红”为逐瘀法系的通用活血药对）：桃仁质重润降、破有形之瘀块，红花轻扬辛散、行血中之滞涩——一破一行、一沉一浮，故凡瘀证二味几乎同进退。剂量两读：少用养血和血、多用破血通经——同药异量又一例。
功用与机理
活血通经
经闭痛经、恶露不行——妇科血瘀之通用行血子。
祛瘀止痛
癥瘕积聚、跌打瘀肿、胸痹刺痛——逐瘀诸方（血府、身痛、膈下、补阳还五）全勤出场。
经典药对
配 桃仁 — 桃红之对
桃破其块、红行其滞——逐瘀法系通用双子星。
配 当归 — 养行相济
归养其血、红行其瘀——祛瘀不伤血之配。
类药鉴别
活血药选用桃仁丹参川芎
所在方
桃红四物汤血府逐瘀汤身痛逐瘀汤补阳还五汤膈下逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Heart, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · invigorate blood
Acrid-warm and dispersing, red in color entering the blood: invigorating blood and freeing menses, expelling stasis and stopping pain — a natural pair with Tao Ren (the "Tao-Hong" being the Blood-Stasis lineage's general blood-invigorating herb-pair): Tao Ren heavy-substanced, moist-descending, breaking a tangible stasis-mass, Hong Hua light-rising, acrid-dispersing, moving the stagnation within the blood — one breaking, one moving, one sinking, one floating, so in any stasis pattern the two nearly advance and retreat together. Two dose readings: small dose nourishes and harmonizes blood, large dose breaks blood and frees menses — another same-herb different-dose case.
Functions & Mechanism
Invigorate blood, free menses
For blocked menses, dysmenorrhea and retained lochia — the general blood-moving piece for gynecological blood stasis.
Expel stasis, stop pain
For concretions and accumulations, traumatic stasis-swelling and stabbing chest-bi pain — present in all the stasis-expelling formulas (Xue Fu, Shen Tong, Ge Xia, Bu Yang Huan Wu).
Classic Pairings
with Tao Ren — The Tao-Hong pair
Tao Ren breaks its mass, Hong Hua moves its stagnation — the general twin-star of the stasis-expelling lineage.
with Dang Gui — Nourishing and moving aiding each other
Dang Gui nourishes its blood, Hong Hua moves its stasis — a pairing that expels stasis without harming blood.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

秦艽Qin Jiao

Gentianae Macrophyllae Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛、苦，平。归胃、肝、胆经。
气机定位
行 · 舒（祛风湿舒筋络）
方中之职
风药中之润剂第二席（不燥）：祛风湿、舒筋络、退虚热——痹证新久皆宜，身痛逐瘀、大秦艽汤之要角。
所在方
身痛逐瘀汤独活寄生汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, neutral. Enters the Stomach, Liver, Gallbladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · soothe sinew
Role in Formula
The second seat of moist herbs among wind-herbs (not drying): dispelling wind-damp, relaxing the sinews and collaterals, abating deficiency heat — apt for both new and chronic bi, a key player in Shen Tong Zhu Yu and Da Qin Jiao Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

羌活Qiang Huo

Notopterygii Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归膀胱、肾经。
气机定位
出 · 达（散寒祛风胜湿）
方中之职
气雄而散，主上半身之风寒湿：太阳经之头项肩背痛专司——与独活分工上下（羌上独下），蠲痹、身痛逐瘀取其达上。
所在方
身痛逐瘀汤蠲痹汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Bladder, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · outthrust
Role in Formula
Powerful in qi and dispersing, governing wind-cold-damp of the upper body: the specialist for Tai Yang channel head-nape-shoulder-back pain — divided from Du Huo by upper and lower (Qiang above, Du below), Juan Bi and Shen Tong Zhu Yu take its reaching of the upper.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

没药Mo Yao

Myrrha
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛、苦，平。归心、肝、脾经。
气机定位
行 · 定（散瘀定痛）
方中之职
树脂之药，散血化瘀、消肿定痛——与乳香为对（乳香行气活血偏伸筋、没药散血化瘀偏定痛），伤科痛证之常客。炒去油用。
所在方
身痛逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, neutral. Enters the Heart, Liver, Spleen channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · settle
Role in Formula
A resin herb, dispersing blood and transforming stasis, dispersing swelling and settling pain — paired with Ru Xiang (Ru Xiang moves qi and invigorates blood, biased to stretching sinews; Mo Yao disperses blood and transforms stasis, biased to settling pain), a regular in traumatology pain patterns. Stir-fried to remove the oil.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

五灵脂Wu Ling Zhi

Trogopterori Faeces
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
苦、咸、甘，温。归肝经。
气机定位
行 · 化（化瘀止痛）
鼯鼠之矢而独入肝经血分：化瘀止痛之力专而猛——“瘀痛”二字是它全部战场（失笑散半壁／身痛逐瘀／膈下逐瘀三阵皆任止痛先锋）。生用行血、炒用兼止血——与蒲黄同款“两向”性格，故二味天配（失笑散）。十九畏之“人参畏五灵脂”是本药最重要的教学点：与参同用之禁（或谓相畏实为相制，临床仍以避为常）——配伍禁忌学的活案例。
功用与机理
化瘀止痛
瘀血诸痛（心腹胁痛经痛）——止痛专才，逐瘀诸方之先锋。
炒用止血
瘀血内阻之出血（崩漏经多夹块）——化瘀即止血，通因通用。
经典药对
配 蒲黄 — 失笑之对
灵脂化瘀止痛、蒲黄行血兼止——瘀痛最小配置。
配 延胡索 — 止痛双雄
灵脂专血分、延胡气血两行——膈下逐瘀之止痛组。
类药鉴别
活血药选用蒲黄延胡索没药
所在方
身痛逐瘀汤失笑散膈下逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, salty, sweet, warm. Enters the Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · transform
The droppings of the flying squirrel, entering the Liver channel's blood level alone: its stasis-transforming pain-stopping power focused and fierce — the two words "stasis pain" are its whole battlefield (taking the pain-stopping vanguard in all three arrays of Shi Xiao San's half, Shen Tong Zhu Yu, Ge Xia Zhu Yu). Raw it moves blood, fried it also stops bleeding — the same "two-direction" character as Pu Huang, so the two are a natural pair (Shi Xiao San). The nineteen antagonisms' "ginseng fears Wu Ling Zhi" is this herb's most important teaching point: the prohibition against using it with ginseng (some say the mutual fear is in fact mutual restraint; clinically avoidance remains the norm) — a live case in combination-contraindication studies.
Functions & Mechanism
Transform stasis, stop pain
For all stasis pains (heart, abdomen, hypochondriac and menstrual pain) — a pain-stopping specialist, the vanguard of the stasis-expelling formulas.
Fried, stop bleeding
For bleeding of internal stasis obstruction (flooding and heavy menses with clots) — transforming stasis is stopping bleeding, freeing to treat what freely leaks.
Classic Pairings
with Pu Huang — The Shi Xiao pair
Wu Ling Zhi transforms stasis and stops pain, Pu Huang moves blood and also stops it — the smallest configuration for stasis pain.
with Yan Hu Suo — The twin champions of stopping pain
Wu Ling Zhi specializes in the blood level, Yan Hu Suo moves both qi and blood — the pain-stopping set of Ge Xia Zhu Yu.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

地龙Di Long

Pheretima
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：蚯蚓
性味归经
咸，寒。归肝、脾、膀胱经。
气机定位
通 · 走（通络利痹清热）
方中之职
虫类通络之寒性一员：通经活络（半身不遂、痹痛）、清热息风、平喘利尿——补阳还五借其走窜引芪药之力周行经络。
所在方
身痛逐瘀汤补阳还五汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
salty, cold. Enters the Liver, Spleen, Bladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Freeing · move outward
Role in Formula
A cold-natured member of the insect collateral-freers: freeing the channels and collaterals (hemiplegia, bi pain), clearing heat and extinguishing wind, calming wheeze and benefiting urine — Bu Yang Huan Wu borrows its coursing to lead the Huang Qi force through the channels.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

蒲黄Pu Huang

Typhae Pollen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘，平。归肝、心包经。
气机定位
行 · 两向（活血止血）
方中之职
香蒲之花粉：生用活血祛瘀、炒用收涩止血——一药两向，故瘀血兼出血之证（产后恶露、经多而痛）最宜。包煎。与古本大黄香蒲汤之用草透心者一物两部。
所在方
失笑散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Liver, Pericardium channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · bidirectional
Role in Formula
The pollen of the cattail: raw it invigorates blood and expels stasis, fried it astringes and stops bleeding — one herb two directions, so most apt for stasis with bleeding (postpartum lochia, heavy painful menses). Wrap-boiled. The same herb as the venting-the-Heart use in the Guilin edition Da Huang Xiang Pu Tang, in two parts.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

丹参Dan Shen

Salviae Miltiorrhizae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
苦，微寒。归心、肝经。
气机定位
行 · 通（活血凉血安神）
苦微寒入心肝血分，“一味丹参功同四物”：活血祛瘀而兼养血之用（性平缓不伤正）、凉血消痈、除烦安神——瘀、热、神三界一肩挑。丹参饮以一两为君治心胃刺痛、补心丹借其“静中一动”防滋腻之壅——现代成为心脑血管第一药，其古典身份（凉血安神之活血药）恰是今日战场的完整注脚：瘀热扰心之胸痹心悸，正合其性。
功用与机理
活血祛瘀
瘀阻之心胃刺痛、经闭癥瘕——性缓不峻，久服可任（与桃红之攻分档）。
凉血消痈
疮痈、瘀热互结——血分之热瘀同清。
除烦安神
热扰心神之烦悸不眠——补心丹之佐：活血与安神一子两职。
经典药对
配 檀香 — 丹参饮之核
丹参重任血分、檀香轻取气分——七血三气治心胃刺痛。
配 酸枣仁 — 动静安神
枣仁养而静、丹参行而清——虚烦兼瘀热之寐差。
类药鉴别
活血药选用红花川芎酸枣仁
所在方
丹参饮天王补心丹
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, slightly cold. Enters the Heart, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · free
Bitter and slightly cold, entering the Heart and Liver blood level, "a single Dan Shen has the merit of Si Wu": invigorating blood and expelling stasis while also nourishing blood (even and gentle in nature, not harming the upright), cooling blood and dispersing abscesses, removing vexation and calming the spirit — shouldering the three worlds of stasis, heat and spirit. Dan Shen Yin takes one liang as sovereign to treat stabbing heart-stomach pain, Bu Xin Dan borrows its "one mover amid stillness" to prevent enriching congestion — in modern times a foremost herb for cardiovascular and cerebrovascular disease, its classical identity (a blood-invigorator that cools blood and calms the spirit) being exactly the complete footnote to today's battlefield: chest bi and palpitation of stasis-heat harassing the Heart suit its nature.
Functions & Mechanism
Invigorate blood, expel stasis
For stabbing heart-stomach pain and blocked menses and concretions of stasis — gentle and not fierce, bearing long use (a gradation from the attack of Tao-Hong).
Cool blood, disperse abscess
For sore-abscess and stasis-heat binding — clearing both heat and stasis at the blood level.
Remove vexation, calm the spirit
For vexing palpitation and sleeplessness of heat harassing the Heart spirit — the assistant of Bu Xin Dan: one piece with two offices, invigorating blood and calming the spirit.
Classic Pairings
with Tan Xiang — The core of Dan Shen Yin
Dan Shen heavily takes the blood level, Tan Xiang lightly takes the qi level — seven blood, three qi, treating stabbing heart-stomach pain.
with Suan Zao Ren — Movement and stillness calming the spirit
Suan Zao Ren nourishes and stills, Dan Shen moves and clears — for poor sleep of deficiency-vexation with stasis-heat.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

檀香Tan Xiang

Santali Albi Lignum
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛，温。归脾、胃、心、肺经。
气机定位
行 · 畅（行气温中止痛）
方中之职
芳香之木，调膈上诸气、温中止痛——心胃气痛之要药，丹参饮之臣。后下取气。
所在方
丹参饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Heart, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · free qi
Role in Formula
An aromatic wood, regulating the qi above the diaphragm and warming the middle to stop pain — an essential for Heart-stomach qi pain, the minister of Dan Shen Yin. Added last to take its qi.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

金银花Jin Yin Hua

Lonicerae Japonicae Flos
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：银花、忍冬花
性味归经
甘，寒。归肺、心、胃经。
气机定位
出 · 解（清热解毒疏散）
方中之职
甘寒不伤胃、芳香可透邪：清热解毒之首药而兼疏散之性——温病初起（银翘之君）与疮痈热毒两线通用。
所在方
银翘散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, cold. Enters the Lung, Heart, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · resolve
Role in Formula
Sweet-cold without harming the stomach, aromatic and able to vent the pathogen: the foremost heat-clearing toxin-resolving herb with a coursing-dispersing nature — used in both early warm disease (sovereign of Yin Qiao) and sore-abscess heat-toxin.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

荆芥Jing Jie

Schizonepetae Herba
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛，微温。归肺、肝经。
气机定位
出 · 透（祛风解表）
方中之职
风药之平和者：微温不燥、发汗之力轻——寒热两方皆可借用（银翘散中一点辛温助透而不助热，“制性存用”）。炒炭止血。
所在方
银翘散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, slightly warm. Enters the Lung, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · vent
Role in Formula
The even one among wind-herbs: slightly warm and not drying, light in sweat-promoting force — borrowable by both cold and heat formulas (a touch of acrid-warmth in Yin Qiao San to aid venting without abetting heat, "curbing the nature, keeping the use"). Charred it stops bleeding.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

牛蒡子Niu Bang Zi

Arctii Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：鼠粘子
性味归经
辛、苦，寒。归肺、胃经。
气机定位
出 · 利（疏散风热利咽透疹）
方中之职
辛散苦泄而滑：疏散风热、利咽消肿、透疹通便——风热咽痛之专子（银翘之臣）。
所在方
银翘散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, cold. Enters the Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · drain damp
Role in Formula
Acrid-dispersing, bitter-draining and slippery: coursing and dispersing wind-heat, benefiting the throat and dispersing swelling, venting rashes and freeing the stool — the specialist seed for wind-heat sore throat (minister of Yin Qiao).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

芦根Lu Gen

Phragmitis Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘，寒。归肺、胃经。
气机定位
入 · 生（清热生津）
方中之职
苇之根，甘寒质轻多汁：清肺胃之热而生津止渴、除烦止呕——清而不伤、润而不腻，温病护津之平剂（鲜者尤佳）。
所在方
银翘散桑菊饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, cold. Enters the Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · engender fluids
Role in Formula
The root of the reed, sweet-cold, light-substanced and juicy: clearing Lung-stomach heat while engendering fluid to stop thirst and removing vexation to stop retching — clearing without harming, moistening without cloying, an even fluid-protecting formula in warm disease (the fresh is especially good).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桑叶Sang Ye

Mori Folium
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：霜桑叶
性味归经
甘、苦，寒。归肺、肝经。
气机定位
出 · 清（疏风清肺明目）
方中之职
甘苦而凉，轻清疏散：清疏肺络风热（桑菊之君）、平肝明目、兼凉血——温病轻剂与凉肝明目两线之通用轻子。
所在方
桑菊饮沙参麦冬汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, bitter, cold. Enters the Lung, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · clear
Role in Formula
Sweet-bitter and cool, light-clearing and coursing-dispersing: clearing and coursing wind-heat of the Lung collaterals (sovereign of Sang Ju), settling the Liver and brightening the eyes, and also cooling blood — a versatile light seed for both warm-disease light formulas and cooling-the-Liver eye-brightening.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

玉竹Yu Zhu

Polygonati Odorati Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：葳蕤
性味归经
甘，微寒。归肺、胃经。
气机定位
入 · 润（养阴润燥不恋邪）
方中之职
甘润平和：养肺胃之阴而不滋腻、不恋邪——阴虚兼外感亦可用（后世加减葳蕤汤），沙参麦冬汤、益胃汤之佐。
所在方
沙参麦冬汤益胃汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, slightly cold. Enters the Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · moisten
Role in Formula
Sweet-moist and even: nourishing Lung-stomach yin without cloying or lodging the pathogen — usable even in yin deficiency with contraction (the later Jia Jian Wei Rui Tang), an assistant in Sha Shen Mai Dong Tang and Yi Wei Tang.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

贝母Bei Mu

Fritillariae Bulbus
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：川贝、浙贝
性味归经
苦、甘，微寒。归肺、心经。
气机定位
降 · 化（清热化痰润肺散结）
苦甘微寒而质润：化痰药中的“润”派掌门——与半夏成燥润两路（夏主湿痰之燥化、贝主燥痰热痰之润化），痰之寒热燥湿由这对分掌两半。一名两药：川贝甘润力胜（虚劳燥咳久嗽）、浙贝苦泄力胜（风热咳嗽、痰核散结——消瘰丸取浙）。兼散结消肿（瘰疬痈肿）。十八反“贝母反乌头”是其教学要点——与半夏同反乌头，化痰二将同一禁。
功用与机理
润肺化痰止咳
燥咳热咳痰黏难咯——润化之主力（养阴清肺之佐）。
散结消肿
瘰疬痰核痈肿——消瘰丸之“质”层：化核之材。
经典药对
配 玄参 — 滋化散结
玄参滋其本、贝母化其质——消瘰丸君佐之配。
配 知母 — 二母清润
知母清润其上源、贝母化润其痰质——燥热咳嗽之二母散原对。
类药鉴别
化痰药选用半夏竹茹栝楼实
所在方
养阴清肺汤消瘰丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, sweet, slightly cold. Enters the Lung, Heart channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · transform
Bitter-sweet and slightly cold, moist-substanced: the head of the "moist" school of phlegm-transforming herbs — with Ban Xia forming the drying and moistening two lines (Ban Xia governs the drying-transformation of damp phlegm, Bei Mu the moist-transformation of dry phlegm and phlegm-heat), phlegm's cold-heat dry-damp divided between this pair. One name two herbs: Chuan Bei sweet-moist and stronger (taxation dry cough, chronic cough), Zhe Bei bitter-draining and stronger (wind-heat cough, phlegm-node dissipating — Xiao Luo Wan takes Zhe Bei). Also dissipating binds and dispersing swelling (scrofula, abscess). The eighteen incompatibilities' "Bei Mu opposes Wu Tou" is its teaching point — with Ban Xia both opposing Wu Tou, the two phlegm-transforming generals under one prohibition.
Functions & Mechanism
Moisten the Lung, transform phlegm, stop cough
For dry cough and heat cough with sticky hard-to-expectorate phlegm — the main force of moist-transformation (the assistant of Yang Yin Qing Fei).
Dissipate binds, disperse swelling
For scrofula, phlegm-nodes and abscess-swelling — the "substance" layer of Xiao Luo Wan: the material that dissolves nodes.
Classic Pairings
with Xuan Shen — Enrich, transform, dissipate binds
Xuan Shen enriches its root, Bei Mu transforms its substance — the sovereign-assistant pairing of Xiao Luo Wan.
with Zhi Mu — The two Mu, clearing and moistening
Zhi Mu clears and moistens its upper source, Bei Mu transforms and moistens its phlegm-substance — the original pair of Er Mu San for dry-heat cough.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

龙胆草Long Dan Cao

Gentianae Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：龙胆
性味归经
苦，寒。归肝、胆经。
气机定位
降 · 折（泻肝胆实火）
方中之职
大苦大寒之最：上泻肝胆实火、下清下焦湿热——目赤耳肿与阴痒淋浊一药两战场（龙胆泻肝汤之君）。苦寒败胃，中病即止。
所在方
龙胆泻肝汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, cold. Enters the Liver, Gallbladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · cut down fire
Role in Formula
The most greatly bitter and cold: draining Liver-Gallbladder repletion fire above and clearing lower-burner damp-heat below — red eyes with ear swelling and genital itch with turbid strangury, one herb on two battlefields (sovereign of Long Dan Xie Gan Tang). Bitter-cold spoils the stomach, stop once it hits the mark.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

车前子Che Qian Zi

Plantaginis Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘，寒。归肝、肾、肺、小肠经。
气机定位
降 · 利（利水通淋）
方中之职
甘寒滑利：利水通淋、渗湿止泻（利小便以实大便）、兼清肝明目——淋证水肿之常客。包煎。
所在方
龙胆泻肝汤八正散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, cold. Enters the Liver, Kidney, Lung, Small Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · drain damp
Role in Formula
Sweet-cold, slippery and benefiting: benefiting water and freeing strangury, percolating damp and stopping diarrhea (benefiting urine to firm the stool), and clearing the Liver and brightening the eyes — a regular in strangury and edema. Wrap-boiled.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

槟榔Bing Lang

Arecae Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦、辛，温。归胃、大肠经。
气机定位
降 · 坠（下气行滞）
方中之职
质重下坠、行气之力最猛：破滞消积、下气除后重、兼杀虫——芍药汤借其“坠”除里急后重。
所在方
芍药汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, acrid, warm. Enters the Stomach, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · weigh down
Role in Formula
Heavy and sinking, the fiercest in moving qi: breaking stagnation and dissolving accumulation, descending qi and removing heaviness below, and killing worms — Shao Yao Tang borrows its "sinking" to remove the heaviness of dysentery.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

瞿麦Qu Mai

Dianthi Herba
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦，寒。归心、小肠经。
气机定位
降 · 通（利水通淋）
方中之职
苦寒降利：清心与小肠之火、利水通淋——热淋涩痛之专卒（八正散之君）。孕妇忌。
所在方
八正散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, cold. Enters the Heart, Small Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · free
Role in Formula
Bitter-cold, descending and benefiting: clearing Heart and Small Intestine fire, benefiting water and freeing strangury — the specialist soldier for heat-strangury painful dribbling (sovereign of Ba Zheng San). Shunned in pregnancy.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

萹蓄Bian Xu

Polygoni Avicularis Herba
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦，微寒。归膀胱经。
气机定位
降 · 利（利尿通淋）
方中之职
苦降利尿、兼杀虫止痒——与瞿麦为通淋之固定搭档，热淋之常规部队。
所在方
八正散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, slightly cold. Enters the Bladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · drain damp
Role in Formula
Bitter-descending, benefiting urine, while killing worms and stopping itch — a fixed partner with Qu Mai for freeing strangury, the regular troops of heat-strangury.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

桑白皮Sang Bai Pi

Mori Cortex
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘，寒。归肺经。
气机定位
降 · 泻（泻肺平喘利水）
方中之职
桑根之皮：甘寒性降，泻肺中伏火而平喘、利水消肿——泻肺而不伤正之柔剂（泻白散之君），与葶苈之峻泻成轻重两档。
所在方
泻白散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, cold. Enters the Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · drain
Role in Formula
The bark of the mulberry root: sweet-cold and descending, draining latent fire in the Lung to calm wheeze, benefiting water and dispersing swelling — a soft formula that drains the Lung without harming the upright (sovereign of Xie Bai San), forming with the fierce-draining Ting Li a light-heavy pair.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

地骨皮Di Gu Pi

Lycii Cortex
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：枸杞根皮
性味归经
甘，寒。归肺、肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 清（凉血退蒸清肺）
方中之职
枸杞之根皮：甘寒入阴分，退有汗之骨蒸、清肺中深伏之热——虚热实热两清（与丹皮分工：丹皮退无汗之蒸、地骨退有汗之蒸）。
所在方
泻白散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, cold. Enters the Lung, Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · clear
Role in Formula
The root-bark of the wolfberry: sweet-cold entering the yin level, abating sweating steaming-bone and clearing deep-latent heat in the Lung — clearing both deficiency and repletion heat (divided from Mu Dan Pi: Mu Dan Pi abates sweatless steaming, Di Gu abates sweating steaming).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

萆薢Bi Xie

Dioscoreae Hypoglaucae Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦，平。归肾、胃经。
气机定位
行 · 分（利湿分清化浊）
方中之职
分清别浊之专才：膏淋白浊、小便浑如米泔者非它莫属（萆薢分清饮之君），兼祛风湿利关节。
所在方
萆薢分清饮
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, neutral. Enters the Kidney, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · separate turbid
Role in Formula
The specialist for separating the clear from the turbid: for milky strangury, white turbidity and urine murky as rice-water nothing else will do (sovereign of Bi Xie Fen Qing Yin), also dispelling wind-damp and benefiting the joints.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

益智仁Yi Zhi Ren

Alpiniae Oxyphyllae Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：益智
性味归经
辛，温。归脾、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 摄（温肾固精缩尿）
方中之职
辛温固摄：温肾缩尿止遗、温脾摄唾止泻——下元虚寒之尿频遗浊专子（缩泉丸、萆薢分清饮之臣）。
所在方
萆薢分清饮缩泉丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Spleen, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · restrain
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm and consolidating: warming the Kidney to contract urine and stop enuresis, warming the Spleen to restrain drool and stop diarrhea — the specialist seed for lower-origin deficiency-cold urinary frequency and turbid discharge (minister of Suo Quan Wan and Bi Xie Fen Qing Yin).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

石菖蒲Shi Chang Pu

Acori Tatarinowii Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：菖蒲
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归心、胃经。
气机定位
出 · 开（芳香开窍化浊）
方中之职
芳香之窍药：开心窍、化湿浊、醒神志——痰蒙清窍之神昏健忘、湿浊蒙蔽之耳鸣皆倚之；与远志成开窍定志之对。
所在方
萆薢分清饮安神定志丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Heart, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · open
Role in Formula
An aromatic orifice-herb: opening the Heart orifices, transforming damp-turbidity and rousing the spirit-mind — clouded spirit and forgetfulness of phlegm veiling the orifices and tinnitus of damp-turbidity veiling both rely on it; forms with Yuan Zhi an orifice-opening will-settling pair.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

乌药Wu Yao

Linderae Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
性味归经
辛，温。归肺、脾、肾、膀胱经。
气机定位
行 · 温（行气止痛温肾散寒）
辛温行散而独走下焦：行气药大多盘踞中上二焦（陈皮中、香附肝、檀香膈），乌药专司“下”——少腹寒凝之疝痛经痛、膀胱虚冷之尿频遗溺皆其地界。一身两职：行气止痛（膈下逐瘀之腹部行气药）与温肾散寒助气化（缩泉／萆薢分清之温摄翼）——“行中带温、温中能摄”使它在固摄阵中不显突兀：摄而不滞正需这一味动药。
功用与机理
行气止痛
寒凝气滞之少腹痛疝痛痛经——下焦气分之专司。
温肾散寒缩尿
膀胱虚冷之尿频遗溺——缩泉丸之“一行”：气化则能出亦能约。
经典药对
配 益智仁 — 一摄一行
益智温摄、乌药温行——缩泉丸之机关：纯涩则滞、纯行则失。
配 香附 — 上下气对
香附主肝郁之中上、乌药主寒滞之下——膈下逐瘀腹部行气组。
类药鉴别
理气药选用香附益智仁肉桂
所在方
萆薢分清饮缩泉丸膈下逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Lung, Spleen, Kidney, Bladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · warm
Acrid-warm and dispersing, traveling the lower burner alone: most qi-moving herbs occupy the middle and upper burners (Chen Pi the middle, Xiang Fu the Liver, Tan Xiang the diaphragm), and Wu Yao specializes in the "below" — cold-congelation mounting hernia pain and menstrual pain in the lower abdomen, urinary frequency and enuresis from bladder deficiency-cold, are its territory. Two offices in one body: moving qi and stopping pain (Ge Xia Zhu Yu's abdominal qi-mover) and warming the Kidney, dispersing cold and aiding qi-transformation (the warm-restraining wing of Suo Quan / Bi Xie Fen Qing) — "moving with warmth, warming with restraint" makes it unobtrusive in a consolidating array: restraining without stagnating needs just this one moving herb.
Functions & Mechanism
Move qi, stop pain
For lower-abdomen pain, hernia pain and dysmenorrhea of cold-congelation qi-stagnation — the specialist of the lower-burner qi level.
Warm the Kidney, disperse cold, contract urine
For urinary frequency and enuresis of bladder deficiency-cold — the "one mover" of Suo Quan Wan: qi-transformation restored, able both to issue and to restrain.
Classic Pairings
with Yi Zhi Ren — One restraining, one moving
Yi Zhi Ren warm-restrains, Wu Yao warm-moves — the mechanism of Suo Quan Wan: pure astringency stagnates, pure movement loses.
with Xiang Fu — An upper-lower qi pair
Xiang Fu governs Liver-constraint in the middle and upper, Wu Yao governs cold-stagnation below — the abdominal qi-moving set of Ge Xia Zhu Yu.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

独活Du Huo

Angelicae Pubescentis Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛、苦，微温。归肾、膀胱经。
气机定位
行 · 达（祛下焦风寒湿）
方中之职
主下半身之风寒湿：腰膝腿足之痹痛专司——与羌活分工上下（羌上独下），独活寄生汤以之为君冠名。
所在方
独活寄生汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, slightly warm. Enters the Kidney, Bladder channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · outthrust
Role in Formula
Governing wind-cold-damp of the lower body: the specialist for bi pain of the lower back, knees, legs and feet — divided from Qiang Huo by upper and lower (Qiang above, Du below), Du Huo Ji Sheng Tang taking it as sovereign and naming the formula.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

姜黄Jiang Huang

Curcumae Longae Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归脾、肝经。
气机定位
行 · 横（破血行气走肩臂）
方中之职
辛温破血行气而“横行肩臂”：上肢痹痛之引经要药（蠲痹汤之臣）——外散风寒、内行气血一身两职。
所在方
蠲痹汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Spleen, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · traverse
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm, breaking blood and moving qi while "traveling across the shoulder and arm": an essential channel-guide for upper-limb bi pain (minister of Juan Bi Tang) — dispersing wind-cold without and moving qi-blood within, two offices in one.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

蚕沙Can Sha

Bombycis Faeces
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：晚蚕沙
性味归经
甘、辛，温。归肝、脾、胃经。
气机定位
行 · 化（祛湿舒筋和胃）
方中之职
蚕之矢而得桑之气：祛风湿、舒筋络、化湿浊和胃——湿热痹之筋脉拘挛（宣痹汤）与霍乱转筋皆用之。包煎。
所在方
宣痹汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, acrid, warm. Enters the Liver, Spleen, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · transform
Role in Formula
Silkworm droppings gaining mulberry qi: dispelling wind-damp, relaxing the sinews and collaterals, transforming damp-turbidity and harmonizing the stomach — used for both the cramping sinews of damp-heat bi (Xuan Bi Tang) and cholera-cramps. Wrap-boiled.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

柏子仁Bai Zi Ren

Platycladi Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘，平。归心、肾、大肠经。
气机定位
入 · 润（养心安神润肠）
方中之职
柏实之仁，质润多脂：养心血安心神（与枣仁为养神之对：枣仁入肝、柏仁入心）、兼润肠通便——阴血虚之失眠兼便干者一举两得。
所在方
天王补心丹
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Heart, Kidney, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · moisten
Role in Formula
The kernel of the arborvitae seed, moist and oily: nourishing Heart blood and calming the Heart spirit (forming with Suan Zao Ren a spirit-nourishing pair: Suan Zao Ren enters the Liver, Bai Zi Ren the Heart), while moistening the bowel and freeing the stool — hitting two birds in yin-blood-deficiency insomnia with dry stool.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

龙齿Long Chi

Fossilia Dentis Mastodi
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘、涩，凉。归心、肝经。
气机定位
降 · 镇（镇惊安神）
方中之职
化石之齿，与龙骨同源而镇惊之力尤专：惊悸夜惊、魂梦不安者用之（安神定志丸）——齿主镇惊、骨兼收敛，一族两任。先煎。
所在方
安神定志丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, astringent, cool. Enters the Heart, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · weight-settle
Role in Formula
Fossilized teeth, of the same source as Long Gu but especially focused in subduing fright: used for fright-palpitation, night terrors and restless dreams (An Shen Ding Zhi Wan) — the teeth govern subduing fright, the bone also astringes, one kind two offices. Boiled first.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

仙茅Xian Mao

Curculiginis Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛，热，有毒。归肾、肝、脾经。
气机定位
入 · 壮（温肾壮阳强筋骨）
方中之职
辛热性猛，温肾阳、壮筋骨、祛寒湿——二仙汤之一仙。有小毒不宜久服过量，阴虚火旺忌。
所在方
二仙汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, hot, toxic. Enters the Kidney, Liver, Spleen channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · invigorate yang
Role in Formula
Acrid-hot and fierce in nature, warming Kidney yang, strengthening sinews and bones, and dispelling cold-damp — one of the two immortals of Er Xian Tang. Slightly toxic, not for prolonged or excessive use, shunned in yin-deficiency fire hyperactivity.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

淫羊藿Yin Yang Huo

Epimedii Folium
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：仙灵脾
性味归经
辛、甘，温。归肝、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 兴（补肾壮阳祛风湿）
方中之职
辛甘性温，补命门、兴阳道、强筋骨兼祛风湿——二仙汤之二仙，阳痿、宫冷、痹弱通用之温肾主力。
所在方
二仙汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, sweet, warm. Enters the Liver, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · boost yang
Role in Formula
Acrid-sweet and warm, supplementing Ming Men, rousing the yang pathway, strengthening sinews and bones while dispelling wind-damp — the second immortal of Er Xian Tang, the Kidney-warming main force versatile for impotence, cold womb and bi-weakness.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

巴戟天Ba Ji Tian

Morindae Officinalis Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
甘、辛，微温。归肾、肝经。
气机定位
入 · 润（温肾助阳而不燥）
方中之职
甘润微温：补肾阳、强筋骨、祛风湿——温阳药中之柔和者（不似仙茅之燥烈），久服可任。
所在方
二仙汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, acrid, slightly warm. Enters the Kidney, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · moisten
Role in Formula
Sweet-moist and slightly warm: supplementing Kidney yang, strengthening sinews and bones, and dispelling wind-damp — the gentle one among yang-warmers (unlike Xian Mao's drying-fierceness), bearing long use.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

补骨脂Bu Gu Zhi

Psoraleae Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：破故纸
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归肾、脾经。
气机定位
入 · 固（补命门火、温脾止泻）
方中之职
辛温壮火：补命门以暖脾土（四神丸之君——补火暖土的化身）、固精缩尿、纳气平喘——脾肾双温之要药。
所在方
四神丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Kidney, Spleen channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · consolidate
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm and fire-strengthening: supplementing Ming Men to warm the Spleen earth (sovereign of Si Shen Wan — the embodiment of supplement-fire-to-warm-earth), consolidating essence and contracting urine, grasping qi and calming wheeze — an essential for dual Spleen-Kidney warming.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

肉豆蔻Rou Dou Kou

Myristicae Semen
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：肉果
性味归经
辛，温。归脾、胃、大肠经。
气机定位
入 · 涩（温中涩肠）
方中之职
辛温而涩：温中行气、涩肠止泻——久泻虚寒之常客（四神丸、真人养脏汤两见）。煨用去油方涩。
所在方
四神丸真人养脏汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · astringe
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm and astringent: warming the middle and moving qi, astringing the intestine and stopping diarrhea — a regular in chronic-diarrhea deficiency-cold (appearing in both Si Shen Wan and Zhen Ren Yang Zang Tang). Roasted to remove the oil before it astringes.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

罂粟壳Ying Su Qiao

Papaveris Pericarpium
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：米壳
性味归经
酸、涩，平，有毒。归肺、大肠、肾经。
气机定位
入 · 涩（涩肠敛肺止痛）
方中之职
涩之峻者：涩肠固脱、敛肺止咳、止痛——滑脱不禁之最后手段（真人养脏汤之君）。有依赖性、受管制，中病即止，今多以赤石脂石榴皮诃子代。
所在方
真人养脏汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sour, astringent, neutral, toxic. Enters the Lung, Large Intestine, Kidney channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · astringe
Role in Formula
The fierce one among astringents: astringing the intestine and consolidating desertion, gathering the Lung and stopping cough, stopping pain — the last resort for unrestrained slippage (sovereign of Zhen Ren Yang Zang Tang). Addictive and controlled, stop once it hits the mark; today mostly substituted by Chi Shi Zhi, Shi Liu Pi or He Zi.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

诃子He Zi

Chebulae Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：诃黎勒
性味归经
苦、酸、涩，平。归肺、大肠经。
气机定位
入 · 敛（涩肠敛肺利咽）
方中之职
酸涩而苦：涩肠止久泻、敛肺止久咳、开音利咽——涩中带降之品（涩不留邪之相对安全档）。煨用涩肠、生用清肺利咽。
所在方
真人养脏汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, sour, astringent, neutral. Enters the Lung, Large Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · astringe
Role in Formula
Sour-astringent and bitter: astringing the intestine to stop chronic diarrhea, gathering the Lung to stop chronic cough, opening the voice and benefiting the throat — an astringent with descent (a relatively safe grade of "astringing without lodging the pathogen"). Roasted it astringes the intestine, raw it clears the Lung and benefits the throat.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

山楂Shan Zha

Crataegi Fructus
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
酸、甘，微温。归脾、胃、肝经。
气机定位
行 · 消（消食化积活血）
方中之职
消油腻肉积之专才（保和丸之君）：酸甘微温、消食兼活血散瘀（产后瘀痛、疝气亦用）——焦用消食力增。
所在方
保和丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sour, sweet, slightly warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · disperse food
Role in Formula
The specialist for dissolving greasy meat accumulation (sovereign of Bao He Wan): sour-sweet and slightly warm, dissolving food while invigorating blood and dispersing stasis (also used for postpartum stasis pain and hernia) — charred its food-dissolving force increases.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

神曲Shen Qu

Massa Medicata Fermentata
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：六神曲
性味归经
甘、辛，温。归脾、胃经。
气机定位
行 · 化（消食和胃）
方中之职
发酵之曲剂：消酒食陈腐之积、健脾和胃——与山楂莱菔子成“三消”分工（曲主酒谷发酵之积）。丸剂中兼作赋形。
所在方
保和丸
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, acrid, warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · transform
Role in Formula
A fermented leaven preparation: dissolving the accumulation of stale wine and food, fortifying the Spleen and harmonizing the stomach — forming with Shan Zha and Lai Fu Zi the "three digestants" division (the leaven governs the accumulation of fermented wine and grain). Also serves as a binder in pills.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

藿香Huo Xiang

Pogostemonis Herba
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：广藿香
性味归经
辛，微温。归脾、胃、肺经。
气机定位
出 · 化（芳香化浊解表）
方中之职
芳香化湿之首药：外散风寒、内化湿浊、中止呕恶——一药三任（藿香正气之君）；湿浊中阻之呕吐尤专。鲜者解暑力胜。
所在方
藿香正气散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, slightly warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · transform
Role in Formula
The foremost herb for aromatic damp-transformation: dispersing wind-cold without, transforming damp-turbidity within, stopping nausea in the middle — one herb three offices (sovereign of Huo Xiang Zheng Qi); especially focused on vomiting of damp-turbidity obstructing the middle. The fresh wins in dispelling summer-heat.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

白芷Bai Zhi

Angelicae Dahuricae Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛，温。归肺、胃经。
气机定位
出 · 达（散寒燥湿通窍止痛）
方中之职
辛温芳香而走阳明：散风寒、燥寒湿、通鼻窍、止前额眉棱骨痛、消肿排脓——阳明头面之引经要药。
所在方
藿香正气散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, warm. Enters the Lung, Stomach channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Exiting · outthrust
Role in Formula
Acrid-warm, aromatic and traveling to Yang Ming: dispersing wind-cold, drying cold-damp, freeing the nasal orifices, stopping forehead and brow-ridge pain, and dispersing swelling and expelling pus — an essential channel-guide for the Yang Ming head and face.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

大腹皮Da Fu Pi

Arecae Pericarpium
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：槟榔皮
性味归经
辛，微温。归脾、胃、大肠、小肠经。
气机定位
降 · 宽（下气宽中利水）
方中之职
槟榔之果皮：下气宽中、行水消肿——气滞湿阻之脘腹胀满专司（藿香正气之佐），与槟榔同源分工（榔坠积、皮宽胀）。
所在方
藿香正气散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, slightly warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Large Intestine, Small Intestine channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · loosen chest
Role in Formula
The fruit-peel of the areca: descending qi and widening the middle, moving water and dispersing swelling — the specialist for epigastric-abdominal distension of qi stagnation with damp obstruction (assistant of Huo Xiang Zheng Qi), of the same source as Bing Lang with a division of labor (the nut sinks accumulation, the peel widens distension).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

苍术Cang Zhu

Atractylodis Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归脾、胃、肝经。
气机定位
行 · 燥（燥湿运脾祛风湿）
方中之职
燥湿力冠术类：运脾燥湿（平胃散之君）、祛风湿、明目——与白术分工：白术守而补（虚者用白）、苍术走而燥（湿者用苍），术家兄弟各司一职。
所在方
平胃散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Liver channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · dry damp
Role in Formula
The strongest in drying damp among the Zhu herbs: transporting the Spleen and drying damp (sovereign of Ping Wei San), dispelling wind-damp, brightening the eyes — divided from Bai Zhu: Bai Zhu guards and supplements (used in the deficient), Cang Zhu travels and dries (used in the damp), the Zhu brothers each with an office.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

延胡索Yan Hu Suo

Corydalis Rhizoma
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
别名：元胡、玄胡
性味归经
辛、苦，温。归肝、脾经。
气机定位
行 · 止（活血行气止痛）
方中之职
“行血中气滞、气中血滞，专治一身上下诸痛”：气血两行之止痛专才——痛证通用（膈下逐瘀之佐、金铃子散之半）。醋制止痛力增。
所在方
膈下逐瘀汤
Nature, Flavor & Channels
acrid, bitter, warm. Enters the Liver, Spleen channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Moving · stop pain
Role in Formula
"Moving qi-stagnation within blood and blood-stagnation within qi, treating all pains of the whole body": the pain-stopping specialist moving both qi and blood — versatile in pain patterns (assistant of Ge Xia Zhu Yu, half of Jin Ling Zi San). Vinegar-processed its pain-stopping force increases.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

前胡Qian Hu

Peucedani Radix
常用药 ⓘCommon ⓘ
性味归经
苦、辛，微寒。归肺经。
气机定位
降 · 宣（降气化痰兼散风）
方中之职
苦降辛散：降肺气、化痰浊、兼疏散表邪——外感咳嗽痰多之两面手（杏苏散之臣），与柴胡名近而职异（柴升前降）。
所在方
杏苏散
Nature, Flavor & Channels
bitter, acrid, slightly cold. Enters the Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Descending · diffuse Lung
Role in Formula
Bitter-descending and acrid-dispersing: descending Lung qi, transforming phlegm-turbidity, and coursing-dispersing the exterior pathogen — a two-faced hand for contraction cough with copious phlegm (minister of Xing Su San), close to Chai Hu in name but different in office (Chai Hu raises, Qian Hu descends).
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

党参Dang Shen

Codonopsis Radix
核心药 ⓘCore ⓘ
别名：上党人参
性味归经
甘，平。归脾、肺经。
气机定位
入 · 补（平补脾肺之气）
甘平质润，补脾肺之气而兼养血生津——它是“人参的日常替身”，却有自己独立的性格坐标：无人参救脱之峻力（虚脱急证不可代），亦无黄芪走表升举之偏性（纯里虚气弱之的）。一句话定位——“守而润”：守中焦之气（脾虚食少倦怠）、润上焦之津（肺虚气短、气津两伤之口干），性平不燥不峻故可为日常平补之帅。近代方书凡“人参”用于一般气虚者多以党参代之，唯救急、固脱、大补元气三事非人参不可——这条替代边界本身就是最好的补气药选择课。
功用与机理
补中益气
脾胃气虚之食少便溏、倦怠乏力——四君辈可以党参代人参作日常调补，平补而不助火。
补气生津
气津两伤之气短口干、热病后倦怠——甘润兼能生津，较黄芪之温升更宜阴分不足者。
养血
气血两虚之面色萎黄、头晕——气能生血，党参补气以助生血之源（常配当归熟地）。
经典药对
配 黄芪 — 守走相济
党参守里补中、黄芪走表升举——气虚兼表虚下陷者双补里外。
配 白术 — 补运相成
党参补其气、白术运其湿——四君之核（以党参代参之平补版）。
配 当归 — 气血双补
党参补气生血、当归养血活血——气血两虚之基础对。
类药鉴别
补气药选用人参黄芪山药
所在方
Nature, Flavor & Channels
sweet, neutral. Enters the Spleen, Lung channel(s).
Qi Dynamic
Entering · tonify
Sweet-even and moist-substanced, supplementing Spleen-Lung qi while also nourishing blood and engendering fluid — it is "ginseng's everyday stand-in," yet with its own independent character coordinate: it lacks ginseng's fierce desertion-rescuing power (irreplaceable in acute desertion) and lacks Huang Qi's exterior-traveling raising bias (its target is pure interior deficiency with weak qi). One phrase locates it — "guarding and moist": guarding the middle-burner qi (Spleen deficiency, reduced appetite, fatigue), moistening the upper-burner fluid (Lung deficiency, shortness of breath, dry mouth of qi-fluid both harmed), even in nature, neither drying nor fierce, so fit to be the marshal of everyday even supplementation. Modern formularies mostly substitute Dang Shen for "ginseng" in ordinary qi deficiency, with only the three matters of acute rescue, desertion-consolidation and greatly supplementing original qi requiring true ginseng — this substitution boundary is itself the finest lesson in choosing a qi-supplementing herb.
Functions & Mechanism
Supplement the middle, boost qi
For reduced appetite, loose stool and fatigue of Spleen-Stomach qi deficiency — the Si Jun class may substitute Dang Shen for ginseng in everyday regulation-supplementing, evenly supplementing without abetting fire.
Supplement qi, engender fluid
For shortness of breath, dry mouth and post-febrile fatigue of qi and fluid both harmed — sweet-moist and also able to engender fluid, more apt for yin-level insufficiency than Huang Qi's warm-raising.
Nourish blood
For sallow complexion and dizziness of qi-blood dual deficiency — qi can engender blood, and Dang Shen supplements qi to aid the source of blood-engendering (often paired with Dang Gui and Shu Di).
Classic Pairings
with Huang Qi — Guarding and traveling aiding each other
Dang Shen guards the interior and supplements the middle, Huang Qi travels the exterior and raises up — dual interior-exterior supplementation for qi deficiency with exterior deficiency and sinking.
with Bai Zhu — Supplementing and transporting completing each other
Dang Shen supplements its qi, Bai Zhu transports its damp — the core of Si Jun (the even-supplementing version substituting Dang Shen for ginseng).
with Dang Gui — Supplement both qi and blood
Dang Shen supplements qi and engenders blood, Dang Gui nourishes blood and invigorates it — the basic pair for qi-blood dual deficiency.

桂枝汤类方Gui Zhi Tang Class

类方鉴别 · 类别枢纽Formula Class Hub
本类方剂（15）
桂枝汤Gui Zhi Tang
Gui Zhi Tang
汗出·恶风
桂枝加葛根汤Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang
项背强几几·汗出
桂枝加附子汤Gui Zhi Jia Fu Zi Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Fu Zi Tang
汗漏不止·恶风
桂枝去芍药汤Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Tang
Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Tang
误下后胸满·脉促
桂枝去芍药加附子汤Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Jia Fu Zi Tang
Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Jia Fu Zi Tang
误下后胸满·脉微
桂枝加桂汤Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang
气从少腹上冲心（奔豚）·发作欲死复还止
桂枝加芍药汤Gui Zhi Jia Shao Yao Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Shao Yao Tang
腹满·时腹自痛
桂枝加大黄汤Gui Zhi Jia Da Huang Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Da Huang Tang
腹大实痛·痛处拒按
桂枝加厚朴杏子汤Gui Zhi Jia Hou Po Xing Zi Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Hou Po Xing Zi Tang
发热汗出恶风·咳喘
桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤Gui Zhi Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
遗精滑泄·梦交
桂枝甘草汤Gui Zhi Gan Cao Tang
Gui Zhi Gan Cao Tang
发汗过多后心下悸·叉手自冒心
桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li Tang
烦躁·火逆误治之后
小建中汤Xiao Jian Zhong Tang
Xiao Jian Zhong Tang
腹中急痛（喜温喜按）·心悸虚烦
当归四逆汤Dang Gui Si Ni Tang
Dang Gui Si Ni Tang
手足厥寒·脉细欲绝
桂枝人参汤Gui Zhi Ren Shen Tang
Gui Zhi Ren Shen Tang
下利不止·心下痞硬
鉴别主轴
鉴别主轴：营卫天平向哪一侧倾斜 × 病势深入哪一层（表→胸→中→血脉→精关）
桂枝汤是一架天平：桂（出/阳）与芍（入/阴）等量对峙，姜枣草为辅轴。类方的生成规律只有三种动作——移动砝码（加桂/倍芍）、拆除砝码（去芍）、外挂新件（加附/葛/龙牡/饴/朴杏）。看懂每个动作对应的病机移动，十五首方是一首方。
临证决策链（抓手 → 选方 → 推理）
汗出恶风、脉浮缓，别无兼症
→
桂枝汤
营卫失和之原型：卫失固摄、营阴外泄，天平原位调衡即可。
上证＋项背强几几
→
桂枝加葛根汤
兼经输不利、津不上布，外挂葛根升津柔筋。（无汗则换葛根汤底盘）
汗漏不止、小便难、四肢微急
→
桂枝加附子汤
过汗伤及卫阳之根（少阴），外挂附子塞漏固摄——下游诸症不治自复。
误下后胸满脉促
→
桂枝去芍药汤
胸阳被遏，拆除芍药之阴柔，全方转纯阳通散。兼微寒则再挂附子。
气从少腹上冲心（奔豚）
→
桂枝加桂汤
心阳虚而下寒上僭：桂枝砝码加重至五两，以温为降。
误下后腹满时痛
→
桂枝加芍药汤
邪陷太阴、脾络拘急：芍药砝码加倍至六两，重心从卫转营。大实痛再挂大黄二两导滞。
心下悸、叉手自冒心、欲得按
→
桂枝甘草汤
汗多亡心阳：拆到只剩桂草二味辛甘化阳之核。兼烦躁（神浮）则挂龙牡。
腹中急痛喜温按、虚劳悸烦、寒热错杂之虚象
→
小建中汤
中焦化源告竭：倍芍再加饴糖为君，不治两端之乱而独复生化之源。
手足厥寒、脉细欲绝
→
当归四逆汤
血虚寒凝脉道不通：底盘改装为温血脉（去姜倍枣加归辛通草）。脉细与脉微，一字之差分血虚与阳衰。
利下不止、心下痞硬、表证仍在
→
桂枝人参汤
屡下塌其中轴而表未解：理中撑轴为主，桂枝后下解表为辅。
失精梦交、脉极虚芤迟
→
桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤
阴阳不相交固：桂枝汤复其交，龙牡固其滑——先交后涩。
常见误用
最常见的误用是见表证即桂枝汤而不问汗之有无——无汗表实误服桂枝汤，是助其闭郁。第二陷阱是把类方当独立方背诵而不见天平之移动，临证遇到“介于两方之间”的病人便无从下手；记住砝码逻辑，加减便有了自己的尺度。
Formulas in This Class (15)
桂枝汤Gui Zhi Tang
Gui Zhi Tang

桂枝加葛根汤Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang

桂枝加附子汤Gui Zhi Jia Fu Zi Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Fu Zi Tang
汗漏不止·恶风
桂枝去芍药汤Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Tang
Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Tang
误下后胸满·脉促
桂枝去芍药加附子汤Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Jia Fu Zi Tang
Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Jia Fu Zi Tang
误下后胸满·脉微
桂枝加桂汤Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang
气从少腹上冲心（奔豚）·发作欲死复还止
桂枝加芍药汤Gui Zhi Jia Shao Yao Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Shao Yao Tang
腹满·时腹自痛
桂枝加大黄汤Gui Zhi Jia Da Huang Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Da Huang Tang
腹大实痛·痛处拒按
桂枝加厚朴杏子汤Gui Zhi Jia Hou Po Xing Zi Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Hou Po Xing Zi Tang
发热汗出恶风·咳喘
桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤Gui Zhi Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Gui Zhi Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
遗精滑泄·梦交
桂枝甘草汤Gui Zhi Gan Cao Tang
Gui Zhi Gan Cao Tang
发汗过多后心下悸·叉手自冒心
桂枝甘草龙骨牡蛎汤Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Gui Zhi Gan Cao Long Gu Mu Li Tang
烦躁·火逆误治之后
小建中汤Xiao Jian Zhong Tang
Xiao Jian Zhong Tang
腹中急痛（喜温喜按）·心悸虚烦
当归四逆汤Dang Gui Si Ni Tang
Dang Gui Si Ni Tang
手足厥寒·脉细欲绝
桂枝人参汤Gui Zhi Ren Shen Tang
Gui Zhi Ren Shen Tang
下利不止·心下痞硬
Axis of Distinction
Axis of distinction: which way the nutritive-defensive balance-scale tips × how deep the disease has entered (exterior → chest → middle → blood vessels → essence gate)
Gui Zhi Tang is a balance-scale: Gui Zhi (exiting/yang) and Shao Yao (entering/yin) face off in equal measure, with ginger, jujube and licorice as the supporting axle. The class is generated by only three actions — moving a weight (add Gui Zhi / double Shao Yao), removing a weight (drop Shao Yao), or bolting on a new part (add Fu Zi / Ge Gen / Long-Mu / malt sugar / Hou Po-Xing Ren). Grasp which pathomechanism-shift each action answers to, and the fifteen formulas are one formula.
Clinical Decision Chain (Grasp → Choose → Reason)
Sweating, aversion to wind, floating moderate pulse, no other signs
→
Gui Zhi Tang
The prototype of nutritive-defensive disharmony: the defensive fails to secure, nutritive yin leaks out — rebalance the scale at its original position.
The above + nape-and-back stiffness
→
Gui Zhi Jia Ge Gen Tang
Also channel-transport inhibited with fluid not spreading up; bolt on Ge Gen to raise fluid and soften the sinews. (Without sweat, switch to the Ge Gen Tang base.)
Incessant leaking sweat, difficult urination, slight tension of the limbs
→
Gui Zhi Jia Fu Zi Tang
Excess sweat has harmed the root of defensive yang (Shao Yin); bolt on Fu Zi to plug the leak and secure — the downstream signs resolve of themselves untreated.
Chest fullness and a hurried pulse after mistaken purging
→
Gui Zhi Qu Shao Yao Tang
Chest yang is suppressed; remove Shao Yao's yin-softness and the whole formula turns to pure-yang freeing-dispersal. With slight cold, bolt on Fu Zi as well.
Qi surging from the lower abdomen to the heart (running piglet)
→
Gui Zhi Jia Gui Tang
Heart-yang deficiency with lower cold usurping up: the Gui Zhi weight is increased to five liang — descending through warming.
Abdominal fullness with intermittent pain after mistaken purging
→
Gui Zhi Jia Shao Yao Tang
Pathogen sunk into Tai Yin, Spleen collaterals cramping: the Shao Yao weight is doubled to six liang, the center of gravity shifting from defensive to nutritive. For great repletion pain, bolt on two liang of Da Huang to conduct stagnation.
Palpitation below the heart, hands crossed over the heart, desiring pressure
→
Gui Zhi Gan Cao Tang
Excess sweat has collapsed Heart yang: stripped down to just Gui Zhi and Gan Cao, the core of acrid-sweet transforming yang. With vexation-agitation (spirit floating), bolt on Long-Mu.
Urgent abdominal pain relieved by warmth and pressure, taxation palpitation-vexation, deficiency signs of cold-heat complexity
→
Xiao Jian Zhong Tang
The middle-burner source of transformation is exhausted: double Shao Yao and add malt sugar as sovereign, treating not the disorder at either end but restoring the source of engendering alone.
Reversal cold of the hands and feet, thin pulse verging on expiry
→
Dang Gui Si Ni Tang
Blood-deficiency cold-congelation with the vessel-path blocked: the base is rebuilt into a warm-the-blood-vessels formula (drop ginger, double jujube, add Dang Gui-Xi Xin-Tong Cao). A thin pulse versus a faint pulse — one word apart divides blood deficiency from yang debilitation.
Incessant diarrhea, hard focal fullness below the heart, exterior still present
→
Gui Zhi Ren Shen Tang
Repeated purging has collapsed the central axle while the exterior is unresolved: Li Zhong props the axle as the main task, Gui Zhi added last resolves the exterior as assistant.
Seminal loss with dream-intercourse, an extremely deficient, hollow, slow pulse
→
Gui Zhi Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Yin and yang failing to interact and consolidate: Gui Zhi Tang restores their interaction, Long-Mu consolidate the slippage — first interact, then astringe.
Common Misuse
The commonest misuse is reaching for Gui Zhi Tang at any exterior pattern without asking whether there is sweat — giving it in exterior-repletion without sweat abets the constraint. The second trap is memorizing the class members as separate formulas without seeing the scale move; faced with a patient "between two formulas" one is then lost. Remember the weight-logic and modification has its own measure.
← 返回上页← Back首页Home

麻黄剂类方Ma Huang Class

类方鉴别 · 类别枢纽Formula Class Hub
本类方剂（14）
麻黄汤Ma Huang Tang
Ma Huang Tang
无汗·恶寒发热
葛根汤Ge Gen Tang
Ge Gen Tang
项背强几几·无汗恶风
葛根加半夏汤Ge Gen Jia Ban Xia Tang
Ge Gen Jia Ban Xia Tang
表证无汗·呕逆
大青龙汤Da Qing Long Tang
Da Qing Long Tang
不汗出而烦躁·发热恶寒身疼痛
小青龙汤Xiao Qing Long Tang
Xiao Qing Long Tang
咳喘痰稀白多沫·干呕
麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤Ma Xing Shi Gan Tang
Ma Xing Shi Gan Tang
喘咳气粗·汗出
麻黄细辛附子汤Ma Huang Xi Xin Fu Zi Tang
Ma Huang Xi Xin Fu Zi Tang
发热·脉沉
麻黄附子甘草汤Ma Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao Tang
Ma Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao Tang
少阴感寒二三日·无吐利等里证
麻黄杏仁薏苡甘草汤Ma Xing Yi Gan Tang
Ma Xing Yi Gan Tang
一身尽疼·发热日晡所剧
麻黄连轺赤小豆汤Ma Huang Lian Yao Chi Xiao Dou Tang
Ma Huang Lian Yao Chi Xiao Dou Tang
身黄·发热
越婢汤Yue Bi Tang
Yue Bi Tang
一身悉肿·恶风脉浮
越婢加术汤Yue Bi Jia Zhu Tang
Yue Bi Jia Zhu Tang
一身面目肿·小便不利
葛根黄芩黄连汤Ge Gen Huang Qin Huang Lian Tang
Ge Gen Huang Qin Huang Lian Tang
利遂不止（误下后）·喘而汗出
射干麻黄汤She Gan Ma Huang Tang
She Gan Ma Huang Tang
咳而上气·喉中水鸡声（痰鸣辘辘如蛙声）
鉴别主轴
鉴别主轴：麻黄开“出”之路开向何处（皮毛之汗 / 肺气之壅 / 肌表之水）× 兼何种内患（内热 / 内饮 / 阳虚 / 湿邪）
麻黄是经方中的开路之王，但“开”只是动作，方向由配伍决定：配桂枝开汗孔，配石膏弃表专清宣，配附子从少阴向外托，配薏苡缓化其湿，重用配石膏则驱肌表之水。读麻黄剂，先问两个问题：这次开的是哪扇门？门里还藏着什么？
临证决策链（抓手 → 选方 → 推理）
无汗恶寒、身痛脉紧、喘
→
麻黄汤
表闭原型：一个“闭”字生八症，开门（发汗）一法收全功。
上证＋项背强几几；或合病自下利
→
葛根汤
兼经输不利或清气被迫下走：加葛根升津升清。但呕不利者再加半夏。
不汗出而烦躁、脉浮紧
→
大青龙汤
表闭至极而内已化热（寒包火）：麻黄倍量破闭＋石膏清内。脉微弱汗出者禁——此禁忌与方同等重要。
咳喘痰稀白多沫、干呕、无汗
→
小青龙汤
外寒＋内饮：姜辛味结构温化水饮，散中有收。与大青龙同治“外寒内X”，X为热为饮，是两青龙之分野。
汗出而喘、口渴气粗、无大热
→
麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤
热壅于肺：石膏倍麻黄，夺其发表、存其宣肺。汗出而喘＋恶风脉缓者是桂枝加朴杏证，切勿相混。
发热而脉沉、恶寒蜷卧
→
麻黄细辛附子汤
阳虚之体感寒（太少两感）：附子固本、麻黄开门、细辛贯通表里。势缓证轻者以甘草易细辛（麻黄附子甘草汤）。
一身尽疼、日晡所剧
→
麻黄杏仁薏苡甘草汤
风湿在表：麻黄减至半两取微汗——治湿之汗贵缓贵久，峻汗则风去湿存。
身黄发热、无汗、兼表证
→
麻黄连轺赤小豆汤
湿热瘀郁在里而表闭无路：开表即是给湿热放出路，三焦分消。
一身悉肿、脉浮自汗出
→
越婢汤
风水在肌表：麻黄六两非为发汗为发水（开鬼门）。小便不利、肉极湿盛者加术断内源。
误下利不止、喘而汗出、脉促（表未解而里已热）
→
葛根黄芩黄连汤
表里双解：葛根半斤一药两战场、芩连清陷里之热——与葛根汤成寒热镜像。
咳而上气、喉中水鸡声
→
射干麻黄汤
寒饮壅结喉间：射干开豁＋姜辛味化饮＋菀冬止咳——与小青龙以“声”分位。
常见误用
麻黄剂的第一戒律是“有汗不用麻黄”——但麻杏石甘、越婢皆治“汗出”之证，何也？因石膏已夺麻黄发表之性，所用者宣肺发水之能。可见戒律的本体是病机（表虚忌再开）而非药名。第二陷阱是忽视仲景亲书之禁忌：疮家、衄家、亡血家、尺中迟，条条是临床安全红线。
Formulas in This Class (14)
麻黄汤Ma Huang Tang
Ma Huang Tang
无汗·恶寒发热
葛根汤Ge Gen Tang
Ge Gen Tang
项背强几几·无汗恶风
葛根加半夏汤Ge Gen Jia Ban Xia Tang
Ge Gen Jia Ban Xia Tang
表证无汗·呕逆
大青龙汤Da Qing Long Tang
Da Qing Long Tang
不汗出而烦躁·发热恶寒身疼痛
小青龙汤Xiao Qing Long Tang
Xiao Qing Long Tang
咳喘痰稀白多沫·干呕
麻黄杏仁甘草石膏汤Ma Xing Shi Gan Tang
Ma Xing Shi Gan Tang
喘咳气粗·汗出
麻黄细辛附子汤Ma Huang Xi Xin Fu Zi Tang
Ma Huang Xi Xin Fu Zi Tang
发热·脉沉
麻黄附子甘草汤Ma Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao Tang
Ma Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao Tang
少阴感寒二三日·无吐利等里证
麻黄杏仁薏苡甘草汤Ma Xing Yi Gan Tang
Ma Xing Yi Gan Tang
一身尽疼·发热日晡所剧
麻黄连轺赤小豆汤Ma Huang Lian Yao Chi Xiao Dou Tang
Ma Huang Lian Yao Chi Xiao Dou Tang
身黄·发热
越婢汤Yue Bi Tang
Yue Bi Tang
一身悉肿·恶风脉浮
越婢加术汤Yue Bi Jia Zhu Tang
Yue Bi Jia Zhu Tang
一身面目肿·小便不利
葛根黄芩黄连汤Ge Gen Huang Qin Huang Lian Tang
Ge Gen Huang Qin Huang Lian Tang
利遂不止（误下后）·喘而汗出
射干麻黄汤She Gan Ma Huang Tang
She Gan Ma Huang Tang
咳而上气·喉中水鸡声（痰鸣辘辘如蛙声）
Axis of Distinction
Axis of distinction: where Ma Huang opens the road of "exiting" (sweat of the skin-and-hair / congestion of Lung qi / water at the flesh-exterior) × what inner trouble accompanies (inner heat / inner rheum / yang deficiency / damp pathogen)
Ma Huang is the king of road-openers in the classics, but "opening" is only the action; the direction is set by combination: with Gui Zhi it opens the sweat pores, with Shi Gao it drops the exterior and purely clears-diffuses, with Fu Zi it thrusts outward from Shao Yin, with Yi Yi Ren it gently transforms damp, and in heavy dose with Shi Gao it drives water from the flesh-exterior. To read a Ma Huang formula, first ask two questions: which door is being opened this time? And what else is hidden behind it?
Clinical Decision Chain (Grasp → Choose → Reason)
No sweat, aversion to cold, body pain, tight pulse, wheeze
→
Ma Huang Tang
The exterior-closure prototype: one word "closure" breeds eight signs, and one method — opening the door (promoting sweat) — resolves them all.
The above + nape-and-back stiffness; or combined disease with spontaneous diarrhea
→
Ge Gen Tang
Also channel-transport inhibited or clear qi forced downward: add Ge Gen to raise fluid and the clear. But with retching-diarrhea, add Ban Xia.
No sweat with vexation-agitation, floating tight pulse
→
Da Qing Long Tang
Exterior closure at its extreme with heat already forming within (cold wrapping fire): double the Ma Huang to break the closure + Shi Gao to clear within. Contraindicated with a faint weak pulse and sweating — this contraindication is as important as the formula.
Cough-wheeze with thin white frothy phlegm, dry retching, no sweat
→
Xiao Qing Long Tang
Exterior cold + inner rheum: the ginger-Xi Xin-Wu Wei Zi structure warm-transforms water-rheum, gathering within dispersing. With Da Qing Long it treats "exterior cold + inner X," X being heat or rheum — the dividing line of the two Qing Long.
Sweating with wheeze, thirst and heavy breathing, no great heat
→
Ma Xing Shi Gan Tang
Heat congesting the Lung: Shi Gao doubles Ma Huang, stripping its exterior-effusing and preserving its Lung-diffusing. Sweating with wheeze + aversion to wind and a moderate pulse is the Gui Zhi Jia Po Xing pattern — never confuse them.
Fever with a sunken pulse, aversion to cold with curled-up lying
→
Ma Huang Xi Xin Fu Zi Tang
A yang-deficient body contracting cold (dual Tai Yang-Shao Yin): Fu Zi secures the root, Ma Huang opens the door, Xi Xin connects exterior and interior. For a milder, gentler case, replace Xi Xin with Gan Cao (Ma Huang Fu Zi Gan Cao Tang).
Whole-body pain, worse in the late afternoon
→
Ma Xing Yi Gan Tang
Wind-damp at the exterior: Ma Huang reduced to half a liang for a faint sweat — the sweat that treats damp must be gentle and prolonged; a fierce sweat drives out the wind and leaves the damp.
Yellow body, fever, no sweat, with an exterior pattern
→
Ma Huang Lian Yao Chi Xiao Dou Tang
Damp-heat stasis constrained within with the exterior closed and no exit: opening the exterior gives the damp-heat a way out, dispersed through the triple burner.
Whole-body swelling, floating pulse with spontaneous sweat
→
Yue Bi Tang
Wind-water at the flesh-exterior: the six liang of Ma Huang is not for sweat but for water (opening the ghost gate). With inhibited urination and extreme flesh-damp, add Bai Zhu to cut the inner source.
Incessant diarrhea after mistaken purging, wheeze with sweating, hurried pulse (exterior unresolved, interior already hot)
→
Ge Gen Huang Qin Huang Lian Tang
Resolving both exterior and interior: half a jin of Ge Gen fights on two fronts, Qin-Lian clear the heat sunk within — forming a cold-heat mirror image with Ge Gen Tang.
Cough with qi rising, a frog-croak sound in the throat
→
She Gan Ma Huang Tang
Cold-rheum congested and bound in the throat: She Gan opens and clears + ginger-Xi Xin-Wu Wei Zi transforms rheum + Zi Wan-Kuan Dong stops cough — divided from Xiao Qing Long by the "sound."
Common Misuse
The first commandment of Ma Huang formulas is "no Ma Huang where there is sweat" — yet Ma Xing Shi Gan and Yue Bi both treat "sweating" patterns. Why? Because Shi Gao has already stripped Ma Huang of its exterior-effusing nature, and what is used is its diffuse-the-Lung and effuse-water ability. So the commandment is really about the pathomechanism (exterior deficiency forbids re-opening), not the herb name. The second trap is ignoring Zhang Ji's own written contraindications: the sore-ridden, the nosebleed-prone, the blood-depleted, a slow cubit pulse — each a clinical safety red line.

柴胡剂类方Chai Hu Class

类方鉴别 · 类别枢纽Formula Class Hub
本类方剂（7）
小柴胡汤Xiao Chai Hu Tang
Xiao Chai Hu Tang
往来寒热·胸胁苦满
大柴胡汤Da Chai Hu Tang
Da Chai Hu Tang
呕不止·心下急
柴胡桂枝汤Chai Hu Gui Zhi Tang
Chai Hu Gui Zhi Tang
发热微恶寒·支节烦疼
柴胡桂枝干姜汤Chai Hu Gui Zhi Gan Jiang Tang
Chai Hu Gui Zhi Gan Jiang Tang
胸胁满微结·往来寒热
柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
胸满烦惊·谵语
柴胡加芒硝汤Chai Hu Jia Mang Xiao Tang
Chai Hu Jia Mang Xiao Tang
胸胁满而呕·日晡潮热
四逆散Si Ni San
Si Ni San
四逆（指头微寒而身不寒）·或腹痛
鉴别主轴
鉴别主轴：枢机不利向哪个方向偏移——偏表（兼太阳）/ 偏里（兼阳明实）/ 偏虚寒（兼太阴）/ 偏神志（邪扰神明）/ 纯气郁（阳郁致厥）
小柴胡汤是枢机之治的原点：柴芩转枢为核、参枣草护中为盾、姜夏和胃为辅。类方的生成规律是“枢郁不变，兼局各异”——邪从枢机向哪个战场蔓延，就在小柴胡底盘上加挂哪一组模块：兼表挂桂枝汤、兼里实挂枳黄或芒硝、兼脾寒挂姜桂、兼神浮挂龙牡。看清主战场与副战场，七首方是一首方的七种局面。
临证决策链（抓手 → 选方 → 推理）
往来寒热、胸胁苦满、嘿嘿不欲饮食、心烦喜呕——但见一证便是
→
小柴胡汤
枢机不利之原型：柴芩转枢、参枣草固中防传，和解一法独立于汗吐下之外。
上证＋呕不止、心下急、郁郁微烦
→
大柴胡汤
枢郁向里压成阳明之实：去参草之补，挂枳实大黄之通——和解与通下并轨。
发热微恶寒、支节烦疼、微呕、心下支结
→
柴胡桂枝汤
太阳少阳各占一半：两方各取半量并联。两个“微”字即剂量之尺。
胸胁满微结、渴而不呕、但头汗出、便溏
→
柴胡桂枝干姜汤
胆热未清而脾寒已起：柴芩清上、姜桂温中，寒热两端同治。“渴而不呕”定去夏加蒌根。
胸满烦惊、谵语、小便不利、一身尽重
→
柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤
邪弥三焦、神气浮越：小柴胡转枢为中军，龙牡镇神、大黄泻热、苓桂通阳利水三路并进。
少阳阳明同病而其人已虚（误下之后、潮热微利）
→
柴胡加芒硝汤
与大柴胡同病位不同体质：虚人经不起枳黄之破，改芒硝之软润，小柴胡微量护其中。
四逆而仅指头寒、脉弦、胸胁腹气滞诸症
→
四逆散
阳郁致厥，非阳衰：柴枳升降对开其郁，芍草酸甘柔其急。误作阳衰投姜附则助其郁热。
常见误用
柴胡证“但见一证便是”常被反向误用为“见胸胁症状就是柴胡剂”——前提是先确认病在枢机（往来寒热、口苦脉弦等枢机指征），再谈一证定方。第二陷阱在大小柴胡之间：见少阳证叠加便秘就上大柴胡，忘了问体质虚实——柴胡加芒硝汤的存在就是提醒：同一病位，攻法分档。第三，四逆散之厥与四逆汤之厥，一字之差，温疏两途，先摸脉。
Formulas in This Class (7)
小柴胡汤Xiao Chai Hu Tang
Xiao Chai Hu Tang
往来寒热·胸胁苦满
大柴胡汤Da Chai Hu Tang
Da Chai Hu Tang
呕不止·心下急
柴胡桂枝汤Chai Hu Gui Zhi Tang
Chai Hu Gui Zhi Tang
发热微恶寒·支节烦疼
柴胡桂枝干姜汤Chai Hu Gui Zhi Gan Jiang Tang
Chai Hu Gui Zhi Gan Jiang Tang
胸胁满微结·往来寒热
柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
胸满烦惊·谵语
柴胡加芒硝汤Chai Hu Jia Mang Xiao Tang
Chai Hu Jia Mang Xiao Tang
胸胁满而呕·日晡潮热
四逆散Si Ni San
Si Ni San
四逆（指头微寒而身不寒）·或腹痛
Axis of Distinction
Axis of distinction: which way the inhibited pivot shifts — toward the exterior (with Tai Yang) / toward the interior (with Yang Ming repletion) / toward deficiency-cold (with Tai Yin) / toward the spirit-mind (pathogen harassing the spirit) / pure qi-constraint (yang-constraint causing reversal)
Xiao Chai Hu Tang is the origin point of pivot treatment: Chai Hu-Huang Qin turning the pivot as the core, ginseng-jujube-licorice protecting the middle as the shield, ginger-Ban Xia harmonizing the stomach as assistants. The class is generated by "the pivot-constraint unchanged, the accompanying situation varied" — whichever battlefield the pathogen spreads to from the pivot, bolt that module onto the Xiao Chai Hu base: with an exterior, add Gui Zhi Tang; with interior repletion, add Zhi Shi-Da Huang or Mang Xiao; with Spleen cold, add ginger-Gui; with spirit-floating, add Long-Mu. See the main and secondary battlefields clearly, and the seven formulas are seven situations of one formula.
Clinical Decision Chain (Grasp → Choose → Reason)
Alternating chills and fever, chest-hypochondrium fullness, silent unwillingness to eat, vexation with a tendency to retch — a single sign suffices
→
Xiao Chai Hu Tang
The prototype of pivot inhibition: Chai Hu-Huang Qin turn the pivot, ginseng-jujube-licorice secure the middle to prevent transmission, harmonizing-resolution a method standing apart from sweating, vomiting and purging.
The above + incessant retching, urgency below the heart, brooding slight vexation
→
Da Chai Hu Tang
The pivot-constraint pressed inward into Yang Ming repletion: drop the supplementing ginseng-licorice, bolt on the freeing Zhi Shi-Da Huang — harmonizing-resolution and purging on the same track.
Fever with slight aversion to cold, aching joints, slight retching, propping bind below the heart
→
Chai Hu Gui Zhi Tang
Tai Yang and Shao Yang each hold half: the two formulas each at half dose in parallel. The two words "slight" are the measure of the dose.
Chest-hypochondrium fullness with slight binding, thirst without retching, sweating only from the head, loose stool
→
Chai Hu Gui Zhi Gan Jiang Tang
Gallbladder heat uncleared while Spleen cold has arisen: Chai Hu-Huang Qin clear above, ginger-Gui warm the middle, treating cold and heat at both ends. "Thirst without retching" settles the removal of Ban Xia and addition of Gua Lou Gen.
Chest fullness with vexing fright, delirium, inhibited urination, whole-body heaviness
→
Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang
Pathogen pervading the triple burner, spirit-qi floating: Xiao Chai Hu turning the pivot as the central army, Long-Mu subduing the spirit, Da Huang draining heat, Ling-Gui freeing yang and benefiting water advancing on three fronts.
Shao Yang and Yang Ming disease together in an already-deficient person (after mistaken purging, tidal fever with slight diarrhea)
→
Chai Hu Jia Mang Xiao Tang
Same disease-location as Da Chai Hu but different constitution: the deficient cannot withstand the breaking of Zhi Shi-Da Huang, so switch to the softening-moistening Mang Xiao, with a small dose of Xiao Chai Hu protecting the middle.
Reversal cold reaching only the fingertips, wiry pulse, chest-hypochondrium-abdomen qi-stagnation signs
→
Si Ni San
Yang-constraint causing reversal, not yang debilitation: Chai Hu-Zhi Shi open the constraint by ascending-descending, Shao Yao-Gan Cao soften its urgency with sour-sweet. Mistaking it for yang debilitation and giving ginger-Fu Zi abets its constrained heat.
Common Misuse
The Chai Hu maxim "a single sign suffices" is often misused in reverse into "any chest-hypochondrium symptom means a Chai Hu formula" — the premise is first confirming the disease is at the pivot (alternating chills and fever, bitter taste, wiry pulse and other pivot indicators), then speaking of one-sign-decides. The second trap is between Da and Xiao Chai Hu: seeing a Shao Yang pattern plus constipation, one reaches for Da Chai Hu, forgetting to ask about constitutional repletion or deficiency — the very existence of Chai Hu Jia Mang Xiao Tang is the reminder: at the same disease-location, the attacking method has gradations. Third, the reversal of Si Ni San and the reversal of Si Ni Tang are one word apart, warming versus coursing two roads — feel the pulse first.
